E: March 7th: Wildhunt Siege

C: 在入侵现场优雅踱步的女人如同一道谜题，她嘲弄着受害者的同时又残酷地将加害者消灭殆尽。\n通讯里神秘的协助者透露出两人似乎怀抱着某种目的。\n她们的入局是混乱升级的预兆抑或是一段故事的开始？
E: The woman sauntering elegantly across the invasion site is a mystery. She mocks the victims, while also ruthlessly eliminating their oppressors.\n Over their comms, the mysterious helper revealed that the two seem to have some sort of agenda.\nIs their presence a sign of more chaos to come? Or is it the start of a new story?

C: 女人的协助者从暗处走到了台前，这个外貌年幼的少女似乎已经从空间站的数据库里抓住了自己想要的信息。\n目标是回廊深处的房间。\n「星核就在里面？」「它能告诉我们星核在哪里。」
E: The woman's helper emerges from the darkness and steps forward. This young-looking girl seems to have found the information she was looking for in the space station's database.\nThe target is the room in the depths of the corridor.\n"Is that where the Stellaron is?" "It can tell us where the Stellaron is."

C: 先前出手相救的姬子终于登场，她的笃定与从容几乎让你忘了他们也是被卷入这场险境的外来者。\n如今，只有空间站的代理站长艾丝妲知道，这场危机是否已经得到了缓和……
E: Himeko, who helped you before, has finally made her appearance. Her relaxed and confident posture almost makes you forget about the fact that they're also outsiders who were dragged into this crisis.\nAt this point, only Asta, the acting lead researcher of the space station, knows whether the crisis has been adverted...

C: 你睁开眼，发现自己仍在空间站，还好这次不需要再面对什么陌生的天花板。\n刚刚的经历仍在你的脑中盘旋，如果这一切是真的，你希望姬子就在附近。\n你的心中，还有一堆疑问需要她的解答。
E: You open your eyes and find yourself still in the space station, staring at a ceiling that doesn't look so strange.\nYou are living through what just happened. It seems your mind is not playing tricks on you. You wish Himeko was here.\nYou have so many questions to ask.

C: 这一晚虽没有军靴踢踏扰人清梦，可你却被梦中诡谲异常的低语惊醒。\n一连几天里，你的噩梦内容都是如此。这不寻常的巧合使你辗转难眠。\n硬逼着自己睡着只会使你更加焦虑…横竖都睡不着，不如出门散散心吧。
E: Although this night was not disturbed by the sound of the footsteps of the troops, you were abruptly awakened by the eerie whispers in your dream.\nYou've had the same nightmare for several days in a row. This odd coincidence has made it hard for you to fall asleep.\nYou've tried sleeping in all postures, and forcing yourself to sleep will only cause more frustration... Why don't you go outside and take a walk?

C: 令人遗憾的是，这回还是那位深蓝色头发的老朋友担任你们的向导…\n实话说，如果真的是「漆黑的虎克大人」来担任向导的话，或许比桑博更令人安心——\n但现在已经没得选了…硬着头皮跟随桑博前往史瓦罗基地吧。
E: Unfortunately, the old friend with the dark blue hair is still your guide this time...\nTo be honest, you would feel more at ease if Pitch-Dark Hook the Great was your guide...\nBut you don't have a choice now... Looks like you'll just have to go with it and follow Sampo to Svarog's base.

C: 避过城中铁卫的重重眼线，你们终于成功穿过了禁区大门。此处的铁卫全副武装、杀气腾腾，城中巡逻的铁卫与之相比只可称为懒散…\n不过，你注意到他们看见希露瓦后显然收敛了敌意。有朗道家千金的帮助，眼下的铁卫禁区可谓畅通无阻。\n但你们对此地尚不熟悉，先前往高处瞭望地形吧。
E: After avoiding the watchful eye of the Silvermane Guard, you finally arrive at the entrance to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. The Silvermane Guards here are armed to the teeth and hostile. In comparison, the Silvermane Guards patrolling the city appear to be extremely lazy...\nHowever, you notice that they seem significantly less hostile after seeing Serval. With the help of a Landau, no obstacles stood in your way at the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nYou're still not familiar with the area yet. Find a vantage point to observe the terrain.

C: 明明是外宾身份，却要如梁上君子般做抉门斩关的活计。但麻烦到来时，也顾不上体面了。\n太卜司中，留守卜者们人人自危。星核带来的变数已超越了太卜司所能计算的极限。现在，该是问问太卜如何处置的时候了。
E: Though you are guests, you are now breaking down locks and gates like a group of thieves. However, there is no point in being polite when trouble is at your door.\nThe remaining diviners in the Divination Commission are all worried for their own skins. The variables brought by the Stellaron had far surpassed the limits of the Commission's calculation capacities. Now is the time to ask the master diviner about her plans.

C: 「建木」的根系缠紧洪炉，自工造司各处汲取力量，生成名为「丰饶玄鹿」的灵兽拱卫自身。\n一番奋战，你们却发现玄鹿生机不绝，倒地亦能复生。唯有切断其供输来源，方有胜机。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's roots wrap tightly around the furnace and absorb power from all over the Artisanship Commission, creating the Abundant Ebon Deer to protect itself.\nYou discover during battle that the Ebon Deer appears immortal and revives as soon as it is defeated. The only chance you have of victory is to cut off its energy source.

C: 「建木」的根系缠紧洪炉，自工造司各处汲取力量，生成名为「丰饶玄鹿」的灵兽拱卫自身。\n一番奋战，你们却发现玄鹿生机不绝，倒地亦能复生。唯有切断其供输来源，方有胜机。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's roots wrap tightly around the furnace and absorb power from all over the Artisanship Commission, creating the Abundant Ebon Deer to protect itself.\nYou discover during battle that the Ebon Deer appears immortal and revives as soon as it is defeated. The only chance you have of victory is to cut off its energy source.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n你们在「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」吃了个闭门羹，但机灵的桑博立刻想到了替代方案。只是在谜底揭开之前，他委托你收集一些材料…从一台街机里。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nYou're turned away at the door of Peppy Pepeshi's Salon, but the quick-witted Sampo immediately thinks of a back-up plan. However, before this mystery can be unveiled, he entrusted you to collect some materials... from an arcade machine.

C: 流萤看起来似乎很愧疚。她希望带你再去一个地方——不是什么旅游景点，而是只属于她的「秘密据点」——她将在那里道出所有秘密。\n跟上她吧，她看起来没有恶意。
E: Firefly has an extremely guilty look on her. She wants to take you to another place — not a tourist spot, but her very own "secret stronghold." Once there, she will explain all the secrets to you.\nFollow her, as she does not seem to have ill intentions.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你们即将抵达这片空间的尽头，并在这里看到了一位手持拼图的筑梦绅士——拼图中的画面一定藏着让你们逃出生天的办法。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nAs you are about to reach the end of this space, you see a Dreamweaver Gentleman holding a puzzle, within which lies the key to your escape.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你们即将抵达这片空间的尽头，在这里看到了一位手持拼图的筑梦绅士，并利用他打开了通向出口的大门。继续前进吧。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nAs you are about to reach the end of this space, you see a Dreamweaver Gentleman holding a puzzle and use him to open the door to the exit. Continue onwards.

C: 你已抵达自己的结局。\n最后的时光，同████好好道别吧。尽量让自己……\n…死而无憾。
E: You have reached your final end.\nBid your farewells to █████████ in your final moments. Try your best to...\n...Die without regrets.

C: 即便砂金以生命为代价向众人揭示了家族在匹诺康尼的黑暗秘密，但经由万众一心的家族运作，谐乐大典的倒计时仍未中止。这都多亏了你——身为家族（暂时）的骄傲，你现在的一举一动都将牵动整个匹诺康尼的心。\n是时候做你该做的事了，「知更鸟」。
E: Despite Aventurine revealing The Family's dark secrets in Penacony to all at the cost of his own life, the countdown to the Charmony Festival continues thanks to the operations of The Family's united efforts. This is all thanks to you... As the (temporary) pride of The Family, your every move from now will affect the very beating heart of Penacony.\nIt is time to do what you must, "Robin."

C: 在漫漫长夜的尽头，米沙最终拾回自我：「钟表匠」拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔童年美梦中懵懂无知的主角——「钟表小子」的好朋友，一名年轻的学徒，一位未来的列车机修工…同时，也是一位老无名客「开拓」之旅的起点。\n他已完成自己的使命，「钟表匠」已了却最后一桩夙愿。现在，匹诺康尼的未来就掌握在你们的手中。
E: With the passing of an extremely long night, Misha has finally regained his identity: The oblivious main character in the childhood dream of the Watchmaker, Mikhail Char Legwork — Clockie's friend, a young apprentice, a future Express maintenance engineer... Simultaneously, the origin of an old Nameless' Trailblazing journey.\nHe has completed his mission and the Watchmaker has fulfilled his final, long-awaited wish. Now, the future of Penacony is in your hands.

C: 你来到了一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉…这里看起来像是筑梦边境，但如果你没记错，筑梦边境应该没有开设动物园的业务。\n看看这猴子是怎么回事吧，万一折纸大学教课的真是猴子呢？
E: You find yourself on... An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernana Monkeys! Bana bana... Bana bana... This place resembles Dream's Edge, but as far as you remember, there are no zoos in that area.\nCheck out that bizarre monkey. What if it's actually monkeys teaching at Paperfold University?

C: 筑梦艺术课开始了，所幸你的第一个任务不是跟混凝土打交道。课上的一切都很新奇，无论是想象力作画，还是你的忍者同学与猴子老师——看来这次学院之旅是离不开这两个词了。\n动手…不，动脑画出你的大作吧！
E: The Dreamweaving class has started, and thankfully, your first task doesn't involve dealing with concrete. Everything in this class feels fresh, from creative artwork to your ninja classmate and monkey mentor. It seems like these two elements are intertwined in your academic journey.\nUse your hands... or your brain to craft your own masterpiece!

C: 这一点和现实世界极为相似——梦境开始向人们提出完全不合理的要求。\n尝试打破更多的规则，找到余音的来源。
E: This is very reminiscent of the real world... The Dreamscape is starting to make completely unreasonable requests of people.\nTry breaking some more rules to find the source of the Afterechoes.

C: 他们似乎视而不见…莫非，自己已经成为了一道亡魂？那么，又是被何人所害？\n在附近找找关于自己的线索。
E: It seems they do not notice you... Or could it be that you are a ghost? If so, who killed you?\nLook around for clues about you.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 列车车厢受袭迫降，好在我们并无大碍。初步判断，这个世界有文明存在。我们决定提高警惕，探索这片完全未知的土地。
E: The coach was forced to make an emergency landing, but thankfully, we were both unharmed. Our initial assessment suggests that this world contains civilization. We resolve to remain vigilant as we explore this unfamiliar land.

C: 纷争泰坦「尼卡多利」突袭奥赫玛，情急下我们伸出援手，跟随白厄一路击败泰坦眷属、保护居民。
E: Nikador, the Strife Titan, launched a surprise attack on Okhema. In a moment of desperation, we stepped in to assist. Following Phainon's lead, we defeated the Titankin and protected the residents on the way.

C: 在我们准备返回浴宫之时，三月七的照片意外流出，还被奥赫玛的居民们传颂为「粉霞天女」，闹出了不小的风波。
E: As we prepared to return to the bath chamber, March 7th's photographs were unexpectedly leaked, and she was celebrated by the residents of Okhema as the "Rosy Celestial Maiden," causing quite a stir.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 我，不死的迈德漠斯，亡国的王储，纷争的新神…如今已迈上以血作辙的归途。
E: I, the undying Mydeimos, the Last Prince, the new God of Strife... now tread the blood-soaked road home.

C: 遐蝶登门拜访，既是为了散心，也是让{NICKNAME}跟随她取一样东西。\n「暂停逐火之旅」的支持与否，已经成了奥赫玛公民的头等大事。
E: Castorice's visit isn't only for the purpose of relaxation, but also to have {NICKNAME} follow her to claim a certain item.\nThe vote to support pausing the Flame-Chase Journey or not has become the matter of prime importance among the citizenry of Okhema.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be those who fell during Era Chrysea.

C: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
E: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n你当然也记得，你是如何成为一名行刑者，一名督战圣女的。
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nOf course, you also remember how you became an executioner and a Maiden of War.

C: 黑潮的造物连同那位盗火行者在此间步步紧逼，而刻法勒的火种却仍不见踪影。我们选择相信被托付火种的赛飞儿，向着云石天宫不断奔跑。
E: Black Tide Creatures, along with the Flame Reaver, are closing in step by step, yet Kephale's Coreflame remains nowhere to be found. We choose to trust Cipher, who was entrusted with the Coreflame, and keep running toward Marmoreal Palace.

C: 面对将要到来的「灾难」，昔日的白厄做出了选择。\n而这个决断，也将他带向了逐火之旅的开端…
E: Faced with the oncoming "catastrophe," the Phainon of the past made his choice.\nAnd that very decision led him to the start of Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C: 你是不是觉得自己不该在这种地方？没事的，每个人都这样想。
E: Feeling like you don't belong here? It's okay. Everyone feels the same way as you do.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n访问控制节点，上传封装密钥。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nAccess the control node and upload the encapsulated encryption key.

C: 如今翁法罗斯被三重命途之一的「记忆」所裹挟，三月、{NICKNAME}…{F#她们}{M#他们}俩去向不明，能将他们带回的就只有我了。\n如今翁法罗斯迷雾重重，还有一位友人能为我拨云见日。
E: Now Amphoreus is ensnared by the Remembrance, one of the Three Paths, and March and {NICKNAME}... they are nowhere to be found. I'm the only one who can bring them back.\nAmphoreus is shrouded in mystery now, but I have a friend who can help me see through the fog.

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 据遐蝶和赛飞儿所说，黄金裔们在大战结束后便出现在星穹列车之中。或许，这就是史诗落幕前，最后的一次告别机会了。多和伙伴们聊聊天吧，这大概是他们此生唯一一次登上星穹列车的机会了。
E: According to Castorice and Cipher, the Chrysos Heirs appeared on the Astral Express after the great battle. Perhaps this is the last chance to say goodbye before the epic tale comes to an end. Take some time to chat with your companions, for this might be their only opportunity to ever board the Astral Express.

C: 站内向来通过一架电波中继器收发银河讯号，它坐落于怪物驻守的失地，临近名为嘘实埋间的标志性舱室。如今通讯中断，第一要务自然是保证中继器不掉链子。
E: The station has been sending and receiving cosmic signals through an airwave repeater located in the lost territory guarded by monsters. It's been recently known as the signature cabin of the Disposal Site. With communications cut off, the most important task is naturally to ensure that the repeater is functional.

C: 接受艾丝妲的远程协助，了解收容舱段的状况
E: Receive remote assistance from Asta and learn about the condition of the storage zone

C: 在查完梅厄的数据记录后，你本想尽快完成调查。但事与愿违，终端机运行起来比家用网络的信号还要飘忽。无奈之下，你只好继续求助于工程师……
E: You planned to finish the investigation as soon as possible after checking Mare's data record. Unfortunately, the terminal's network signal is so poor that you have to ask for the engineer's help again...

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n意见收集完了，平票。没办法，找希儿决定吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nFinished collecting ideas. It's a split vote. Oh well, let's find Seele and get her to decide.

C: 根据斯薇塔的说法，现场的嫌疑人有四位，会说谎的只有一位。而此刻还在说谎的人最可疑，不是吗？\n外表看似小孩，智慧也确实是小孩，名侦探虎克大人是不靠谱的…你才是真正做决断的人。
E: According to Swetta, there were four suspects at the scene, and only one of them lied. Whoever lies now must be the most suspicious.\nHook is not a detective, but a child... You're the one who makes the decision.

C: 没想到拍卖会上还有矿脉探测器可用的探针，没有比这更合适的礼物了，快去告诉虎克大人吧。\n又能将大熊玩偶「菌菌」卖掉，又能买到合适的礼物，世界上怎么会有这样两全其美的事呢？
E: You didn't expect to find a probe for the vein detector at this auction. This is a great gift, so you decide to tell Hook about it.\nNow you can sell the toy bear "Junjun" and buy a perfect gift. Great!

C: 卢卡在和史瓦罗的对决中战至昏迷。醒来之后，他仍然不愿意向你和希儿透露这些「试炼」背后的真正意图。\n你决定去向最了解卢卡的人——他的师傅奥列格——打听一下，看看这个年轻搏击手最近是否表现出了异常的一面。
E: Luka fought until he passed out in his battle with Svarog. He still refuses to tell you and Seele the true purpose behind his "trial" even after he woke up.\nYou decide to ask Oleg, his trainer, whether Luka's been acting weird recently.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第一个目标是…帮忙打杂。和机械师卡西迪聊聊，看看你们该如何帮他走出困境。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe first goal of the trial is to... help with chores. Chat with Cassidy the mechanic and see how you lot can help him out of this crisis.

C: 你帮助贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆找回了一件珍贵的失窃展品。\n从佩拉处得知，博物馆临近开放，现在正缺一位兼职的运营经理。\n这项业余活动提起了你的兴趣，去和博物馆的大堂助理艾丽斯打个招呼吧。
E: You helped the Belobog History and Culture Museum recover a valuable stolen artifact.\nYou learn from Pela that, as the museum is about to open to the public, they need a part-time operation manager.\nThis after-hours activity piques your curiosity. Go and say hello to Eris, the museum's lobby secretary.

C: 工业展区的雕塑「齿轮与智慧」失窃了，你和佩拉来到下层区的机械聚落调查此事。\n没想到，你们居然从故障的机器人体内发现了「齿轮与智慧」的组件。\n收集零件的过程过于缓慢且痛苦…你们打算去找史瓦罗打听一下情况。
E: The sculpture Gears and Wisdom in the Industrial Exhibit was stolen. Pela and you arrive at the Robot Settlement in the Underworld to investigate this matter.\nYou did not expect to find parts of Gears and Wisdom inside the malfunctioning robot.\nThe process of collecting parts are long and arduous... You plan to go find Svarog and ask about the situation.

C: 艾丝妲对黛青小姐企图绕过经纪人直接与你们交流一事有所怀疑，为了以防万一，在流云渡见到黛青之前，先找到经纪人，看看有没有什么消息。
E: Asta is suspicious of Ms. Daiqing's attempt to circumvent her manager and communicate with you directly. Just in case, find Daiqing's manager to see if there is any news before meeting Daiqing at Cloudford.

C: 根据寻物启事上的说法来看，失主是「工造司匠人小聪」，要不要去问问他到底发生了什么事？\n寻物启事上写着「有重谢」，你这样充满着探索精神之人总得看看这礼有多重吧？\n当然，最重要的是，你有一颗乐于助人的心。
E: According to the lost-and-found notice, the owner is "Cong, craftsman of the Artisanship Commission." Maybe you should ask him what happened.\nThe words "Big Reward" is written on the lost-and-found notice. For one who is brimming with the spirit of exploration such as yourself, you have to see what this big reward is, right?\nOf course, the most important thing is that you have a willing heart to help others.

C: 小聪决定再去表白一次，这一次他会带上用心准备的礼物，和一颗真诚的心。总之，现在就出发去买礼物。\n在听完了你的一通分析之后，小聪立刻有了精神气，小聪可真是一个单纯的小伙子呀。\n那么，静斋到底知不知道呢？
E: Cong decided to confess once again, this time with a carefully prepared gift and a sincere heart. Anyway, set off now to buy the gift.\nAfter listening to your analysis, Cong immediately regained his spirits. Cong is really a simple young man. \nIf so, does Jingzhai really know?

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 钟珊将你引荐给大善人们，却引起了大善人之间的争执…这事真和你没关系，不然还是趁早溜了吧。
E: Zhongshan introduced you to the Benevolent Ones, but it caused a dispute among them... This really has nothing to do with you, so you should probably slip away as soon as possible.

C: 云璃的爷爷怀炎将军似乎打算瞒着云璃接收异乡送回的宝剑。不管有没有什么隐情，云璃是不会错过「传奇宝剑」的。\n和云璃聊聊吧，她肯定对赠剑仪式很感兴趣——准确来说，有机会一睹宝剑真容，对她这样的剑客来说很有吸引力。
E: Seems like General Huaiyan is planning to accept the repatriation of the sword while keeping it a secret from his granddaughter, Yunli. Even if there's a catch, Yunli would never miss an opportunity to lay her eyes upon the legendary sword.\nChat with Yunli. She'll want to be at the sword-gifting ceremony... Well, she's a swordmaster after all. She'd definitely want to catch a glimpse of the great sword.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 在彦卿的陪同下，你们终于见到了景元，得知罗浮仙舟在建木灾异之后重开演武仪典的用意，更得知了来自朱明与曜青两座仙舟的将军前来观礼的消息。\n所谓来者不善，大概如是了。
E: Accompanied by Yanqing, you all finally gained a meeting with Jing Yuan, learning the purpose of the Wardance's revival after the Ambrosial Arbor crisis. You also learned of the generals of the Zhuming and Yaoqing coming forth to observe the ceremony.\nTheir motives were anything but earnest.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 另一边厢，神策府中，曜青将军飞霄召见列车团的成员，询问建木灾异的始末。\n没有想象中咄咄逼人的气势，这位将军抵达罗浮的目标，或许从一开始便不在此处——她想要的，是确认景元的忠诚从未改变。
E: Within the Seat of Divine Foresight, the Yaoqing's general Feixiao summons the Express crew to inquire about the whole story surrounding the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis.\nThere's none of the terseness that one might expect. The general's objective upon arrival on the Luofu might not have been here in the first place — all she wants to ensure is that Jing Yuan's loyalty has not changed.

C: 在释放诱饵后，天击将军真正的追猎开始了。云骑军锁定呼雷的所在，开赴长乐天。而呼雷所宣告的袭击也即将开始。
E: With the bait set, the Merlin's Claw's true hunt begins. Having locked onto Hoolay's whereabouts, the Cloud Knights depart for the Exalting Sanctum. However, Hoolay's promised assault is also set to begin.

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。\n巨大的震动仿佛一个警告，危机悄然降临。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.\nA tremendous quake seems to herald the silent arrival of danger.

C: 在等待出发的日子里，庞德为柯柯娜准备了一些东西。
E: As you await the departure day, Pound has prepared something for Cocona.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 螺丝咕姆给你的信物似乎让查德威克想起了他的过往。\n使用钟表把戏进入他的心绪空间，亲身经历他曾经历过的一切吧。
E: Screwllum's keepsake seems to have awakened Chadwick's memories.\nUse the Clockwork to enter his Emoscape and relive his experiences.

C: 那张照片或许和「湛蓝爵士」有着密切关系，回去找它求证下吧。
E: That photo is probably closely related to Dr. Blues. Go back to ask him for a confirmation.

C: 家族秘书有些事情要与你见面详谈，这似乎与「晖长石号」的所有权转交问题有关。
E: The Family's secretary has something to discuss with you in detail in person. It seems to be about the transfer of Radiant Feldspar's ownership.

C: 姬子发来消息，列车组现在已经成为了匹诺康尼集团的小股东。\n老实说，你并不知道这到底意味着什么…但你还是决定前往酒店耀武扬威一番。
E: Himeko has sent you a message, informing you that the Crew has become a minority shareholder of Penacony Conglomerate.\nWhile you have no idea what that exactly means... you decide to head to the hotel to assert your newfound status.

C: 埃美丽开始学习如何与人聊天，还是用短信帮她复习下之前所学的内容吧。
E: Emily is starting to learn how to chat with people. Use text messages to help her revise what she has learned.

C: 埃美丽想精进与人沟通的知识，请你再教教她吧。
E: Emily wants to improve her interpersonal communication skills. Keep on teaching her.

C: 行政区的华劳斯似乎在为某件事烦恼……\n作为热心的开拓者，你准备去打听一下他的近况。
E: Wallace in the Administrative District seems to be worried about something...\nAs one helpful Trailblazer, you plan to ask how he has been lately.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n他希望能和流动法官费尔多交朋友，还想派你去和他交涉——好人做到底，你决定帮他这个忙。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe wants to be friends with the roaming judge, Furdo, and would like you to talk to him — You decide to help him the whole way through.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n他希望能和房地产中介拉雯妮交朋友，还想派你去和她交涉——好人做到底，你决定帮他这个忙。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe wants to be friends with the real estate agent, Lavonne, and would like you to talk to her — You decide to help him the whole way through.

C: 前往磐岩镇，调查奇怪的地方，也许你能找到马克西姆丢失的记忆……
E: Head to Boulder Town to investigate the strange place. Maybe you'll be able to find Maxime's lost memories...

C: 尤利安要求你帮忙派送「地火」剩下的订单。虽然不知所谓，但乐于助人总是好事…大概吧？
E: Julian asks you to deliver the remaining orders of "Wildfire." You don't know why, but it's good to help those in need... right?

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 你还真在列车里发现了奇怪的东西——一面镜子。\n为什么别人都对这面镜子熟视无睹呢？
E: You actually did discover something weird aboard the Express — a mirror.\nWhy is everyone turning a blind eye to this mirror?

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 请与界种科室长辛克尔沟通，帮忙补足列车物资。
E: Speak with the head of Department of Ecology, Hinkel, and help to replenish provisions on the Express.

C: 你设身处地为帕姆着想，再三挑选过后，你为帕姆买到了最适合帕姆喝的饮料（你认为）。不知道帕姆喝下去会有什么反应呢，帕姆会吧咂嘴吗？莫名地，你开始期待着帕姆的反应……
E: After placing yourself in Pom-Pom's shoes and giving the choices a lot of thought, you have bought the perfect drink (in your opinion) for Pom-Pom. What would Pom-Pom's reaction be when they drink it? Would Pom-pom smack their lips? You find yourself eagerly anticipating Pom-Pom's response...

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 「人们做不到一起死去。即使同时亡故，他们也只是各自面对了自己的死亡。」\n——见证珀里法斯的朋友们被黑潮杀死的最后时刻。
E: "People cannot manage to die together. Even if they die at the same time, they are simply facing their own respective deaths."\n— Witness Periphas' friends' final moments as the black tide killed them.

C: 将存有疑点的调查结果告知珀里法斯。
E: Let Periphas know of the suspicious conclusions from the investigation.

C: 现在，继续深入黎明云崖、向负世泰坦的所在进发吧。
E: Now, proceed further into Dawncloud toward the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 你们终于来到了最靠近刻法勒的地方，试着和它说说话吧。
E: You've finally reached the closest spot to Kephale. Try speaking with it.

C: 「刻法勒」的声音有些可疑…或许该悄悄去声源处调查看看。
E: Something seems suspicious about "Kephale's" voice... Perhaps we should quietly investigate its source.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了鼹鼠党老大——漆黑的虎克大人。代她们前往磐岩镇，了解漆黑的虎克大人是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on the boss of The Moles, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great. Head to Boulder Town in their stead, and see whether Pitch-Dark Hook the Great is interested in the position.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是列车中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something aboard the Express...

C: 西衍先生朗声道：「如今材料已经备齐，是时候锻造出神兵利器，彻底斩断烬灭祸祖的痴心妄想了！」
E: Mr. Xiyan loudly declares: "Now the materials have all been gathered, it is time to forge the divine weapon and completely destroy the Ruin Author's delusional plots!"

C: 在司辰宫里的商业区开发竞标已经结束了，迄今为止的一切努力是否有结果，就等司辰宫方面的消息了。\n从小习武从军的素裳可能也没想到自己有一天能站在谈判席上，找她再聊聊吧。
E: The open bidding in the Palace of Astrum for the Commercial District has concluded. As for whether all your hard work thus far will pay dividends, that needs to wait until the Palace of Astrum makes its formal announcements.\nThe ever-martial Sushang probably never expected that she would end up as a negotiator one day. Find her and speak with her.

C: 帮助商会完成码头营收的任务，建立商铺与商会的合作，规划合理的路线…这都将帮助金人巷实现复兴。\n金人巷商会通过码头运营赚取储值金，至少应该先挣到目标金额，帮助商会摆脱眼前的危机。
E: Help the merchant guild reach the dock's revenue goal, build up cooperation between the guild and the stores, plan reasonable routes... All these tasks will help revitalize Aurum Alley.\nThe Aurum Alley Merchant Guild accumulates funding through operating the docks. You should prioritize reaching the revenue goal and help the guild overcome their immediate crisis.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说卖小吃的高阿姨和商会建立合作关系。但高阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Tall Auntie, who sells snacks, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Tall Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。接下来，他们将正式开启本次为模拟宇宙制作的三个片段的「位面」！
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Following that, they will officially initiate the three sections of "planes" developed for this version of Simulation Universe!

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 信念与希望足以构成通往胜利的桥梁。在踏上擂台之前，你还有时间从朋友的支持中汲取力量。
E: Faith and hope are more than sufficient materials to build a bridge toward eventual success. Before you rise to the arena, you still have time to draw strength from the support of your friends.

C: 太卜用「寻径指津」喻示「命运之中」的人，纵使有着太多选择，但想要前进便只能沿着唯一的道路。\n她固执地将自己置于牛角尖之中，你能做的便是用她的规则和理念打破她的固执。\n规则就是用来打破的，去完成「寻径指津」挑战吧。
E: The master diviner uses "Pathfinder" to show omens to people whom destiny beckons. Despite the numerous choices they encounter, one must walk the only path in order to progress.\nShe has stubbornly holds on to her own believes, and the only thing you can do is to break her obsession by using her own rules and reasoning.\nRules are meant to be broken. It is time to overcome the Pathfinder challenges.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」上无奇不有，比如能够「将活人从现世带走」的幽灵星槎。按照帖子的线索去迴星港调查一番，想必与岁阳脱不了干系。
E: The Ghostly Grove offers a myriad of uncanny stories, including an enigmatic Phantom Starskiff that eradicates the existence of living beings from the mortal world. It would be wise to follow the clues in the post and investigate in Stargazer Navalia, as it is highly possible that a heliobus is involved.

C: 粉丝寄来了礼物？这可真是意外。\n看来桂乃芬没有做错。去收下粉丝的心意吧，这是你应得的。
E: A present mailed by a fan? That's surprising.\nLooks like Guinaifen didn't do anything wrong. Go accept the fan's gift. That's something you deserve.

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n小星星准备了用于模拟的空间，希望向你展示怪物们的生存状况，去听听它有什么想说的吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offers you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nStarlet has prepared a space used for simulations, hoping to show you how the monsters are surviving. Go and hear what it has to say.

C: 这装文件的宝箱，不会是工厂批发的吧？
E: Could this chest full of files have been dispatched from the factory?

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n本层的拍摄已经完成，去下一个片场吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nFilming on this floor has concluded. Go to the next location!

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 艺术是与生俱来的礼物，人们会编织艺术，一如婴孩会呼唤母亲。
E: Art is an innate gift. People create it just as naturally as infants call for their mothers.

C: 和驭空交谈，进入最后的战斗。愿丹轮高悬，照彻尘心。
E: Speak with Yukong and enter the final fight. May the claret wheel hang overhead, illuminating mortal hearts.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 匹诺康尼大剧院里的雕塑数不胜数，应该拍摄其中的哪个好呢？
E: There are countless sculptures in the Penacony Grand Theater. Which one should you snap a picture of?

C: 你们越走越深，来到了一片颇为空旷的房间。
E: As you enter deeper and deeper, you find yourself in an open and spacious room.

C: 没想到缇宝率领的奇美拉小队居然后来居上，占据了第二名的位置…但你还有不少时间，努力工作来击败她吧！
E: Surprisingly, Tribbie's chimera squad secured second place... But there's still time to turn the tables. Work hard and outperform her squad!

C: 「黑潮」事件顺利解决，却留下了更多谜团。\n继续比赛，赢得前往淘汰赛的入场券「银盏徽章」，或许就能让真相水落石出。
E: The black tide incident has been resolved, but more mysteries still remain.\nContinue the competition and win the Silver Chalice Badge, the ticket for the knockout stage. That might uncover the truth.

C: 虽然奖杯被窃让你有些心痛，但还有冠军的荣耀等待你去角逐。前往赛场，准备开始冠军赛吧。
E: Although the stolen trophy pains you, the glory of the championship still awaits. Head to the competition area and get ready for the final match!

C: 家族还挺识相的，知道你没赛车，为你赶工定制了专属赛车。只是没想到这一轮的对手会是空间站的老熟人，还好对方车技一般没有放水，你轻而易举地拿下了晋级名额。
E: The Family is quite understanding, they know that you don't have a car of your own, so they swiftly made you an exclusive one. Who would have thought that you'll go against a familiar face from the space station in this round? Thankfully, they've never hidden their skills at racing, and you advanced with ease.

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 舒翁口中的「特调配方」究竟有什么秘密？既为了解开疑问，也为了证明自己的实力，你决定按照配方调制这份「能让饮用者对任何事表示赞同」的调饮。
E: What secrets lie within Siobhan's "special recipe"? To unravel this mystery and prove your own abilities, you decide to mix this drink that "makes anyone who drinks it agree to anything" according to the recipe.

C: 花火自告奋勇替你调制「特调配方」，这果然又是她恶作剧的一部分。赶紧回临时吧台看看吧，希望你缺席的这段时间里，她还没把吧台闹得天翻地覆……
E: Sparkle volunteered to mix the "Special Mix Recipe." That was obviously part of her prank. You'd better check on the makeshift bar. Hopefully she hasn't turned the whole place upside down while you were away...

C: 花火为你记录了「梦乡」配方的两种不同功效。这份配方已尝试完毕，回到临时吧台，准备接待最后一位客人吧。
E: Sparkle has recorded the two different effects of the "Dreamland" recipe for you. Now that you've finished testing this recipe, head back to the temporary bar to serve your last guest.

E: Inspect the suspicious starskiff

E: Leave Chadwick's Emoscape (1F)

C: 渐入佳境•中段
E: Budding Splendor: Progression

C: 距离第二次试剑
E: Time to Second Sword Trial

C: 距离第二次试剑
E: Time to Second Sword Trial

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 开心点，{NICKNAME}。搭乘星穹列车可是非常难得的体验…
E: Cheer up, {NICKNAME}! It's not every day someone gets to ride on the Astral Express...

C: 我们该怎么办…
E: What should we do...

C: 被冰雪覆盖的星球…我想找的答案会在这里吗……
E: A planet covered in snow and ice... Will I find my answer here...?

C: 列车上有我和帕姆值守，也够了。
E: Pom-Pom and I are more than capable of looking after the Express.

C: 再说，你和我们又没什么交情，星核猎手清不清白和咱们有什么关系~
E: Also, we're not your friends. Why should we care if a Stellaron Hunter is innocent, hmm~?

C: 对了，我刚刚跟丹恒打了招呼，也跟你通个气哈：咱们到时候一起投反对票！
E: Oh yeah, I just spoke to Dan Heng, here's the deal: We've all gotta vote against!

C: 是的，还在重复——啊，好了！
E: Yes, it's still on repeat... Ah! There we go.

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 什么呀，一点都不热情……
E: Good to see you too...

C: 你看见空间站的标志，好像一只耳机把鸡蛋砸破了洞。
E: You see the emblem of the space station. It looks like an earphone that has cracked a hole in an egg.

C: 点击任务栏图标
E: Click the icon on the taskbar

C: 这里到处都是稀奇的玩意儿，也就是所谓的「奇物」。黑塔收集这些东西又不用，净搁这儿吃灰，也不知道图啥。
E: This place is full of fancy little gadgets — Herta's collection. I really don't get why she'd go out of her way to collect them and then leave them here to gather dust...

C: 走！
E: Go!

C: 大多数人都是仰慕黑塔女士来到空间站的，现在联系不上她，也没有余地让他们联系家人，只希望他们能挺过这次危机。
E: Most of them came to the space station because they admired Madam Herta. But now they can't reach her or even their own families. I just hope they can all survive this crisis.

C: 请受伤的科员切勿随意移动，医护人员马上就到…插入一则紧急通知。
E: All injured researchers, please stay where you are. Medical staff will be arriving immediately... Here's an emergency notice.

C: 眼睛好奇地来回打量，仿佛看穿了一切藏匿于深处的答案。「<unbreak>0.011</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The gun's gaze sweeps back and forth with measuring intent. It seems to have gleaned answers hidden somewhere deep. "<unbreak>0.011</unbreak> points!" It declares.

C: 你的性格倒是挺好的，有什么价值吗？——别误会，我不是在嘲讽你。这是个疑问句，就是说，它可能真的有价值，只是我不知道。
E: While you may have good character, do you have any value? Don't take that the wrong way, I'm genuinely asking you. You might have some value, I just don't know about it.

C: 你能这么想，这很好。拥有这样的想法并付诸行动的人，是真正意义上的英雄。
E: It's good that you think so. Someone with that mindset and the actions to back it up — that is the true meaning of the word "hero."

C: 你可以去找他们哦，年轻人融洽相处吧。
E: You can go look for them. You youngsters should get along well.

C: 列车跃迁还有些准备工作要做。我暂时抽不开身，你就自己到处走走吧。
E: Pom-Pom still needs to prepare for the Express' warp jump. You can look around the place yourself.

C: 关于丹恒…
E: About Dan Heng...

C: 关于星核…
E: About Stellarons...

C: 俱乐部的四位天才联手编写了一个程序，看见办公室里那台大机器了没有？机器有一个宇宙：它就像我们身处的世界一样，只不过更精简，更定制化……
E: The four geniuses of the society wrote a program together. You see the big machine in the office? That machine contains a universe, just like the universe we live in, but it's more streamlined and customized.

C: 那是一种突然降落在各个世界的物质，它的出现就意味着灾祸。我们途经的许多星球都遭受了星核的毒害。
E: Objects that fell from the blue on separate worlds. Their appearance spelled disaster. Many of the planets we've visited have suffered their effects.

C: 那我回房间啦。列车熄灯了！
E: Well, I'm off to my room then. Express lights off!

C: 不管它是什么材质，反正肯定不是冰雕。
E: Whatever it's made of, it can't be ice.

C: 啊？噢，对，是有这么回事……
E: Ah? Oh, yes, that's right...

C: 嗨，菲丝！最近生意怎么样？
E: Hi Fizz! How's business?

C: 啊，你是来取那本书的吧？不好意思呢，出版社那边似乎出了点问题，我还没收到货呢。
E: Ah, are you here to pick up that book? Sorry, there seems to be something wrong with the publisher. I haven't received it yet.

C: 不管怎么样——谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！这张有趣的照片，我一定会好好珍藏的。
E: Anyway, thank you, {NICKNAME}! I will definitely treasure this interesting photo.

C: 筑城者们认为，有必要以更符合礼节的方式称呼各位。「外来者」这几个字，听上去终究有些疏远。
E: The Architects think it's only right that we should address you properly. "Outsiders" is hardly fitting anymore.

C: …不不，我还不想离开这儿。什么，艾普瑟隆？那种纸醉金迷的地方有什么乐子好找？「越能体现人性尊严的快乐，越是高级的快乐」——这才有趣！
E: ...No no, I'm in no hurry to leave. What? Oh, Epsilon? Pff. What fun can you get out of a giant vanity fair like that? "True happiness always entails the manifestation of the dignity of mankind..." Now that's a quote I live by.

C: 这张照片就送给你们吧，就当作是列车组的临别礼物。
E: Here, keep it... a little farewell gift from the Astral Express.

C: 那是当然。还在下层区的时候，我就看出来了。
E: No doubt. I figured that out back in the Underworld.

C: 离开…？这么快？我以为你们还能再多待几天，至少等到情况稳定下来……
E: Leave...? So soon? I thought you'd stay for a few more days — at least until everything had calmed down...

C: 毕竟有免费的下午茶…
E: I never say no to a free afternoon tea...

C: …你怎么还记得这茬呀？
E: Uh... You still remember that?

C: 小暖炉原本的主人，是我们朗道家的一位祖先，兰黛尔•朗道。她可是七百年前贝洛伯格保卫战里大放异彩的英雄之一。
E: Its original owner was an ancestor of the Landau family — Rhonda Landau. She was one of our great heroes who participated in the Defense of Belobog <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago.

C: 我倒也不是怕会寂寞——毕竟有你们送的那个…呃，通讯装置。如果真想她的话，我随时发短信就好了。
E: I'm not afraid of being alone. After all, there's that, uh... communication device you gave me. If I really miss her, I can send her a message whenever I want.

C: 如果您想要它平安回来，请在本周六下午三点，把<unbreak>100</unbreak>元藏在你家壁橱顶上被夫人锁住的箱子里那根钓竿的杆身内，带着这根钓竿出门，我会再和你联系。
E: If you want them returned to you in the same condition, hide <unbreak>100</unbreak> shield within the shaft of the fishing rod inside the chest locked by your wife on top of your wardrobe. At 3:<unbreak>00</unbreak> PM this Saturday, leave your home with the fishing rod and I will contact you again.

C: 你注意到随着你的接近，守卫的眼神变得炽热起来。
E: As you approach, you see a light flicker in the guard's eyes.

C: 总有人会来处理它——其实，你很确定，当你下次来到这个邮筒时，就不会再看见它了。
E: Someone will come and deal with it. In fact, you're certain you won't see that letter again the next time you come to this mailbox.

C: 有一瞬间，你甚至觉得垃圾桶变成了宝箱。
E: For a moment, the trashcans turn into treasure chests.

C: 有人需要的时候他就会出现；有人「需要」的时候他就会消失——我只知道这么一个规律。
E: When people need him, he appears, and when people really need him, he disappears. Sampo's first and second laws of motion.

C: 我该如何找到「地火」？
E: How can I find them?

C: 我当时困得要死，没跑几步路就被一个家伙擒住了。还好「地火」出手相助，要不然我连这身工作服都要被扒走了！
E: At the time I was exhausted — I'd hardly run a few feet when one of them caught me. If it weren't for Wildfire, they'd have stolen the clothes off my back!

C: …跟你们讲道理真是浪费口水。现在好了，你们闹这一出大动静，整片矿脉都被机器人霸占了，谁都落不着好。
E: ...It's a waste of time trying to reason with you. While you've been kicking up this fuss, the whole vein's been seized by robots. Now we're all in the same boat.

C: 你…你们想干什么？我警告你，「地火」还在附近……
E: Whoa, easy, wh—what are you trying to pull off? I—I'm warning you, Wildfire are in the area...

C: …你不会想说桑博吧？
E: ...Do you mean Sampo?

C: 他只是地下的一台机器人，为何会知道重要的秘密？
E: Why would a mere robot in the Underworld have knowledge of important secrets?

C: {NICKNAME}，规则很简单，看到躲起来的孩子，捉住他就行啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, it's simple. When you see one of them, you just have to catch them!

C: 倒也不必，你的伪装术已经可以说是魔法了……
E: No need for the melodrama. That was still a magical performance...

C: 明白了，你可以随时来找我。
E: No problem, come find me any time.

C: 没有了解，信任无从谈起。不过既然言及于此，我建议你不要太过于信任桑博•科斯基。
E: I don't know them. Trust isn't part of the picture yet. But speaking of trust, I suggest you don't place too much of yours in Sampo Koski.

C: 我看三月挺精神的。
E: March looks the most awake.

C: 唉，那等于没说…所以咱们回地面以后该怎么行动呢？咱们说了半天，特别激动人心，可好像啥结论也没得出来……
E: Well then that's as good as nothing for now... So, what should we do when we get back above ground? After all this talk, we're still back at square one...

C: 是的，她肩负了很多责任。虽然不大能理解，但我相信她在尝试用自己的方式解决问题。
E: Exactly, she has a lot of responsibilities. I don't completely understand, but I trust that she's trying to solve the problem.

C: 你不过窥到了雪山的一角，就以为自己看清了真相。只是在下层溅了一身泥渣，居然就敢质疑我的命令？
E: You merely glimpsed the tip of the iceberg and now you think you know everything. You spend a short time with that Underworld scum, and suddenly you have the audacity to question my orders?

C: 为了得到「菌菌」，虎克努力装了一个月的「乖宝宝」——按时吃饭，按时睡觉，也没有跟别的小朋友打架……
E: Hook pretended to be well-behaved for a month in order to get Junjun. She ate on time, slept on time — even stopped fighting with the other kids...

C: 奥列格头儿…他没跟我说太多，但我知道他把担忧都藏在心里。
E: Chief Oleg... He didn't say much, but I know he's not the kind to wear his heart on his sleeve.

C: 不服？不服气就自己上擂台试试，打几场就知道了。
E: Not convinced? Then enter the ring and fight a few bouts yourself, and then you'll see.

C: 是…天赋异禀，领跑俱乐部排名的全新赛季？
E: Is {M#he}{F#she}... a gifted new talent ready to rock the club's new seasonal rankings?

C: 还好我早早地买了季票，可以直接去二楼贵宾席，不用跟这群家伙抢票……
E: Good thing I bought the season pass early, and I can go directly to the VIP seat on the second floor without having to fight for tickets with these guys...

C: 谢谢你的好意，不过我…咳…我身体好得很…咳…没什么大问题。
E: Thank you for your kindness, but I... *cough*... I'm fine... *cough*... It's no biggie.

C: （向娜塔莎讲述事情经过）
E: (You tell Natasha what happened)

C: 妈妈怎么还不下班呢…呜呜……
E: Why hasn't mummy finished work yet... *sniff* *sniff*

C: 呃…之前还看到他在被拳馆老板教训，之后就不知道去哪儿了。
E: Uh... I saw him being scolded by the owner just then. Not sure where he went after.

C: 您现在距离登顶仅一步之遥，本赛季也已接近尾声——您的对手，也就是当前的天梯榜榜首，也已经做好准备，只等与您一战。
E: You are now only one step away from reaching the top, and the season is drawing to a close — your opponent, the current leader of the ladder, is also ready for you.

C: 这外面人来人往的，不大方便。咱们进诊所聊，娜塔莎也在等着呢！
E: Quite right. Let's head inside — too much commotion out here.

C: …你不会就是来看戏的吧！
E: ...Stop stoking the fire!

C: 别惊慌，银鬃铁卫一定会保障下层区居民的安全。你们从哪个方向来？
E: Don't worry, the Silvermane Guards are trained for these situations. Where do we find them?

C: 明白了——毋须担心，我马上安排铁卫前往设防、搜救难民。
E: Understood. I'll send my men to set up a perimeter and start the rescue operation right away.

C: …感激不尽。奥列格先生，我以「存护」之名向你保证，绝对会尽力挽救每一条生命。
E: ...Thank you. In the name of the Preservation, I promise we'll do everything we can to save lives.

C: 每个人选择的道路都不同。
E: People walk on different paths.

C: 你认识去大矿区的路，对吧？准备好了就去追上杰帕德吧！
E: You know the way to the Great Mine, right? Let's catch up with Gepard when you're ready!

C: 你们两人状况还好吗？
E: How are you guys feeling?

C: …嗯，他们迟早会回来的，齐诺。
E: ...Mm. They'll come back one day, Zino.

C: 谁叫我们是一家人呢。
E: Well, a Landau just called out a Landau.

C: 尤利安没找到过，也不知道是不是真的，不过{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}要是想了解《冒险鼹鼠队》的话，我可以都告诉你。
E: I haven't found anything, and I'm not even sure whether it's really true. But {M#mister}{F#miss}, if you'd like to know more about The Adventurous Moles, then I can tell you all about that.

C: 我去找找看吧。
E: Let me go and see.

C: 关于《冒险鼹鼠队》的事…
E: About The Adventurous Moles...

C: 巨大的垃圾箱。如果你得了感冒，也可以把它当胶囊旅馆来用。
E: A huge dumpster. If you caught a cold, you can even use it as a capsule hotel.

C: 一只普普通通的邮筒。
E: Just a normal mailbox.

C: 从沙袋上你能学会的事：遭到打击时，不妨随势摇摆，再利用惯性反击。
E: What you learned from observing the sandbag: When assaulted with blows, try to move with the force and counterattack using momentum.

C: 好吧，我不碰它——
E: Fine, I won't touch it.

C: 这座垃圾桶猛一瞧没有什么特别的，但当你细看时，就发现了它的邪恶之处：用来支撑箱盖的弹簧杆被动了手脚。如果有人用力推开箱盖，盖子就会反弹，给那人一点苦头尝尝。
E: This trashcan looks just like the other ones at first glance, but when you take a closer look, you uncover its sinister nature: Someone has done something to the spring bar of the lid. If you push the lid of this trashcan, the lid will be bounce back to you, dealing a heavy blow.

C: 博识学会星空生态学派宣布：琥珀历<unbreak>2157</unbreak>纪结束，<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪正式到来。
E: The Intelligentsia Guild's Astral Ecology School has declared the official end of <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE and the start of <unbreak>2158</unbreak> AE.

C: 晚上好。
E: Good evening.

C: 「厄兆先锋」向西格玛叁号星系发出警告，恶性噬硅细菌存在向该地区传播趋势。
E: The Omen Vanguards have warned the Sigmar-III galaxy about the potential spread of malignant silicon-eating bacteria.

C: 工业行星巴兰扎熔炉在绝灭大君「铁墓」的袭击下瘫痪，联觉信标生产受到影响。
E: The industrial planet Baranza Forge has been crippled by an attack from the Lord Ravager "Irontomb," impacting the production of Synesthesia Beacons.

C: …不，还是要严肃点。
E: ...Let's not do that.

C: 从目前的状况来看，星核的影响尚未完全深入。
E: From what we've gathered, the influence of the Stellaron can still be contained.

C: 星穹列车——在下闻名已久，心驰神往，今日得见，幸甚至哉！
E: The Astral Express! I must confess that the train's reputation precedes it, such that it is often close to my thoughts. How delightful to come face to face with its passengers!

C: 卡芙卡有控制他人的能力。
E: Kafka is good at controlling the people around her.

C: 我想到了！有一个奇怪的地方，非常微小——他刻意跳过了「刃」！
E: Ah, that's it! A minor detail, but curious. He avoided talking about Blade!

C: {NICKNAME}觉得这个景元将军怎么样？
E: What do you make of this Jing Yuan?

C: 真是辛苦你了…
E: Thank you so much...

C: 大家先休息片刻，追踪星核猎手卡芙卡，必然是一场硬仗。
E: Let's take advantage of the rest. It won't be easy to track down Kafka the Stellaron Hunter.

C: 不过光有这一节也不能说明什么，毕竟仙舟上不止一处洞天，当时降雨的地方也不止一处。
E: Still, that doesn't help us much. The ship is huge, with changing conditions across various delves. I'm sure there were showers across many of them at the time.

C: …我好像又惹人生气了。
E: ...I think I offended someone again.

C: 有吗？我怎么觉得她冷冰冰的……
E: Really? I thought she was pretty icy...

C: 冷峻只是她的伪装。
E: I'm sure she's just putting on a tough front.

C: 别乱用成语，倾巢而出那是什么好词么？
E: Do you mean "out in full force"?

C: 那行，在下还有公务要忙，您要是改了主意，欢迎随时来找我。
E: Hmph, very well. I still have business to attend to. If you change your mind, come to me any time.

C: 这是什么意思？就一张图片，是让我们去这个地方碰头吗？
E: What does that mean? It's just a picture. Are we supposed to meet someone there?

C: 那得有多大？列车这么大？不对，黑塔空间站这么大！也不对。
E: So how big was it? Bigger than the Express? Bigger than Herta space station? No, that can't be right.

C: 抱歉，我还有要事在身。
E: I'm so sorry, but I have something important to attend to.

C: 你看见了吗…那棵树…
E: Did you see that... that tree?

C: 几乎一无所知。我本要依照行程登船离开罗浮，突然听说爆发了骚乱。
E: Almost nothing. I was scheduled to leave the Luofu when I heard there was a disturbance.

C: 剑术和医术，都是这么练出来的。丹恒兄弟也是漂泊的人，一定能理解吧。
E: That's how I trained my swordplay and healing skills. You are also a wanderer. Surely you understand.

C: 需要再给你指一下路吗？
E: Do you need me to point the way for you again?

C: 咦，可以吗？你真～好。
E: Can you? You're toooo kind~

C: 手头还有几笔其它仙舟的商单，但…说实话，原本约了「鸣火」商团的停云女士谈笔买卖，看来现在是不成了。
E: I had some more trading to do on the other Xianzhou ships, but my main appointment was with Miss Tingyun of the Whistling Flames merchant guild. We had a business deal to discuss, but I fear it will no longer go ahead.

C: 是，也不是。这是工造司仿生我狐族五感而开发出的「谛听」，敏锐程度更甚。
E: Yes, and no. This is Diting, a bionic dog developed by the Artisanship Commission. He has all the five senses of the foxian race and takes them to another level.

C: 利用环境掩盖痕迹…天舶司的这位姑娘还真喜欢考验人啊。咱们四处找找，看看她有没有留下别的痕迹？
E: Using the environment to hide her traces... Our girl from the Sky-Faring Commission sure knows how to put up a challenge. Let's look around and see if we can find any other clues.

C: 这不赶巧您来问人嘛，我心想我得露一手活儿啊。您别担心，这是免费表演，不强买强卖。
E: Then you guys swung by asking for this foxian lady, so we thought we'd give you a bit of improv — free of charge I might add.

C: 毫无疑问，这是她抛给你们的小小线索，之一？
E: No doubt this is a tiny clue she left for you. Or maybe there are more of them?

C: 客官您问的可不就是「不夜侯」的老板娘吗？
E: Unfortunately yes, the boss is never far away.

C: 搜集的线索应该已经足够让「谛听」追踪卡芙卡了。
E: We should have enough clues here to get Diting on the move.

C: 为了方便你们找到我，我还留下了许多蛛丝…瞧见了没？
E: Of course, I didn't want to make things too difficult, so I spun you a broad web... Wasn't that nice?

C: 这也是你的计划。
E: This was all part of your plan.

C: 这个家伙…能不能别给我挖坑啊——
E: That guy... Can I go one day without him throwing me under the—

C: 吉时已到，得动身了。各位，请吧。
E: The time has arrived. We must depart. Please, proceed.

C: 这只是我个人的猜想…和希望。如果那就是停云，幻胧为何要多此一举湮灭证据。将遗体扔于故人面前，岂不更符合她的毁灭「美学」？
E: At this point, it's all just conjecture and hope. But if that body belonged to the real Tingyun, it does raise the question of why Phantylia would go to such lengths to destroy any evidence of her. Wouldn't it be more in line with her destructive nature to leave Tingyun's remains behind as a display of power?

C: 摘去头盔，你直视阵亡云骑的脸。
E: Removing the helmet, you look straight into the face of the fallen Cloud Knight.

C: 恩公竟是个为达成目的不择手段的人呢。
E: Hehe, it strikes me that you'd use any means to achieve your goal, benefactor.

C: 龙…
E: Aargh... Long...

C: 是，「叩祝三爪，朝觐尺木」…通往玄根深处的道路便会打开。
E: Yes, "reverence to the three talons, the path to the great roots..." It's the way to the root depths.

C: 不必担心，随我来便是。
E: Don't worry about it, just follow me.

C: 持明族寿尽时，会重返古海结卵，再以幼体蜕生出水。
E: When the life of a Vidyadhara is over, they return to the ancient sea and form a shell, before emerging anew. This is the hatching rebirth cycle.

C: 诸位，这就是「丰饶」与「毁灭」结合的力量！
E: Witness the power of Abundance and Destruction combined!

C: 没想到这一路上咱们误打误撞，成了拯救罗浮的英雄。总觉得轻轻松松就干了许多了不得的事情，好不真实。
E: Well, we had a lot of stumbles along the way, but we still managed to kick butt and save the Luofu without breaking a sweat. Feels kinda surreal.

C: 重回罗浮，重新踏足鳞渊境…有种不真实的感觉。
E: Returning to the Luofu and Scalegorge Waterscape... it's a surreal feeling.

C: 如果你们打算在罗浮逗留一阵的话，我恐怕没法和你们同行。抱歉了，{NICKNAME}。
E: If you're planning on an extended stay on the Luofu, I'm afraid I won't be able to join you. I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}.

C: 停云恐怕……
E: I'm afraid Miss Tingyun is...

C: 这是梦茗小姐为你准备的茶，以你的名字命名。
E: This is the tea that Mengming has made, especially named after you.

C: 我回来了。
E: Sorry to interrupt the poetry...

C: 一路顺风。
E: Safe travels.

C: 将军太客气了！
E: You're too kind, General!

C: {NICKNAME}，快过来，好像不大对劲……
E: {NICKNAME}, over here, something's not right...

C: 又一个……
E: Not another one...

C: 如果这意味着自己消失，我会。
E: If it means that I will disappear, I would.

C: 我知道这很难，不必着急作出决定。我说了…答案并不重要。
E: I know this is hard, you don't have to be hard-pressed to make a decision. As I have said... the answer is inconsequential.

C: …说吧，我们或许在想同一件事。
E: ...Go on. We may be thinking of the same thing.

C: 我转录下这些杂音，它们与列车跃迁时的引力波频率完全吻合，而以列车引擎的空间曲率为密钥——我得到了上面这段话。
E: I recorded these dissonant notes, and they were a perfect match with the gravity wave frequency when the Express made its warp jump. Also, the Express engine's spatial curvature was its encryption key.

C: 错了，我要找的人就是你。
E: Wrong. You're the one I seek.

C: …「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我说对了吗？
E: ...{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron, have I hit the nail on the head?

C: 左还是右？准备好——我要揭晓答案了。
E: Left or right? Get ready, I'm about to reveal the answer.

C: 祝您在匹诺康尼度过一个愉快的假期！
E: May you have a pleasant stay in Penacony!

C: 我们是不是在哪见过…
E: Have we met somewhere...

C: （似乎有种奇怪的感觉…）
E: (I have a strange feeling about this...)

C: <color=#ff3a3e>说来惭愧，因为过去的某些经历，我有时会忘记一些不该忘记的事…所以这种确认也成了平常，请别在意。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>This may sound embarrassing, because I would sometimes forget stuff I really shouldn't have from past experiences... It's just a habit of mine, don't mind me.</color>

C: 在做出选择前，你应当知晓这些。告辞了。
E: I thought you should know all this before making a choice. Goodbye.

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
E: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 怎么了，我来帮你。
E: How can I help?

C: 行了行了，小子们——到此为止。
E: That's enough, boys.

C: 虽然你与钟表小子合了一张完美的影，但那撮眼睫毛似乎并不领情。
E: You took a nice pic with Clockie.

C: 嗨，爱德华医生。我想带朋友们体验一点…有趣的东西，你懂的。
E: Hello, Edward. I'd like my friends to try something... fun, if you know what I mean.

C: …还有米沙！米沙他遇到危险啦——滴答！救命！救命！
E: ...And Misha! Misha is in trouble! Tick-tock! Help! Help!

C: <size=36>都是一家人！</size>
E: <size=36>We're a family!</size>

C: 对不起。因为一些原因，有些事…我现在还不能向你全盘托出。但也有些事，我应该对你坦诚。
E: I'm sorry. For certain reasons, there are things I can't reveal to you yet. But there are also things you should know.

C: 行了，你收回去。这次我权当没看见，下次再这样我可要通知橡木家系了。
E: Get those out of my sight, and I'll pretend nothing happened this time. Try pulling something like that again, and I'll report it to the Oak Family.

C: 男人变得十分开心，但依旧滴水不漏——也许你得使些「激将法」才行。
E: The man has become content but remains impenetrable. Perhaps you need to provoke him a bit.

C: 如果那时我也有这种力量，米娅…我们是不是就能有个不一样的结局？
E: If I'd had that power back then, would we have ended up differently, Meeya?

C: {NICKNAME}，你好像把他弄抑郁了……
E: {NICKNAME}, I think you've made him depressed...

C: 有点吓人…
E: It's kinda scary...

C: 有种悲伤的感觉…
E: There is a sadness to this...

C: 你是忆庭的忆者…？
E: You're the Garden of Recollection's Memokeeper...?

C: 说正经的。我知道各位正在四处调查匹诺康尼的异象，不如说，我们非常乐于看见这一幕。因为你们调查得越深入，就越有机会了解到美梦的真相。
E: I'll get straight to the point. I know you've all been investigating the abnormal phenomenon surrounding Penacony. Or rather, we are pleased to see that you've been doing that — because the deeper you delve, the closer you'll get to uncovering truth about this so-called "beautiful" dream.

C: 形势很明朗了。盛会之星远没有表面上看起来那么简单，围绕着「钟表匠的遗产」，包含家族在内的一众势力各怀目的，彼此制衡。
E: The situation is clear — the Planet of Festivities isn't what it seems on the surface. Everyone's sights, including the factions in The Family, are set on the Watchmaker's Legacy. Every party has its own motives, and they're attempting to thwart each other.

C: 所以，我要受姬子小姐之托，带两位返回现实了。{NICKNAME}…很高兴看到你一切安好，我们出发吧，到安全的地方再谈。
E: Which is why I must undertake Miss Himeko's request and bring both of you back to reality. {NICKNAME}... I'm glad to see that you're fine. Let us reach a safe place before speaking again.

C: 这可真是…「灿烂夺目」。就是这个房间吗？
E: This is truly... a magnificent sight. It's this room, then?

C: 除非他还有更在意的事，需要——或者说，正在确认。
E: ...there is something else he cares more about and needs — or should I say, is verifying.

C: 我不敢肯定两起事件是同一人所为，但那道巨大的伤口…很像它的翼刃，我们都见过它行凶的瞬间。
E: I'm not sure the two cases were committed by the same culprit, but that massive wound... looked like its winged blade. We've all witnessed it in action before.

C: 该怎么做？让我想想…机会难得，不容有失，我得非常小心……
E: What should we do? Let me think... It's too rare an opportunity to miss out on, so I gotta be careful...

C: 各位，尚不是消沉的时候，我们还能为她们做些力所能及的事，比如…找出凶手。
E: ...Stay strong, everyone. We can still do what we can for them... starting with finding the murderer.

C: 哎，你这车轱辘话说了跟没说似的……
E: You're like a broken record...

C: 「是么？但在我尝来…它们并无区别。」
E: "Really? But I don't taste... any difference at all between them."

C: 真的？我以为你早放下了呢。
E: Really? I thought you'd given up on that already.

C: 那就是个借口，教授。那女人不对劲，我需要有人牵制她，在我们行动时视野外的变数越少越好。
E: That was just an excuse, good doctor. There's something wrong with that woman, and we need someone to keep her in check. It's better to minimize the variables outside of our control when we execute our plans.

C: …这也在意料中。我想再请教下，人们入梦时通常会留下什么痕迹么？
E: ...Just as I thought. I'd like to ask, what kind of traces do people leave when they enter a dream?

C: 没错，我们正在为家族调查凶案呢。可以找你们的长官聊聊案情吗？
E: That's right. We're investigating a murder for The Family. Can we speak to your Captain about the case?

C: 你能再表演一次吗，{NICKNAME}？就是那个——钟表小子的神奇魔术！
E: Can you perform it again, {NICKNAME}? That... Clockie magic!

C: 你这个灰毛…为什么听不进我说的话？！
E: You punk... Why can't you understand the words that are coming out of my mouth!?

C: 唉，人类总是重复同样的错误……
E: Humans never learn...

C: 家族本身也是一座巨大、完美的建筑，就像…一尊活着的神像。
E: The Family itself is a huge, perfect building. Like... A living idol.

C: 在这样说时，她的手也轻轻搭在了刀镡上——
E: She says this as her hand gently rests on the hilt of the sword.

C: 这一次，他流拍了。
E: This time around, there were no successful bids for him.

C: 我一路走过盛会之星的现实和梦境，看着黑夜升起又落下，时光为人们停驻，而精神的富有和贫穷…也永远停留在各自的刻度。
E: I've traveled through the reality and Dreamscape of the Planet of Festivities, watched the tides of night rise and fall, when time stopped for people. Where the spirits of the rich and impoverished... remain forever fixed on their own scales.

C: 尽管不完全相同，但你所描绘的这个故事…它和我的过往重叠在一起。而在那深不见底的梦中……
E: Even if not completely similar, this story you just told... It overlaps with my past. And within that abyssal dream...

C: 算了。给你这个，拿着。死到临头再打开它，你会感谢我的。
E: Fine. Here, take this. Open it when you're on your last legs. You'll thank me.

C: …朋友，乐观点。是金子总会发光的。
E: ...Hey, stay positive. Gold will always shine one day, right?

C: 「幸福理应属于高尚之人」…这话的意思是我们可以把它拿走咯？嘿嘿，平时多做好事还是会有回报的嘛。多谢啦！
E: "Happiness belongs to the noble." Does this mean we can take it? Ahaha, doing good deeds does pay off! Thank you!

C: 投入「<unbreak>50000</unbreak>信用点」…
E: Give <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits...

C: 或许…我是该找个地方重新想想，对我来说，舒翁究竟意味着什么……
E: Maybe... I should find a place to reflect on what Siobhan truly means to me...

C: 这样对她也好…盛会的梦固然迷人，可梦就是梦，不是现实。她那杯饮料我请了，钱你们收着吧。
E: *sigh* That's good for her... Radiant dreams may be enticing, but they're nothing more than dreams. Her drink is on the house. Please keep the money.

C: 能让他们放行吗？
E: Can you convince them to let us in?

C: 刚收到了封锁令，说是那位星期日亲自下达的，天知道要干什么。
E: They just received a lockdown order, supposedly from Sunday himself. Who knows what it's for.

C: 呵，你又不知道它在哪儿了？
E: Heh, suddenly you don't know where it is?

C: 「钻石」向来看重结果。只要我能创造的价值远高于成本…过程和手段就不是问题。
E: Diamond has always been all about results. As long as I can create value far beyond the cost, the ends justify the means.

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 你忽然变得很体贴啊，良心发现了？
E: Don't get soft on me now. What, did you suddenly grow a conscience?

C: 但卡提卡人不知道，这次我们会反抗，天上来的黑衣人也站在我们这边。卡提卡人在他们面前毫无胜算，一定会为自己的傲慢付出代价。
E: Little do the Katicans know, this time we will fight back! The men in black that descend from the skies are on our side. The Katicans stand no chance against them and will surely pay for their arrogance.

C: 那对眼睛，还有「芬戈妈妈」…不，这不可能……
E: Those eyes... and Mama Fenge... No! It can't...

C: 因为除此之外，我一无所有。
E: Because other than that, I have nothing.

C: 瞧见这枪里的子弹了么？九毫米，永远的经典。眼下我需要星穹列车的帮助，但如果你们和那家伙一样是群冒牌货…啧，这子弹怕是要躺我脑门里了。
E: See the bullets in this gun? 9-millimeter, an eternal classic. I may need the Astral Express' help right now, but if you're an imposter just like that one... Tsk, then this bullet might just end up in my head.

C: 很高兴你尚有自知之明，可惜，没有「请」。
E: I am glad that you're an understanding one. Alas, I'm not "asking."

C: 在大典的某个时刻按下它，说不定会有惊喜哦。
E: Press it at just the right moment in the celebration, and there could be an unexpected treat in store for you.

C: 就像你看到的，我被「死亡」的翼刃贯穿。浓稠忆质的重压…它们在脑海中炸开，恍若现实。
E: It is how you see now — I was impaled by the bladed wings of "Death." The heavy pressure of concentrated memoria miasma... exploded in my mind, as if it was actually reality.

C: 于是我返回梦境中的酒店，想告诉你它的存在。但我还不能公开自己的身份，只能想办法转移与你同行之人的注意，将你带离战场。
E: And so then I returned to the hotel in the Dreamscape, hoping to tell you of its existence. Yet I could not reveal my own identity, so I could only divert your party's attention and lure you away from the battlefield.

C: 那就拜托你了。另外，我们也在寻找失散的同伴，红色头发的女性，身边还有一位粉色头发的女孩，不知道你是否有印象？
E: If it's not too much trouble. Also, we're looking for our missing companions: A woman with red hair, accompanied by a girl with pink hair. Have you seen them?

C: 嗯？你们是谁，这里要消失了，你们还不走吗？
E: Hmm? Who are you all, and why haven't you left yet? This place is about to disappear!

C: 美梦崩溃…那个忆者也说过同样的话，原来是真的啊。
E: The sweet dream's collapse... that Memokeeper mentioned the same thing. So, it's real.

C: 看，她就在那儿。
E: Look, there she is.

C: 它看起来一点力气都没有…我们去找个软垫，给它做个鸟巢吧？
E: It looks weak and frail... Why don't we find something soft and make a nest for it?

C: 现在，我信守承诺，把你挂念一辈子的后人带来了。我不知道为什么你永远忘不了那辆列车，但我还记得你离开人世前，说过的最后一句话……
E: I've kept my promise... brought the future Trailblazers you've waited so long for. I don't know why you were so obsessed with that train, but I remember your last words...

C: 你是想说…她以为自己成为了生活的主人，可也不过是抛弃现实逃遁到美梦中，失去庇护便会瞬间现出原形。
E: What you're trying to say is... she thinks she's in control of her life, but in reality, she's just escaping from reality and seeking solace in this sweet dream. Once she steps out of this sanctuary, everything will be lost.

C: 这里正合适，我们就在此等候梦主到来吧。
E: Let's wait here for the Dreammaster to arrive.

C: 嗯，这倒是令我意外。梦境是五大家族共同维护的结果，若有人利用谐乐肆意散布那星核的力量，此人必然身居高位……
E: Hmm, this is indeed surprising to me. The Dreamscape is maintained by the collective effort of the Five Families. If someone were to use the Charmony Festival to recklessly disseminate the power of the Stellaron, this individual must hold a position of great authority...

C: 你好，我们是星穹列车的无名客，想来办理入住手续。
E: Greetings. We're the Nameless from the Astral Express, and we'd like to check in.

C: 这可是酒单上最贵的一款。您可真是内行啊。
E: Well, that's the most expensive one on the list. You have a taste for the finer things.

C: 你认为这样一个人借用巡海游侠的名号，别有目的。
E: And you believe that someone like her would have an ulterior motive for impersonating a Galaxy Ranger?

C: 所以…我是个可有可无的失败的钟表，对吗？
E: ...I'm just an expendable failure of a clock, aren't I?

C: 啊？
E: Ahhhwww?

C: 你小子还挺能救…
E: You're quite the savior, aren't ya...

C: 重要的是，此身如今已立于此处——狭路相逢，我，「纯美骑士团」的银枝，恳求与二位展开一场骑士道的较量！
E: What matters is that I now stand before you — our paths have crossed. I, Argenti of the Knights of Beauty, am humbly requesting for a battle with you both in the name of the Code of Chivalry!

C: 咦？我们还什么都没做……
E: Huh? We haven't even done anything...

C: 我们回来了！只要有这些，你一定能够打开心结，滴答！
E: We're back! As long as you have these, you'll be able to find closure, tick-tock!

C: 记得{NICKNAME}说过，前面有个特别壮观的喷泉。
E: {NICKNAME} once mentioned there's a magnificent fountain up ahead.

C: 是什么？我不知道。
E: Hmm? I'm not quite sure.

C: 但无需害怕，正如人们会感到迷茫，在某个瞬间，他们也会下定决心，做出一个大胆但又了不起的决定……
E: But don't worry, everyone goes through moments of uncertainty and hesitation. Eventually, they gather the courage to make bold decisions...

C: 是啊，在匹诺康尼，恐怕咱们已经无路可走了。所以也只能把目光看向阿斯德纳之外了。
E: Yes, I'm afraid there's no way out in Penacony, so I'll have to consider alternatives beyond Asdana.

C: 如果你们希望，用人们更熟知的名字——「钟表匠」来称呼我，也并无不可。
E: If you prefer, you can call me by a more familiar name, the Watchmaker.

C: 各位，我们既然接过了接力棒，就一定不能辜负他们的意志。
E: Now that we've taken up the mantle, we can't afford to fail them.

C: 个子不大，野心不小…那结果呢？
E: Quite an ambition for such a small girl... So, what happened?

C: 会不会是来晚了？
E: Are we too late?

C: 老实说对公司没有任何好处…但对全宇宙的长远发展却是非常有利的。
E: To be honest, it does nothing to benefit the IPC... but it is extremely beneficial to the long-term development of the entire universe.

C: 我帮你问问列车长吧。
E: I'll help you ask the conductor.

C: 「生命是一座迂回的迷宫，除了记忆，我们一无所有。」
E: "Life is akin to a winding labyrinth, where memories serve as our sole companions."

C: 对了。她临走前托我给你带个话：「千万要区分现实和想象的界限」……
E: By the way, she left me a message to pass on to you. "Always make sure you can distinguish reality from imagination."

C: 直到一名自灭者寻得其遗物。他是一名真正纯粹、高尚且无私的伟大战士。
E: That was until the day a Self-Annihilator found his relics. Truly, he was a pure, noble, and selfless warrior.

C: 哎，你去哪儿呀？
E: Hey, where are you going?

C: 看，他果然还在和那个牛仔聊天！
E: Look, he's still talking to that cowboy!

C: 而你梦境中的瑕疵，正是那位不应出现在现实中的米沙。也是在翻开「记忆」的这一页时，我才确信了自己也身在幻觉之中。
E: The flaw in your dream lies within Misha, who could have never appeared in reality. When I turned the pages of your memories, I realized that I was in an illusion, too.

C: 正是因为这自私的本能，即便早已知晓自己在做徒劳的反抗，人们依旧会拼尽全力。尽管荒谬，但这同样是一种抗争。
E: It's through this inherent self-centered instinct that people exert their utmost effort, even when they know their struggle is fruitless. As absurd as it may seem, it's their resistance.

C: 「钟表把戏」现在无法为此人指明方向。
E: Your "clockwork" is unable to point this person in the right direction.

C: （竟然是…知更鸟？）
E: (It's... Robin?)

C: 无数声音透过忆质交响如滚雷，其中有道回响格外清晰。你知道它来自身边的那位少女，你们的心脏合着同样的节拍，沉静，再沉静……
E: Innumerable voices resonate through the symphony of memoria like roaring thunder, and among them, one echo stands out with exceptional clarity. You know it comes from the girl beside you, your hearts beating to the same rhythm in silence, and then, more silence...

C: 然后嘛，我就开始做大吃大喝大买特买的梦了…星期日不会以为这就是我想要的生活吧？从这种幻觉里醒来…轻轻松松嘛。
E: And then, I dreamed about stuffing my face with delicious food and going on a shopping spree... Sunday didn't seriously believe that was the life I wanted, right? Breaking free from that cheesy illusion... was just a piece of cake.

C: 知、知道了！感谢总监提醒！
E: G—got it! Thank you for the reminder, Director!

C: 把「飞碟堡」抛给账账。
E: Toss a Floatdisc Burger to Numby.

C: 这么多按钮…一个个按下去，我得忙到猴年马月啊？
E: So many buttons... How many centuries would it take to press them all?

C: 看你睡得很熟，就没有打扰。
E: I didn't disturb you since you were in a deep sleep.

C: 尽管离事实还有不少差距，但也算是影响最小的结果了吧……
E: While quite different from the truth, this appears to be the outcome with the least impact...

C: 匹诺康尼的「秩序」是个例吗…
E: Is the Order incident in Penacony a unique case...?

C: 这答案或许比你想的更简单：信用点，人们最爱的东西，星际间唯一被认可的恒定价值货币，公司有能力保障它永不贬值。
E: The answer is simpler than you think: It's all about credits, everyone's favorite thing and the universally recognized currency among the stars. The IPC has the power to perpetually ensure their value.

C: 我想活下去。为了这个愿望，我愿意押上自己的一切。
E: I want to keep on living. And for that, I'm willing to give up everything I have.

C: 哇…好漂亮的项链！是猫眼石的吗？太美了……
E: Whoa... what a beautiful necklace! Is it made of cymophane? It's stunning...

C: 是什么让你甘愿承受沦为弃子的风险，也要为「钻石」完成这一切？
E: What drives you to take such a risk and extend this invitation on behalf of Diamond, even if it could lead to your downfall?

C: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
E: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)

C: 你这回可是有点过誉了…
E: You flatter me too much...

C: 第一件案子是「苏乐达工厂纵火案」。我们在现场发现了一柄大锤、一只娃娃，还有残留的约半升不明液体。化验刚结束，结果表明那是一条红鲱鱼。
E: The first case is the SoulGlad factory arson case. We found a hammer, a doll and half a liter of an unidentified fluid at the scene of the crime. Our forensics results showed it's a red herring.

C: 炸弹…？
E: The bomb...?

C: 唉，小灰毛呀小灰毛，这么长时间过去了，你一点变化都没有，我好失望呀……
E: Oh Gray Hair, Gray Hair, it's been so long, but you haven't changed at all. I'm sorely disappointed...

C: 花火，是花火！
E: Sparkle, it's Sparkle!

C: 只、只是串戏了啾！请你千万别告诉别人啾。
E: I—I just got the parts mixed up! Please don't tell anyone, tweet.

C: 你说句话，可以吗？
E: Can you speak, please!?

C: 这也是眼下最好，也是最合理的选择了。毕竟这个漫长的故事，理应有一个「圆满」的结局。
E: At present, this is our best, and most logical course of action. After all, a long story deserves a happy ending.

C: 在长夜中到来的第一束光，往往无法照亮什么，因为它转瞬即逝，而黑夜太过漫长。
E: The first glimmer of light in the prolonged night often illuminates little, as it is fleeting and the darkness too vast.

C: ——敬匹诺康尼的过去、现在、未来…和稚子至死不渝的梦。
E: ...To Penacony's past, present, future... and the child's unwavering dream unto death.

C: 三月又欺负帕姆了？
E: Is March picking on Pom-Pom again?

C: 校方打算在「太阳的时刻」筹办一场有关「开拓」的学术研讨会，邀请星穹列车作为嘉宾出席。
E: The university plans to hold an academic conference on the topic of "Trailblazing" in the Moment of Sol. The Astral Express has been invited as guests to the conference.

C: 蕉蕉蕉~睡蕉小猴真是好~蕉蕉蕉~幸福美满乐陶陶~
E: ♪ Ba na na na, Slumbernana Monkey's best~ Ba na na na, enjoying life without a stress ♪

C: 差点没给我星核敲碎。
E: That almost shattered my Stellaron.

C: 已经不想再品鉴了…
E: I don't want to listen to it anymore...

C: 很好！「坦然豁达」是登台必备的素养，也是许多演员梦寐以求的天赋。
E: Very good! Staying calm and sanguine is essential when you're on stage. It is a talent most performers yearn for.

C: 我还以为自己很有演艺天赋呢，结果竟然要去筑梦边境打灰，这合理吗？
E: I really thought I had the acting chops! Now I have to go pour concrete in Dream's Edge. It's not fair.

C: 谐乐学院
E: Charmony Academy

C: 快看，学生们都聚在这儿呢。好多摊位啊，都是学生社团吗？
E: Look, there are so many students here! And so many booths. Are they all set up by student clubs?

C: 看，是睡蕉小猴！
E: Oh look, it's Slumbernana Monkey!

C: 大骗子！
E: You cheat!

C: 嗨，同学，能让一让吗——
E: Hi, excuse me. Can you move out of the way?

C: 摄影师三月，上！
E: Photographer March 7th, you're up!

C: 睡蕉小猴二创禁令
E: Ban on derivative works inspired by Slumbernana Monkey.

C: 睡、睡蕉社？您要加入睡蕉社？
E: Th—The Slumbernana Association? Are you planning on becoming a member?

C: 那外头就交给你了。这一路…多谢了。
E: Gotcha, I'll leave things out here to you, then. Oh, thanks for all the help so far.

C: 我不会制止他们奔向毁灭，但前提是…他们能够清醒地作出决断。
E: But I won't stop them from heading towards destruction... as long as they made the decision with a clear head.

C: 既然「同谐」的调律能够消除杂音。如果居民们愿意在我的引领下合唱谐乐，也许就能驱散回荡在流梦礁的恶曲。
E: We know the tuning of Harmony can erase the static noise. If the people of Dreamflux Reef are willing to follow my lead in singing a Charmonic tune together, we may be able to erase the heinous noises reverberating around Dreamflux Reef.

C: 没见过流氓？我不是米凯，想赌一赌我会不会开枪？
E: Never seen a thug before? I'm not Micah. Wanna try me and my gun?

C: 别忘了我那场梦
E: Don't forget about my dream.

C: 这位同学，你肯定理解不了蕉师这番话里包含的爱。无论如何，你和刚刚那位女同学都还算有天赋，但这位交白卷的姑娘却一无所有。
E: You can't possibly understand the affection in my words. Both you and the other girl have some talent, unlike her. She has no talent whatsoever to speak of.

C: 啊？这……
E: Huh? Um...

C: 先失陪了，同学们，有什么问题咱们课后再聊吧。
E: Excuse me, students. I'll take all other questions after class.

C: 同学们看好了，这就是当下最具商业价值的流行文化蕉！
E: Behold, the sensational B-wave that's been raking in all the money these days!

C: 所以我进行了*蕉学*，开导他成为一只睡蕉小猴——就在你刚刚送出的那批里，没想到吧？
E: So, I instilled in him the tenets of our banacademics, convincing him that becoming a Slumbernana Monkey is the right thing to do. Oh, that's right! He's in the batch of toys that you just delivered. Quite a turn of events, huh?

C: 简而言之，折纸大学出现了一种模因病毒，正在大肆传播并感染学生们的心智。
E: The short story is that a memetic virus has broken loose in Paperfold University. It's going around infecting the students' minds as we speak.

C: 但它最后灭绝了，对吗？
E: But it eventually became extinct, didn't it?

C: 注定？多么可笑。「忍者的利刃并非不能斩断因果，不如说，我等必须斩断因果！」
E: ...Destined? Hmmph, all nonsense! "The ninja's blade can and must sever the chain of cause and effect!"

C: 啊，你又回来啦。
E: Oh, you're back.

C: 而你这位游侠朋友，你亲手打断了他获得幸福的过程。
E: As for your Ranger friend though, you just single-handedly destroyed his path to happiness.

C: 你…怎么能这么说？我还以为你也是真心喜欢睡蕉小猴的……
E: H—How could you say that? And here I thought you loved Slumbernana Monkey from the bottom of your heart...

C: 是么？那我想你误会了一点。
E: Is that so? Well, I reckon you got that wrong.

C: 以流梦礁作为起点，美丽的世界将会降临，而他的目光，也会投向我们一同铸就的伟业。
E: With Dreamflux Reef as our starting point, a beautiful world shall descend upon all. And he will eventually cast his gaze upon us and the grand cause that we've forged together.

C: 这边！你怎么呆头呆脑的，没睡醒？
E: This way! Why do you seem so out of it? Haven't you woken up yet?

C: 这都什么玩意儿？
E: What is this fudgin' nonsense?

C: 如果了断一切因缘，忘记你和世间的一切联系……
E: If you end all connections and forget everything that ties you to the world...

C: 只是一介研究猿而已。
E: No, I'm just a research ape.

C: 容我再次道歉，我和蕉授的确有合作关系。但这一切情非得已，身为<color=#dbc291ff>模因生命</color>，我不慎落入敌手，染上了致命的模因病毒。
