E: Please, let me apologize once more. Yes, it is true that I had a working relationship with Profnana, but I was coerced into it. As a <color=#dbc291ff>memetic lifeform</color>, I inadvertently fell into the hands of my enemies and became infected with a lethal memetic virus.

C: 我会努力修行，有朝一日…成为大师所说的「缭乱忍侠」。
E: I will continue to train hard... till the day I become the Dazzling Ninja that Master speaks of.

C: ——是一部漫画。自从为了躲避巡海游侠，我们将研究所封闭后，我收集的漫画书是她唯一能获取到的娱乐了。
E: ...It's a manga series. After we sealed off the research institute to hide from the Galaxy Rangers, my manga collection has been her only source of entertainment.

C: 没事，我已经在培育四号了，如果出问题了就顶上新的。
E: That's fine. I'm already nurturing No. 4. If something happens to 3, we'll replace her with that new one.

C: 把这卷轴拿去吧。此乃缭乱•忍法的奥义所在，它能释放邪祟畏惧的异彩，将邪忍的阵法尽数破坏。
E: Take the scroll with you, for within its pages lie the secrets of Dazzling Ninjutsu. It shall cast a brilliance that makes fiendlings fear and destroy the evil ninja's intricate matrices.

C: 将它泼洒在「忍之都」吧，用墨彩将这城的阴霾驱散，扬起反抗罪恶的旗幡。
E: Paint it throughout the Ninja Capital. Banish the shadows with ink, and raise the banner against evil.
...Yes.

C: 「叆叇馆主」，吟诵辞世句吧。
E: "Umbra Headmistress," it's time you breathed your last.

C: 嗯，听说知更鸟小姐要在广场主持新的开幕式，我们去看看吧。
E: Yes, and I heard that Miss Robin is going to host the new opening ceremony in the Plaza. Let's head over and take a look.

C: 好了，三月七同学，现在流行的是《银河忍法帖》！你要赶得上潮流才行！
E: Alright March 7th, the latest trend now is the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions! You have to keep up with the trends!

C: 今后你一定会成为大明星的，先给我签个名吧！
E: I'm sure you'll become a superstar one day. Can I get your autograph in advance?

C: 是的。匹诺康尼的生活并非表面那么理想。站在悬崖的边缘，轻风也能将人推入谷底。
E: That's right. Life in Penacony is not as ideal as what is seen on the surface. If someone is standing on the edge of a cliff, even a gentle breeze can easily tip them over.

C: 最后的最后，花火隆重返场，上演了一出触目惊心的炸弹秀。这场「危机」最终在盛大的烟火中落幕，每个人都收获了各自最好的结局，美梦的悲喜剧落下帷幕。
E: In the very end, Sparkle makes a grand return with a startling bomb show. This "crisis" is ultimately resolved amidst spectacular fireworks. With everyone receiving their own best ending, the tragicomedy of the sweet dream comes to a close.

C: 正如，预言为阿蝶揭示的命运……
E: Just like the destiny that the prophecy revealed for Cas...

C: 是白厄的声音吗？
E: Is it Phainon's voice?

C: 「想带走他？可以：拿上铜枪，上前来证明自己的信念与他相配……」
E: "You wish to take him away? Sure. Pick up a spear and prove that your resolve can rival his..."

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，你醒了。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, you're awake.

C: 恕我不请自来…见你还未起床，只好在一旁静静等待。
E: I apologize for arriving uninvited. I saw that you were still asleep, so I took the liberty of waiting nearby.

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}…是我的命运。我身上所负的诅咒，正是来自于它。
E: {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}... controls my fate, in a sense. The curse I bear came from them.

C: 听你的梦话，想来是做了个漫长的梦吧？
E: You were talking in your sleep... Did you dream of many things?

C: 这泰坦太不懂事了！
E: What an inconsiderate Titan!

C: 仙女木…这些小家伙，名字还真可爱。
E: White Dryad... What a cute name.

C: 如果真是这样，我想大家，还有那刻夏，肯定会没事的！
E: If that's really the case, I think that everyone including Anaxa will definitely be all right!

C: 「引纬」方才没能探到她的气息，如果真是道幻影作成的假身，未免太过离奇。可如果是已逝之人，我应当能感觉出来才对……
E: The Weft could not detect her presence just now. That would be out of the ordinary if she were truly a phantom body. But if she is someone who has passed on, I should be able to tell...

C: 喔，不胜荣幸。
E: Oh, that's truly an honor.

C: 你屏息凝神。嘀嗒！一滴水落入池中。
E: You hold your breath and focus. Drip drip! A drop of water falls into the pool.

C: 正是。莫非汝不知怎生是好了？
E: Indeed. Could it be that you actually do not know how to proceed?

C: 就那个——{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}祭司的誓词。
E: That being the oath of {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}'s priests.

C: …缇安大人，现在这道气息的位置在？
E: ...Lady Trianne, where is the aura gathered at right now?

C: 唔，没有。那个不知道是什么的东西，好像还在更前面，更上面。
E: Umm, no. That unknown thing seems to be even farther ahead and higher up.

C: <size=36>小小灰，小小蝶——快来看——！</size>
E: <size=36>Little Gray, Little Cas... Look over here... Quick!</size>

C: 对不起，人家不该说你们是小东西…！
E: Sorry, I shouldn't have called you guys "little things"...!

C: 好了，速速照吾说的做便是——倘若诸位足以通过这道考验，吾便将真相如实相告吧。
E: Alright, just do as I say. If you're able to pass the trial, I will tell you everything truthfully.

C: 尤其是那名唤那刻夏的异端——不惜磔裂灵魂当作础石，引发奇迹，在这树庭中布下天罗地网，将一众黑潮造物困于樊笼中，以免殃及他方。
E: Especially that heretic named Anaxa. He did not even hesitate to tear his soul apart and use it to perform a miracle. He trapped all the creations of the black tide within the Grove so that they would not be able to harm others.

C: 当然，吾也得以匿身潜藏…嗯，这也是「等价交换」的一道侧面吧？
E: Of course, this also meant that I was able to conceal myself and remain hidden... Well, that's also an "equivalent exchange," right?

C: 啊，人家搞明白了！所以，你是想借我们之手，把自己的火种再拼起来，还能救活那刻夏！
E: Ah, I finally understand! So, you want us to lend you a hand in piecing your Coreflame back together! We'll also be able to save Anaxa that way!

C: 交给我吧，我最会拉扯了。
E: Just leave it to me. Buying time is my specialty.

C: 还真是静得出奇啊…发生什么了？
E: This place is too quiet... What in the world is going on?

C: 愿命运与尊神恭候你……
E: May fate and the gods await your arrival...

C: *我*只是…有些担心她的心智。出发前，缇安已经连短句都念不清了……
E: I am just... a little concerned about her state of mind. Trianne was already unable to speak even in short sentences when they left...

C: 谢谢。阿雅，这次得麻烦你陪*我们*去趟浴场，放松一下啦……
E: Thanks. And Agy, it looks like we will need you to come with us to the baths this time to unwind...

C: 最后，我最信赖的赫菲斯辛…他本该与我一道见证尘埃落定，却在我与父亲角斗的前夕宿疾复发……
E: And at last, my most trusted friend, Hephaestion... He was supposed to stand by my side through it all, but a sudden relapse of his illness hit him on the eve of my duel against my father...

C: 不用拖着病躯与那女人对峙，真是一桩幸事。遐蝶，还有这位来不及认识的朋友，我今日就先行告退了。
E: It's fortunate we don't have to confront that woman while I'm hauling around this sick body. Castorice, and this friend I haven't gotten the chance to know — I'll take my leave for today.

C: 生命是种挣扎。
E: Life is a struggle.

C: 克拉特鲁斯，你当真觉得自己有资格染指试炼，亵渎神谕？
E: Krateros, do you truly believe you're worthy of entering the trial? To blaspheme against the prophecy?

C: 悬锋，王者的印戒，属于你母亲。重铸、修复…由我。
E: A signet ring. For the king of Kremnos. Belonged to your mother. Recast and restore it... I did.
(What...)

C: 来，让它们排排坐好吧。
E: Come, let's line them up.

C: 做噩梦了么？
E: Did you have a nightmare?

C: 稍等，*我们*来辨认一下……
E: Wait, we should read it first...

C: 听——脚步声，很急促，有三、四个人，正在往这边赶来。
E: Listen — footsteps, fast ones. Three or four people, coming this way.

C: 异乡人…不，开拓者们——我将动身前往悬锋城了。
E: Outlanders... no, Trailblazers, I will soon make my way to Castrum Kremnos.

C: 此去恐无归期。我能否将后背交予二位，恳请你们…继续协助逐火的征程？
E: With this departure, I fear that I will never again return. Can I entrust you both to watch my back... and to continue supporting the Flame-Chase Journey in my absence?

C: 还有什么告别的话想说吗？这没准是最后的机会了。
E: Any final goodbyes you want to share? This might be your last chance.

C: 王子来了，快跑！
E: The prince is here. Run!

C: 竟然还有这等勇士？能辨识出他的身份吗？
E: What a brave soul. Do we know who he is?

C: 那个悬锋老将呢，他的情况如何？
E: What about the Kremnoan veteran? How is he doing?

C: 不过二十来年光阴，很快的。
E: Twenty years can go by in no time.

C: 这边来——接下来，我们要穿过这面书架。
E: This way. Now, we'll go through this shelf.

C: 都能循着那踏出的万千道路…在鲜花芬芳的西风尽头重聚。
E: Follow the myriad paths trodden and reunite at the end of the west wind... where flowers bloom in spring.

C: 她的神力所剩无几。现在…感应微乎其微。
E: She doesn't have much divine power left. We can barely sense anything...

C: 星穹列车这是开哪儿去了…？
E: Where did the Astral Express head to this time...?

C: 圣…圣杯战争？！
E: The Ho... Holy Grail War!?

C: 你的思绪渐渐回溯到了那场「圣杯战争」伊始，许多模糊的细节变得清晰了起来。
E: Your thoughts gradually rewind to the beginning of that Holy Grail War as many vague details gain clarity.

C: 姐们，就当是做个慈善呗，让这位小朋友完成一下她的「社会实践作业」又有什么损失呢？
E: Miss, consider it charity! Let this kid finish her "social studies project." I mean, what's the harm in that?

C: 这个人是…通缉犯波提欧？！
E: That guy... That's the wanted criminal Boothill!?

C: 你等待了一会儿，但什么都没有发生。
E: You waited for a while, but nothing happened.

C: 谢谢你救了我。
E: Thanks for saving me.

C: 抱歉，但对初次见面的御主提出的第一个要求竟然是「大吃一顿」…这实在有失为王的仪态。
E: My apologies. To think the first request I make of my new Master is to... devour a feast. Hardly befitting of a king's dignity.

C: 不过是些不值一提的「群演」罢了。
E: Just some disposable extras. Nothing special.

C: 好的…啊？<unbreak>100</unbreak>个？您确定吗？
E: Okay... wait, did you say a hundred? Are you sure about that?

C: 我很自由。
E: I'm totally free.

C: 我将帮助各位一点一点卸去「英雄」的角色妆容，直到抹消你们最初的选择，也抹消一路所受的苦难。
E: I'll help all of you to remove the hero's garish makeup bit by bit, until I've wiped away even the choice you've made to become a hero, until I've wiped away all the pain you've endured on this thorny road.

C: 他打算离开，又突然不忍心地转身看向你。
E: He turns to leave... yet could not help himself from looking back at you.

C: 那么，你要去哪里？你又能去哪里？像你这样并无特长的年轻人不正该找个十六险一金的稳定工作，舒坦地干到世界末日？
E: But where would you go? Is there anywhere you can go? You're young, with no special talents. Isn't your best bet a cushy job with full benefits, clocking in every day until the world ends?

C: 好啊，无论你想要留在哪里，我都会尊重你的选择。
E: Alright. I'll respect your choice no matter what you pick.

C: （身体好沉，不行，还有今天的工作要做。）
E: (My body feels so heavy... But I can't rest. There's still today's work to get through.)

C: 我们哪儿有拦着你？{NICKNAME}，有空聚个餐吗？
E: We're not holding you back, {NICKNAME}. Let's have lunch together!

C: 呦，这不是第一个被关进固有结界的英灵吗？没好好活用你那两条骄傲的腿吗？
E: Yo. If it isn't the first Heroic Spirit to get trapped in her Reality Marble. Didn't you use those long legs of yours well enough?

C: 难得我们意见一致，我挺喜欢这方案的。你怎么说，砂金先生？偶尔当一次正义的伙伴也不错吧？
E: Our opinions rarely align, but I'm fond of this idea. What do you think, Mr. Aventurine? It's nice to play as the hero of justice now and then, isn't it?

C: 让从者面对我们，自己却居身幕后，真是稳健的战略……
E: Letting his Servant meet us, while he stays safely behind the scenes... What a calculating strategy...

C: 说起来，你难道不好奇，老桑博想对圣杯许下的愿望是什么吗？
E: By the way, aren't you curious what old Sampo's wish to the Holy Grail was?

C: 我想想这次让他学什么叫。
E: Let me think... how will he bark this time?

C: Archer，你听听我这声音，可是货真价实的吧？
E: Archer, listen to my voice! It's obviously me, right?

C: 还不开始自相残杀吗？房间，要爆炸了喔？
E: Still not turning on each other yet? Room's about to blow!

C: 燃起来了！{NICKNAME}，我失去的一切，今天都要你千倍奉还！
E: I'm all FIRED UP! {NICKNAME}! Now... I will take back everything you took from me. You shall pay tenfold... No. A thousand fold!

C: 瞧瞧这是谁？一个可怜的小家伙。想要解开朋友的诅咒，却是自身难保。
E: Well, who do we have here? A poor little thing. Trying to save your friend from a curse when you can't even protect yourself.

C: 我提出这一理论的前提是，没有任何知更鸟处于异常状态。
E: I proposed this theory assuming none of the Robins would be in a defect status.

C: 第二场展映已经结束，让我们在最后的噩梦里再会吧！
E: The second screening has ended. See you in the final nightmare!

C: Archer，作为从者，你会站在我这一边对吧？
E: Archer. As my Servant, you'll come with me, right?

C: 退票！退票！
E: Refund! I want a refund!

C: 嗯，我也听过，像什么「公司策划了一切」的阴谋论，还有什么…混乱是被一场车祸终结的，乱七八糟。所以真相是什么？
E: Oh, I've heard those. Conspiracy theories about how the IPC had orchestrated everything and... What was it again? That the chaos was only quelled because of an accident? Ugh, it makes no sense. So, what's the lowdown?

C: 我是真不明白，为什么非得回匹诺康尼？公司给你派任务了？
E: I don't understand. Why are you hell-bent on going back to Penacony? Is this an IPC mission?

C: 成，那咱们继续走吧，帮一位逃犯重返故地，真棒。
E: Alright, then let's keep going. Helping a fugitive return to their home... So exciting.

C: 你不必说那句话的，会显得我们十分可疑。
E: You shouldn't have said that just now. It'll only make us look suspicious.

C: 怎么了这是？
E: Did something happen?

C: 希望在我成为囚徒的这几天，匹诺康尼没有遇上新的麻烦。
E: I hope nothing terrible has fallen upon Penacony while I was in captivity the last few days.

C: 如您所见，我重返故乡只是为了和它道别。您是否愿意高抬贵手，给我一个不留遗憾的机会？
E: As you can see, I've only returned to my home to bid it farewell. Would you be kind enough to give me a chance to say goodbye so that I may leave without regrets?

C: 我们再试一次。
E: Let's try that again.
Oof...

C: 黑暗在眼前沉降，如同宇宙诞生前的混沌。在一片混沌中，一个声音像造物者那般响起……
E: Darkness descends before the eyes, reminiscent of the chaos before the birth of the universe. Amidst this chaos, a voice emerged, resonating like that of the creator...

C: 这条路又通向何方？
E: And where does this path lead?

C: 我…这是……
E: I... This is...

C: 这是大实话，连我都很想学呢。
E: That's true! I'd love to learn how you do it!

C: 是的。我感到不安，甚至惶恐。离开匹诺康尼后，我不再能控制一切。
E: I feel unsettled, maybe even scared. Ever since I left Penacony, I could no longer control everything.

C: 可大多数人不都是这么过日子的？
E: But isn't that how it is for most people?

C: 他可以加入星穹列车。
E: He can join the Astral Express Crew.

C: 那的确意料之外，还是算了吧。
E: That's unexpected, alright... but let's not do that.

C: 别担心。以防万一，我还留了个「后备方案」。先卖个关子，等需要时再揭秘吧。
E: But we'll be fine. Let's just say I have a backup plan. I'll reveal it when the time comes.

C: 星期日自幼在忆质充盈的星系长大，擅长精神治疗，我请他也来做些诊断。
E: I invited Sunday to help with the diagnosis. He grew up in a star system rich in memoria. When it comes to mental healing, he's quite the specialist.

C: 那剩下的人呢？
E: What about the rest of you?

C: 那些家伙是哪来的？坏死数据？活性化的系统锈斑？不应该啊…总不能是军团又打过来了吧？
E: Where did those things come from? Corrupted data? Reanimated systemic rust? No, not likely... It can't be the Legion's second ambush, right...?

C: 唉…有空的话，您还是跟艾丝妲小姐聊聊吧。
E: *sigh* ...I suggest meeting Miss Asta for a chat when you have time.

C: 这太疯狂了，女士！我们费了那么大力气才来到这里，只差一步就能接触到星神本尊了…重启一次「谒见系统」的成本有多高，您也知道！
E: That's beyond all reason, ma'am! We went through so much just to get here! Now we're just one step away from making contact with the Aeon THEMSELF... Please, you know how insanely costly it is to reboot the Audience System!

C: 拍摄断崖对岸的大门
E: Take a photograph of the gate on the opposite cliff

C: 拍摄悬锋斗技场
E: Take a photograph of Kremnos Arena

C: ——对不住，没能保护好你。
E: Uh, pardon me for... not keeping you safe.

C: 与尔化龙秘法比何如？
E: Is it any match for your dragon transmutation?

C: 在想什么吗？
E: How do you view the situation?

C: 「黎明的光沉负于肩，金色的血落向大地——」
E: "With light of dawn heavy upon their shoulders, golden ichor spills unto the land..."

C: 压迫感十足，又相当古旧…是当地的某种文化建筑吗？
E: Imposing and somewhat archaic... Could it be a cultural site?

C: 而不辜负他们的信任，就是我等黄金裔的职责——「纷争」的爪牙，休想伤及民众分毫！
E: To honor their faith is the sacred duty of the Chrysos Heirs— Minions of Strife, you shall not harm these people!

C: 缇宁大人的预言示现了……
E: The prophecy of Lady Trinnon has come true...

C: 不能给英雄们添乱。
E: We mustn't cause more trouble for the heroes.

C: 发生什么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 坐下，然后闭上眼。
E: (Sit down and close your eyes.)

C: 说起来，你们和阿雅聊过了吧，感觉如何？
E: Ooh, you met Agy, right? How did your chat go?

C: 你将三月七的照相机交给了达米亚诺斯……
E: You give March 7th's camera to Damionis...

C: 让丹恒吃掉饲料。
E: Offer the feed to Dan Heng.

C: 原来是两位勇士，失敬失敬！没想到你们也会对社会逸闻感兴趣，当然没问题。
E: Ah, brave warriors, pardon me! I didn't expect you to be interested in such social affairs, but sure thing.

C: 我向各位大人保证，现在开始——你们再也听不见「粉霞天女」这四个字！
E: I assure all of you that from now on, you'll no longer hear the words "Rosy Celestial Maiden"!

C: 万事万物都要遵循世界的底层规则，我还在尝试理解翁法罗斯的。
E: All things have to obey the underlying laws of the world. I'm still trying to understand Amphoreus's laws.

C: 喜欢吗，小青龙？
E: Do you like it, Cold Dragon Young?

C: 浴池
E: Bath

C: 遐蝶小姐也是这么想的，对吧？
E: Isn't this what Miss Castorice believes as well?

C: 我会的。
E: I will.

C: ……战士浸染金血，战袍织作残章……
E: ...Warriors soaked in golden blood, their cloaks tattered...

C: …可我不应靠近你。
E: ...But I should not come near you.

C: 你起床很久了？
E: Have you been up for a while?

C: 原来是虚空开门？
E: Oh, it's not an actual gate?

C: 这就是泰坦的征伐——{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}、它的眷属、还有信仰「纷争」的人们，所向披靡，战无不胜。即便死去，也将拥抱永恒的荣耀。
E: Such is the Titan's conquest — {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, the Titankin, and the people who have faith in Strife sweep away all their enemies. Even in death, they embrace eternal glory.

C: 有点夸张了吧？悬锋城在黄金战争中的失利，我一下能记起来的就有三场。
E: I think you're exaggerating a little. I can think of at least three losses suffered by Castrum Kremnos in the Chrysos War, just off the top of my head.

C: 伟哉，吾主{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}。
E: All hail {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, my master and guide.

C: 「不要靠近…不要进来。」
E: "Venture no closer... Keep out."

C: 丹恒阁下的意思是？
E: What do you mean, Mr. Dan Heng?

C: 只要让这一侧的托盘沉下去就行，对吗？
E: We just have to make the weighing pan on this side drop, right?

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…它在嘲弄我们。
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... is mocking us.

C: 「母亲…母亲？」
E: "Mother... Mother?"

C: 怎么，不喜欢家乡的风味？
E: Why? You don't like the taste of home?

C: 我需要一个解释…
E: I need an explanation...

C: 其余诸事，我不关心。
E: I don't care about anything else.

C: 迷迷…称呼，临时。
E: Mem... Address. For now.

C: {NICKNAME}…你来了。
E: {NICKNAME}... You're here.

C: 我不记得任何事…
E: I don't remember anything...

C: 我们分别了…然后又重逢了。
E: We parted ways... and met again once more.

C: …然后这个生物就出现了。
E: ...This creature appeared.

C: 这样就可以了。我们出发吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Everything's set now. Let's head out, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 不过又是空洞的威慑，和以往并无不同…都是他们内心恐惧的显化。
E: It's nothing more than an empty threat, much like before — a reflection of their inner fears.

C: （啊…原来是个听不见声音的孩子。）
E: (Oh... She's a child who can't hear.)

C: 感谢你，阿雅。那位元老…她又给你添麻烦了吗？
E: Thank you, Agy. That elder just now... Was she causing you trouble again?

C: 依照先前的约定，缇宝会接过「门匠」的职责。
E: Tribbie will take over as the gatekeeper, according to what we've agreed on.

C: 「勇气，荣耀，理智，坚韧，牺牲」……
E: Courage, Honor, Reason, Tenacity, Sacrifice...

C: 嗯？不再看看别的货了吗？
E: Leaving already? Don't you want to browse through my other wares?

C: …格奈乌斯。
E: ...Gnaeus.

C: 是专为扎格列斯之手设计的试炼吗？靠近些看看吧。
E: Could it be a challenge that requires us to use the Hand of Zagreus? Let's get closer and find out.

C: 这下可有的赚了……
E: Looks like I've hit the jackpot this time...

C: 「耐心些，计划尚未完成…<color=#dbc291ff>封存泰坦的灵魂并非易事</color>。祭司们已经在加班加点……」
E: "Be patient, for our plan is still underway... <color=#dbc291ff>Sealing a Titan's soul is no easy endeavor</color>. The priests are already working as fast as they can..."

C: 在一个十分接近的时空里…
E: From a time dimension very close to ours...

C: 来吧…同我诉说吧。
E: Go on... Tell me your tale.

C: 那是我的本源，我的使命。我并非凡人，也不惧怕死亡——即便如此，你也打算为我哀哭吗？
E: This is my purpose, my origin. I am no mortal and I do not fear death... Even so, will you still weep for me?

C: 怎么了吗，阁下？
E: What's wrong, Lord Gnaeus?

C: 格奈乌斯阁下，你听到的召唤……
E: Lord Gnaeus, the calling you're heeding...

C: 「见证…补遗…铭记…书写…令散佚的命运重新聚拢吧……」
E: "Behold... Addendum... Engrave... Record... Let lost fate be rejoined..."

C: 远处就是重渊…啊，我回想起来了，当时没来得及说出口的问题。
E: That's the Abyss in the distance... Oh, that reminds me of the question I didn't get to ask.

C: 格奈乌斯…阁下？
E: Lord... Gnaeus?

C: 白厄的命运由他自己掌舵。
E: Phainon steers his own fate.

C: 小白…呼…会成功的……
E: Snowy... zzz... will succeed...

C: 归还火种本是黄金裔的职责，阁下鼎力相助，我实在感激不尽。
E: Surrendering the Coreflame is a Chrysos Heir's duty. Your selfless assistance is deeply appreciated.

C: 别担心，阿格莱雅。{NICKNAME}可比我有骨气，对吧？
E: Don't worry, Aglaea. {NICKNAME} is tougher than I am, right?

C: 来自天外的旅者，*我们*祈祷泰坦能认可你的资质。
E: Traveler from beyond the sky, let us pray that the Titan acknowledges your worthiness.

C: 旅人口中喃喃着我无法通晓的语言。又或许，他只是心不在焉，对我的提问置若罔闻。
E: The mutters of the traveler are in a language I'm unable to comprehend. Or perhaps, they're just distracted and ignored my question.

C: 泰坦…拒绝…你…我……
E: Titan... Rejects... You... Me...

C: 而我，阿那克萨戈拉斯，身为树庭在奥赫玛公民大会的特派公使，也早已了解你的能耐……
E: While I, Anaxagoras, serving as the Grove's special envoy to Okhema's citizens' assembly, have long known the extent of your abilities...

C: 我自有把握，犯不着操多余的心。
E: Save your concerns. I know very well what I'm doing.

C: （这泰坦倒是悠哉…先探探元老院最近的动向好了。）
E: (This Titan appears to be quite at ease... I should investigate the Council of Elders' recent activities first.)

C: 造化之神竟能创造出你这种信徒，真不知是该感到可笑还是可怜。
E: I'm not sure whether I should laugh or cry right now... I can't believe that a follower such as you could have been made by a Creation Titan.
You...

C: 收手吧，那刻夏。你是我最好的学生，我不能眼睁睁看着你误入歧途。
E: Let it go, Anaxa. As one of my best students, I cannot watch you go down the wrong path without doing anything to stop it.

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Let's begin, then.

C: 喂，你看那个……
E: Hey, look at that...

C: 也好，就让我一探究竟……
E: Very well, then. Let me uncover the truth for myself...

C: 你…说得…呼…人家…先回…呼……
E: You're right... Then I'll... go back to...

C: 有人说过，今天你的眼睛明亮了许多吗？
E: Has anyone told you that your eyes are sparkling today?

C: 我在哀地里亚城外的沼泽间，为她树立了一座衣冠冢，将她留在我亲手送葬的一众死者间。然后，为了觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，我再次踏上了流浪。
E: I erected a cenotaph in her honor in the marshes outside Aidonia's city walls with the others I had laid to rest. Then, I set out once more in search of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}.

C: 该怎么找到它？
E: How would we find them?

C: 真就咱们仨？
E: Really? Just the three of us?

C: 可是，师父…那位姐姐，难道骗了我们？
E: But master... Did that lady really lie to us?

C: 他刚才是不是说了…活着的人？他见过的生者，不仅仅只有我们？
E: Didn't he say... "more living people"? So that means he's seen other members of the living apart from us?

C: 我…可以接受。
E: I... was agreeable to that request.

C: 不错！所以，我才必须让它重回世间，展翅高飞。我早已在高塔布下炼金法阵，只可惜…缺失了最关键的一样材料。
E: That's right! That's why it's imperative that I bring the dragon back to the mortal realm and make it soar the skies again! I have long since prepared my alchemical matrix in the tower, although... I am still missing the most crucial material of all.

C: 我理解了，阿蒙内特阁下。
E: I understand, Lady Amunet.

C: …我将以这漫长人生中全部的<color=#dbc291ff>「爱」</color>，完成最后的奇迹。
E: I will use all the <color=#dbc291ff>"love"</color> I've experienced in this long life to complete the final miracle.

C: 阁下…？
E: Are you...?

C: 人如其名…多美呀。
E: You're as beautiful... as a fleeting butterfly.

C: 走，到冥界去——去看看她将如何给你的提问、我的抉择，带来完美的证明。
E: Let us journey to the nether realm and see how she will substantiate the answer to your question and validate my decision.

C: 向前走，别回头。
E: Keep moving forward and don't look back.

C: 从冰封中醒来时，三月的记忆一片空白。做最坏的打算，我决不能让同样的事发生第二次。
E: When March awakened from the ice, her memories were completely wiped clean. I want to prepare for the worst and prevent something like that from happening again.

C: 我曾有幸和你的老师恩贝多克利斯一同探讨「敬拜学派」的文章。
E: I was fortunate enough to have the opportunity to discuss a treatise about the Venerationists with your teacher, Empedocles.

C: 这学府存放的知识堪比一座森林，最聪明的学者也会在其中迷路。出发前，要再整理下思路么？
E: With the vast amount of knowledge it holds, this academy is akin to a labyrinth of information... Even the cleverest of scholars would easily lose their way in here. I should gather my thoughts before heading in.

C: 看来这两份记录，是同一场景下的前后两段对话。
E: By the looks of them, these scrolls are records of two conversations that took place in the same setting, one after the other.

C: 此地危险，也不适宜久留。
E: Agreed, this place isn't safe. We should leave as soon as we're done.

C: 他的影响力这么大？
E: Does Anaxa hold that much influence?

C: 炼金材料，法阵图样，甚至禁令的封印也不在了…难道都被黑潮摧毁了？
E: Materials for alchemical experiments, matrix diagrams, and even the seal to the lab... They're all gone. Did the black tide destroy it all?

C: 大部分资料看起来仍然属于「智种学派」的研究范围，不过，一份名为「黄金裔背景考察」的手记，夹杂在其中。
E: Most of the materials look to be within the research domain of the Nousporist school of thought. However, a document titled A Study on the Chrysos Heirs' Background is mixed within.

C: 来古士宣告论辩结束，与会者们相继散去……
E: Lygus announces the conclusion of the debate, and the attendees part ways...

C: 有一天，一条恶龙降临了。它的翅膀能够遮蔽太阳，它的利爪足以劈开海浪……
E: Until one day, an evil dragon descended upon the town. Its wings were large enough to blot out the sun, while its claws were sharp enough to rip the waves apart...

C: 我和你的看法一致，{NICKNAME}。
E: I feel the same way as you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们在，风堇姑娘。
E: We are here, Miss Hyacine.

C: Korus...Pamae…
E: Korus... Pamae...

C: 雷电，是它愤怒的悲鸣……
E: Thunder and lightning are the cries of their fury...

C: 你的诅咒，从此不再！
E: Your curse ends here!

C: 阴魂不散，形容的就是你这家伙吧？
E: You just don't know when to quit, do you?

C: 轮回……
E: Cycles...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我脆弱不堪的谎言…迟早会被揭穿哪。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>My fragile lies... would have been exposed sooner or later.</color>

C: 我要加速了，可别跟丢咯！
E: I'm going to speed up. Don't get left behind!

C: 天空后裔的使命已经完成…你们的守望终于可以告一段落了。
E: The mission of the Skyfolk has been completed... Your watch can finally come to an end.

C: 塞纳托斯与瑟希斯的火种已经归位。
E: Thanatos's and Cerces's Coreflames have been returned.

C: 「理性」…
E: "Reason"...

C: 什么动静？
E: What's that sound?

C: 来古士仔细地扫描了损坏的车厢推进装置，随后开始有条不紊地检查其中的部件……
E: Lygus carefully scans the damaged propulsion system, then methodically began inspecting its components...
...Hmm?

C: 这些史料的立场似乎有些偏颇，为了丑化先辈们的事业，把黄金裔滥用神力、悍然掀起战乱的滔天罪行一笔带过……
E: This historical perspective seems biased, glossing over the Chrysos Heirs' abuse of divine powers and their blatant initiation of war, in order to defame our predecessors...

C: 不会有一位公民把票投给你们这群阴影里的刽子手。
E: Not one citizen would cast their vote for you executioners lurking in the shadows.

C: 差点忘了…对于缇宝老师来说，历史不止是书卷上的文字，也是你亲身经历过的时代呀。
E: Oh, I forgot... For Lady Tribbie, history is more than just words on a page — it's something you've personally lived through.

C: 毕竟，这世上知道你还活着的人就只有我一个嘛。为了让你活过泰坦试炼，我可是设计骗过了全世界哪。
E: After all, I'm the only one in the world who knows you're still alive. To make sure you survived the Titan trial, I had to fool the entire world.

C: …我需要衣服。
E: ...I need clothes.

C: 你说话可真是九折十八弯，让人摸不着头脑哪。
E: You've got a way of talking that's hard to follow.

C: 伙计，有点吓人。
E: Bro, you sound kind of scary.

C: 「我托付给你的那样东西，它还在吗？」
E: "The thing I entrusted to you, do you still have it?"

C: 无论如何我都无法相信，她会被区区几个刺客……
E: I just can't believe she'd be taken down by a handful of assassins...

C: 他会站出来引领奥赫玛么？
E: Will he step up to lead Okhema?

C: 谁能想得到呢，老师？顺带一说，那些公式我现在也已经忘得一干二净了。
E: Who could have thought, Professor? By the way, I've completely forgotten those formulas now.

C: 对。而且，您的反应还有些吃惊——因为在过去的几百年间，没有哪个天空一族的孩子跟我做了同样的选择。
E: Yes, and I remember how surprised you were. In all those centuries, no other child of the Sky people had ever made the same choice I did.
Hehe...

C: 白厄在那儿——去找他聊聊吧。
E: There's Phainon. Let's go talk to him.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「以天空百目之名，吾为世间降下天象。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"In the name of the Sky's Hundred Eyes, I bring celestial phenomena upon the world."</color>

C: *嘶鸣*
E: *shrieking*

C: *低吼*
E: *roaring*

C: 是我，索拉比斯阁下。我的名字是雅辛忒丝，伙伴们都叫我风堇。
E: It is me, Lord Solabis. My name is Hyacinthia, and my companions call me Hyacine.

C: 这是晖之民的殿堂，烈阳之子们曾在此举办盛大的仪典，感恩艾格勒的馈赠。
E: This is the hall of the Sunfolk, where the Sunborn once held grand ceremonies to give thanks for Aquila's gifts.

C: 它飞向了画壁的穹顶…我记得那里。
E: They soared toward the mural's dome... I remember that place.

C: 那里…发生了什么？
E: What exactly... happened there?

C: 我们不会让它等太久，就用泰坦之血为「侵晨」开锋吧。
E: We won't make them wait for too long. A Titan shall get Dawnmaker to have its first taste of blood.

C: 不…恐怕太晚了。这片天空已经彻底被黑潮吞没……
E: No... it's too late. This sky has been completely swallowed by the black tide...

C: 你真是倒反天罡！
E: You are turning everything upside down!

C: 「清洗者」为了一个千年不变的目标，甘愿以禁术维系千年的身份和记忆…这大概也是一种扭曲到极致的坚韧吧？
E: As a "Cleaner", she was willing to use forbidden arts to absorb a millennium of identities and memories for an objective that hasn't changed in that time... I suppose this is also a form of extreme but twisted resilience?

C: 跟我来。
E: Follow me.

C: 我洗耳恭听。
E: Speak your terms.

C: 世界将为您的奉献动容，开拓者。
E: The world will be moved by your sacrifice, Trailblazer.

C: 他的躯体是永恒，他的四肢是无尽，他将绵延的黑夜踏在脚下——
E: Eternal in form, limitless in reach, he treads the endless night underfoot—

C: 与白厄一起归还最后的火种。
E: Restore the final Coreflame with Phainon.

C: 如果在那空虚、冰冷而孤独的演算尽头，被「智识」星神标定的失败者，却用极其漫长的时光，亲身完成了证明……
E: If through endless solitary extrapolations in the cosmic cold, the one deemed as a failure by the Aeon of Erudition found proof through the ages...
(That's...?)

C: 呃，是我小时候写的许愿瓶…怎么会这么巧？
E: Wait a second... this is... This is my old Wish-In-A-Bottle! How did it end up here?

C: 那就任意翻开神谕牌，看看未来将如何示现吧。
E: Very well, let's see what future the oracle cards wish to show us.

C: 皮西厄斯老师希望小校舍能多几卷书，孩子们都能学到有用的知识；小披索希望能早点长成和他老爹一样强壮的猎人……
E: Mrs. Pythias wished for more books in her little schoolhouse, wanted us all to learn and grow. And little Piso... he wants to grow up strong like his father, to become a hunter...

C: 尽管它所预示的那些声音、面相和愿望，对现在的我来说还太过遥远……
E: Although those voices, visages, and wishes may seem far away now...

C: 当第一缕光自地平线那端升起，满身伤痕的少年立于焦土，将罹难者逐一掩埋，沉默无言……
E: And when dawn broke over scorched earth, a boy, covered in wounds, buried the dead one by one, his silence heavier than the earth he moved...

C: 阁下所见的景象，发生在光历<unbreak>4926</unbreak>年的门关月。彼时，悬锋王子迈德漠斯率领的孤军兵临奥赫玛城下。
E: Behold! It is the Month of Gate, Light Calendar <unbreak>4926</unbreak>. The crown prince of Kremnos, Mydeimos, has led his forces to the gates of Okhema.

C: 嗨，看见你在，真令人开心♪
E: Hello! Seeing you here sure is a sweet surprise♪

C: …我也绝不是它们的对手？
E: ...I'm still no match for them?

C: 是啊…我怎么会忘记？
E: Of course... how could I forget that?

C: …或者，我们还有一个选择。
E: ...Or, we could always choose another option.

C: 哪怕是微不足道的注脚，也会在故事里留下自己的印记！
E: Even the smallest footnote still leaves a mark in the story!

C: 我能做到的…白厄阁下。
E: I can do this... Lord Phainon.

C: 将黎明归还世间吧。
E: Return the dawn to this world.

C: 当仁不让。我将肩负世界，直至此身焚灭。
E: Without hesitation. I will bear this world until my body turns to dust.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>检测到内存异常释放█非法引用██未声明对象███未实现方法████无法捕获的异常█████</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Memory dump irregularities detected █ illegal references ██ undeclared objects ███ unhandled methods ████ uncaught exceptions █████</color>

C: 别担心，我们不会真的分别，因为我会变成你的一部分……
E: Don't worry. We're not truly parting, because I'm going to become a part of you...

C: 大胆地前进…穿过记忆之门……
E: Step forward... through the Gate of Memory...

C: 对，你就当已经到了<unbreak>99.98%</unbreak>…只差这么一丁点，进程就要跑完了。
E: Yep. Think of it as the program having reached <unbreak>99.98%</unbreak> completion already... and then it's over.

C: 你和丹恒进入这个世界的方法仍是未解之谜，所以要阻止来古士，或者让更多援助加入战局，协议是目前最好的突破口。等你把「律法」搞到手，我们再商讨下一步……
E: We still haven't figured out how you and Dan Heng got inside this world, so influencing protocol is currently our best way to stop Lygus or to call for more reinforcements into this fight. Once you've got Law in your hands, we'll discuss our next steps...

C: （这责任太过沉重，没有盲目乐观的理由。或许像白厄一样，我们注定失败。不过是又一次徒劳的尝试，又一次惨烈的牺牲……）
E: (This duty is far too heavy, and it'd be unwise to be blindly optimistic. Maybe we are doomed to fail just like how Phainon was doomed. It'd be yet another fruitless attempt, and yet another tragic sacrifice...)

C: …来古士？！
E: ...Lygus!?

C: 在漫长的时光中，我潜心呵护权杖的演算，企盼「原动力」能从中萌芽。
E: I have devoted myself over the long years to nurturing the Scepter's extrapolations, hoping that the Primum Mobile would bud from within it.

C: 「一百年前，战火点燃了奥赫玛。」
E: "One hundred years ago, the flames of war consumed Okhema."

C: {NICKNAME}…{NICKNAME}？
E: {NICKNAME}... {NICKNAME}?

C: 在说什么，你的思绪怎么也回到过去啦？
E: What are you murmuring? Still lost in the past?

C: 住口！你勾结悬锋，意图谋反，其罪当诛——
E: Hold your tongue! Conspiring with Kremnos and plotting rebellion are crimes punishable by death...

C: 等等，我们不是敌人…
E: Wait, we're not your enemies...

C: 这可真是…完全出乎意料的展开啊……
E: This is... not what I expected at all...

C: 岁月的流向变得好奇怪。无论是谁带来的影响，那位凯撒都是有备而来，反倒是我们陷入被动了呢……
E: The currents of time have become twisted. Regardless of who caused this, that "Imperator" came prepared. We're the ones at a disadvantage now...

C: 救世的英雄…要怎么和他们说话，他们会不会很咄、咄咄逼人？
E: How are we supposed to talk to the heroes of Deliverance... What if they're really... intimidating?

C: 啊…所以，祂们的确存在。
E: Ah... so THEY do indeed exist.

C: 事至如今，我们也该再起停滞的征程…令拦路的浪潮退去了。
E: Now that things have come to this, we must resume our once-stagnant journey... and force the waves that block our way to recede.

C: 今后就用行动证明自己吧。只要不行僭越之举，我会充分尊重臣子一切选择。
E: From this moment on, prove yourself through your actions. As long as no boundaries are crossed, I fully respect the choices of my subjects.

C: 又要打仗了吗…凯撒入主奥赫玛后，我们就没个安稳日子过。
E: Another war? Ever since the Imperator took control of Okhema, we haven't had a day of peace.

C: 这就是文明延续的浪潮：无论何人都有可能遭到吞食，又或迎来终将陨落的命运。
E: This is the tide that carries civilization forward: Anyone may be devoured, or meet the fate of inevitable decay.

C: 你将会沐浴在希望的金光之中…
E: You will bathe in the golden light of hope...

C: 不是即兴发挥哦？人家背过的，就等着在你面前显摆一下，嘻！
E: Hey, that wasn't improvised, you know? I memorized it so I could show it off to you. Teehee~

C: 如此，我们便能痛击企图扼杀「铁墓」的天外势力，为您将要踏上的无尽征途吹响启程的号角。
E: Then, we will be able to decimate the forces beyond the sky that are trying to annihilate Irontomb, and sound the trumpet for the endless campaign you will then embark on.

C: 在橄榄树荫下，他们说奥赫玛绝不会臣服；在冰冷的死雾中，他们说哀地里亚绝不会臣服；在千门万径起点，他们说雅努萨波利斯绝不会臣服……
E: Under the shade of the olive groves, the people of Okhema said they would never bow to me. In the frozen lethal fog, the people of Aidonia said they would never bow to me. At the beginning of the myriad paths, the people of Janusopolis said they would never bow to me...

C: 若你准备好了，我会随你抗争至最后一刻，「救世主」。
E: If you are ready, then I'll follow you and fight to the last, "Deliverer."

C: 它是来古士唯一在乎的事物。翁法罗斯，你们的荣誉和征程…在他眼中根本不值一提。
E: That is the only thing Lygus cares about. As for Amphoreus? Your glory and campaigns? ...He doesn't care about any of those.

C: 没错。此地的时间流速，无限接近于你熟悉的现实宇宙。
E: Indeed. The speed of time here is infinitesimally close to that of the real universe you're familiar with.

C: 终于！咱们的大英雄{NICKNAME}来救我啦！万岁！
E: Now the great hero {NICKNAME} is finally here to save me! Yippee!

C: 去见证那段为「救世主」驻足的岁月，在转瞬即逝的漫长纪元里，永不屈服于「毁灭」命运的抗争……
E: Witness the time that stood still for the Deliverer, and the resistance that never bowed to the destiny of Destruction over the long years that passed in a flash.

C: 为了翁法罗斯，为了你，也为了你记忆中的「三月七」……
E: For Amphoreus, for you, and for the "March 7th" in your memories...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>警告，发现异常数据传输……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Warning. Abnormal data transmission detected...]</color>

C: 我相信，当*你*跨越万径之门，跃下悬崖时，一定怀抱着同样的想法。
E: I believe that you were thinking the same thing when you stepped through the Gate of Infinity and jumped off that cliff.

C: 这一世，我的族人不必再沉沦于虚伪的指引。悬锋的命运已经洗去血污。
E: In this life, my people no longer have to drown in false guidance. Kremnos has washed the blood off its fate.

C: 掐指一算，风堇也该完成天空一族的仪式了。
E: By now, Hyacine must've completed the Sky people's ritual.

C: 看，往日的风景…浮现了。
E: Look, the scenery of the past... has resurfaced.

C: 我被困在了洞穴之中，但我知晓这一切只是须臾幻梦。我不必在梦中挣扎，只需等待。
E: Yes, I'm trapped in the cave, but I know it's all just a fleeting illusion. I don't struggle in dreams. I wait.

C: 我的尾鳍化作双腿，鳞片化作肌肤，体表的泡沫化作闪光的裙摆。
E: My fins became legs, my scales became skin, and the sea foam on my body became a shimmering gown.

C: 践行神谕的王，我并非谁人的剑旗。我只是彷徨的鱼，在杀戮中寻求清醒。
E: Sovereign who follows prophecy... I am no one's sword. I am just a wandering fish, seeking clarity through bloodshed.

C: 高贵的骑士，王已端坐王座之上，这荣耀同样是你的功勋，让我向你举杯致敬。
E: Noble knight, with the sovereign now enthroned, this triumph is yours as much as hers. Let me raise a toast to you.

C: 这歌声…难道是……
E: That voice... could it be...

C: 她的酣歌令此处岁月驻足，禁锢我的身躯，躲避灵魂的磨损——只为等候你的归来。
E: Her exuberant song halted the passage of time in this place, imprisoning my body and shielding her soul from deterioration, all just to await your return.

C: 「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，生于光历<unbreak>3853</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Carminum" Verginia. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3853</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: 不确定该怎么做，靠你了…
E: I'm not sure what to do. It's up to you...

C: 就像每一个共读睡前故事的夜晚，抹去岁月的霜，擦亮回忆的轮廓，让它重新成为心灵的力量。
E: It's like reading bedtime stories together at night. It wipes away the chill of passing time, sharpens the outline of memory, and restores its power to nourish the spirit.

C: 既然如此，向前游吧，去给这段征途一个恰如其分的结局。
E: In that case... go, swim onward and give this campaign a fitting end.

C: 这是…一座天空中的堡垒？
E: Is this... A fortress in the sky?

C: 此人想法倒是与我一致……
E: She certainly shares my way of thinking...

C: 能为历史书写下规则的，从来都惟有「人」。
E: And only "humanity" can pen laws into history's pages.
...Hah.

C: 是我说的还不够明白么？别忘了人见人爱的{RUBY_B#天才俱乐部#4}「寂静领主」{RUBY_E#}，你也不想那剩下八个复制人，被她当作「智识」的病灶一块儿剪除了吧？
E: Did I not make myself clear? Have you forgotten about our dear {RUBY_B#Genius Society #4}"Lord of Silence"{RUBY_E#}? You wouldn't want her to consider your eight other clones as cancers within the Erudition and chop them all up, would you?

C: 我就在这里。可你们…去哪里了？
E: I'm right here. But where did all of you go?

C: 三月七经历了什么，我们不得而知。但我能肯定，倘若在那位「三月小姐」的忆潮中陷得太深……
E: We have no way of knowing what March 7th has experienced. But I can assure you, if we sink too far into the memoria tide of that "Miss March"...

C: 过度焦虑也无济于事，丹恒。当务之急，是先找到那节车厢的下落。
E: There's no use in agonizing over this, Dan Heng. Our top priority now is to find where that Car landed.

C: 瓦尔特——还有螺丝咕姆先生。
E: Welt, and Mr. Screwllum.

C: 瓦尔特先生，姬子小姐，我会不遗余力地促成列车组的团聚——
E: Mr. Yang, Miss Himeko, I will do everything in my power to bring the Express Crew back together—

C: 这、这是在干什么？格式化？！
E: Wh—What's going on? Formatting!?

C: 难道，是「过去的昔涟」？
E: Could she be a... "Cyrene from the past"?

C: 最初的涟漪，究竟希望这些「记忆」被送往何处呢？
E: Where did the very first ripples want these "memories" to be sent to?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程已完成。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting complete.</color>

C: 我迎来自己的收梢，成为下一朵花绽放的养料。
E: I shall welcome my own decay, becoming nourishment for the next flower's bud.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>，已下载。分支#3，开始归档。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>, downloaded. Branch #3, archiving.</color>

C: 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」
E: "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie."

C: 还好还好，至少在「头脑」方面，咱还算占了上风！本姑娘的绝妙计策，完全超出你的想象。
E: But at least when it comes to brains, I've still got the edge! My brilliant plan? Bet you never saw it coming!

C: 为了这场救世之战，我要倾覆的「律法」只有一条，要献上的半神也只有一位——
E: There is only one law I want to overturn to aid the final battle of deliverance, so I will only offer the life of one demigod...

C: 我…真的好开心……
E: I'm... I'm just so happy...

C: 「我找到你了，{NICKNAME}。做得好。」
E: "I found you, {NICKNAME}. You did well."

C: 「怎么了？你的表情充满犹豫……」
E: "What's the matter? Your expression is one full of hesitation..."

C: 千钧一发啊，幸好我及时把你捞了出来。
E: That was way too close... Good thing I was there to fish you out!

C: 总有一天，你会的。依我见，此行终点离那时分相当近了。
E: One day you will, and as I see it, that day won't be far from the end of this journey.

C: 现在，我只关心一件事，那就是让伙伴们平安归来。
E: I only have one concern right now: bringing my companions back safely.

C: 很高兴见到您，「海洋」的半神，海瑟音女士。
E: It's nice to meet the "Ocean" demigod, Lady Hysilens.

C: 至少，我还记得。
E: At least I still remember.

C: 对荒笛来说，这应该是最好的结局。
E: For Terravox, this was probably the best possible ending.

C: 最后一个问题…
E: One last question...

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 这不合理。一个封闭在权杖中的世界，要如何看见自己在外层空间的模样？
E: That doesn't make sense. How could a world enclosed within the scepter have a way of knowing what it looks like from outer space?

C: 另一种可能性是，为了某种更隐秘的目的，她献祭了自身。
E: Alternatively, she might have sacrificed herself for an even more mysterious purpose.

C: 「原来。是这样。我们。被骗了。」
E: "So that's. What happened. We. Were tricked."

C: 幸好{NICKNAME}的气息没有变弱，感觉又靠近了几分……
E: Thankfully, {NICKNAME}'s presence hasn't weakened. I feel like I'm getting a bit closer...

C: 继续刚才的话题吧。
E: Let's get back on our previous topic.

C: 翁法罗斯的因果，从「大衍穷观阵」中消失了。
E: That Amphoreus's causality has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

C: 来世见，智者。若你的猜想有万分之一的可能……
E: See you in the next life, sage. If there's even a one-in-ten-thousand chance your conjecture is correct...

C: 对于{RUBY_B#博识尊}青金脑袋{RUBY_E#}，「铁墓」出世是计算中的时刻，但我相信祂不会坐以待毙。
E: For the {RUBY_B#Nous}Cobalt Head{RUBY_E#}, the emergence of Irontomb is a calculated Instant, but I don't believe THEY will just sit around waiting for death.

C: 同意。
E: Agreed.

C: 无论如何，静候佳音吧。
E: In any case, we can only hope for the best in all that's to come.

C: 难以置信。整座圣城的居民都聚集在这里。
E: Unbelievable. All the residents of the holy city have gathered here.

C: 无需图腾和神话，名为「生存」的本能——就是人类最初的信仰。
E: There's no need for totems or myths. Humanity's most primal faith is that instinct named "survival."

C: 歌颂「满溢之杯，海列屈拉」，您将海洋酿成甘醇，令宴会的每一次举杯，都将「虚无」驱散。
E: Praise be to "Helektra, Chalice of Plenty," for you brew the ocean into sweet wine, dispelling Nihility with every toast at the feast.

C: 还有什么发现？
E: Find anything else?

C: 就用边上那玩意吧，扎格、扎……
E: Just use that thing over there, Zag, Z...

C: 在你来之前，我一直在想，哀丽秘榭的帷幕外，正在诞生的是一个怎样的翁法罗斯？
E: Before you arrived, I kept wondering... beyond the veil of Aedes Elysiae, what kind of Amphoreus is being born?

C: 这不是我们第一次并肩。
E: This isn't our first time fighting together.

C: 不必遗憾，「第二次」正要开始。
E: There is no need for regret. The "second time" is just about to begin.

C: 喂，救世小子——！抱歉啊，这一回，你日夜惦记的英雄们真来了——！
E: Hey, Deliverer boy! Sorry for before, but the heroes you were always holding out for... they're finally here now!

C: 气氛真融洽呢。
E: I'm glad we're all getting along so well!

C: 用你的话说——「现在，只需无条件地相信」。
E: Or as you've said before: Right now, all that matters is to believe.

C: 「他们还说，泰坦的育儿水平比山羊学派高多了。」
E: "They also say that Titans are way better at raising kids than the Caprists."

C: 启动仪式。
E: Begin the ritual.

C: 怎么突然，成熟了好多！
E: You look so... grown-up all of a sudden!

C: 这个男人，宁愿支离破碎，也不肯倒下。
E: This man would rather fall to pieces than fall to his knees.

C: 回家？
E: Home?

C: 在我看来，这不是坏事。
E: I don't think that's a bad thing.

C: 焚身。作薪。
E: With my flesh. As kindling.
▀█That's▄█▄Good█▄

C: 白厄在铁墓体内等待我们。
E: Phainon awaits us inside the Irontomb.

C: 我才是讲故事的人。
E: I'm the one who tells the story.

C: 「*粗口*，守住防线！不计代价——」
E: "Hold the line! At all costs...!"

C: 「当『记忆』与『开拓』交汇，带领我们见证奇迹吧。」
E: "When the Remembrance converges with the Trailblaze, lead us to witness the miracle."

C: 那么，再做最后一次深呼吸吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: Then, take a deep breath one last time, {NICKNAME}.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>为「毁灭」灌注负世的「爱」——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Infusing a worldbearing "love" into Destruction—</color>

C: 是啊，又一次失败。
E: Yes. Another failure.

C: 他如今的命运并无不同。感性与理性互搏，吕枯耳戈斯诞生自后者。
E: His fate is no different now. Sentiment clashed with reason, and Lycurgus was born from the latter.

C: 未来的无数个日夜，你们可要继续担当彼此最宝贵的依靠呀。
E: In the countless days and nights ahead, you must continue to support each other.

C: 谢谢，风堇小姐。我唯一的小小遗憾，就是没能尽情去触碰这个深爱的世界——希望读到这段话的人们，能代我完成这个心愿。
E: Thank you, Miss Hyacine. My only small regret is that I couldn't fully embrace this world I loved so dearly. I hope those who read these words can fulfill this wish in my place.

C: 制度或许不是关键——武力和资源才是决定性的因素。
E: The system might not be the key. Force and resources are the decisive factors.

C: 不久前，你再次遇见了{RUBY_B#浮黎}「记忆」{RUBY_E#}星神，对么？
E: Not long ago, you crossed paths with the {RUBY_B#Fuli}Aeon of Remembrance{RUBY_E#} again, didn't you?

C: 两条路，只有一条是对的。机器头没有告诉我答案。
E: There are two paths, and only one leads to the right end. And Droidhead didn't tell me the answer.

C: 多么绚烂的记忆……
E: Such a splendid memory...

C: 当「记忆」随风逝去，{RUBY_B#德谬歌}「爱」{RUBY_E#}也会留下种子，变成{RUBY_B#Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}「哀怜」{RUBY_E#}……
E: When "memory" drifts away with the breeze, {RUBY_B#Demiurge}"love"{RUBY_E#} leaves behind a seed, and turns into {RUBY_B#Philia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}"lament"{RUBY_E#}...

C: >>>发生了未经处理的异常(3/3) 对象名:"新的…空白…"
E: >>> An unhandled exception occurred (3/3) Object name: "A new... blankness..."

C: 她们也会把这一幕记录下来，写入永恒的诗篇吧？
E: Would they also have recorded that scene into the eternal saga?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>96.024%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>96.024%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 桃子。别走。
E: Peach. Don't leave.

C: 「昔涟」的记忆。全都，保存下来！
E: "Cyrene's" memories. I will, preserve them all!

C: 世界前所未有地安静，真好呀，仿佛能听见心跳的声音。
E: The world has never been so quiet. It's so good... It's as if I can hear the sound of my heart beating.

C: 「你不知道」，对吧？
E: "I don't know." Right?

C: 别了，后辈们。在未来有限的时间中……
E: Farewell, juniors. In the limited time we have left to spend with each other...

C: 斯蒂芬的工作已经完成。做好准备——
E: Stephen's work is done. Let's get ready.

C: 法眼为我卜测到铁墓那抹消万物的一击，同时也告诉我，这一击避无可避、十死无生。
E: The omniscia foresaw Irontomb's obliterating strike. It also told me there was no avoiding it, no surviving it.

C: 但祂不再言语，这便是答案的所有。或许你回答了；或许没有。一切已然发生——
E: But THEY speak no more. Therein lies the entirety of the answer. Perhaps you have completed the reply, or perhaps not. All has come to pass...

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 那刻夏
E: Anaxa

C: 你还是过来吧，这样调查一点也不效率。
E: *sigh* Make your way over here then, there's no point in trying to search like this.

C: 对了，亚伯拉罕呢？你没找到他？
E: By the way, where's Abraham? Did you find him?

C: 可恶，我可不想回去！
E: Ugh. I don't wanna go back!

C: 别听他的，说好了由{NICKNAME}主持全局。我们两个，究竟孰真孰假？
E: Don't listen to him. It's up to {NICKNAME} to make the call. Who's real and who's fake?

C: 是这种憋不住…
E: So this is why you were in a hurry...

C: 是有过一段快乐的时光…啊，是有过一段快乐的时光。
E: We did have a good time... yes... it really was quite good.

C: 那恶棍竟然把机修间炸出一个大洞，乘着飞行器扬长而去！给我留下一地的烂摊子。
E: That scoundrel blew a giant hole in the maintenance room and flew away in an aircraft! Leaving me with all the mess.

C: 所以我生气的是，这老斑鸠没把自己的逃亡计划漏给我，哪怕一丁点儿。
E: So, I was angry that the old scoundrel didn't share his breakout plan with me. Not even a little bit.

C: 嗯，其实这类谣言本与我们无关，但事关艾丝妲那姑娘的声誉，佯装不知也不是无名客的作风。
E: Well, while these rumors have nothing to do with us, they do concern the reputation of young Asta. And turning a blind eye is not the way of the Nameless.

C: 现在电梯开不了，困在下面的人也上不来。
E: The elevator is out of commission, so the people stuck on the floor below can't make it up.

C: 找到「瓜农」了吗？她怎么说。
E: Did you find Gossipmonger? What did she say?

C: 我当时真就被气到浑身发抖，手脚冰凉，大热天的全身冒冷汗。
E: I was so angry that I was shaking. I broke out in a cold sweat!

C: （告知理查的所作所为）
E: (Tell her about Richard's actions)

C: 她没有按时回信，应该只是这次情况特殊罢了！
E: This is the only time she hasn't replied to me.

C: 你不争气！
E: Shame on you!

C: 去监控室调查看看有没有线索…看起来像是有人对中继器动了手脚……
E: I better check the surveillance in the monitoring room... it looks like someone has done something to the repeater...

C: 天涯何处无芳草。
E: There's plenty of fish in the sea.

C: 我一分不收。
E: I won't charge you anything.

C: 不，正是一分一毫的小事，才支撑起了复兴的全局。
E: I disagree. All these minor acts of kindness are precisely what make the reconstruction possible.

C: 你怎么在外面？
E: What are you doing out here?

C: …虽然指令包括但不限于我刚才提到的三种，但显然这条不在《剧本》设置之中。
E: ...Although the instructions are not limited to the three I just mentioned, clearly this is not in the script.

C: 嗯…但我没想到，她会不断主动向外界求援，直到这一切被你们发现。
E: Right... But I never expected she would keep asking for help from the outside world until you eventually found out about all this.

C: 这位冰冷而妥帖的法政科向导一如既往的微笑着。
E: The cold, proper guide from the Department of Galactic Geopolitics is always smiling.

C: 为什么他们为星神们描绘的形象都不同，甚至有所谓的「古兽崇拜」呢？
E: Why are they depicted so differently? Some even have this so-called "Leviathan Worship?"

C: 唔，我大概明白你心中的疑惑了。从短视点的目光看来，无视大家的安危，让他们无止尽地工作，看起来是好事，实则祸害无穷。
E: Well, I do get your point to some extent. It might seem productive, at least in the short term, to just disregard people's safety concerns and force them into nonstop work. But in the real world, such practices will only spell disaster.

C: 是他这个年纪会写的。
E: I think guys his age do tend to write like this.

C: 啊哈哈，空间站公认的…不小心说顺口了。
E: Haha, he probably should've been named Casanova... I've gotten used to saying it, anyway.

C: 那束光，正是大家幸福的笑容。
E: That light... was the happy smiles on all your faces!

C: 哦，是你啊。好久不见！最近过得不太好吗？怎么看你表情很复杂，眉毛都拧到一起去了？
E: Oh, it's you! Long time no see. Are you okay? You look troubled — that's quite a wrinkled brow.

C: 别人踢来的皮球，正面接下就好。我们也踢回去，岂不是承认自己跟他们一个水平？
E: When the ball is in our court, we should just take it. If we kick the ball back into the other court, that just means we've lowered ourselves to their level, wouldn't you say?

C: 卢卡奇？哦，我知道是谁了。
E: Lukacs? Ah, I know who he is.

C: 在下正义之士卢卡奇，自从成为科员以来，一直在为空间站的非人生物合理权益四处奔走。
E: I am Lukacs the justice fighter, and I have been fighting for the rights of non-human creatures on the space station ever since I became a researcher here.

C: 阿兰大哥也很想你。
E: Big brother Arlan misses you too.

C: 职责之外，还完成了呜呜伯的请托，不失为一举两得之策。
E: Apart from our duties, we can also help with Wubbaboos' request at the same time, which is like killing two birds with one stone.

C: 「悲伤的呜呜伯将聚集于冷僻无人的房间，共享彼此的哀思。」
E: "Sad Wubbaboos will gather in an empty room and share their unhappy thoughts."

C: 你应该知道吧？前不久，这里遭到了「反物质军团」的袭击，在那场骚乱中，各舱段的主控系统也瘫痪了。
E: You probably know that this place was recently attacked by the Antimatter Legion. In the chaos, the master control system for each zone was paralyzed.

C: 哦，说了这么多，还没跟你解释我在这儿做什么——刚才也提到，我正在继续调查这件事。
E: Oh, I haven't properly explained to you what I'm doing here... As I mentioned, I'm investigating this situation.

C: 这也太奇怪了，难道她真的就这样走了？千里迢迢来到这里，最后却什么都没带走，也什么都没有留下，这么潇洒的吗？
E: So strange... Did she really leave just like that? She came all this way and didn't take anything with her, nor leave anything behind.

C: 把我给问住了。但…以这位骇客的技术，想骇入主控室应该不是问题。
E: You got me there. But... with the skills of this hacker, I do think it's possible.

C: 百、百密一疏啊，正常人第一反应都是去查不认识的名字，谁会想到问题出在自己身上？
E: I—It's an honest mistake. The reaction of any ordinary person is to check for unfamiliar names, right? Who would think to check their own name?

C: 对方可能闯入了办公室…
E: That person could've gotten into the office...

C: 请勿在意，这只是一个比喻。
E: Please, it's only a metaphor.

C: 没关系，我会在此等候。
E: Take your time, I'll be waiting.

C: 其实她走在正确的路上，只是走得还不够远——相信用不了多久，她就会意识到这点。
E: She's actually on the correct path. She just needs to continue a little further — I trust that she too will realize this soon.

C: 这取决于您的理解，我和黑塔向来有话直言，这样尖锐的交锋实属常有——说它完全是表演，也不妥当。
E: That is up to you to interpret — Herta and I have always been frank with one another. Sharp conversations of that nature happen on a regular basis. It wouldn't be fitting to call it an act.

C: 抱歉，银狼小姐。您期待的这些都不会发生。现在，您可以离开了。
E: My apologies, Miss Silver Wolf, but none of what you are hoping for will be happening today. You may leave now.

C: 不愧是黑塔大人。
E: As expected of Madam Herta.

C: 已经让公司的家伙把账号全部冻结了，估计那小姑娘现在正抱着电脑痛哭流涕吧，哈哈！
E: I already notified someone at the IPC to freeze all her accounts. She's probably crying in front of her computer right now. Hahaha!

C: 那当然，你可是和银狼本人交过手的，区区演习，自然不在话下。
E: Of course. You've fought the real Silver Wolf. It's only natural that this practice is incomparable to the real thing.

C: 朋友，没问题！
E: No problem, friend!

C: 我不能理解，这有违常识，但…我必须努力跟上她的思维。如果不能站在和她同样的角度思考，我永远无法完成这份工作。
E: I cannot fathom that. This goes against everything I know. But... I need to keep up with her thinking. If I cannot stand on the same grounds as her, I will never be able to complete this job.

C: 我的所言所行绝无虚假，你美得有如朝阳下烈放的鲜花！
E: Both my words and actions come from the bottom of my heart. You are indeed beautiful — like flowers blooming in the morning sun!

C: 但你连盆栽都夸！
E: You did just compliment a plant...

C: 三、三月乘客，会不会出了什么意外……
E: D—Did something happen to March...?

C: 不对不对，如果真的像丹恒说的那样，这家伙想都不想就能把列车一口吞掉，哪还顾得上挑食啊！
E: Although, if what Dan Heng said is true, I doubt something that could swallow the Express would be a picky eater...

C: 看来最为巨大的丑恶之徒…竟在列车外！
E: It would seem our enormous, hideous enemy... is right outside!

C: {NICKNAME}，你发现了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, have you noticed?

C: 唉…我们原本是要去哪里来着帕？
E: *sigh* Where were we supposed to be going again?

C: 一起呆久了总有感情是不是！不过先停一停啊！我虽然这么说，但列车还是能最后挣扎一下的吧？！
E: Gah! Are you really about to tell a story? Look, it's been nice meeting you all and I'd love to shoot the breeze, but are you people really just gonna give up!?

C: 这个想法…如果当众提出，定会被你们立刻否定。但身为骑士，我一定要帮助列车解决问题。
E: Were I to air such a proposition among you, verily, it would be dismissed in an instant. Yet as a knight, it is my duty to aid the Express in resolving this issue.

C: 洗车星只会帮忙清洁列车车厢的外壳帕，星球上的站点工作人员会把外壳擦得锃亮…不过列车里的座垫、房间、窗户，和那些边边角角的地方…还得我们自己来！
E: Washtopias only clean the exterior of the train — and they do a great job, too! However, the seats, rooms, windows — all the nooks and crannies inside the Express... we have to do those ourselves!

C: 我想先休息下。
E: A rest sounds good.

C: 黑塔女士没把这事放在心上，外出巡访去了。
E: She's away on a visit. This issue didn't seem to trouble her much.

C: 他们想和黑塔开展一些合作，邀请我同行，担任技术顾问。我欣然接受，好近距离观察这群「大聪明俱乐部」的会员如何将公司财产挥霍一空。
E: They want to start some new collaborations with Herta and have graciously extended an invite for me to play the role of science consultant. It's delightfully amusing. I can't wait to witness firsthand how these geniuses from the so-called "Super Smart Club" squander the IPC's vast resources.

C: 汪！
E: Woof!

C: 这是你要的账号，绿色干净，直连内网毫无压力。
E: Here's the account you asked for. It's legit and secure, allowing you to connect straight to the intranet.

C: 嘘！嘘！你喊那么大声干嘛？不要命啦？！
E: Shhh! Why are you being so loud! Do you wanna disappear too!?

C: …就不会给你这个机会。
E: ...I wouldn't give you the chance.

C: 不清楚，但阮•梅小姐似乎对生活琐事不太关心，日常只出入主控舱段和月台。或许你可以去附近找找？
E: I'm not sure, but she doesn't seem to get around much. She spends most of her time between the master control zone and the railway platform. Maybe you can start your search there?

C: （……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
E: (...So I really can't say anything about her.)

C: 你要解决这事，就去收容舱段看看吧。去了就明白了。
E: If you want to solve the problem, go check out the storage zone. Then you'll understand.

C: 在我的想象中，这会是一种…生来就是「天才」的全新生命。我打算以天才俱乐部#8拉姆为它们命名……
E: In my imagination, these lifeforms would be a new variety that are born as geniuses. I planned to name them after Lambda, member #8 of the Genius Society...

C: 不错，有眼光！
E: Good. You have great taste!

C: 激活特殊的联觉信标。
E: Activate the Synesthesia Beacon.

C: 可以让我跟「芝士流心」单独说话吗？
E: Can I talk alone with Molten Cheese Tart?

C: 它称自己是豆沙灰灰味的。
E: It refers to itself as "Gray Bean Paste"

C: 为避免对科学产生盲从，我谨慎提出质疑——阮•梅能否如坐标轴般剥去外界纷扰，探明生命最本源、也最美丽的存在形式？
E: To avoid blind faith in science, I cautiously raised a query... Would Ruan Mei be able to peel away external influences? Just like pinpointing a coordinate, would she be able to uncover life's most primordial and beautiful form of existence...?

C: （什么东西打开了？）
E: (Did something just open?)

C: 那就是…「令使」。
E: And that is... an Emanator.

C: 就叫做「走在自己的道路上吧，阮•梅！我们永远支持你！」
E: Let's call it "Walking Your Own Path, Ruan Mei! We'll always support you!"

C: 好热闹啊……
E: So lively...

C: （芝士流心和豆沙灰灰，联合起阮•梅培育的各种生物给她写的一封信。）
E: (Molten Cheese Tart and Gray Bean Paste teamed up with various creatures nurtured by Ruan Mei and wrote her a letter.)

C: 我明白了…原来你是这样想的。这样吧…不如我们做个小实验？
E: I see... So that's what you think. How about this... Why don't we do a little experiment?

C: 华劳斯，我永远不会忘记你的雪中送炭，我一定会把期刊办成，让我俩的名字共同镌刻在贝洛伯格的科学史上！
E: Wallace, I will never forget how you came to save me in my moment of need. I assure you that I will finish this journal and have our names etched in the history of Belobog together!

C: 歌剧院的舞台不能没有女主角，你是唯一有这个能力的人。所以，塞琳请答应我，不要让我们的演出谢幕。
E: The theater's stage will need a prima donna, and you are the only person who can do it. So, Celine, please promise me that you won't allow our performances to end here.

C: 直面恐惧才能战胜恐惧！
E: Facing your fear is the only way to defeat it!

C: 来，客官，请——
E: Please enjoy!

C: 我和工程师给这孩子做了些升级。现在它不仅能帮你处理更多事务，还学会了主动帮助他人。
E: The engineers and I gave this little one a few upgrades. Not only can it help you with more things now, but it has also learned to actively help others.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 不如一起下去换个心情？
E: Why not come with us for a change of scenery?

C: 对哦，感觉你每次都是轻装上阵…等等，你不会连睡觉都穿着这身衣服吧？！
E: Huh, you do seem to travel light. But... don't you at least need some pajamas!?

C: 活在风雪中的人们是怎么过节的呢……
E: Brr! How do people living in all this snow celebrate anything...?

C: 这样的画有三十四幅……
E: With <unbreak>34</unbreak> of this type of painting...

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 你们说的这个人，是这帮黑衣人的头头吗？
E: The person you're talking about — are they in charge of the people in black?

C: 末日兽、星核、幻胧，什么强敌咱没见过？就凭你这两下子，也想拦住我们？
E: Pfft! We took down the Doomsday Beast, the Stellaron, and Phantylia. Did you really think YOU could stop us?

C: 在这样的背景下，母星的自然环境日渐恶劣。不知从我童年的哪一刻开始，人们必须戴着呼吸面罩才敢在街道上行走，耳边从早到晚都会传来撕心裂肺的咳声。
E: Given these circumstances, the natural environment of my home planet became increasingly harsh. I don't recall the exact moment when it happened, but people started wearing respirators just to walk down the street. All you could hear were the wheezing coughs of the people — day and night.

C: 当然，这里统计的是平均数据。托帕本人接手的项目，整体成功率在八成往上。她的业务能力无疑是最拔尖的那一档。
E: This is the overall average across all IPC projects. The success rate of projects personally handled by Topaz is above <unbreak>80%</unbreak>. She's undoubtedly one of the most capable people in her field.

C: 嗯？这么大个机器人，别表现得这么拘谨嘛~问就是了。
E: Haha, you're awful polite for a big robot. Ask! Don't be shy!

C: 那当然啦~「无名客」的名气可大啦，毕竟你们追随的是大名鼎鼎的阿基维利嘛。
E: Of course! The Nameless have quite the reputation — you're following in the footsteps of the great Akivili, after all!

C: 会有的，以后会有的~可别低估了「无名客」在星系间的名气呀，毕竟你们追随的是大名鼎鼎的阿基维利嘛。
E: I'd be surprised if you didn't! Don't underestimate the reputation of the Nameless out among the stars — you're following in the footsteps of the great Akivili, after all!

C: 这么说，你愿意收回之前的决定？至于那笔债务，我们一定会想办法慢慢偿还。只是这需要时间……
E: Then, are you willing to retract your previous decision? As for the debt... we'll find a way to gradually repay it, but it'll take some time...

C: 守护者大人一定面临着空前巨大的压力…我们真的给不了她任何帮助吗？真是让人……
E: The Madam Guardian must be under a lot of pressure... Is there really nothing we can do to assist her?

C: 喔，我要报名！
E: Oh, I want to sign up!

C: 他性子急，我怕打起来…
E: He's short-tempered, I'm worried he could start a fight...

C: 哈哈哈，怎么可能，最多降我一两个职级，再扣点奖金。别担心，我现在工作可不是纯为了赚钱~
E: Haha, that's unlikely. At most, they might lower my rank and reduce my bonus a bit. But don't worry, I work for far more than just a paycheck.

C: 你在说啥？瓦赫医生是「穷人们的医生」，他总是给我们分发免费的药物，还会仔细询问我们吃药之后的感受。
E: What do you mean? Dr. Vache was a people's doctor — he handed out free medicine. He even followed up with detailed questions on how we felt.

C: 下层区一直都缺乏药物资源，据说这些药都是瓦赫医生自己研制出来的。
E: The Underworld is always short on medical resources — they say that Dr. Vache made all his own medicine himself.

C: ——一定不能把这些信息告诉娜塔莎医生，明白了吗？你要是敢违反这条规矩，后果自负！
E: ...You must not tell any of this to Dr. Natasha, you hear? If you break the rule, you'll face the consequences!

C: 我不怪你，{NICKNAME}。感谢你事后还能来找我，这份信任对我来说很重要。
E: I don't blame you, {NICKNAME}. After everything you heard, I'm grateful you came back to find me. Your trust is important to me.

C: 关于瓦赫，你应该也已经听到许多不同的意见了。{NICKNAME}，能告诉我你的想法吗？
E: I'm guessing you've heard a lot of different opinions on Vache. What do you make of him, {NICKNAME}?

C: 您是娜塔莎的病人，记得吗？
E: You're one of Dr. Natasha's patients, don't you remember?

C: 我会找到办法处理哥哥留下的这些试剂，「互助会」再也不能打着他的旗号胡作非为了。
E: I'll find a way to dispose of Vache's leftover reagents. Next time the "Mutual Aid Society" wants to whip up a quack cure? They'll be out of luck.

C: 我一定会想办法争取到足够的医疗资源，帮大家渡过各自的难关。如果有必要的话，我会到上层区去求助……
E: I will find a way to access more medical resources and help you through your struggles. If I must, I'll get help from the surface...

C: 搏击俱乐部全新赛季现已开始！\n详情请前往搏击俱乐部咨询掘掘博士！
E: The all-new season of Fight Club has begun!\nFor further information, go ahead and ask Dr. Dig about it at the Fight Club itself!

C: 搏击俱乐部全新赛季现已开始——您可以报名参与「羽量级」的比赛了！
E: Fight Club's all-new season has begun — You can now register for the featherweight matches!

C: {NICKNAME}，您来了！「中量级」赛事现已开放！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're here! The middleweight league is now open!

C: <size=36>「希罗」与「尤尔」！</size>
E: <size=36>Silo and Yur!</size>

C: <size=36>掌声有请，不带感情的「异界拳王」——{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>Give it up for the emotionless Limbo Champion — {NICKNAME}!</size>

C: <size=36>巅峰争霸战，正式开始！</size>
E: <size=36>The battle for the top begins!</size>

C: 显然，在保持自由身的情况下，水魈还是会回到收容舱里睡个好觉。你不禁怀疑，它是否已经罹患斯德哥尔摩综合症。
E: Apparently, although it is free, the Xenohydro still returns to the Storage Zone to sleep. You can't help but wonder if it has Stockholm syndrome.

C: 我还有第三个选择。
E: I have a third option.

C: 咕噜噜……
E: *gurgle*...

C: 呵，都看见了？他连我们姓甚名谁也不知道呢。
E: Oh, see? He doesn't even know our names.

C: 这是怎么回事…
E: What's going on...

C: 我就说吧，你桑博哥哥的判断一向准确！
E: I told you so. My diagnoses have always been accurate!

C: 有些事，不知道会活得更幸福。
E: Ignorance is bliss.

C: 你很想念他，对吗？
E: You miss him, right?

C: 我就知道你的选择一定能让我满意。爸妈收到这花，一定会喜出望外的。
E: I knew you'd pick the right flowers. Mom and dad will be so happy.

C: 不过，在解决一个关键问题之前…博物馆还不能对外开放。
E: However... there's a problem that needs to be resolved before it can open to the public.

C: 你之前是不是……
E: Didn't you already say that...?

C: 采访一下，你喜欢这份工作吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: So I'm curious, how do you like being the museum manager, {NICKNAME}?

C: 谁会干这种缺德事？
E: Who would do such a depraved thing?

C: 我和妹妹在旁边听了很久，一直等到他们几个「呼呼呼」地睡着了……
E: We hid in the shadows and waited until we heard them snoring...

C: 重组「齿轮与智慧」
E: Rebuild Gears and Wisdom

C: {NICKNAME}，要是你还对博物馆的经营感兴趣的话…不妨再去和助理艾丽斯小姐说一声，聊聊工业展区开放的相关事宜？
E: {NICKNAME}, if you're still interested in managing the museum... why don't you go talk to Miss Eris about opening up the Industrial Hall?

C: 看来你已经抓住规律了嘛……
E: ...So you guessed it already.

C: 我没猜错的话，你们是一起从历史文化博物馆赶过来的？这段时间里真是辛苦二位了。
E: If I'm not mistaken, the two of you just rushed over here from the History and Culture Museum? I appreciate your coming here on such short notice.

C: 没有获取到跟文物盗窃案直接相关的线索，但有一件事值得留意……
E: We didn't find anything directly related to the museum thefts, but there was one thing worth noting...

C: 果然也是个公子哥。
E: Guess he comes from old money too?

C: 我看也是，被我抓到的话一定得好好教训一顿。
E: I know, right? I'll teach them a lesson myself if I catch them in the act, that's for sure.

C: …咳，我可以当作没听见喔。
E: ...Ahem. I'll pretend I didn't hear that.

C: 你们想让我去会会他？
E: You want me to go and meet him?

C: （没办法…只能先等佩拉过来了。）
E: (Too late now... I'll have to wait for Pela to get here.)

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 好了，快走吧快走吧——虎克已经等不及啦！
E: Alright. Let's go, let's go — I can't wait!

C: 欸？！现在是该这样的吗…那好吧……
E: Eh!? Is this how the interview should be conducted... Fine...

C: 那么…我要去准备她说的面试了——希望我之后能有幸在博物馆里为你导览，回见。
E: Now... I need to start preparing for the interview she mentioned. I hope I'll have the chance to be your museum guide soon. See you around.
Well...

C: 嗐…那我就跟你直说了吧。
E: Okay, I'll cut to the chase.

C: 艾丽斯…小姐，是吧？我是来交志愿导览员申请表的，给你就行了吗？
E: Are you... Miss Eris? I'm here to submit my volunteer guide application form. Should I give it to you?

C: 原来如此。之前我说什么都没用，看来还是要我们的大英雄{NICKNAME}出马呢。
E: I see. I've been trying to make you come for so long, but to no avail. Seems like {NICKNAME} is the only one who can convince you.

C: 谢谢你，希儿。至于辅助评定人{NICKNAME}——你先去忙自己手头的事吧。等你忙完了，我们就正式开始面试。
E: Thank you, Seele. As for {NICKNAME}, the assistant assessor, you may get on with your things first. We'll start the interview when you are ready.

C: 噗，这都哪儿跟哪儿啊……
E: Pfft, no way, telepathy ain't real!

C: 史瓦罗？我哪会认识。再说了，现在地下这么乱，大家都各扫门前雪的，谁还管其他人的事儿啊！
E: Svarog? I don't know much. The underground is in turmoil, everyone's focused on their own issues. Who has time to get involved in someone else's affairs?

C: 我没有什么要问的了。
E: I've nothing to ask.

C: 哔嘟…脑波扫描模组确实已经损坏。但人工输入搜寻功能仍可正常运行。
E: Beep, beep, beep... My brainwave scanner module is indeed broken. However, manual input for search is still operable.

C: 输入界面在哪？哦，找到了……
E: Where's the input interface? Ah, found it...

C: 时间差不多了，我再说最后一次，虎克——再在外面惹事的话，我就要没收洞洞机了。听到了没？
E: That's enough for now. I'll say this one last time, Hook: If you cause any trouble again, I'll take Diggertron away. Do you understand?

C: 你知道商人最重要的是什么吗？信誉！你们这样凭空污蔑，万一影响到了我的生意…那可是要负责任的！
E: You know what a businessman values the most? Reputation! If your slander ruins my reputation and harms my business... You'll pay for that!

C: 虎克大人是什么建议呢？
E: Boss Hook, what do you think?

C: 咦！厨子呢，那个厨子跑哪里去了？
E: Huh!? Where's the cook? Where did he go?

C: 「矿灯」巴列维…我知道了！谢谢你，桑博叔叔。
E: Balaway the Miner's Lamp... Got it! Thanks, Mr. Sampo.

C: 唔…地髓探针已经坏掉了，这东西怕是已经运转不了了。
E: Hmm... the Geomarrow Probe is damaged. I'm afraid this thing won't work anymore.

C: 哎哟，是{NICKNAME}啊，总算把你给盼来了！快快快，帮我个忙，咱俩关系这么好，你不会见死不救吧?
E: Oh, it's {NICKNAME}. You are finally here! Come on, do me a favor. We are such good friends. You won't just watch me suffer, right?

C: 当初有个老矿头，出卖了自己所有兄弟才把它搞到手…可惜才拿到没多久，他某位兄弟的女儿上门复仇，图还没捂热，那家伙就「呜呼」了。
E: Once upon a time, there was this old miner who betrayed all his friends just to get his hands on this map. Unfortunately, not long after, one of his friends' daughters came for revenge and killed him.

C: 确实，这都被你发现了，桑博老哥的商业眼光真敏锐。
E: Indeed, you are right, Sampo. You really are the one with the business acumen.

C: …你们也不用再像现在这样寄人篱下，没有尊严地活着了。
E: ...and you won't have to rely on the charity of others. We'll finally be living with the dignity we deserve.

C: 不…不好了！有、有怪物向这边来了！
E: Oh no! Monsters are coming this way!

C: 任务到这里就算告一段落了，但我还需要组织铁卫和「地火」进行善后。
E: Looks like we accomplished our mission. I need to get back to the Guards and Wildfire to wrap things up.

C: 嘶…「地火」怎么还不来？
E: Ssss... Why isn't Wildfire here yet?

C: 啊，其实我有备用的地髓块……
E: Oh, actually, I have some spare chunks of Geomarrow...

C: …好像有好吃的！
E: ...There's food in here!

C: 啊，但是……
E: Ah, but...

C: 之前我都没来得及给它拍照，但现在是个好机会……
E: I didn't even get to take a photo of it last time. Now's a good chance...

C: 呃…这个……
E: Um... Err...

C: …我回来了！
E: ...I'm back!

C: 啊？你在说啥？
E: Huh? What are you talking about?

C: 为什么，为什么我到现在才想起来？小时候的记忆好模糊……
E: Why... Why didn't I remember this until now? My childhood memories are so blurry...

C: 你当时年龄太小了。
E: You were too little to remember clearly.

C: 先说好消息吧。
E: The good news.

C: 当然不是，但功绩也不次于那个哦！
E: Of course it wasn't that. But his accomplishments are nothing to be scoffed at!

C: 真没用呀，荣誉队员！到最后还是得靠漆黑的虎克大人亲自出手嘛。
E: What a shame, honorary member! In the end, we still had to rely on Pitch-Dark Hook the Great herself.

C: 这明明是你的同类！
E: This is clearly a robot, just like you!

C: 咦？难道…是帕斯卡一直在修缮这座废弃的城镇吗？
E: Huh? Could it be... Pascal has been repairing this abandoned town?

C: 放心吧，祝你们顺利啊。
E: No worries, I hope things go smoothly.

C: 嗐，术业有专攻呗。「地火」虽然知道史瓦罗的根据地在哪儿，可从来没进去过啊。
E: *sigh* My specialties in the field, perhaps? Wildfire may know where the base is, but have they ever been inside?

C: 说好的线索呢？
E: What about these clues of yours?

C: 可别把史瓦罗当成普通机器人，他可是…呃，很特殊的。
E: Don't take Svarog as an ordinary robot. He's, uh... special.

C: 请伸出右手。
E: Please extend your right hand.

C: 欸？怎么又是我？很痛的好不好！
E: Huh? Me again? It hurts, y'know!

C: 克拉拉？啊，是咱们在大矿区见过的那个小姑娘？
E: Clara? Oh, the girl we saw in the Great Mine?

C: 嗯，这样的话，外圈的大家就不用担心失去光和热了。
E: Yes. The people on the outskirts don't need to worry about heat or light now.

C: 唔，究竟该怎么说服她……
E: *sigh* How are we gonna convince her?

C: 布洛妮娅！没想到刚才你会站出来挺我们，说得也太好了吧！
E: Bronya! I didn't know you'd stick up for us like that back there — well said!

C: 听说了没？那些蠢货好像在矿区打起来了，还是靠史瓦罗大佬出面才摆平的。
E: Did you hear? Those idiots got into a fight in the mine, haha! It only got settled after Boss Svarog showed up.

C: 所以我们想了个法子，干脆组织一场民间拍卖会，让大家物尽其用，各取所需！
E: So we intend to hold a public auction. It will allow folks to make the best use of the stuff they have by exchanging it for stuff they need.

C: 哇…简直和新的一样！娜塔莎姐姐太厉害了。
E: Wow... He looks brand-new! Natasha, you're incredible.

C: 干嘛非得纠结那什么探针啊，我看拍品里有件大熊玩偶，卖相挺不错的……
E: Oh, who cares about that probe thing. There's a teddy bear at the auction that looks pretty valuable...

C: 我…我要加价，加五十！
E: A—And I'll add <unbreak>50</unbreak> to that!

C: 虎克还要去叫上鼹鼠党的小伙伴。等你准备好了就来找虎克吧，我们一起去生日聚会！
E: I'll contact the other members of The Moles too. Come find me when you're ready — we'll go together!

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course.

C: 确实和一般的拖延症患者有所差别。
E: She certainly moves a lot faster than some people I know...

C: 流浪者叔叔阿姨们说，大家最近辛苦收集来的零件总是莫名其妙地消失。他们怀疑营地里可能出了小偷——
E: The vagrants say that the parts they worked so hard to obtain have completely vanished. They're worried that there's a thief in the camp...

C: 我、你、我、呃…不好意思…只、只是昨晚的事情太吓人了…我、我继续！
E: I... you... I—I'm sorry... Last night was just so terrifying... I—I'll continue!

C: 当时营地里黑漆漆的一片，我没看清那毛贼的正脸，但我确信，那绝对是个凶残的家伙……
E: I couldn't see the thief's face because the tent was so dark, but I could tell he wasn't a nice guy...

C: 它只是希望铆钉镇的大家能平安归来…然后过上和从前一样的平静生活。
E: He only wants everyone to return safely to Rivet Town and live their peaceful lives like before.

C: 它们好像认得我？
E: They know who I am?

C: 居然隔着一道门，怎么这么麻烦……
E: And it's behind a gate. What are the odds...

C: 不需要你的屈服。
E: We don't need you to yield.

C: 所以我们才要换位思考。
E: That's why we have to try and put ourselves in their shoes.

C: 总之，她现在很可能有危险。
E: So... she might be in danger now...

C: …记忆恢复了吗？
E: ...Is your memory back yet?

C: 想到对岸去的话，恐怕得再旋转一次栈桥，然后绕路过去。
E: If we want to get to the other side, we'll need to rotate the gear bridge again and go around.

C: 对呀，姬子姐姐才是这方面的专家，对吧？
E: Yeah. Himeko is an expert on this kind of thing, right?

C: 你们在说什么？是你们最先承诺能帮忙解决「星核」的问题，我们才——
E: What!? You promised from the very start that you could reverse the effects of the Stellaron. Otherwise, why would we—

C: 我已经通知了姬子和瓦尔特先生，这颗「星核」就交给他们来封印。
E: I've informed Himeko and Mr. Yang already. They'll seal the Stellaron.

C: 我们原以为是因星核与「毁灭」有关，但现在看来并不简单——恐怕得与瓦尔特先生谈谈才能理出头绪。
E: Originally, we thought it was because the Stellaron was linked to the Destruction, but now it seems to be more than that. We might need to speak with Mr. Yang to understand what's going on.

C: （这家伙，和之前遇到过的裂界生物有些不一样…）
E: (This thing seems a little different from the other Fragmentum creatures...)

C: …呃，你说的是那位「愚者」希莉儿吧？
E: ...Mmm, do you mean Cyrille "the Fool"?

C: …等等，不对——它们真的有眼睛吗？
E: ...Wait. That's not right. Do they even really have eyes?

C: 我先去找档案了，谢谢你。
E: I'll go look for the records then. Thank you.

C: 星槎都有些什么型号？
E: What models are there?

C: 伤得严重不严重啊？
E: Are you hurt?

C: 梅姐的头没有摔着，没事没事。你看我身体倍儿棒，不要赔偿，不用给我赔偿。
E: My head is fine. I'm fine, completely fine. Look, I'm doing swimmingly. I don't want compensation. I don't need it.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>当时俺听到了「咔嚓」一声</color>…是不是星槎被撞坏掉了，俺不用赔偿吧？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I remember hearing a cracking sound</color>... Is the starskiff damaged? I don't need to pay for that, do I?

C: 喂喂喂，认真点儿，把真正的证据拿给他看。
E: Come on. Can you take this seriously? Show him the actual evidence.

C: 今天还要来教希拉吗？
E: Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?

C: 我和吉尔伯特回来了…
E: Gilbert and I are back...

C: 所以，要派活了是吧？
E: Now's the time you're going to ask me to work, right?

C: 嚯哈哈哈哈！主人还在折腾那些软绵绵、酸溜溜的诗吗？
E: Hohohoho! Is the master still playing around with those soppy, limp poems?

C: 你挑事儿对吧？！
E: Are you trying to make trouble!?

C: 写诗最重要的…难道不是忧郁吗？
E: The most important thing about poetry... Surely it is depression?

C: 听着，写诗最重要的就是捕获人人都能共鸣的朴素情感。而在所有朴素情感中，离愁和盼归，是人类最普遍的共通情绪。
E: Look, the most important thing about writing poetry is capturing those simple human emotions which resonate with everyone. And of all the simple human emotions, the pain of separation and the longing for eventual return is the most universal across all peoples.

C: 照、照片我已经删掉了！
E: I—I've deleted the photo!

C: 无言相望玉界门
E: as they silently gaze at the Jade Gate.

C: 我姑且算你押韵了吧。
E: I'll let you pass.

C: 自从我出生起便紧握的爱意。
E: That love which I've been holding onto since I was born.

C: 她算是咱们几个人里最喜欢钻研业务的。没事就会卜上几卦，预测未来，卜的多是爱情运，结果都不太准呢。
E: Among us, she's the most serious about her profession. When she's free, she'll do divination and predict the future. The questions she asks are mostly about her relationship, but the results are not very accurate.

C: …我有一种不祥的预感。
E: ...I have a bad feeling about this.

C: 你好。
E: Hi.

C: 我听清楚了，他说让你去揭掉。
E: Yes, I can hear you clearly.

C: 你别担心他，我看着他呢，让他躺会儿吧，过段时间就好了。
E: Don't worry about him, I'm watching over him. Just let him rest for a little, and he'll be fine after.

C: 黑塔空间站有外驻科员吗？
E: Does Herta Space Station have any off-station researchers?

C: 你是谁啊？
E: Who are you?

C: 实际上，我委托了星际和平公司给小姐姐寄了好几次礼物，他们总是以「收件地址不清」为理由给我退件，但是我没去过仙舟，完全不知道自己哪儿搞错了。
E: But in reality, I have already commissioned the IPC to deliver gifts to her a few times. They kept returning my gifts on the grounds of an "unclear delivery address." I haven't been to Xianzhou, so I don't know where I got it wrong.

C: 我懂，我懂！「开拓之道」是神圣庄严的使命。
E: I know, I know! The Path of Trailblaze is a sacred and solemn mission.

C: 成交。
E: Deal.

C: 我就说吧！没人能抵挡住狐仙小姐姐的魅力。借着替我送出礼物的机会，成了高级会员吗？你还真有行动力啊。
E: Didn't I tell you? No one would be able to say no to a foxian beauty's charm. Did you become an advanced member by delivering my gifts for me? You're so quick!

C: 是啊，你们已经心灵相通了，这和外貌性别没有关系。
E: That's right, you have already spilled your soul to each other, this has nothing to do with your physical appearance or gender identity.

C: 我们认识吗？不认识的话，那么就此别过？
E: Are we acquainted? If not, I suggest we bid each other farewell.

C: 从这个层面上来看，你确实做了一件好事。
E: So in that sense, you've really done a good thing.

C: 求求你，别告诉他们我就是「狐仙黛青」。
E: Please, don't tell them that I am the Foxian Beauty Daiqing.

C: 这是你留下的记号吗？贝尼尼老师，你还真有行动力啊。
E: Did you leave this marking, Bernini? You really were driven.

C: 好啊。
E: Sure.

C: 弄丢了？
E: You dropped it somewhere?

C: 你隐隐觉得有些不对劲，你产生了一种奇怪的预感：陶德的事似乎并没有这么简单，你和他之间的纠缠也不该止步于此。
E: You sense something is off and a peculiar feeling of foreboding comes over you: Todd's issues don't seem to be as straightforward as they appear, and your entanglement with him shouldn't stop here.

C: 我从没想过，自己这辈子竟会和「犯罪」扯上关系…可是，{NICKNAME}，当意识到的时候，我已经这么做了。
E: I never thought I'd ever have anything to do with "crime" in my life, but... {NICKNAME}, by the time I'd realized it, things had already happened.

C: 那魔阴身到底该怎么办？
E: Then, what can be done for them?

C: 【叠好的照片】
E: Folded Photo

C: 我原本觉得，短生种短如弹指般的性命，又何必再苦苦挣扎。但看到他忍着病痛坚持接受治疗的样子，我的心也跟着揪紧起来了。
E: I used to think that the suffering of short-life species was nothing. But my heart... my heart ached when I saw him in such pain.

C: 半夏，说说接下来你想做什么吧。
E: Banxia, tell us what you want to do next.

C: 我想搭乘你的船去流云渡…
E: I'd like to take your ship to Cloudford...

C: 我的体形在不断缩小。皮肤、肌肉、内脏…我确实越来越年轻了，只是这份「青春」似乎没有尽头。
E: My body, it keeps shrinking. My skin, muscles, organs... Indeed, I'm getting younger, you see, but this "youth" doesn't seem to have an off switch.

C: 白露大人，小心！
E: Lady Bailu, watch out!

C: …我们走这边，看看能不能绕过那些云骑军。
E: ...Let's go this way and see if we can avoid those Cloud Knights.

C: 前方有持械恶徒，闲杂人等返回城区避难。
E: There are armed villains up ahead. If you're not on duty here, return to the city for your own safety.

C: 我是半夏请来帮你治病的白露。
E: I'm Bailu. Banxia sent me to heal you.

C: 爱人？
E: Sweetheart?

C: 治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
E: After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.

C: 治疗完成后，你们离开了流云渡，并通知云骑军收殓了那具「魔阴身士兵」的遗骸。
E: After finishing the treatment, you left Cloudford and asked the Cloud Knights to take care of the remains of the Mara-struck soldier.

C: 哎嘿，好玩。丹恒，你再教教我别的法子。看看我能不能再想起些什么。
E: Whew, that's fun. Dan Heng, teach me another trick. Let's see if I can remember anything else.

C: 他们是怎么毫无声息地出现在我们身边的？
E: How did they manage to appear right next to us without a sound?

C: 白露，你先回到禁邸里不许出来，我有事和丹枫大人谈谈。
E: Bailu, return to the Forbidden Residence. I must speak with Master Dan Feng.

C: …关键？
E: ...The key?

C: 我曾经阅读过一些银河生态学的研究——「寰宇蝗灾」的灾难程度与种群密度有着密切关系，一旦繁殖致使密度超过某个阈值，生物种群会发生「相变」。
E: However, based on the cosmic ecology studies that I have read, there is a close relationship between the severity of the Swarm Disaster to the population density of these cosmic bugs. Once reproduction causes a species' density to exceed a certain threshold, a phase transition will occur in the population.

C: 给我介绍下这「牧场行动」。
E: Tell me about this Herding Operation.

C: 好有道理…
E: Quite sensible when you think about it...

C: 问当然是要问的。但不能大海捞针地问，而要有的放矢地问。况且，如果没有明确的疑点，我们也不好三番五次去叨扰人家啊。
E: We will, in due course. But we can't be too general — specific questions are key. Not to mention, without a clear suspicion, it would involve multiple interrogations...

C: 好的。
E: Understood.

C: 为什么这么说？
E: Why do you say that?

C: 今天你兴致好高啊。
E: You're in high spirits today.

C: 《渔公案》？
E: The Angler Mystery?

C: 正如大毫执事官所说：因为建木造成的阴阳相感现象，整个机巧鸟系统都不灵光了。
E: As Official Dahao mentioned, the Arbor caused unusual yinyang phenomena which affected the entire cycrane system.

C: 几位稍等…我才看出来，这孩子是三余书肆的小店长隐书啊。
E: Hold your horses, everyone... I recognize this child now. That's Yinshu — the young shopkeeper at Spare Time Book Shop.

C: 那我们就不客气了。
E: Thanks very much.

C: 宵小之辈安敢放肆若此，着我一剑！
E: Your eyes are bigger than your stomach, foul villain! Have at you!

C: 交给我们吧，有消息后会联系二位的。
E: We can take it off you — we'll let you know when we find him.

C: 是啊，驭空自此之后不愿飞行，也不愿你飞行的原因，恐怕正在于此。
E: Indeed. That's probably why Yukong was never willing to fly again after the battle, and why she forbids you from flying.

C: 事情都办完了？怎么样，还顺利吗？
E: You're all done? Did it go smoothly?

C: 采翼！那是你的女儿，有什么话你去自己和她说！
E: Caiyi, she's your daughter! You'll be able to tell her yourself, do you hear?

C: 你知道吗？那些残酷的事情从未击倒我。我、采翼，还有你的生父广渊，在入伍之初，我们心中就早有准备。
E: You know, the cruelty has never claimed victory. Me, Caiyi, your father Guangyuan... we were prepared for the worst when we enlisted.

C: （输入梁沐的信息）
E: (Enters Liangmu's information.)

C: 你应我的召唤而来，也知道我是真的需要你的帮助，可你却在犹豫，为什么？
E: You heard the call and knew that I truly did need your help, so why are you hesitating?

C: 谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I'm grateful. On the Xianzhou... you're the only one I can turn to.

C: 这可不好，犹豫从来不会带来任何好处。
E: Hesitation never did anyone any good.

C: 接下来么……
E: Let me tell you...

C: 我们的时间不多，所以…就2轮好了。你一共拥有两个问题，也要给我两个答案。但记住：要「一真一假」喔。
E: We don't have much time — let's do two rounds to start. You ask me two questions, and you'll also have to answer two of mine. But remember: One truth, one lie.

C: 是吗？我还挺喜欢这个游戏的。但我玩得不好，银狼总能猜中。
E: You think? I really like it. I'm not good at it though — Silver Wolf always manages to guess right.

C: 就这么简单。
E: That's all there is to it.

C: ——要让他们血债血偿。
E: ...to make them pay in blood.

C: 而艾利欧可以帮助我，只要我按照他的指示行事。
E: Elio can help me, if I follow his instructions.

C: 这个游戏的规则就像现实：我们都觉得自己有无限的可能，但细细想来，真正的可能性寥寥无几，而每个问题和答案都被之前的选择深深束缚……
E: The rules of this game are like reality: We all think we have infinite possibilities, but when you really analyze it, you could count them on your fingers. Every question and answer is constrained by previous choices...

C: 因为你是为了容纳星核这件事而被制造出来的，你的身体经过星神力量的改造，即使接触星核也不会遭到污染。
E: Because you were created for that purpose — your body has been transformed by the power of an Aeon. You are immune to Stellaron contamination.

C: 难道有人偷偷上了列车？
E: Did someone sneak onto the Express?

C: 有劳啦，小弟弟。
E: Thank you, young man.

C: …应星？
E: ...Yingxing?

C: 「这杆枪，锐利得足可穿透龙鳞。小心，可别被它伤到了，龙尊大人。」
E: This spear is sharp enough to pierce dragon scales. Be careful, High Elder, lest you hurt yourself with it.

C: 她走了。
E: She's gone.

C: 那位白珩前辈…后来发生了什么？
E: So... what happened to Baiheng in the end?

C: 我…什么都记不起来。
E: I... can't remember any of it.

C: 既然将军觉得事有蹊跷，那是要替我辩护，洗脱「星核嫌犯」的疑罪？
E: Seeing that you sense something is amiss, are you looking to defend me and clear my name of suspicion?

C: 喂，这算是拐着弯人身攻击了吧！
E: Hey, enough with the passive aggression!

C: 怪了，这几个是什么时候倒的？
E: Huh? They were on their feet a second ago...

C: 多谢你出手相救，小弟弟。
E: Thank you for your assistance, young man.

C: 你找到的那些记录我就拿走了。
E: I'll take those records you found.

C: 你把我给整不会了，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}。
E: I'm at my wit's end with you, {F#Sister}{M#Brother}.

C: 哈哈，这没什么。持明一世能有个六七百年，日子到了就要去鳞渊境重入轮回。对我们来说只是生命的又一个新阶段罢了。
E: Haha, don't be. The lifespan of a Vidyadhara typically spans six or seven hundred years. At the end of that span, there comes a day when we journey to Scalegorge Waterscape and embark on a new phase through self-reincarnation. It marks a significant moment in our eternal life cycle.

C: 什么事？
E: Can I help you?

C: 神策府？看看药方。
E: The Seat of Divine Foresight? Let me see the prescription.

C: 留个联系方式吧。药理鉴定结束后，在下会联系你的。
E: Leave your contact details with me. When I've completed my assessment of the pharmacology, I'll get in touch with you.

C: 想了解帝弓的真相吗？
E: Would you like to learn the truth about the Arbiter?

C: 「请勿…」唉，这什么字。
E: "Authorized personnel only. This chamber is sac..." How do you pronounce it?

C: 这是…我被列车组找到时的记忆？可我自己都不记得了啊？
E: This must be... when the crew first found me? I don't remember a thing.

C: 景元将军？
E: General Jing Yuan?
