E: Who knows? I've met my share of people like them. They're all eager to break free of the societal constraints as though law and order are hampering their lives.

C: 我不愿造成什么麻烦，<color=#f29e38ff>尤其不愿惊动*猎犬*。</color>就让我在<color=#f29e38ff>筑梦边境</color>悄无声息地去吧！就像鸟儿划过天际，不留一丝痕迹……
E: I don't want any trouble, and <color=#f29e38ff>alerting the *Bloodhound* is the last thing I want to happen.</color> Just let me go quietly at the <color=#f29e38ff>Dream's Edge</color>! I want to be like a bird that flies across the sky without leaving a single trace...

C: 啊…朋友，你要不要听我讲个故事？
E: Oh... my friend, can I interest you with a story?

C: 至少，我活了下来。没有什么比活着更美好了。
E: At least I survived. Nothing is better than staying alive.

C: 但家族对我…对我的经历很感兴趣。我最终还是没能拒绝。
E: But The Family... was interested in my experience. I couldn't refuse.

C: 但我还是需要警告您，关于我此前行为失控的诱因…我猜您自己也心知肚明。
E: But I still need to warn you about what caused me to lose control previously... I'm guessing you already know.

C: 酒店到底发生了什么？
E: What exactly happened at the hotel?

C: 我还记得上一个试图私闯公馆的逐梦客。他的下场…算了，你不会想知道的。
E: I still remember the last Dreamchaser to try and infiltrate the pavilion. He ended up... No, you would not want to know.

C: 即使榨干我们的最后一滴血，那些肉食者也会将剩余的尸体啃食殆尽，连食腐的鸟儿都会饿死。
E: Even if they squeeze out our last drop of blood, those savages will still find a way to pick all the meat off our bones so that even the vultures end up starving to death.

C: 不是我说，咱俩萍水相逢一场，何必这么针锋相对？
E: Didn't I already say? Ours was a chance rendezvous, so why should we be at loggerheads?

C: 我出钱，你办事，这就是世界运行的底层逻辑。他们拿到了想要的武器，我拿到了钱，你拿到了报酬，何乐而不为呢。
E: I pay the money, and you do the job. That's the underlying logic behind how the whole world works. They got the weapons they wanted. I got my money. And you got your payment, too. What's wrong with having it good for a change?

C: …我…我当然没忘！是…是我错了，你大人有大量，就原谅我吧……
E: ...I ...Of course I haven't! I... I was wrong. Please forgive me...

C: 这里有给你的信。
E: I have a letter for you.

C: 阿图罗先生轻咳一声，换上了一副波澜不惊的面孔——其中藏着一丝难掩的尴尬。
E: Mr. Arturo coughs quietly and puts on a composed front, but a hint of embarrassment that he fails to hide betrays him.

C: 可是人活在世，终有一日要投入汪洋。我又没法赐他们一艘避浪的船，只能尽量让他们学会踩水，别被淹死就谢天谢地了。
E: Living in this world, everyone has to set sail into the vast world someday. Since I cannot offer them a boat to help them overcome the choppy waters, all I can do is to teach them how to stay afloat in hopes that they will not drown.

C: 就此离去。
E: Leave.

C: 在某场比赛开始前，一位作弊者获取了对手的终端，将其以太灵更改成了最弱的配置。
E: Earlier, before a certain match began, a deceitful player stole their opponent's terminal and replaced their Aether Spirits with the weakest ones possible.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Hahahaha!

C: 人偶没有回应，看来黑塔还有别的事要忙，先行下线了。
E: The puppet gives no response. Seems like Herta is busy with other stuff and had to go offline.

C: 我记得你，大个子{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，你来得正好，本天才有一项伟大的计划准备实施，正好需要你这样的大个子人才！
E: I remember you, tall one. You came just in time. I've got a fantastic plan to put into place, and I could use some tall talent like yourself helping out!

C: 啾？我在跟大家聊天呢，怎么了啾？
E: Tweet? I'm just chatting with everyone. What's wrong, tweet?

C: 人家还有几位朋友在别处建设小镇，它们都是很有趣的鸟，客官可以去认识一下它们啾~
E: I also have a few friends who are building other small towns. They're all fascinating birds, and you can get to know them if you like, tweet~

C: 你看你看，有了我的翎羽，这车标是不是都更加帅气了啾！
E: Look, look, with the addition of my feathers, the logo is so much more stylish, tweet!

C: 据说石头老板最喜欢吃石头了啾…
E: I hear that Boss Stone loves eating Boss Stones, tweet...

C: 关于美梦小镇…
E: Tell me about Dreamville...

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 来吧！接招吧！
E: Take this! Feel my strength!

C: 本公子从不吝啬啾！请把报酬和礼物一起带走吧~
E: I'm never a scrooge, tweet! Take this reward and gift with you as well!

C: 关于小镇居民…
E: About the townspeople...

C: 喝了这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达～你看我唱得好不好听啾？
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, make your dreams a blast! How did I sound? Not bad eh?

C: 不行了，要死鸟了，得找个高点的地方清醒清醒啾。
E: I can't, I'm gonna die. I have to find a high place to sober up, tweet.

C: 今天的演出就到此为止，感谢你的捧场啾。
E: Today's show ends here. Thank you for coming everyone, tweet.

C: 无论口味和风格，只要你能想到的，就没有我调不出来的啾。
E: Whatever taste or theme, if you can think of it, there's nothing that I can't mix, tweet.

C: 别以为你是哈努兄弟，我就会怕你，我一点都不怕怕怕怕怕，再见啾。
E: You think I'm scared of you just because you're Brother Hanu? I'm not s—s—s—scared at all! Goodbye, tweet.

C: 刚刚我还在天上，周围突然转转转了一下，我就到这里来了啾。
E: I was just minding my own business in the sky, and then the surroundings suddenly started to spin round and round, and now here I am, tweet.

C: 你要爪子没爪子，要翅膀没翅膀，哪里像小鸟了啾？！
E: You've got no talons and no wings. How're you even a bird, tweet!?

C: 稍等，我帮你处理一下。
E: Wait a minute. I'll take care of this.

C: 让我看看，售票装置售票装置……
E: Let's see, ticketing device, where's my ticketing device...

C: 那家伙，说着要带小镇上的朋友们一起去冒险，结果自己居然迟到了啾。
E: That guy said he was going to take all the town's friends along for an adventure, and yet he's running late, tweet.

C: 她望着前面，一会儿笑嘻嘻，一会儿哭唧唧的，好吓鸟啾。
E: She's just staring ahead, laughing one moment, then weeping the next. Scary, tweet.

C: 啾啾…看来店主去外面玩了，难怪最近清醒村这么安静呢。
E: Tweet... Seems like the shop owner is out on vacation. No wonder Rouseville is so quiet.

C: 大家都看不到我…
E: No one can see me...

C: 三月七！
E: March 7th!

C: 亲爱的玩家，为了更好地了解你的游戏体验，提升游戏品质，我准备了一份问卷啾。
E: Dear player, to better understand your experience and improve the gaming quality, I've prepared a survey, tweet.

C: 你这是不文明行为！走，跟我去自首！
E: That was an uncivilized action! Come, we're going to hand you in!

C: 我相信下次冠军也非你莫属，{NICKNAME}大人。
E: I just know that the next championship belongs to you, great {NICKNAME}!

C: 做好事，徒手拔杂草！
E: Do a good deed, and pull out the weeds with your bare hands!

C: 只要你不说，我不说…我们都能好好的，我去做个好人，而你很快就会结束卧底生涯。
E: As long as we keep it a secret... we'll both be fine. I'll have a chance to do the right thing, and you won't need to stay undercover any longer.

C: 那好，还请{NICKNAME}不要外传！我俩尚有急事要处理，暂且告别，神策府种种，今日倒是叫你见笑了……
E: And please keep this between us, {NICKNAME}. I'm sorry for getting you involved in all this trouble with the Seat of Divine Foresight. Now, if you'll excuse us...

C: 听上去像空间站的奇物？
E: Sounds like the Curios in the space station, don't you agree?

C: 谛听会说话诶！
E: Wait, this Diting can actually talk!?

C: 这样一来，丹鼎司丢失的所有「禁忌书典」就都已经找齐了。多亏了你帮忙，这些书才没产生任何不良影响。
E: Thanks to your help, all the lost forbidden tomes have been safely returned without causing any calamities.

C: （向燕翠请教拳法的秘密。）
E: (Ask Yancui for the secret behind Xianzhou boxing)

C: 你这可就问对人了，咱可是「云曳旗旌流星拳」的首席大弟子，这仙舟四十八路拳法我打小就练了个遍。
E: You've come to the right place. I'm the top disciple for the Cloudbanner Meteor Fists. I've practiced the Forty-Eight Chambers of boxing since I was knee-high to a grasshopper.

C: 你为什么一直盯着这几块墓碑看，你也认识小风吗？
E: Why are you staring at these tombstones? Do you know Xiaofeng, too?

C: 好了好了，借过借过，别踩在我坟头啦，我还要搬东西过来盖新坟呢。
E: Fine, excuse me then. Don't step on my tomb. I'd like to move some stuff into a new grave.

C: 这古琴似乎还没有注意到你，你也不必给它面子。你要是想回来，随时可以。
E: This guqin doesn't seem to have noticed you yet, so you don't have to pay it heed. If you want to come back later, you can do so at any time.

C: 虽然我没有本事，但是仙舟罗浮上肯定有<color=#dbc291ff>懂音乐的人</color>能够完成这首曲子。
E: I may not have the aptitude for it, but there must be someone aboard the Xianzhou Luofu who <color=#dbc291ff>knows about music</color> and who can help complete this song.

C: 我已经明白原委了，但是我帮不了您。
E: I understand the whole picture now, but I'm afraid I can't help you.

C: 竟、竟然是这样的展开？
E: I—Is that how everything worked out?

C: 唉…也行，你要是改变心意了，就再来这里找我吧。
E: Sigh... Fine. If you ever change your mind, come back and find me then.

C: 你你你你你…孽徒！你敢还手！你真是欺天灭祖、悖逆人伦、意狠心毒！
E: You-you-you-you... sinner! You dare fight back! You really are a blasphemer, violating human relations with cruelty and malice!

C: 唉，还是做一只自由自在的岁阳比较快乐。
E: "sigh" It's so much better being a free and roaming heliobus.

C: 这车看起来还挺贵的，不知里面坐的人怎么样了……
E: That car looks quite expensive. I wonder what happened to the people in it...

C: 本来我正常在路上走着， 那辆车不知发什么疯，直接穿过半个马路过来撞我——不知道的还以为车主歧视硅基生命呢。
E: I was just walking along the street as per normal when that car suddenly drove halfway across the lane to hit me —Who knows whether this was a hate crime targeting silicon-based lifeforms!

C: 这年头碰瓷的手法都这么粗暴吗？太嚣张了，我在苜蓿草家系可是有熟人的！
E: Is this how they run insurance scams these days? So blatant! I'll have you know that I have contacts in the Alfalfa Family!

C: 哦，我懂了，你们串通好的是吧？说到底还是为了我的钱，钱！
E: Oh, I see. You two are in cahoots, aren't you? It's all for my money, isn't it? Money!

C: 啊，奥洛是我的老朋友…有段时间没听到他的消息了。
E: Yeah, he was my old friend... I haven't heard anything from him in some time.

C: 那天的赌局结束后，他就从梦境里消失了。我不知道他去了哪里。抱歉。
E: After that gamble ended, he disappeared from the dreamscape. I don't know where he went, sorry.

C: 听我一句劝，不要跟别人再提起他的事了——和他扯上关系对你没有好处。
E: Let me ask you one thing, though — do not mention him to anyone again, ever. Associating with him will only bring you harm.

C: 啊，奥洛是我的老朋友…有段时间没听到他的消息了。
E: Yeah, he was my old friend... I haven't heard anything from him in some time.

C: 喂，你看那边…
E: Hey, look over there...

C: 当然啊。哼哼…看您的样子，怕不是入戏太深，真的动了感情？
E: Of course. Hohoho... Look at you. You were so into the act... Did you develop some real feelings?

C: 你正面对着一台略显落寞的取款机。在其他机器忙于喷吐苜蓿币时，只有它安安静静地站在原地。
E: You find yourself standing in front of an ATM that looks somewhat forlorn. While the other machines are busy dispensing Alfalfa credits, it stands quietly in its place.

C: 我来抓你归案！
E: I'm here to bring you to justice!

C: 声音的源头仿佛就在头顶，可放眼望去，除了空荡荡的广告牌，什么也没有。
E: The sound seems to be coming from above you. However, looking up, you see nothing but an empty billboard.

C: 那是辆非常豪华的跑车，只有匹诺康尼最富贵的家伙才买得起的款式。
E: This car in particular was an extremely luxurious limousine, one that only the richest in Penacony could afford.

C: 桶王的呼唤会在每夜伴你安详入眠。
E: The calling of the King of Cans will accompany you every night to a peaceful sleep.

C: 灰毛{F#小妞}{M#小子}，站住！
E: Hey, gray hair {F#chick}{M#brat}, stop right there!

C: 在此，我诚恳地邀请你加入我们，让流梦帮的事业更上一层楼。
E: I'd like to sincerely invite ya to join us n' help the Dreamflux Gang's business reach the next level.

C: 这就完了？
E: That's it?

C: 嗯，做的不错，充分传达了我们对家族的愤恨！
E: Yeah, not bad! It really conveys our rage toward The Family!

C: 这种「看起来做了什么，但其实什么也没做」的做法，可能也是一种仪式感。
E: Perhaps this method of "looking like it's doing something but actually did nothing" is also part of the ceremony?

C: 胜者有胜者的义务。了结我…然后飞向天空吧。
E: The victor bears the responsibility of victory. Finish me... and fly into the sky.

C: 你不知道这是违法的吗？
E: Haven't you heard that's illegal?

C: 暂且放过你们，等把这个倒卖团伙全部逮捕后再清算。别跑，给我站住——！
E: I'll let you be for now and we'll settle things once the scalping syndicate members have all been locked up. Freeze. Don't run...!

C: 我想和你唠的可都是正事！是为了提升咱们的工作效率、改善咱们的演出环境——
E: I wanted to chat to you about work stuff! About how to increase our work efficiency, to improve on our performance environment...

C: 随着最后一个尾音的落下，观众们纷纷要求下再来一首，歌者有点腼腆地表示「下次一定」，观众们这才罢休。
E: The audience erupts into an encore chant right after she sings her final note, quieting down only after the singer shyly promises to do so next time.

C: 瓦尔特正在一处无人的角落观看手机里的故乡动画，他第一时间响应了你并表示随后就到。
E: Welt is on his phone in a secluded corner, watching some animation videos from his homeworld. He replies to you immediately and promises to be there soon.

C: 在哪儿在哪儿？就是用这个看电影吗？
E: Where is it? Where is it? Do we use this thing here to watch the movie?

C: 你还记得吗？{NICKNAME}，后来发生的事——流萤小姐并没有「死亡」，别怕，过去的事就让它过去吧。
E: Remember what happened afterward, {NICKNAME}. Miss Firefly didn't "die." Don't be afraid. Let the past stay in the past.

C: 既然他提到了多个不在场判官的名字，想必也是从你那里得到了一些暧昧的记忆，这记忆是否能够以假乱真，就不得而知了。
E: Since that individual has listed the names of several absent judges, it must have gotten some vague memories from you, but it's unknown whether these memories are authentic or fabricated.

C: 圆周率小数点后一百位是什么？
E: What is the number at the <unbreak>100</unbreak>th decimal place for π?

C: 明白了，我会把书留下来。
E: I got it. I will leave this book behind.

C: 所以它被落在囚室附近，应该是另有原因。
E: Hence, I believe the book is near the prison for other reasons.

C: 油腔滑调的，我凭什么帮你？
E: You're too smoothly glib, why would I help you?

C: 感谢你，能够找到这些冥顽不灵的逃犯，全都要多亏了你。
E: We thank you for finding these persistent fugitives. You really came through for us.

C: 而我寻找的，只是一个保险柜，就在这证物仓库里。至于保险箱里是什么，您就不必打听了。
E: Myself, I'm just looking for a certain safe inside this warehouse. As for its contents... Sorry, but it's private.

C: 仁科以他八十万云骑教习的臂力按住你的脑袋，硬生生把你的视线固定在上方。
E: Renke uses the arm strength he used to train <unbreak>800,000</unbreak> Cloud Knights to forcibly fix your line of sight on the skies.

C: 你就别再难为{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}了。
E: Stop trying to make it difficult for {F#her}{M#him}.

C: 何须救兵？一根球棒足矣！
E: Who needs reinforcement? One baseball bat is enough for me!

C: 你们从哪里冒出来的？
E: Where did you all come from?

C: 你问我，我问谁？
E: You're asking me, but who can I ask?

C: 在出声的那个瞬间，你清晰地看见隔壁桌上那只折纸小鸟的眼睛里出现了高光。
E: The moment it makes a sound, you clearly see a glint in the Origami Bird's eyes.

C: 在这位同学的软磨硬泡下，你最终还是拍摄了合影，并在照片后方签上了名字。
E: Thanks to the student's constant pestering, in the end, you agree to take a photo together and sign on the back of it.

C: 咦…你不是传说中的盛会巨星吗！我在论坛上看过好多关于你的帖子，听说你超有才的！有空的话，来帮帮我们吧！
E: Hey... Aren't you the legendary Festive Superstar!? I've seen so many posts of you on the forums. I heard you're really talented! Please help us if you've got time!

C: 来点喝的吧。
E: Give me something to drink.

C: 这根本不是心理测试！
E: This is not a psychological assessment at all!

C: 梦游会跑这么远？
E: Would I sleepwalk that far?

C: 致敬传奇耐咬王。
E: To pay respects to the legendary Bite-Enduring King.

C: 没错，就是「铁水瀑布」。
E: That's right, it should be a "molten waterfall."

C: 吼吼？想钻谜题的空子？本狮可没说具体是哪个幕匿时，无论是多么热爱冒险的勇士，总是要睡觉的吼！
E: Ho-ho? Trying to play with loopholes? I didn't explicitly state which Curtain-Fall Hour. Even the most adventurous warriors would have to sleep sometime!

C: 吼吼，题目是这样的：<color=#dbc291ff>「什么东西小时候很可爱，长大后大家却都不喜欢？」</color>
E: Ho-ho, the question is as such: <color=#dbc291ff>"What is something that is very cute when it's small, but disliked by everyone when it's grown big?"</color>

C: 一个图标挤下所有窗口，跳到你的面前，身后跟随着一串文本框。
E: An icon, followed by a series of text boxes, squeezes out of all the windows and jumps in front of you.

C: 我能有什么好处吗？
E: What do I get from this?

C: 很好的种子。呼呼。带走这个吧，这是你应有的收成。
E: A good seed. *crackle* Take it. This is the fruit you deserve.

C: 不错！桶盖正是世间最为坚固超群的防御，正是它保卫着无数垃圾桶的尊严。
E: Correct! A trashcan lid indeed represents the most impenetrable defense, safeguarding the sanctity of trashcans.

C: 桶是一块会思考的金属。而我时刻在想，桶生的意义是什么？
E: A trashcan is a piece of metal capable of thinking. And I'm always pondering, what purpose does a trashcan serve?

C: 要是其他年轻人也像你这么懂规矩，该有多好啊……
E: If only all other youngsters were as well-mannered as you...

C: 对，可恶的家族！
E: Yeah, curse The Family!

C: 我也没教你什么啊…
E: But I didn't teach you anything...

C: 师傅，你可以批评我，但不能这么羞辱我的人格！
E: Master, while you can criticize me all you want, you cannot insult my dignity!

C: 塔塔洛夫曾教导过我们——视若无睹，与罪人同罪。
E: Tatalov taught us that turning a blind eye to crime is equivalent to being complicit in it.

C: 道德感和好奇心的决斗尚未分出胜负，你的手就已经替你做出了选择。
E: Your morality wars with curiosity. Yet, your hand has already made the choice for you.

C: 就尊重它的意见吧。
E: Might as well respect its wish.

C: （咪发迷，你要多想：给文明以工具，而不是给工具以文明……）
E: (Mifamem, remember this: give tools to civilization, not civilization to tools...)

C: 或许明天就能收到回信，明天再来看看吧。
E: Maybe the reply will arrive tomorrow. Come check again then.

C: 被我的话语感动了？
E: Did my words move you?

C: (:３っ「唉，无敌是多么寂寞，本豹只能被水淹没。」)∋
E: (:３っ "*sigh*... Being invincible is so lonely. Guess I'll just let the water drown out my greatness." )∋

C: 你取出昔涟准备的蔬果，眼前的麦田守望者 / 神圣呜呜伯 / 好好奇美拉 / 黄豆粉糍粑 / 奇美啦迷吃得相当欢快。
E: You offer the fruits and veggies Cyrene prepared. Guardian of the Wheat Field / Holy Wubbaboo / Curious Chimera / Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake / Chimeramem digs in happily.

C: 但更多时候，它会像现在这样打盹，仿佛这便是生命的终极答案。
E: But most of the time, it just dozes like this, as if it's already found the ultimate meaning of life.

C: 就像「记忆」一样。在时间的长河里，它可能会消失，但不会离去。当内心的小角落被唤醒，回忆一定会以更美的形式再度浮现。
E: It's like memories. They might fade with time, but they never really go away. When the heart is stirred, those moments return, more vivid and more beautiful than before.

C: 嗯…哪里去了呢？偷偷躲在哪个小角落里，等着我去找呢？
E: Hmm... Now where did it go? Hiding in some corner, waiting for me to come find it?

C: 昔涟如约更换了稻草人，这个家伙正盯着你——似乎对鸟儿更可亲了。
E: As promised, Cyrene has replaced the scarecrow. The new scarecrow stares at you, seemingly even more approachable to birds.

C: （继续保持安静）
E: (Keep quiet)

C: 哈哈哈，赞美塔兰顿！你的教诲为我指明方向，你的公正令付出终有回报。
E: Hahaha, praise Talanton! Your teachings guide my path, and your fair orders always yield reward.

C: 怎么还有反转的？
E: Another twist?

C: （描述自己的外观）
E: (Describe your own appearance)

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Climb inside the wooden horse's stomach)

C: 若你能听到信徒的祈祷，请给予我回应吧，请…轻敲三次木壁，以昭示你的存在。
E: If you can hear your disciple's prayer, please give me a sign. Please... knock on this wood three times and show that you are here.

C: 对啊，你确实回答了他的疑问，当然有资格拿走这些，就连最为公正的塔兰顿都没法因此指责你。感谢雅努斯的馈赠吧。
E: That's right. You answered her questions, did you not? Of course, you have earned the right to take these. Not even the most just Talanton could blame you. Let us thank Janus for these gifts.

C: 汹涌而来的困意包裹了你，就连受塞纳托斯赐福的永眠都不可能有如此地甜美，你…安安稳稳地在木马肚子里睡了个好觉。
E: A torrent of drowsiness washes over you. Not even an eternal sleep gifted by Thanatos could feel this sweet. You... drift into a deep and peaceful slumber inside the belly of the wooden horse.

C: 别、别…停下！我只是稍作歇息，很快就离开，不会造成任何影响，请放心。
E: No, don't... Stop! I'm just taking a quick break. I'll be gone in a moment! This will not affect anything. Please don't worry.

C: 毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
E: No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from tales of old — its proud head held high, its cavernous belly large enough to hold several people — every detail matches the stories you know.

C: 你不是雅努斯的神驹吗？
E: But aren't you Janus' divine foal?

C: 是啊，如此自以为是的行事做派让你颇为不快。你，堂堂星穹列车的无名客，岂是挥之即来的对象。这次，你偏要对这匹木马说不。
E: Their arrogance really gets under your skin, doesn't it? You, a Nameless of the Astral Express, won't be commanded so easily. This time, you're refusing to play this wooden horse's game.

C: 那些跳跃的火苗已经熄灭，其中小小的灵智，恐怕也随着永昼的终结逝去了。
E: Those flickering flames have already been extinguished, and the tiny sparks of sentience within them have likely perished along with the end of the Eternal Day.

C: 不过，无论如何，我们这把年纪，也算是活回本了。
E: But no matter what happens, at our age, we can at least say we've lived long enough to make it worthwhile.

C: 就像现在的我们，一定要呆在活火旁边，一副瑟瑟发抖的样子。
E: Just like us now, huddled by the Living Flames, shivering as if it were the only thing keeping us together.

C: 坚持住，医师很快就来了——
E: Hold on, the physician will be here soon...

C: 呜…汪汪汪！
E: Oh... Woof woof!

C: 一个伤透了我心的人，一个让我哭笑不得的人，一个让我魂牵梦萦的人。
E: Someone who broke my heart. Someone who made me laugh and cry. Someone who I longed for day and night.

C: 看你的服饰，也不是界种科的大人。算了算了，还是不和你说了。
E: Judging from your outfit, you don't look like you are a big shot from the Department of Ecology. Anyway, I better not talk about this with you.

C: 你在研究什么生物呢？
E: What creatures do you study?

C: 纵然灾难会毁灭物质，但是那些都有机会复原。唯有人心的损伤，是难以弥补的。
E: Disasters are physically destructive, but the buildings can be rebuilt. It is the human heart that is irreparable.

C: 你别看他现在这么阻挠他徒弟的爱情，当年的他，好家伙，那叫一个多情郎啊。
E: Don't be fooled by his seeming determination to prevent his apprentice from dating. You never could've guessed that he used to be quite the womanizer back in his younger days.

C: 嘿，你这小子，新来的吧？这种问题，你居然问我伯纳德，真不知道是故意找骂，还是太傻太天真！
E: Hey, kiddo, are you new here? How dare you ask me this question? Are you looking for trouble? Or are you an idiot?

C: 你的时尚品味很赞。
E: You have great fashion sense.

C: 有事说事，别挡我视线。
E: State your business and stop blocking my view.

C: 你很想去其他舱段逛逛？
E: Would you like to visit the other zones?

C: 话说回来，也许这就是真的呢？不行，我要更加努力，不能辜负阮•梅女士的期待啊！
E: There's a chance it's true, isn't it? I must work harder to never let Miss Ruan Mei down!

C: 年纪轻轻的别老叹气。
E: Don't just keep sighing at such a young age.

C: 你是空间站的大人物吧，我不是刻意怠慢你，只是我还有些事要处理。
E: You're a big shot from the space station, aren't you? I'm not making you wait on purpose, and I really have some matters to attend to.

C: 抱歉抱歉，我这谈判刚结束，手忙脚乱的让你见笑了，还有别的事要收拾，恕不远送了。
E: I'm sorry you have to see me in this state, as I've just wrapped up a negotiation. There are some loose ends to tie up, so I won't be able to see you off.

C: 你这个坏东西，你怎么能这样！
E: You're a bad guy! How can you do this to us!?

C: 我在你身上感受到了阮•梅的气息，你们先前想来是有过接触。或许你比我更熟悉这个舱段，但我独自求索许久，也有一些心得。
E: I can feel Ruan Mei's aura on you, so I suppose you two have met before. You're probably more familiar with this zone than I am, but I've also learned a thing or two after exploring alone for a long time.

C: 这台终端搭载了超距遥感通讯技术，通讯录里仅有一位联系人——「阮•梅」。
E: This terminal is equipped with ultraremote sensing technology. There is only one person in the contact list: Ruan Mei.

C: 你又懂了？
E: And you're an expert?

C: 你往箩筐中望了望，里面似乎只有一些垃圾。
E: You take a peek inside the basket. It looks like there is just trash inside.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」必然存在</color>，否则当我们谈论「阿卡索斯」的时候，为何能理解彼此想表达的内容？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Icatus" must exist</color>. Otherwise, when we discuss "Icatus," how could we possibly understand what each other is referring to?

C: 好，依我看，我们不妨继续刚才的辩论。理念与现实，究竟何者更为可靠？
E: Very well. I think that we may as well continue the debate that we were having before: Ideals or reality, which is more reliable?

C: 知识并非必须从存在的事物中来，只有依靠感官获得的知识才是如此。你刚才的推论中，已经蕴含了反面例证。
E: Knowledge does not have to come from things that exist. Only knowledge that comes from the senses is obtained this way. You already mentioned an example that disproves this in your previous argument.

C: 但想要证明某个事物不存在，需要从根本上进行否定，无论现在或未来，都没办法找到任何证据。因此，这并非事实层面的不存在，而是概念层面的不可能。
E: However, if you wish to prove that something does not exist, you have to fundamentally deny the possibility — Indicate that there is no possible way for us to ever find evidence of its existence, whether in the present or the future. Therefore, this does not equate to non-existence on a factual level. It equates to conceptual impossibility.

C: 辛苦了，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。这是报酬，请收好。
E: Great work, {NICKNAME}. Thank you so much. Here's your reward, there you go.

C: 嗯，我去问问各位朋友吧，或许能拼凑出新的线索。谢谢你了，阿芙罗小姐。
E: Hmm, I'll go check in with my friends, then, and maybe I'll be able to piece together a few clues. Thank you so much, Miss Aphrea.

C: 来人啊——
E: He's here!

C: 或者…万一我们遭遇不测，至少还能成为剧作家们创作时的灵感吧。
E: Or else... if anything should ever happen to us, at least let us serve as inspiration for playwrights out there.

C: 我会保护好她的。毕竟，现在才是一切幸福的开始……
E: I will keep her safe. After all, now is just the beginning of our happiness together...

C: 如果要找她的话，不妨把目光抬高一些。我只能说这么多了。
E: If you want to find her, you might as well set your sights higher. That's all I can say.

C: 嗯…知道了，我试一试吧……
E: Hmm... I understand. I'll give it a try...

C: 唔…
E: Argh...

C: 可惜加不了对照组了……
E: It's a shame we can't add a control group...

C: 哎，真不容易，你们人没事就好。
E: Wow, that's rough. Thank goodness you're okay.

C: 哎，你不懂我是我们家唯一一个坐过飞船的人，拍给家里人看看呗。
E: Hey, you have to understand — I'm the only one in my family to have ridden in a spaceship before. It's a photo for my family.

C: 那你们头儿呢？
E: What about your chief?

C: 年轻人真不行啊……
E: Youngsters these days really are useless...

C: 在那个深夜，我刚轮值完，突然感觉人好冷，心也好冷……
E: It was in the middle of the night. I had just finished my shift when I suddenly felt a chill down to my core...

C: …可空间站里不都是恒温的吗？
E: ...But doesn't the space station always maintain a constant temperature?

C: 活着？如果思考便意味着存在，毫无疑问你是活着的。可刚才明明，你的思绪已经离你远去，你看见塞纳托斯在朝你招手…到底是怎么回事？
E: Alive? If to think is to exist, then undoubtedly, you are alive. But just now, your thoughts had clearly drifted far away. You saw Thanatos beckoning to you... What's going on?

C: 是啊，这种「纷争」的后遗症，总需要时间去克服。只不过……
E: True. It's just the scars of Strife — something that takes time to heal. However...

C: 悬锋人的字典里，没有*恐惧*二字。以前没有，往后也不应该有。这才是我们的传统，我们能自称为「悬锋族人」的根基。
E: In the Kremnoan creed, there is no fear. There never was, and there never should be. That is our tradition, the foundation of our identity as Kremnoans.

C: 你收不住情绪，关我什么事？我刚打算休息一会……
E: What does your lack of control over your emotion have to do with me? I was just about to take a break...

C: 我，我明白了，我接受全责。
E: I understand. I accept full responsibility.

C: （…怎么会有这么多人？）
E: (...Why are there so many people here?)

C: 前辈，请用力矫正我们！
E: Old-timer, go ahead — straighten us out with all your might!

C: 孩子啊，不要害怕——我会为你们背负这沉重的黎明，将漆黑的凶潮隔绝于圣城之外——直到永远。
E: Child, fear not — I will carry the burden of this heavy dawn, shielding the Holy City from the tides of darkness... for all eternity.

C: 柯库翁拾起小贩行囊中的矛和盾，阻拦住黑潮造物。你也赶忙用它们继续完善壁垒。
E: Glykon takes up the lance and shield from the merchants' belongings to hold back the Black Tide Creatures. Meanwhile, you rush to enhance the barricade with the remaining items.

C: 阿波罗尼心系世界命运，故总会产生疑虑，最终必然离开欢宴，消为一簇泡沫。
E: Apollonius, burdened by the world's destiny, is forever plagued by doubts, destined to leave the banquet and dissolve into a bubble of foam.

C: 阿波罗尼，就这么变成了泡沫…该怎么和吟风爵她们说呢……
E: Apollonius just dissolved into bubbles... How am I going to tell Dux Carminum and the others...

C: 选择卷六
E: Select Volume 6

C: 孩子们为你准备了礼物……
E: The kids got something for you...

C: 比如…怎么才可以让帕金斯它们飞起来，像列车一样飞到更高的地方呢？
E: Like... How can we get Perkins to fly — how can we get him to fly to super high places like the Express?

C: 真的？成吧，那我这礼物算是白带了……
E: For real? Hmph, never mind the GIFT I got for you then...

C: 如果只凭我们贝洛伯格现有的技术，确实很难实现。不过……
E: It will be very difficult to bring this concept to reality using Belobog's current technology.

C: 嘿嘿…夸得我都有点害羞了。
E: Ah, stop it, you're making me blush.

C: …改变一下佩佩的饮食配方，也许就不会掉毛了…
E: ...Maybe if I change Peppy's diet, he won't shed so much...

C: 等回去之后我就给佩佩试试，希望它不要挑食。
E: I'll start him on the new diet when I get back... Hope he isn't too picky.

C: 这个材质感觉不错……
E: This material feels good...

C: 她刚刚其实就在列车上。
E: —She was on the Express for real, not just a hologram.

C: 你来这就为了这个？
E: So that's why you came all the way here? All for a lucky gacha pull spot?

C: 你可千万别误会，我不是真的想要离开罗浮一去不回…至少现在不想。
E: Don't misunderstand — I don't wanna leave the Luofu forever... at least not right now.

C: 你来看看我是不是长高了？我觉得应该是高了一丢丢。
E: Do you think I'm taller? I swear I've grown a smidge.

C: 我叫卡波特，是界种科的科员。但还有另一重身份，更为重要——
E: My name is Capote. I'm a member of the Department of Ecology, but my other identity is even more important...

C: …嘿！别偷偷摸摸站在别人身边！你这样是很容易吓到人的！
E: ...Hey, don't come up to people all quietly like that! You are going to scare people!

C: 你应该自我反省…
E: You need to self-reflect more...

C: 哎，{NICKNAME}。从那件事之后，我又何尝没有反省过自己的呢？可是那些人哪儿会听我讲话？在他们眼中，我已经是个不知悔改的罪人了。
E: Ahh, {NICKNAME}, have I not reflected upon my actions since then? But who amongst those people would listen to me? For them, I am already an unrepentant sinner.

C: 和你聊了聊，感觉心里舒服痛快多了。之前我说话老是忍不住去端着架子，说些空话。现在能和你这样推心置腹地说说话，感觉倒是十分难得。
E: I feel a lot better after speaking to you. I used to always put up airs and talk big, but now that I can speak candidly with you, it's actually a rather rare experience.

C: 我问丹恒老师要去哪儿，他说要去智库查阅资料，然后就走进资料室了。
E: I asked Dan Heng where he was off to, and he said he was going to the data bank to look up some material. Then he walked straight into the Archives.

C: 你说话能不能正常点…
E: Can't you talk, like, normally...

C: 总之这事儿…多亏有你教我，我现在语气没之前那么冲了，感觉整个人都不同了呢！
E: Anyways... I still have to thank you. I don't talk as aggressively these days and it feels like I'm a completely new person.

C: 我也没有太大把握——但无论如何，我想有值得一试的价值。
E: I'm not confident either — but they're at least worth a try.

C: 我们铁卫已经与裂界对抗了太久，付出了太大的代价…哪怕是星核问题已经被你们解决了的当下，伤亡报告上的数字还是令人触目惊心。
E: Us Silvermane Guards have fought against the Fragmentum for far too long and have lost too much... Even though you've solved the Stellaron problem for now, the number of casualties is still staggering.

C: 该和杰帕德讨论一下了……
E: Time for a chat with Gepard...

C: 没错，就是星球仪——那上面有个和帕姆非常相似的图案！
E: It's the armillary sphere for sure. There's a shape on it that really looks like Pom-Pom!

C: 这么看，我们住的这颗星球也不算很大嘛？
E: Say, our planet really isn't that big, is it?

C: 我觉得你和丹恒能做朋友。
E: I feel like you and Dan Heng could be good friends.

C: （乖巧的叫声）
E: (Expresses obedience)

C: 这里实在太无聊了，我正在练习心算打发时间~正好，要不你来出题考我吧？越难越好。
E: I'm getting so bored here that I've started practicing mental math to pass the time... Since you're here, why don't you test me? Make it a hard one.

C: …好、好主意。
E: ...G—Good idea.

C: 是很好的主意。我们总有很多方式，留住它作为生命…最为美丽而夺目的时刻。
E: I shan't discount it. There are countless ways to immortalize the most dazzling moments of a flower's life.

C: 无名客在旅途中，一定会与各方人士产生交集，这种人际交往不会让你觉得厌烦么？
E: As a Nameless who's always on the road, constantly meeting with various characters — don't these encounters become wearisome?

C: 得研究研究…老实说，我没有做过这么复杂的工作，还要向你们学习呢。
E: Hmm... Well, I'll need to look into it... Honestly, I've never worked on something so intricate. Guess I'll be learning from you guys!

C: 哈哈！看来你这是已经做好当列车向导的准备了啊！那就不多等了，开始吧！
E: Haha! Looks like you're prepared to be the Express' tour guide! Then let's not waste any more time, and get started!

C: 这些束手束脚的「道德准则」，还是让内心纯净的人去遵守吧！
E: I'll leave these restrictive "moral principles" for the pure-hearted folk!

C: 可以常来放松。
E: Feel free to come here to relax.

C: 假发的款式和颜色…
E: The style and color of the wig...

C: 别急，{NICKNAME}。待我将这些碎片中的记忆一一复现，会与你一同分享的。
E: Settle down, {NICKNAME}. Allow me to manifest the memories from these fragments, and I'll share them with you.

C: {NICKNAME}，我的挚友。请允许我用骑士的方式，向列车表达真诚的问候！
E: {NICKNAME}, my dear friend, please allow me to extend my sincere greetings to the Express in a way that only a knight can!

C: 不过不必担心，竞逐的主办方为新手设计了专门的减速赛道区。
E: But do not worry, the races' organizers have designed slower courses for beginners.

C: 不行吗…可那位老板说这颗同样绚丽的五彩晶石正是五彩种子的产物。
E: Really... But that shopkeeper said that this equally splendid Rainbowite is the product of rainbow seeds.

C: 喝点姬子的咖啡吧！
E: Drink some of Himeko's coffee!

C: 原来是姬子小姐的手艺！三月姑娘方才还提醒小女子不要轻易尝试，但我仍放不下好奇心……
E: So it is Miss Himeko's work! Miss March was just telling me not to try her drinks haphazardly, but I could not contain my curiosity...

C: 谜底就是谜面。
E: The answer is the riddle itself.

C: 不知再回仙舟，会看到怎样一番风景呢……
E: I wonder what kind of scenes I would behold if I returned to the Xianzhou...

C: 泪，已流尽了。
E: I'm all outta tears.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 谢谢，我很感谢这位市民对我的认可，但我还有工作——谁？华劳斯？莱姆士汀家那个？
E: Thank you. I appreciate his recognition, but I have work to... Who? Wallace? That Limestein guy?

C: 我的情报果然不假，这一定是个陷阱。莱姆士汀家的公子没理由对我一个小职员这么执着，这背后不知有怎样的政治黑幕…
E: As expected, my intel was right all along. This is most certainly a trap. A Limestein has no reason to be obsessed with a simple office worker like me. I wonder what shady political force is driving this...

C: 你也需要浇水吗？看你长这么高，不至于吧？
E: Do you need to be watered too? It looks like you've grown tall enough already.

C: 我已经在筹备出城的计划啦。
E: I'm already making preparations for the expedition.

C: 你负责哪一块的公务？
E: What kind of work do you do exactly?

C: 不过金子总会发光，地髓总会发热，迟早会有人愿意资助真正的科学！唉，我一直在等这样的人，怀才不遇是多么痛苦啊……
E: Geomarrow always rises to the top, it is just a matter of time before a talented scientist such as myself receives proper funding for my research. Alas, I have always been waiting for a patron to come along. It is painful to see my talent go unnoticed...

C: 你误会了，我不是记者。
E: No, I'm not a journalist.

C: 剧院的经理总觉得观众只喜欢幼稚的青春情歌，但也许观众的品味早就比他们这些数票仓的人更刁钻了。
E: The theater manager is convinced that the audience is only interested in love songs aimed at teens. But it's possible that people's taste has changed and the management failed to grasp it.

C: 我也觉得没必要自找麻烦。
E: I don't think you need to put yourself through all that either.

C: 坏了，我怎么又成富家子弟了？
E: Huh, why do you think I'm a rich kid?

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 听着就头皮发麻。
E: Just hearing about it makes my head spin.

C: 不对，应该说这案子根本无从审起…就是布洛妮娅大人本人来了也不行。
E: I guess more specifically, I should say that there's no way this case can be tried... Even Lady Bronya herself would not be able to.

C: 你的问题还真尖锐…咳，这么说吧，下层区的大家过得都很拮据，相对于大多数人来说…我手头还算富余。
E: You are quite direct... Ahem, let's put it this way, everyone in the Underworld is practically living on scraps... so compared to most of them, I have a decent life.

C: 你问这个干嘛，心动了？想露两手？那刚才怎么不答应我？
E: Why are you asking? Are you thinking about giving it a try now? You could have said yes to me earlier.

C: 不过，我很高兴听到{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}这么说！谢谢你～
E: You just made my day! Thank you!

C: 就到这里吧。
E: I've got to go.

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我们又见面啦！
E: It's you again!

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 不管怎么说，最近的暖气管道确实是不如以前热了。不过稍微凉快点对我来说倒是件好事……
E: Anyway, the heating pipes are not as hot as they used to be. But I feel better with the cooler temperature...

C: 你怎么也不知道？这还怎么往下捋……
E: You don't know either? How am I supposed to go on then...

C: 你是埃里克吗？
E: Are you Eric?

C: 她最近还在地上忙自己的事情。
E: She's been busy with work up in the Overworld.

C: 这…你对别人的兴趣就这么好奇嘛？
E: It's... Why are you being so nosey?

C: 我想订个客房休息会儿。
E: I would like to reserve a room.

C: 好事将近？你猜得倒准。现在这城里发生了不少事…我听我认识的一些朋友说，你好像也出了不少力？
E: Good times? Correct. There's lots going on in the city right now... I hear from friends of mine that you seem to be up to lots, too?

C: 原来你还有这种隐藏身份…
E: So this is your secret identity...

C: 「铁罐焖螈肉」？
E: Iron Pot Braised Olm?

C: 之前收不到信吗？
E: Could you not get letters before?

C: 古代遗物到底是什么？
E: What are relics?

C: 不过也就仅限于尝试啦…毕竟我到最后总会发现，其他活计做起来比捉洞螈累姑且不说，挣得也没有这么多……
E: But I only tried once or twice... In the end I realize the other jobs are more tiring than catching olms. Also, I'm not making much more money...

C: 总之，现在就等上下层区正式开放咯，不知道能找到什么样的工作呢？啊，走之前还得和歌蒂师傅说一声……
E: Anyway, I'm just waiting for the Over and Underworlds to open up. I wonder what kind of job I'll be able to land. Oh, I should talk to Master Gertie before I leave.

C: 再见，布洛妮娅。
E: Goodbye, Bronya.

C: 最近病人多吗？
E: Have lots of people been getting sick?

C: 在这上层区，把我们的摇滚艺术称作「演出」的人可算不多…大多数人都管我们的表演叫「噪音」，哈哈。
E: Not many people up in the Overworld consider our rock art a "gig"... Most people just call it "noise," haha.

C: 你们乐队都有谁？
E: Who was in your band?

C: 唔…谢谢{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，克拉拉会努力想办法的。
E: Mmm... Thank you {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, I will try my best.

C: 竖井下端为旧地髓开拓团科学考察基地「炉心」，现已废弃。
E: The bottom of the well shaft is the old Geomarrow Development Group's science expedition base: The Furnace Core. It has since been abandoned.

C: 不过，听说在我加入乐队以前，乐队应该还有一个人——那人好像是贝斯手，后来失踪了，据说和姐姐、还有可可利亚大人有些联系……
E: But from what I heard, there was actually another member before me, a bass player I think? But then they just disappeared, and I heard they had some connection with my sister and Madam Cocolia...

C: 何况现在的这股冲劲未来能维持多久，还真不太好说。
E: Plus, who knows how long we can keep up this momentum?

C: 好吧，再见。
E: All right. See you next time.

C: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！欢迎来到「星际决胜庆典」会场！
E: Hey, {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the Interastral Tournament Festival!

C: 你很喜欢这款游戏吗？
E: Do you like this game?

C: …坏了，那首摇篮曲的第一句歌词是什么来着？
E: ...Dang, how does that lullaby start again?

C: 我想看《冒险鼹鼠队》！
E: I want to see The Adventurous Moles!

C: 当心点，别把衣服弄湿。
E: Careful now, don't get your clothes wet.

C: 初雪八落吧，送老人准没错。
E: First Snow. They're great for oldies.

C: 我想再点个红肠拼盘……
E: I think I'll order another sausage platter...

C: 那个《奇谭》二创作者……
E: The Winterlands re-creator...

C: 史瓦罗大佬究竟是什么来头……
E: What's Boss Svarog's background?

C: 别起哄！
E: No heckling!

C: ~在绯色星光照耀下~
E: By scarlet stars' glow, we see~

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。佩拉小姐已经和我说过了，您可以免票参观！
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Miss Pela has notified me that you can enter free of charge!

C: 按照十王司规定，想要进入幽囚狱的人员都必须经过严格审查，这也是为了保证幽囚狱正常收押工作。大人既然是为查案而来，必然是得到了许可。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission imposes a mandatory and stringent assessment on those who wish to enter the Shackling Prison, so that all remand and detention orders within the facility can be performed without disruptions. Since you're here for an investigation, you're naturally granted the relevant permissions.

C: 幽囚狱中关了太多犯人，不论道德水准，他们的才华和能力都是顶尖的——这也是他们只能被关在幽囚狱的原因。
E: There are too many prisoners locked away in The Shackling Prison. Morality aside, these people are the cream of the crop in terms of talent and capacities — This is precisely why they have to be locked away in The Shackling Prison.

C: 大人您请问。
E: Please go ahead and ask your question.

C: 老板您还有什么需要帮助的吗？
E: Do you have anything else you need help with?

C: 符玄太卜算到了她以后会把我赶出太卜司，于是就把我赶出太卜司了。
E: Master Diviner Fu Xuan foresaw that she would remove me from the Divination Commission, so she did.

C: 现如今这情况，不知道太卜大人算到了吗？嗐，多半是没有算到吧。
E: I'm not sure if the master diviner has foreseen this? I'm thinking, probably not.

C: 只不过嘛，咱后来还是去做了餐饮业，没继承武馆，但终归还是留下了不少武人的傲骨呀，嘿嘿。
E: It's just that I went into the food business in the end, so I didn't take over the martial art school. But I've still retained the pride of a martial artist, heehee.

C: 师父以前就是个特别严肃、少言寡语的人，只有在处理旧物的时候，偶尔会露出笑容。对他来说，旧物换新颜是件了不得的事情。
E: My master used to be so darn strict. A man of very few words, only smiling when he was handling antique items. If you ask him, renovating something old is the most amazing pursuit there could ever be.

C: 他总是讲「天不生无用之人，地不造无用之物。」简单来说就是，没有任何一样事物与人是真正的废弃物。
E: He always said, "Heaven makes no useless people, and the world makes no useless things." Meaning that, nothing and nobody is ever truly a waste.

C: …这里是书店，要是想看书、选书，直接进店翻阅就好，要结账的时候再来叫我吧。
E: ...This is a bookstore. If you want to read or pick out a book, just go in and browse around. Call me when you want to pay.

C: 今天有五十二个人来跟我说这事，其中有四十八个问我是否有探讨建木生长与停息之秘的书籍到货。
E: There have been <unbreak>52</unbreak> people who came to talk to me about this matter. Among them, <unbreak>48</unbreak> asked me whether there were readables that discussed the secrets behind the growth and ceasing of the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 你会说我是什么？
E: What would you say I am?

C: 主人想让我帮他作诗。
E: My master wants me to help him write poetry.

C: 充分调动五感，模糊现实和虚拟，享受纯粹的艺术时空，主观视角与客观视角的交替……
E: It fully engrosses the five senses and blurs reality with illusion creating a purely artistic time in space: The alternation of the subjective with the objective...

C: 但那几位判官还是很讲道理的，人家和我说了，只要我能像镜流大人一样立下「十三奇功」，就能给我安排特殊待遇，每周离开幽囚狱，撂地摆摊一天！
E: However, the judges were quite reasonable. They told me that if I could complete "<unbreak>13</unbreak> Outstanding Accolades" like Madam Jingliu, they would grant me special arrangements and allow me to leave The Shackling Prison once every week to set up shop outside!

C: 这是常有的误会，我们这是跟云骑军有合作的，可不敢随便跑路的。
E: A common misunderstanding. We're teamed up with the Cloud Knights, so we can't just run away from them.

C: 想问问你…
E: I want to ask you something...

C: 不知道，广大看到这番景象，又作何感想呢？
E: I wonder how Guangda would feel when faced with such a scene?

C: 什么工时？
E: What job hours are those?

C: 噢，我算是知道了——你和地衡司那帮人就是一伙的！成天就知道管这管那，给我添堵……
E: Oh, I think I get it — you're in cahoots with those guys at the Realm-Keeping Commission! Just sticking their noses in my business all day, making things tough for me...

C: 唉…可千万别出事，千万别出事…一旦出事我连退休金都别惦记了。
E: *sigh* Please don't let there be another accident. Please don't let there be another accident... If anything else happens, they'll take my pension away.

C: 风平浪静不好吗？
E: Isn't it good to be quiet at work?

C: 哈哈哈，料到您会这么问了。
E: Hahaha, I knew you'd ask that.

C: 这不是景元将军的贵客吗？让您见笑了。这是我老姐永念，隶属于天舶司，我是神策府的永海，请问您今天是有什么要事吗？
E: Isn't this one of General Jing Yuan's esteemed guests? Apologies for the ruckus. This is my sister Yong Nian over at the Sky-Faring Commission, and I'm Yong Hai from the Seat of Divine Foresight. To what do we owe the pleasure?

C: 哦，你血脉相连的大个活姐姐，对你来说就和建木生发差不多是吧？
E: Oh, I see. To you, I'm like the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth, right?

C: 啊～这地衡司要是能直接把钱给我，让我不用出门，不用这么劳神费力地工作就好了。
E: Ah~ If the Realm-Keeping Commission could give me the cash directly and let me stay at home all day without doing this troublesome job, that'd be great.

C: 你又来啦？虽然…咳咳…虽然有人能陪我聊几句，我心里还是挺舒服的。说吧…找我还有什么事？
E: Are you back? Even though... *cough*... Even though you can only join me for a few moments, I still feel great about it. Tell me, to what do I owe the honor?

C: 大人在此稍作等候，在下这就前去通报。
E: Could you please wait here a moment? I'll go and report in for you.

C: 哎呀，真不好意思。这流云渡是一处商港，往来起落的也都是货轮，我就先入为主地以为您也是位域外行商了。
E: Ack, I'm really sorry. Cloudford is a commercial port, and the only ships that visit are freighters, so I presumed that you were an outworld traveling merchant.

C: 关于辛克莱和麦尔彦…
E: About Sinclair and Maryam...

C: 我们埃伊加文明，几千年前是一群各自为政的星际牧民，在「领航天蛾」的导向下，在许多行星之间逐水草而居。很多时候，也会为了些资源兄弟阋墙。
E: Thousands of years ago, our Aigaian civilization was just a group of interstellar herders who did things our own way. Under the guidance of the Navigator Moth, we'd live a nomadic lifestyle across several planets. In many cases, internecine quarrels would break out over resources.

C: {NICKNAME}大人，有什么需要吗？在这幽囚狱里，绝对没人比我记忆力好。若是有用得到的地方，在下义不容辞。
E: Do you still need anything else, {NICKNAME}? You will find no one in The Shackling Prison with a better memory than me. If I can be of any use to you, please do not hesitate to ask.

C: 总之，您有需求的话请随时来找我，我会给您打折的！
E: So if you have any orders, come find me any time. I'll even cut you a deal!

C: 虽然太卜大人虽然嘴上没说，但她老人家早就有打算治治这里的歪风邪气了。我也不瞎操心了，咱们就等着瞧吧。
E: The master diviner may not have said anything, but she has long held plans for cleaning up negative work culture here. So I don't bother worrying about it anymore. Let's just wait and see what happens.

C: 你这个态度不像卖药的……
E: You don't seem to care much about making sales at all...

C: 主理一些阁下不该知道的公务。
E: Matters that you shouldn't know about.

C: 不知云骑的队伍几时能撤出此地，还这儿一片清净！
E: When will the Cloud Knights withdraw from this place and restore its sanctity!?

C: 很久以前，我在机缘巧合之下遇到过一位「方壶」护珠人，叫做粼汐。她的云吟术出神入化，几乎到了艺术的境地。
E: A long time ago, I had the pleasure of meeting a Pearlkeeper from the Xianzhou Fanghu named Linxi. Her cloudhymn magic was superb, almost transcending into the realm of artistry.

C: 转世重生，「我」早已不是当年的「我」了。谁又会在意上一世的活法和建议？倒不如留个值钱的坠子，也好利益同胞嘛~
E: After rebirth, "you" are not the same "you" as before. Who cares about how your previous life was lived, or what suggestions might get passed on? You're better off bequeathing a valuable pendant or whatever for the future benefit of your fellows!

C: 几个月前，我联系不上自己的最喜欢的徒弟了。最近才听说，她加入了药王秘传。
E: A few months back, I lost touch with my favorite apprentice. But I've just heard that she's been sucked into the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 有什么越狱秘诀可以传授么？
E: Do you have any jailbreaking tips you can share with me?

C: 不过凭我多年的经验，我觉得幽囚狱最大的安全保障在于环绕四周的水障。要是有精通御水之术之人帮助我，可能会更容易逃出去。
E: But, my many years of experience tell me that The Shackling Prison's greatest insurance is the surrounding moat. If only I had someone proficient in water magic with me, my escape would be a lot easier.

C: 不利？您有被迫害妄想吗？
E: Come on, what makes you think that? Do you have a persecution complex or something?

C: 公司所做的一切都是为了利…啊，不对，是为了伟大的克里珀！
E: Everything we've been doing is for profi... I mean, for the profound Qlipoth!

C: 公司与仙舟再次恢复稳定的贸易联系之后，天舶司提供了商贸合作的范围，金人巷地区的经营管理也在招标文件上。
E: After the IPC re-established stable trade routes with the Xianzhou, the Sky-Faring Commission had outlined the scope of the business cooperation with the management for Aurum Alley also being up for negotiation in the tender documents.

C: 自从我们「微观派」当了领导，能调用的资源也越来越多。以前我只能放生矿泉水，现在我直接置办了些设备，开始用生活废水搞生态养殖了。
E: Since we, the Microscopic Faction, took charge, we have been allocated more resources. We could only release mineral water back then. Now, we have purchased some equipment and started ecological farming with domestic wastewater.

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 往后常来这里玩玩吧，金人巷也是日新月异，变得我都快不认得了。
E: Do come here often to have fun! Things in the Aurum Alley change so fast that I can barely keep up.

C: 拟人化？你这么说也没有错。
E: In the same way they view people? Yeah, in a sense that's what they've been doing.

C: 我有事就先走了。
E: Now if you'll excuse me.

C: 我断断续续地练习了约五十年，才刚摸到编钟的门槛。
E: I've been practicing chimes for about fifty years, and now I'm just starting to get the hang of it.

C: 你自己随便挑吧，要是有什么感兴趣的，看看可以，别着急上手。
E: Feel free to take a look at everything here. Just please don't touch anything.

C: 姐个人猜想啊，正因为小桂子一辈子不过百年，她才会比我们这些几百年的老帮菜更需要让自己的生命散发出光热…当然啦，这都是姐瞎猜的。
E: Perhaps it's because her life is short that she wants to live every moment to the fullest... but of course, this is just my speculation.

C: 天呐，药王慈怀！我没认错的话，你就是那位{NICKNAME}吧？
E: By the mercy of Sanctus Medicus! If I'm not mistaken, you must be {NICKNAME}, right?

C: 想问青镞策士所说有几分真假？
E: May I know which part of what Qingzu said is true?

C: 我也不知道，但这是我家传的，想来是有些厉害之处的。
E: I'm not sure why, but it is a family heirloom, so I guess there's something special about it.

C: 瞧你挺聪明的，真的没有学问？
E: You seem pretty smart to me. Do you really not do well in school?

C: 这是怎么算出来的！
E: How did you work that out?

C: 某一天，太卜大人突然出现并询问你「是你整理了『帝垣琼玉牌』的玩法吗？」，此时你又该作何回答？
E: One day, the master diviner shows up and asks whether you are the one who organized and restored the rules of the Celestial Jade game. How should you answer her?

C: 嗯…我还在找她，但这件事真的很困难…比我预想中还困难。
E: Yes, but it's much, much harder than expected.

C: 你这祝福还挺别致…
E: What unconventional well wishes...

C: 所以「你们」到底是什么？
E: So, what exactly are you?

C: 最后我就来到仙舟了，变成了现在的街头艺人小桂子～
E: Then finally I came to the Xianzhou and became Little Gui, the street performer you see today~

C: 十王司针对不同的星界生物准备了一系列有针对的标准流程，效果不同的驱魔道具…这也是十王司比地衡司、云骑军更擅长处理岁阳灾害的原因。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission has prepared a series of targeted protocols and exorcism tools with different effects for different astral beings... This is also why the Ten-Lords Commission is more skilled at dealing with heliobus disasters than the Realm-Keeping Commission or the Cloud Knights.

C: 不过，我是冥差里最可爱的那个，大人您请记好了。
E: However, I am the cutest spiritfarer of all, don't you forget that!

C: 怎么样，你感兴趣的话，我拿几件来给你瞧瞧？
E: How about it? If you're interested, I could pick out a few for you to try.

C: 以下内容引自《十王刑统》：「一司，秉烛守夜，勾摄魔邪。二司，威罚罪囚，靖平域内。三司，业报公允，天年有尽。」
E: The following is quoted from the Ten Lords' Penal Code: "The first division keeps vigils at night and evils at bay. The second division punishes the criminals and pacifies the territory. The third division ensures fairness in the Karmic Wheel and life expectancy."

C: （关于十王司的职责）
E: (About the responsibility of the Ten-Lords Commission)

C: 有没有能买得起的？
E: Is there anything I can actually afford?

C: 你知道吗，仙舟人虽然所有人看上去都很年轻，但是一旦跟他们聊天，你立刻就能察觉他们全都在发霉了，哎呀，我可受不了。
E: You know, everyone aboard Xianzhou looks really young at first glance, but as soon as they open their mouths to speak, you instantly realize just how moldy they are from the inside out. Tsk, I can't stand it.

C: 掌柜是不是觉得我特有钱？
E: You think I've got deep pockets?

C: 不过，客人还是误会了。刚才那位客人啊，不是来做生意的，所以我也没告诉他咱这里有什么好东西。
E: But, you are nonetheless mistaken. That customer just now did not come for business, which is why I did not tell him about my goodies.

C: 那位客人受活水银侵蚀，命在旦夕，希望以自己身躯的一部分换来苟延残喘的三十年光阴。不知怎地，他得知有人曾在我这儿典当了一剂逆化灵药。
E: This customer had been poisoned by living mercury, and his life was in grave peril. He had hoped to relieve himself of this part of his body in exchange for thirty years of health. He somehow knew that someone had pawned a vial of reversion elixir here.

C: 「这校兵场内如果没有高人打擂，我可不仅要这一官半职，还得要抹粉戴花、游街示众了！哈哈哈……」
E: "If there are no more skilled challengers in this parade square, I would ask for not just an official title, but to be wreathed in flowers and paraded through the streets for all to see! Hahaha..."

C: 云骑军一名小队长仰面向台上看了看，未等这疤面剑客说完，双脚点地，飞身蹿上擂台，朝着靶人就是一剑，那两半靶人应声变成了碎块。
E: A Cloud Knights captain eyed the ring, and before the scarred swordsman could finish his sentence, the captain pushed himself off the ground with his feet, sprang up to the ring, and flashed his sword at the broken dummy, turning the dummy into pieces.

C: 暂时不需要…
E: Not at the moment...

C: 今天我还去了司辰宫一趟，问了问熟人有没有外派工作需要人手，等来的只有「近期没有，再等等。」
E: I even went down to the Palace of Astrum today and asked an associate there if there were any interstellar vacancies. All I got was "not recently, wait a while longer."

C: 不聊了，云骑开始瞪我们了。
E: We should stop here. The Cloud Knights are starting to glare.

C: 有吗？嘿嘿，不好意思～
E: Am I? Hee-hee, I'm sorry about that.

C: 我其实也不太懂品茶。
E: Actually, I don't really know much about tea.

C: 哈哈，仙舟上现在已经离不开鹤运物流了，吃饭点餐、网络购物、同城速递…可以说，要是没有咱们鹤运物流，这仙舟多半是难以运转了。
E: Haha, Xianzhou relies heavily on Heron Express Specialists: Delivering meals, online shopping, within-city deliveries... It'd be very difficult to operate Xianzhou without Heron Express.

C: 春分刚才唱的歌吗？这是持明时调《龙牙传》的唱词～故事的主角是一位「龙尊」，虽然春分还不太理解唱词，但曲调有种很悲伤的感觉。
E: The song I was just singing? It's a Vidyadhara elegy called Dragontooth Tales~ The story is about a high elder, and even though I don't quite understand what the lyrics mean, I know it's quite a mournful song.

C: …你要是和那帮仙舟的老东西交涉一番，你也会生气的。
E: ...You'd be livid, too, if it was you talking to them.

C: 没想到筑城者是这样的…
E: I didn't expect this from an Architect...

C: 你还想看我的手机。
E: You want to see my phone?

C: …再说了，我来仙舟是有任务在身的，是要做商业、学术交流的。
E: Not to mention I came to Xianzhou with the purpose of engaging in trade and academic exchange.

C: 瞧一瞧看一看，走过路过千万不要错过，买不来吃亏，买不了上当！
E: Come take a peek, and don't miss out! Your loss if you don't buy, no loss if you do!

C: 配合巡逻的机巧都坏了…
E: Every piece of machinery assigned to cooperate with the patrols went out of order...

C: 你们要是偷懒…
E: If you keep loafing about...

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！这位{F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}，要来瓶匹诺康尼原装进口苏乐达么，边看比赛边喝，快乐加倍哦！
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, and make your dreams a blast! That {F#lady}{M#gentleman} over there, would you like a bottle of authentic SoulGlad imported directly from Penacony? Multiply your happiness with some SoulGlad as you watch the competition!

C: 它降低了糖浆含量也就算了，还增加了仙舟当地的草药成分，你说这种不伦不类的口味是什么都可以，怎么可能还是苏乐达？
E: Not only does its recipe call for reduced syrup levels, but it even includes local Xianzhou herbs as ingredients. Call the mishmash of flavors what you want, but it's not SoulGlad.

C: 来看看哎！
E: Come and see!

C: 感觉和<unbreak>14</unbreak>没区别啊？
E: Doesn't it feel just like the XIV?

C: 哦，这件事咱们不能大声地说，不过效果你是可以放心的。
E: Ahem! These things aren't meant to be discussed so openly, but you needn't worry about the outcome.

C: 嗯…诗云：「昭昭日月明，离离星辰行。」
E: Hmm... there is a poem that says: "Bright are the silver moon and the morning sun— Yet life's blessed rest with the star-sown sky."

C: 我们之间的共同点就是在于「畅聊毁灭世界的方法」…久而久之，也算是小有名声——包括我在内，有四个人被并称为「四绝」。
E: Our common ground lies in "discussing ways to destroy the world"... And since then, we gathered a small following. Including me, there are four of us called the "Four Greats."

C: 唱得好啊！
E: You're a really great singer!

C: 现在有无糖的配方了。
E: Their new recipe is sugar-free though.

C: 你看我需要你的格斗技吗？
E: Do you need to see my skills?

C: 你就老实待着吧。
E: Why don't you just sit tight here?

C: …请问您是在以消灭我为前提在与我讨论吗？
E: ...Excuse me. Are you only asking to find out how to destroy me?

C: 你也许还是应该回归天外。
E: Maybe you should go back beyond the sky.

C: 等你真正将我打坏以后，我就什么也感觉不到了。我这样解释，你就明白这其中的原理了吧？不过，你这么担心我，我向你保证，我会活得好好的～
E: And when you really break me, I won't feel a thing. You understand the logic from my explanation? Though, since you're so worried about me, I promise to live my best life!

C: 最近工作还顺利吗？
E: Has work been going well lately?

C: 香嘛，首先得打开盒子闻一闻。要是香喷喷的，估计是加了香精，不太好。高级的木香，都是沉敛的，有自然清雅的气息。
E: When it comes to incense, the first thing to do is open the box and take a whiff. If the smell comes rushing forth, it's probably had added fragrance and is a cheap product. High quality wooden incenses are subtle, with a natural and elegant aroma.

C: 我和了。
E: I win.

C: 这种事情，不要啊！
E: No, not like this!

C: 这下我听懂了。
E: Now that, I can understand.

C: 正常，毕竟技术工种…
E: Sure, they're all technicians...

C: 我早就觉得她不对劲了…
E: I knew there was something up with her!

C: 嗯…过几天我带你去见她。
E: Yes... I'll bring you to her in a couple of days.

C: 哎呀，批评指正若是合理的话，你就当是对心境的磨炼吧。
E: Well, if the criticism is justified, you should just see it as a chance to train yourself to be tougher.

C: 什么梦碎？别瞎说。我只是有点感触而已。我要找的那个英雄，是云骑军中的一员，这次就在其中…不幸离世……
E: What are you talking about? I'm just feeling a bit sentimental. The hero I'm looking for is one of the Cloud Knights. Unfortunately, he has passed away...

C: 才不是呢，我是觉得那姑娘也挺漂亮的，怎么就瞎了眼肯去…哎……
E: Not at all. I just wonder what got into the beautiful girl's head that made her go to the funeral... *sigh*

C: 口碑好不代表质量高，「尚滋味」是吧？你看它这价格…
E: Good reviews don't mean good quality. Spices Supreme, right? Just take a look at the prices...

C: 等待军令…
E: Awaiting orders...

C: 等待军令…请发令。
E: Awaiting orders... Please dispatch orders.

C: 我很高兴与你分享眼中的世界。
E: I'm happy to share the world through my eyes with you.

C: 如果你实在想留个纪念，就拿着这枚猫咪硬币吧，反正我也用不上它了。
E: If you really want a souvenir, take this cat coin. It's not like I have any use for it anyway.

C: 哈哈。我听出了你话语中的僭越，但无妨，毕竟我是人们口中的「僭主」。
E: Haha. I hear the insolence in your words, but it's fine. After all, I am what people call a "tyrant."

C: 当然。毕竟我要征服的，可是这星辰大海啊。
E: Of course. After all, I'm here to conquer the seas of stars.

C: 在那之后，我也成了热衷观棋的一员。
E: After that, I also became one of those chess-watching enthusiasts.

C: 这枚骨螺来自斯缇科西亚的海床，是我许多年前采撷的，历经风霜仍保持光洁。
E: I collected this shell fossil from the seabed of Styxia many years ago, and it still retains its pristine shine despite weathering through snow and storms.

C: 勾手指，挠痒痒…扳手腕？
E: Pinky promise, tickle fight... arm wrestling?

C: 又重操旧业了！
E: Back to the old grind!

C: 纯度，有用吗？
E: Purity? Can you eat that?

C: 哦？为什么？
E: Oh? Why?

C: 你要是喜欢「晖长石号」，你回去啊。
E: If you like the Radiant Feldspar, then just go back to that ship.

C: 亦舒亦急，可湍可缓。
E: It can be swift or slow, rapid or meandering.

C: 跳舞的囚犯。
E: The dancing convict

C: 石碑上的歌者狰狞地狂笑着，身体左右摇摆，让你想起了鮟鱇鱼头顶的饵。
E: The singer on the stone tablet wears a hideous and wild smile. Their body sways side-to-side like the lure on the head of an angler fish.

C: 生命很长，刑期更长，百无聊赖的犯人蜷缩成一团，任凭枝叶在大脑中生长。最终，他放弃了思考。
E: Life is long, but his sentence is even longer. The convict was pushed to a level of boredom that inspired him to curl up into a ball and allow branches and leaves to grow in his brain. In the end, he gave up on thought altogether.

C: 你是一名地衡司的王牌执事，得知有人打算*炸掉竞锋舰*，你千辛万苦登上竞锋舰后，犯人告诉你，他在竞锋引擎上安装了*定时炸弹*。
E: You are a highly decorated officer of the Realm-Keeping Commission who has heard that someone is planning to blow up the Skysplitter. After you painstakingly board the ship, the criminal informs you that he has already installed a time bomb in the engine.

C: 不好意思，王牌执事可没有这样的习惯。你只能先吃个棒棒糖平替一下。
E: Sorry, high-achieving officers can't have such bad habits. You can only have a lollipop to calm down.

C: 一二三四，二二三四……
E: One-two-three-four, two-two-three-four...

C: 拳法练习，开始！
E: Boxing practice, let's begin!

C: 不知道我本事是否够格。
E: Not sure if my skills meet the mark.

C: 如果你跑得足够快，或者武艺高强到可以单挑整个仙舟联盟的云骑军，那么你就可以吃掉笼屉里的包子——无需支付任何费用。
E: If you are a fast runner or someone powerful enough to fend off all the Cloud Knights of Xianzhou Alliance single-handedly, you are free to have all the buns in the steamer without paying for them.

C: 这有啥，之前还有人掏枪呢！
E: What's wrong with that? There was even someone with a gun!

C: 「谨防泄漏——请注意操作规程，避免息壤过量增殖。」
E: "Leakage Precaution: Please follow the operating procedures to prevent the excessive proliferation of the Fallow Earth."

C: 迴星港里到处都是这种金属外壳——这星槎培养失败率是不是有点高？
E: Such metal shells can be found everywhere at the Stargazer Navalia. It seems like the failure rate of starskiff cultivation is quite high.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Abomination."

C: 「将这一异象归咎于反物质军团而非其他原因，是因为在雅梵娜之链的这些暗区里，军团紧随黑暗的脚步，消灭了那些抵抗世界。」
E: "The unusual occurrence was attributed to the Antimatter Legion. It was because the legion followed the dark areas in the Yvanna chain and wiped out the resisting worlds there."

C: 音乐派对正火热进行中。
E: The music party is in full swing.

C: 数字单据上既没有写明寄件人和地址，也未标注收件人的信息。你要打开它吗？
E: Neither the sender's address nor the recipient's info is on the digital label. Should you open it up?

C: 「恭喜你，从星际和平公司影视部毕业啦！感谢你的一路相伴，我们江湖再见！」这是你第一次知道，人进入社会参加工作之后，还能有机会毕业。
E: "Congratulations on graduating from Interastral Peace Corporation! Thanks for your company so far, and I wish our paths will cross again in the future!" You just realize that the idea of graduating from a company actually exists.

C: 如今你的这一世走到了尽头，即将开始新的轮回。你的一生很幸福，没留下任何遗憾，但你在众人的心中留下了一个永远的遗憾——
E: Now, your current life has come to an end, and it is time for you to begin a new cycle. You have lived a happy life with no regrets, but your departure will leave an eternal regret for everyone else...

C: 你看到箱子上赫然写着「寄件人：蓝玫瑰、收件人：红桃」。
E: You see a note blatantly scrawled on the package that reads: "Sender: Blue Rose. Recipient: Red Peach."

C: 太有实力了！我爱你们！
E: Amazing!!! I love all of you!

C: 太美了，「快递之龙」。
E: It's beautiful! Delivery Dragon!

C: 就在这千钧一发之际…
E: Just in the nick of time...

C: 那制作人一直骂「见鬼了」。
E: The producer just kept cursing.

C: 气得我给他们一顿乱填。
E: I was so upset, I gave them all random answers.

C: 在你面前的只是星槎的投影，你明白吗？你不会遇到章鱼头船长，也不会遇到受诅咒的怪物，星槎更不会从海底突然冒出来。
E: What's before you is merely the projection of a starskiff, do you understand? You are neither going to meet Captain Octopushead nor the cursed creatures. And the starskiff will not suddenly leap out of the ocean.

C: 在梦境内容如此丰富的当下，书籍这样原始的载体只能起到纪念意义了。
E: At present, where dreams are as abundant as they are, primitive items like books serve only as commemorative objects.

C: 这是…一个垃圾桶。梦中居然也存在垃圾桶？！
E: This is... a trashcan. There are even trashcans in the dream!?

C: 这家店铺卖的东西和对门完全相同，其中竞争想必非常激烈。
E: This store sells the same exact merchandise as the one opposite it. The competition must be fierce between the two.

C: 这盏灯飞得如此之高，以至于它的打开和关闭都成问题。
E: This lamp is flying so high that trying to turn it on and off is going to be a problem.

C: 科琳的房间。除非她想出来，不然没人进得去——你已经知道那什么「锁闭式次元力场发生器」的存在了。
E: Colleen's room. No one can open the door unless she opens it herself. You are aware of the enclosed dimensional force field generator on the door.

C: 家族监管局，负责监督整个筑梦边境的工程进展——顺带驱逐那些不该出现的家伙。
E: The Family's surveillance agency, charged with overseeing the entire Dream's Edge's construction, as well as driving out people who should not be there.

C: 梦泡带来的紊乱侵扰了这处座位，现在它已经不适合被任何人使用。
E: The disorder brought about by the dream bubbles have infested this seat — it is now unsuitable for usage.

C: 台前已无来宾，唯余座椅冰凉。
E: There are no guests at the front desk, and the seats have turned cold.

C: 惠特克爵士的嘴角露出浅浅的笑意，你从中还读出了一丝不屑。
E: There is a hint of disdain in the faint smile surfacing on Sir Whittaker's face.

C: 听上去怪轻松的。
E: Sounds pretty easy to me.

C: 前来匹诺康尼的宾客中，有超过一半是在各自世界享有一定声誉的名流；其中更不乏富可敌星的超级富豪。
E: More than half of the guests here are well-known figures in their respective homeworlds. Some of them are even ultrarich tycoons with enough wealth to rival an entire planet.

C: 哎，话可不兴这么说啊！我先代表苜蓿草银行警告你，造谣是要负责任的！
E: Look, you shouldn't make baseless allegations like that! I must warn you on behalf of the Alfalfa Bank that you can be held accountable for the rumors you spread!

C: 可现在…什么都捞不着，产品没人买，住宿费用倒越来越高，想让孩子来玩也付不起……
E: But now... I've come away empty-handed. I've sold nothing, racked up a huge hotel bill, and I can't even take my kids on holiday...

C: 啊，糟、糟糕，大伯交待过我，不能随便说自己是橡木家系的成员……
E: Ah, o—oh no, Uncle told me never to reveal that I'm a member of the Oak Family...

C: 不管怎么样，证书…还有奖章，都是很重要的！我都给你看！
E: Anyway, the certificates... and the medals, they're really important! I'll show all of them to you!

C: 你被迫听笨罐先生讲解起了他获得证书的艰辛历程，时间流逝得如同水珠在冰过的汽水瓶表面凝结那般缓慢。承认吧，要是可以，你也想考张汽水品鉴技能证。
E: You are forced to sit through Mr. Piggy Bank's monologue on his arduous journey to acquire all his certificates. Time trickles as slow as pearls of condensed droplets inching their way down the side of a chilled soda can. Admit it, if you could, you also want to try sitting for a soda appraisal certificate.

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 没什么想法。
E: I don't have any ideas.

C: 每个人都有秘密，每座城市都有它幽暗的角落。如果不想让秘密被暴露在大众的视野之下，可得多费一番功夫学习埋藏真相的技能。
E: Everyone has secrets, and every city has its dark corners. If its secrets are to be kept away from the public eye, you'd have to learn to be very skilled in burying the truth.

C: 还是说…您其实并不了解这种行为究竟意味着什么呢？
E: Or... do you actually not really understand what this is all about?

C: 怎么回事？在你校准对方情绪的一瞬间，一只谛听突然出现在了眼前！
E: What's going on? The moment you calibrate the target's mood, a Diting pops out of nowhere.

C: 唉…其实，我当年并没有想过要做一个裱糊匠。
E: *sigh* I've never actually thought about being a reality fixer-upper before.

C: 为了匹诺康尼的福祉，我居然不得不和理想背道而驰…真是讽刺。
E: It's just... ironic that I have to betray my own ideals for the sake of Penacony.

C: 有了这次教训，电视台也不敢敷衍了事了，一连开了几档新节目，哈…监制他们有得忙了。
E: Well, that's a lesson learned. The station will be wary about going through the motions and just randomly pumping out new shows all the time. Hah... The producers better get busy!

C: 那你有什么建议？
E: So what do you suggest?

C: 卡什女士激烈地咳嗽了起来，你的提问似乎刺激到了她。
E: Lady Cash coughs violently. Seems like your question has irritated her.

C: 哎呀，刚才那些话都别往心里去——我其实是很爱惜这些道具，也很热爱匹诺康尼的。
E: Oh my, please don't mind my words — I love these props like my own, and I'm a fan of Penacony.

C: 这些道具，一个个都太没用了！
E: These props are useless!

C: 没用的东西，简直是废物！训练这么久都学不会！
E: Useless items! Garbage! They can't even get anything right after all that training!

C: 据说只有爱才能锁住一个自由的灵魂，现在看来，连她那样优秀的人也没法幸免。
E: Well, they say that only love can tame a free spirit. It seems like even a carefree person like her cannot escape such a fate.

C: 一定是父亲把我保护得太好了。他以前就这样，恨不得把一切都装进瓶子里才行。
E: Dad must have been too protective of me. He's always like this. If possible, he would rather keep me safe in a bottle himself.

C: 啊…真没想到，居然能在这里遇到其他人。你好。
E: Ah... I never imagined meeting other people out here. Hello.

C: 我唯一想做的，就是在这个空无一人的梦境里安静地画画。
E: My only wish is to paint in this empty Dreamscape alone quietly.

C: 没见过。
E: ...Didn't see her.

C: 关于你的制表工艺。
E: Tell me about your watchmaking.

C: 等等……这是……什么感觉……
E: Wait... What... What is this feeling...

C: 她不理会你的劝说，冲着自动乐团的指挥家大喊大叫——但对方沉浸在自动奏响的音乐之中，也不理会她的反抗。
E: She disregards your advice and yells at the conductor of the automated orchestra — the conductor, immersed in music, ignores her resistance.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 我太缺少危机意识了。常盘国自己的市场够大，在公司的贸易体系内也一直占有相当程度的份额。
E: I was too oblivious to our crisis. Tokiwa's market is sufficiently developed and we have always occupied considerable shares within the IPC trade system.

C: 我平时在「太阳的时刻」上班，下班后才会来「黄金的时刻」让自己放松一下。
E: Normally, after I finish work in the Moment of Sol, I come to Golden Hour to relax by myself.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 卜萝…泥巴…？听着耳熟，是哪位名人来着……
E: Bron... Naya? Sounds familiar. Who is that person?

C: 你是怎么拿到邀请函的？
E: How did you get an invitation?

C: 你开始给爱德华医生讲述你的浪漫梦境。
E: You start describing your romantic dream to Dr. Edward.

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 米沙，还有米哈伊尔，他们之所以决定建起美梦小镇，初衷一定是希望大家能带着亲朋好友一起来到这里，享受难得的欢乐时光！
E: The reason why Misha and Mikhail decided to build up Dreamville was the hope that everyone could bring their friends and family here to have a good time!

C: 万一你们在旅途中迷了路，就呼唤「罗盘小子」的名字吧。我一定会速速赶到大伙身边，为你们精准导航！
E: If you ever get lost during your travels, just call for the Compassie. I'll be there in a flash and help you to navigate with great precision!

C: 别那么心急，朋友！此时此刻，您就是整个梦境十二时分里最闪耀的那颗幸运星！
E: Don't be so impatient my friend! Right here, right now, you're the shiniest lucky star across all Twelve Hours in the Dreamscape!

C: 没有明确的需求，我当然只能先随口说说咯…这难道能怪我吗？*粗口*！
E: Without clear instructions, I could only do things my way... How can you blame me for that? *Profanity*!

C: 而且公馆里也有很多安保措施。您就放一百个心吧！
E: What's more, there are many more security measures inside the pavilion itself. You can rest completely assured!

C: 我也曾与有手有脚的垃圾桶大打出手，暴力推翻了他们的王。直到今天，依旧有桶视我为敌。
E: I also once hit a trashcan that had arms and legs, thrashing their leader thoroughly and flipping it upside down. Even now, there are trashcans that bear great hostility towards me.

C: 歼灭模式，启动！
E: Annihilation mode activated!

C: 有什么推荐的美食？
E: Are there any dishes you can recommend?

C: 哈啊…谢谢你的体贴……
E: Ahh... Thank you for your kindness...

C: 需要帮忙吗？
E: Do you need help?

C: 哈哈，客人您可真体贴！相信我，您会喜欢这支「美梦」的！
E: Haha, you're so thoughtful! Believe me, you will enjoy this "beautiful dream"!

C: 象征鸢尾花家系的徽记，优雅绽放的花朵散发着动人心魄的魅力。
E: A crest that symbolizes the Iris Family. A flower blooms elegantly, exuding a charm that captivates the hearts of man.

C: 象征隐夜鸫家系的徽记，枝头的鸟儿亦是衔枝的筑梦师。
E: A crest that symbolizes the Nightingale Family. The bird sitting on the branch is also a Dreamweaver, holding the branch in place.

C: 我对你的态度，得取决于你的音乐品味。
E: My opinion of you depends on your taste in music.

C: 怎么回事？在你提出问题的一瞬间，一名智械女性突然出现在了眼前！
E: What's going on? The moment you ask the question, an Intellitron girl pops out of nowhere!

C: 只可惜，不能在这里一直待到正式演出。每次开演，我都会远远地站在外面看着。
E: It's just a shame that I can't stay here to see an official performance. I always stand somewhere outside and look at the theater every time a show is on.

C: 演出啊，会有些什么呢？是像梦泡电影那样？还是说有比流行曲目好听一百倍的歌？还是…总而言之，应该是我完全想象不出来的美梦吧。
E: What kind of show? Something like a dream bubble movie? Or some song that's a hundred times better than regular pop music? Or... Anyway, it must be some dream that I couldn't even begin to imagine.

C: {NICKNAME}？难道是星穹列车的那位……
E: {NICKNAME}? Don't tell me you're the one with the Astral Express...

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. Bye-bye.

C: 啥？你说什么？敢不敢再说一遍？！我超级骇客还从来没怕过谁！
E: Huh? What did you say? Just you try saying that again! I've never been afraid of anyone before in my life!

C: 还未等你有反应，「石剑」突然疯狂挥动起手臂来，于是你的视野里出现了一道绚丽的彩虹。
E: Before you get a chance to react, Stoneblade suddenly swings his arms around wildly. A brilliant rainbow materializes before your very eyes.

C: 「那位红发的挑战者，凭借出色的演技和高贵的品格成功征服了所有评委」…就离谱！
E: "The redheaded challenger won the hearts of all the judges with incredible acting and superb morals"... What a load of baloney!

C: …好，那么正式开始之前，我们再来对一遍流程：首先是那位冠军的挑战路线，确定记清楚…嗯？哎呀，看来没必要特意去记了……
E: ...Alright. Before we officially start, let's go over things once more: First, the winner's route — can you remember all that? ... Ah, looks like you won't have to remember it after all...

C: 聊天？我可没那个闲情逸致！
E: You want to chat? I'm not in the mood for that!

C: 伊丽莎白——我的名字叫伊丽莎白。奇怪，我为什么要把真名告诉你？我们也不熟啊……
E: Elizabeth — my name is Elizabeth. That's weird, why am I telling you my real name? We barely know each other...

C: 想活命的话就离他们远点，可别被骗进噩梦里当肥料…要是那玩意主动招惹你，你就…就敲碎它们的壳子、打烂里面的怪物、将它们捣成泥、烧成灰……
E: Stay away from them if you want to live. They'll trick you into going into the nightmares and use you as fertilizer... If those things come at you, you've gotta... You've gotta smash their shells, beat the hell out of the monsters inside, grind them into paste, and burn them to ash...

C: 一般情况下，我只画自己喜欢的题材和作品。打个比方，会在午夜活过来的人偶啊，墨水变成的恶魔啊…之类的。
E: Normally I just draw works and themes that I enjoy myself. A puppet that comes to life at night, ink that transforms into demons... Things like that.

C: 很扯，对吧？但确实让我焕发了第二春。而且…我伪装得很好。人的心态会被他人所扮演的社会角色左右——没有什么比一位可怜的少女更容易惹人疼爱了。
E: Ridiculous, right? But, it's given me a second chance at youth. Plus... I play the role well. People's attitudes are influenced by another character's role in society... And what is more loveable than a pitiful young girl?

C: 田地是最公平的，有劳才有得。不干活，就没饭吃。
E: The farms are the definition of fairness. If you want to benefit, you have to do the work. If you don't work, you'll have nothing to eat.

C: 除了音乐之外，孩子们也应该接触其他的学科……
E: Children should be exposed to other subjects beside music, too.

C: 是啊，连钟表小子都没有彻底打倒过它的敌人……
E: You're right. Even Clockie has never completely defeated his enemies before...

C: 你让我想起了刚到匹诺康尼的自己…那应该是将近十个琥珀纪之前的事了，我那时也是和你一样意气风发的年轻人，希望能代表「烛墨学派」记录匹诺康尼的历史。
E: You reminded me of myself when I first arrived in Penacony... That would have been nearly ten Amber Eras ago, and I was a spirited youngster like you, hoping to record the Penacony history on behalf of the Candelagraphos.

C: 刚开始的时候，编辑还会为这事儿来找我麻烦，让我不要在故事里加入奇怪的元素和乱码。
E: At the start, the editors came at me, telling me not to include strange elements and garbled codes in the story.

C: 就和生命一样，比起被豢养后逐渐失去可塑性的匹诺康尼，这样的梦域反而能够承载更丰富的变化。
E: Just like life, such a dreamland can hold richer permutations than Penacony, which had gradually lost its plasticity after being cultured.

C: 哎呀，不知不觉竟然聊了这么久……
E: *Oooh* I didn't realize that we'd been chatting for so long...

C: 提示？当然可以，我知道所有小鸟的位置。
E: A hint? Certainly, I know where all the birds are.

C: 啾，这股苏乐达的味道…难道是钟表小子的朋友啾？怪不得一副硬派好汉的样子……
E: Tweet, this SoulGlad smell... Could you be Clockie's friend, tweet? I thought you looked like someone tough...

C: 它们让着你的吧？
E: They let you win, didn't they?

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，石头老板似乎找到了<color=#dbc291ff>哈努兄弟的据点</color>，有个勇敢的小家伙，已经飞去救他了啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: It seems like Boss Stone has located <color=#dbc291ff>Brother Hanu's usual hangout</color>. A brave little one has already flown there to save him, tweet.

C: 啾！客官想聊聊天吗？人家一直都在啾。
E: Tweet! You wish to chat? I've been waiting here always, tweet.

C: 当然，如果你有任何疑问，我将很乐意解答。
E: Of course, if you have any questions, I'd be more than happy to answer them.

C: 苏乐达的由来？
E: SoulGlad's origin?

C: 我只认识「哈努兄弟」。
E: I only know Brother Hanu.

C: 快降低关卡难度！
E: You need to reduce the stage difficulty!

C: 嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
E: Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?

C: 你怎么知道…
E: How did you know...

C: 有些人感受到了，而有些人永远不会——这就叫做艺术。
E: Art isn't universal — some people can appreciate it, while others can't.

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 但也正因为太过方便，有时候…也会显得太可悲些。
E: But it's this same convenience that also makes things... sad.

C: 我所感受到的欣喜，与我发现贝壳时的欣喜，显然并不是同一种事物。
E: The joy I felt was on a whole other level compared to when I found the shell.

C: 我们的时间都太珍贵了，验资当然是必不可少的……
E: Our time is precious, so maintaining creditworthiness is crucial.

C: 纯粹的记忆没有立场，总是不加选择地保留过去，这是它最体贴的地方……也是它最危险的地方。
E: Pure memory retains the past without any embellishments or standpoints. It's what makes it so thought-provoking... and dangerous.

C: 明明也没遇到坏事，但又烦躁得厉害…这就是所谓的无名火吗？
E: Nothing terrible has happened, but I feel unusually frustrated... Could this be what they call "angry for no reason"?

C: 不过你要是在星际和平公司认识人——我是说，某些关键部门里的员工——你可以去打听打听，说不定会有惊喜。
E: But if you have connections within the IPC, especially in key departments, asking around might bring you some exciting deets.

C: …哎，道理我都懂。就是不知道这次要花多少时间来消化这个噩耗……
E: ... *sigh* I do know that. I'm just not sure how long I'll take to recover from this setback this time...

C: 艾丽卡不会有什么不满吗？
E: Won't Erica take issue with this?

C: 客官，如果您有「魔法硬币」就好了，魔法硬币可以唤醒人家的记忆啾！
E: Dear guest, it'd be fantastic if you have a magic coin. Magic coins can reawaken my memories, tweet!

C: 好的啾，欢迎客官随时回来和我聊天啾~
E: Sure thing. You're welcome to come back and chat with me anytime, tweet~!

C: …还有这么多讲究啊。
E: ...That's a ton of instructions.

C: …但现在光这么说也没用，只能以后表现得好一些，吃一堑当长一智吧，大副说得对，还是要照流程行事才行。
E: ...All this talk of regret wouldn't change a thing anyway. I'll just have to work harder to make up for it. This is a lesson to learn from. The first mate is right, following proper procedures is the way to go.

C: 能来空艇上工作是我的荣幸！
E: It's my honor to work on the airship!

C: 这些年来，我的音乐事业没有任何发展，出碟录音样样都要花钱，还不如来这里调饮。
E: My music wasn't going anywhere those years, and you had to put in money to release albums, record tracks, and whatnot. Surely I'm better off here mixing drinks.

C: 请您尽管问吧。
E: Please, ask away.

C: 你对船员还挺宽厚的。
E: You're pretty nice to your crew, huh?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 现在再品味，哎，这时间的圈套…我早早就落入其中了……
E: But now, when I listen to it again... *sigh* This trap of time... I seem to have fallen into it a long time ago...

C: 年轻人，听好——音乐这东西，享受别人的成果就好，别把自己搭进去了。
E: Listen, young one — for something like music, just enjoy what others have produced. Don't sacrifice yourself for it.

C: 你的演技不错。
E: You spin a great tale.

C: 展会上会有哪些作品？
E: What kind of works will there be at the exhibition?

C: 唉，其实是我自己的事。你要是真好奇…行吧，能跟人讲讲也好。
E: Ah, that's just a personal issue. Although, if you're really curious... Alright, I guess it's good to talk to people about these things.

C: 又见面了，游客！还是对我们的展览感兴趣吗？
E: We meet again, visitor! Are you still interested in our exhibition?

C: 你知道当我听他信誓旦旦地把「翾翔」念成「寰翔」时的感受吗？
E: Do you know how I felt when he said "aeronautics" instead of "aerodynamics" with a completely straight face?

C: 而你——就有这个潜质！现在递交入团申请，你就是除了本社长之外最资深的成员，有权优先享受社团的一切资源福利！
E: And you... You've got what it takes! If you submit your application to join now, you'll be the most senior member after me, the club leader! You will be able to enjoy all the benefits and resources our club offers!

C: 说吧，我可喜欢和你这样有见识的人交流了。
E: Say it. I love conversing with cultured people like yourself.

C: 怎么能放弃自己的梦想呢？
E: How can you give up on your dream like that?

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，你问了个好问题。我最近也在烦恼这件事。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, you've asked a great question. I've been troubled over this recently too.

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}太客气了！我们都这么熟悉了，有什么事就直说吧！
E: You're too polite, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager! We are so familiar with each other, just speak freely!

C: 或许我也该多听听学生们的想法，避免陷入固步自封的境地。
E: Perhaps I should pay more attention to what the students say, so we don't get entrapped in our own hubris.

C: 真是，想起来就生气！这种人还能当上学院代表，简直不可思议！
E: Agh, just thinking about it makes me angry! It's preposterous that such a person could even become an academy representative!

C: 同学们快来瞧瞧哇，都是新到的好货！这位同学！我是财富学院的学生，小本创业，勤工俭学，要不要来支持一下……
E: Students, come take a gander. These are all newly arrived beauties! I'm a Fortune Academy student, bootstrapping my business, and working hard to pay through school. How about throwing some support my way...

C: 大佬，你知道「折纸大学年鉴」吗？那个…我想麻烦你帮我写上一段对我的未来寄语。
E: Boss, have you heard about the Paperfold University Yearbook? Well... Could I trouble you to write a message for my future?

C: 咳咳咳，我朋友不太会说话请见谅。船长请您见谅！
E: *cough cough* My friend doesn't really think before she speaks, please don't take it to heart!

C: 站在矩阵的终点，一切明白如洗：十二泰坦符文包裹的符号，象征着十二道因子参与的无限循环。
E: Standing at the end of the matrix, everything becomes crystal clear: the symbols encased in the Twelve Titans' runes represent an infinite loop involving twelve factors.

C: 鲜艳的红晶，簇生成纷争之形——在某本不存在的字典中，它被称作「力量」，词源与「石榴」同根。
E: A crimson crystal blooms into the shape of strife. In a dictionary that doesn't actually exist, it's called "Strength," a word with the same root as "pomegranate" in the Kremnoan language.

C: 跟我的帝彼亚有啥区别？
E: How is it any different from my Bionyx?

C: 这都多少年前的广告了？
E: That advert is how many years old?

C: 就不能适配球桌高度嘛？
E: But can't you adjust the height of the table to suit the user?

C: 不对外开放！快回去！
E: No visitors allowed! Leave!

C: 反正梦里摔不死人，嘿！
E: Well, you can't really fall to your death in a dream anyway!

C: 买个苏乐达要那么久？
E: It's taking forever to buy SoulGlad!

C: 这个不错，就它了。
E: Sounds good. That's the one.

C: 嘿…可恶，抠、抠不下来？啊啊啊啊！
E: Wh—What...? Drat, why can't I tear it down?... Arrrgh!

C: 我这么相信你，你可不能骗我哦。
E: I've put my trust in you, so don't you lie to me.

C: 哼…他看了半天，最后和我说，「要不咱们还是用第一版方案吧」。
E: Well... He hesitated for a long time and finally said... "Maybe let's just use the initial plan."

C: 欢迎您，贵客。
E: It's a pleasure to have you here, dear guest.

C: 我们是不是在哪里见过？
E: Have we met each other before?

C: 你来这是做什么的？
E: What brings you here today?

C: 不如等到《寻星顽童》重映的时候再说吧。在影院的散场灯光下，我想我会同意的。
E: How about we wait for the Urchin Starhunters to perform again and speak then? Maybe I'll think you're my friend when there's a bit more light and noise.

C: 这届的对手也太厉害了。
E: The contestants this time are so strong.

C: 每届都报名，每届都不过，好不容易自律起来，把每天的空闲都拿来练习，还碰上今年这种对手阵容。
E: I've signed up for every audition, and I've failed every audition. I've finally gotten some self-discipline to train during my spare time, but I just had to meet this year's lineup of opponents.

C: 感觉肚子有点不舒服…
E: My tummy doesn't feel too good...

C: 船长还会继续招人吗？
E: Is the captain going to keep hiring people?

C: 那边的姐姐很担心…
E: The lady over there is very worried...

C: 大哥也来匹诺康尼了…
E: My big brother has come to Penacony too...

C: 有家神奇的典当行……
E: There's a wondrous pawnshop...

C: 看似普通的涂鸦，彰显着学生们无处安放的才华——尽管后勤部门从不这么认为。
E: What looks like ordinary graffiti is a testament to the aimless talent radiating from students — even if the Logistics Department doesn't think so.

C: 座无虚席的财富学院课室，就连门后都挤满了人。从门缝间传来的声音可以依稀辨认出，似乎是哪位商界名流在此召开经验分享会。
E: The Fortune Academy classroom is packed to the brim with students, right up to the door. From the voice seeping through the crack of the door that's ajar, you can make out that some prominent business figure from the industry is sharing their insights.

C: 哈哈哈，太好笑了，我得联系新闻社来报道这件事，先拍个照片……
E: Hahaha, that's funny! I must contact the News Society to report about this, but not before I take a picture first...

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 你这混小子，不喝牛奶怎么长得高，我给你倒杯子里了啊。
E: You rascal, you won't grow taller if you don't drink milk. I'll pour some into your cup.

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 暂时不想洗澡。
E: You don't want to take a shower just yet.

C: 水珠蹦跳，清扬的流水声与你相和。你不由得引吭高歌，歌声在浴室湿润的水汽中回响，有如天籁般悦耳。
E: Water droplets bounce, and the clear sound of flowing water harmonizes with you. You can't help but burst into song, your voice echoing in the bathroom's humid atmosphere, as melodious as heavenly music.
Oink... oink oink...

C: 朋友，看你的眼神就知道，你也向往着和大地兽伙伴一起冒险的生活，没错吧？
E: Friend, I can see that spark in your eyes — the yearning for adventure with your dromas buddies. Am I right?

C: 哈哈，看来是我误会您的来意了。只怪近期光顾小店的顾客十有八九都是冲着这个系列来的。
E: Haha, it looks like I misread your interest. Lately, it seems like everyone who stops by is on the hunt for that specific line of products.

C: 为何不找你哥聊聊？
E: Why don't you talk about it with your brother?

C: 那又怎么样，阿芙罗，你就听婶婶一句劝吧：像你这样的大美女，喜欢你的人排起队来都能绕集市一圈了，又何必吊死在一棵树上？
E: So what, Aphrea? Seriously, take my advice: With your beauty, why settle for him when you could have a queue of admirers eager to do anything just for your attention?

C: 要我说啊，我给你介绍那位就很好。人家在原本的城邦曾经是个大贵族呢，就算来到了奥赫玛，血统和身份也不是一般人比得了的。
E: In my view, the man I introduced you to is remarkable. He was a prominent noble in his previous city, and even though he's in Okhema now, his heritage and status make him stand out.

C: …就这？
E: ...That's it?

C: 诶呀，我还没说完呢…这种秘酿既干净又营养，唯一的问题就是口感粗糙、味道非常…独特。不过由于价格便宜又容易制作，迄今为止它仍旧有着不小的市场。
E: Hey, I'm not done explaining yet... While it's clean and nutritious, its taste is coarse and... well, unique. Still, it's a hit here because it's cheap and easy to make.

C: 衣匠能把它们缝起来吗？
E: Can a Garmentmaker stitch them back together?

C: …什么意思，难道说，你是……
E: ...What do you mean? Could it be... You're...

C: [★] 非常不满意
E: [★] Very unsatisfied

C: 不过…这么说来我倒是有个不情之请。半年前我的女儿和女婿一起跟随一支探险队出城探索，至今了无音讯。
E: But then again... I do have a small favor to ask. Half a year ago, my daughter and son-in-law went on an expedition away from the city, and they haven't been heard from since.

C: 问问他们有没有组织。
E: Ask about how their organization is.

C: 这是一只普通的箩筐。如你所见，和垃圾桶没有任何相似之处。
E: What you see before you is simply an ordinary basket. As you can see, it bears no resemblance to a trashcan.

C: 哦？你也对{RUBY_B#圆锥曲线}艾格勒曲线{RUBY_E#}感兴趣？我写过八卷本的《艾格勒曲线论》，只可惜原始稿件都已经被黑潮吞进肚子里了。
E: Oh? You're interested in {RUBY_B#Conic Section}Aquila Curves{RUBY_E#} too? I penned a comprehensive book called On Aquila Curves spanning eight volumes. It's a shame my manuscripts were lost in the black tide.

C: 打听你的事
E: Ask about Tavananna.

C: 请问…您意下如何？
E: If I may... Would you like to join our membership?

C: 水质柔软，泡沫适量，浴盐带来的淡淡花香又为室内增添了些许温馨氛围。啊，还有什么比旅途劳顿之后泡个澡更为放松的事呢？
E: You bath in the soft water in the embrace of nice and rich bubbles, the faint floral fragrance of the bath salts adds a certain cozy touch to the room. Ah, is there anything more relaxing than a bubble bath after a long, labored journey?

C: 再会。
E: Farewell.

C: 而吉奥里亚与瑟希斯达成盟约，让植物们替自己挡住法吉娜不息的波涛声和雨声。
