E: So, Georios formed an alliance with Cerces to have plants shelter the land and block the sound of Phagousa's endless waves and rain.

C: 但是...但是那张脸...不，不可能！那是队长的脸！不，这不可能！
E: But... But that face... No, it can't be! It was my captain's face! No, it couldn't have been!

C: 怎么听着似曾相识…
E: You sound like someone I've met before...

C: …「僻静的地方」？
E: ..."Some place quiet"?

C: 寒腿叔叔可比你会编故事多了。
E: Even Mr. Cold Feet can spin a better tale than you.

C: 买卖不成仁义在！阿普里斯别的不是很懂，香料和肥皂的知识还是有一些的……
E: The deal didn't work out, but our friendship prevails! I don't know much about other things, but I do know my spices and my soaps...

C: …嗐，咱们聊这个干嘛！人活着还是得向前看——也得向钱看，哈哈哈哈！
E: ...Hey, why are we talking about this! People have to keep fighting on to live — and for that cash, haha!

C: 有时候真羡慕他们能如此投入自己的信仰…至少让生活不那么虚无，对吧？
E: Sometimes I really envy how they can throw themselves into their faith like that... At least, it must make life feel a little bit less empty, right?

C: 咦，是个生面孔。你好啊，我叫卢克雷提娅，是这里的兽医。
E: Oh, a fresh face? Hello there, my name's Lucretia and I'm the vet around here.

C: 不，我只是刚好路过。
E: No, I'm just passing by.

C: 不过话说回来，我是真的觉得很奇怪…「小家伙」们到底怎么了？哎，可惜我目前还没有头绪……
E: But then again, I really do find it strange... What happened to the little guys? *sigh* Unfortunately I still don't have any clue...

C: 奇怪…「小家伙」们到底怎么了？哎，是你啊！怎么，太喜欢大地兽又来看它们吗？还是说…想找我唠嗑？
E: That's strange... What happened to the little guys? Hey, it's you! What's up, can't get enough of our dromases? Or maybe... are you here to chat with me?

C: 不行，这个真的不行，我也是听上面的吩咐，你也体谅一下吧。
E: No, this really is impossible. I'm just following orders here, please be understanding.

C: 据说浴场的泉眼是法吉娜的恩赐，不同浴池的泉水各有不同的效果。除了治愈身心的常见功效外，传闻黄金裔专用的池水可能蕴含微量的泰坦之力。
E: Legend has it that the fonts of the spring water are a gift from Phagousa, and different baths can give you different effects. Besides the usual effects of healing both body and mind, rumor has it that waters in the Chrysos Heirs' bath contain vestigial traces of Titan power.

C: 为什么要研究这个？
E: Why are you researching this?

C: …让您见笑了，客人。这是我以前工作时养成的习惯，还请多包涵。
E: ...I am sorry you had to see that, dear customer. My old job left me with some bad habits. Please forgive me.

C: 很久以前，躺椅曾是一种只有身份尊贵的人才能使用的家具。那些人会不惜成本地用上好的胡桃木、乌木、雪松木做成框架，冬天搭配细羊毛织成的软毯，夏天搭配清凉的白亚麻布。
E: A long time ago, the lounger was an item of furniture limited only to those of great importance. These people would spare no expense and use the finest walnut, ebony, and cedar wood to make the frames and pair them with a fine wool in winter, or cool white linen for summer.

C: 不过，听说有些战士掌握飞盾的技巧，而且扔出去还能飞回来…这可比标枪方便多了。或许我也该学一手？
E: But I hear some warriors are masters at throwing shields, and have their shield return to them after they throw it out... So much more convenient than javelins. Perhaps it's time I learn to do that?

C: 啧，杂碎！说要捍卫荣耀，结果连爬起来再战的勇气都没有。就这点觉悟，还敢挑战尼卡多利的祭司？
E: Tsk, pathetic! All that hot air about defending glory — he couldn't even muster enough courage to get up and fight again. One with such shallow resolve dares challenge a priest of Nikador?

C: 你对黄金裔们的了解？
E: How well do you know the Chrysos Heirs?

C: 偶尔有小玩具，她们做不出，会找我帮忙。
E: Little toys, they cannot make. Seek my help, they occasionally do.

C: 这是个什么店？
E: What kinda shop is this?

C: 您要是真对这手这么感兴趣，送您本指南，老希自个写的。
E: I can give you a guide if you're really interested in it. I penned it myself.

C: 老板，来瓶秘酿！
E: A bottle of ambrosia please!

C: 太不公平~
E: How unfair!

C: 干了！
E: Bottoms up!

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽。秘酿强烈的风味如一场风暴，连泰坦也会被放倒——
E: You raise the bottle and down it into your hatch. The ambrosia's intense flavor hits you like a storm, capable of toppling even a Titan...

C: 聪明的人总有别样的魅力，他神乎其技地偷来了你所在高台的建筑图纸，找到了下行的密道……如果没有九千九百九十九级台阶就更好了。
E: Smart people often have unique charms — he has adroitly stolen the building blueprint of the elevated platform you're on, and found the underground secret passage... Now if only there weren't nine-thousand, nine-hundred and ninety-nine steps to walk down.

C: 这下听懂了。
E: I understood that.

C: 你的心绪变得更加平静了……
E: Your mind has become even calmer...

C: 你感觉有些疲惫……
E: You feel a little fatigued...

C: 重新回顾了那段记忆后，我似乎有些…理解缇宝大人了。
E: After reminiscing on that memory, I somewhat... understand Lady Tribbie.

C: 「阿卡索斯」正是如此。看不见、摸不着，只能通过我们的理性来认知，规定着所有能找到的阿卡索斯城。可它确实存在，就在某个地方，并且永远不会消亡。
E: "Icatus" is much the same. It cannot be seen nor touched. It is only recognized through our rational cognition, which regulates all the cities of Icatus that we find. However, it does in fact exist somewhere, and it will never disappear.

C: 不错。我便是其中之一。
E: That's right. I am one of those refugees myself.

C: 要是它在时间之内存在，那么它就处于流变当中。就连泰坦都会陷入疯狂，就连尼卡多利都会陨落，时间内的事物，该如何永久存在？
E: If it exists in time, then it is in a state of flow. Even the Titans will descend into madness and Nikador will fall with time. How can anything in time exist forever?

C: 真的吗？刚才我在观察我的壁画作品，有些太投入了，可能吓到你了，抱歉。
E: Really? I was so engrossed in observing my artwork, that I might have startled you, sorry.

C: 灰色的…天空？
E: A gray... sky?

C: 有成果吗？
E: Any progress on your work?

C: 我先走了，别太难过哈。
E: I'll be going now. Don't be too upset, okay?

C: 你将自己当初在黑塔空间站醒来、而后加入列车的经历「稍稍加工」了一下，讲给了眼巴巴望着你的男人。
E: You "modified" your experiences about waking up first in the Herta Space Station and then joining the Express to the gawking man.

C: 你们那个叫「无名客」的探险队也是…以巨大的驼兽为家周游世界吗？真是浪漫啊~
E: Your "Nameless" exploration team... Do they also explore the world on the back of a giant beast? How romantic.

C: …你有考虑过你的姐姐吗？她已经在战争中失去了父母，失去了兄长。如果你也将自己的性命置于危险中，你至少应当先与她道别，再采取行动。
E: ...Have you thought about your sister? She has already lost her father and mother to battle. She lost her older brother too. If you are going to put your life in danger, you should at least bid her farewell before you act.

C: …我确实没有告诉她是今天。我再等等姐姐，谢谢你，欧弥利亚婶婶。
E: ...You're right. I didn't tell her today was the day. I will wait for her. Thank you, Auntie Aumilia.

C: 艺术源自生活，而生活就是泡澡。只要在这浴场呆着，灵感就会像法吉娜的蜜酿一样源源不断。
E: Art comes from life, and life is all about soaking in the bath. As long as I'm here in the baths, inspiration will flow endlessly, just like Phagousa's honey brew.

C: 发困不是好事吗？梦境是灵感的源头，能给人许多启发。我还得虔诚地感谢塞纳托斯，每次都让我睡得那么舒服呢。
E: Isn't feeling sleepy a good thing? Dreams are the source of inspiration and can offer many insights. I have to sincerely thank Thanatos for always making my sleep so comfortable.

C: 就不能拒绝吗？
E: Can't you just refuse?

C: 不仅这些，奇美拉还拥有非常强的团队意识，懂得相互配合，也会关心它们的管理员。
E: Not just that, chimeras are also highly receptive to teamwork, possessing great synergy, and will care for their handlers.

C: 卡尼兽。
E: The Canis.

C: 我早就有这个想法了，但是老爸说前线非常危险，我一个小女孩不要随便过去。
E: I've thought about it, but my dad says it's dangerous and not a place for a girl like me.

C: 你误会了，孩子。神明从不曾被凡俗之财所取悦。你所需奉上的，仅是能够代表心意的重要之物。
E: You misunderstand me, child. The gods would never derive joy from the fortune of mortals. What you need to offer is something of importance to represent your intention.

C: 要我说…堂堂命运泰坦的传谕圣女，却总想着去与平民接触，这种事成何体统！
E: If you ask me... I find it simply outrageous that she is the great Holy Maiden, fated to bear the prophecies of the Fate Titans, and all she wants to do is talk with common folk!

C: 你看着祭司煞有介事的样子，努力把笑忍住了。
E: You try your best to hold back your laughter as you watch the priest putting on their dramatic rendition.

C: 不会不会，您没有责怪份量太少，已经让我很惶恐了。对…我忘了您来自异邦，习俗不同……
E: No, no, the fact that you didn't comment on how little it is has me on edge. Oh... I forgot you're from a foreign city, and our customs must be unfamiliar to you.

C: 男孩子独自出门，保护好自己。
E: Stay safe out there. A lone boy can get into a lot of trouble.

C: *我们*的妈妈…有关她的记忆是*我们*最宝贵，可也最容易失去的回忆…因为有她陪伴的日子太美好，以至于*我们*总不敢沉湎其中。
E: Our mother... Memories of her are our most precious treasures, yet also the easiest to lose. Those days she spent with us were so beautiful that we hardly dared to immerse ourselves in them.

C: 嗷嗷…嗷嗷嗷嗷！
E: Awawawaw... ooo... ooo!

C: 可是，我却被伙伴们称作最完美的黄金裔，被奥赫玛的人民奉为救世主。
E: Yet, my companions call me the most perfect Chrysos Heir, and the people of Okhema revere me as the Deliverer.

C: 它已经被我们打败了。
E: They've already been defeated by us.

C: …可你都是堂堂正正当着大家的面做的呀。
E: ...But you did. And in full view of everyone.

C: 首先，我先声明，我不是你理解的「坏人」。我只是树庭结业不久的学生，给元老院做事纯粹是为了丰厚薪酬，绝无任何政治立场。
E: For the record, I'm not who you think I am. I'm just a new graduate from the Grove, working for the Council of Elders purely for the generous pay. I have zero political stance.

C: 没事，我先走了。
E: Well, I'm heading off, then.

C: 我还以为…啊，不好意思，是我失态了。不过，我很有魅力也是事实嘛。
E: I thought... Ah, pardon me, I got carried away. But it's true that I'm very charismatic.

C: 你忙吧，还是不打扰你了。
E: I'll let you get back to your work.

C: 还有吗？
E: More?

C: 不不，这我不能收。
E: No, wait. I can't take this.

C: 呃，不客气？
E: Um, you're welcome?

C: 你忙吧，还是不打扰你了。
E: I'll let you get back to your work.

C: 看啊，黎明云崖——即使在这最接近黎明机器的地方，我也能闻到阴谋与诡辩的恶臭。
E: Look at Dawncloud Cliff — even here, closest to the Dawn Device, I can smell the stench of conspiracy and sophistry.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 赛飞儿把你也送来了？
E: Did Cipher send you here too?

C: 我已经受够了担惊受怕、东躲西藏的日子。现如今，我只想在琴声中停歇，等待最后一刻的到来。
E: I'm tired of living in fear, hiding from place to place. Now, I just want to rest in this music, waiting for the final moment to come.

C: 收集「帝王睡莲」…
E: Collect "Imperial Water Lily"...

C: 纷乱里白昼纵然逝去\n惶恐中生命尚存希望
E: Though daylight fades in the chaos,\nhope still lingers in the midst of fear.

C: 马尔库斯他…他没有撒谎…他是对的，都怪我……
E: Marcus... he wasn't lying... he was right. It's all my fault...

C: 无知无觉，了无回应，那不过是过往的倒影，和你在镜中见到的自己并无二致。
E: Those unfeeling, unresponsive reflections of the past differ not from your own reflection in the mirror.

C: 直到市集中的卫兵和工匠赶来支援，才勉强把防线稳固在这里。
E: We only managed to secure this position when guards and craftsmen rushed over from the marketplace to reinforce us.

C: 是啊，我还活着。说实话，起初我挺惊讶；所有被风堇姑娘用天空祝福吊住性命的人都很惊讶。
E: Yes, I'm still here. Frankly, I was shocked, as were all of us whose lives hung by a thread thanks to Miss Hyacine's blessings of the sky.

C: 不死的迈德漠斯牺牲了——目睹了那一幕的圣城卫士已为我送来了悲报。
E: The undying Mydeimos has fallen — Holy City Guards who witnessed his end have delivered this tragic news to me.

C: 去也没地方去了，我刚刚悼念过了同僚们，之后打算专注于大家伙们身上。前段时间发明的几道新菜色，趁现在都给它们做来尝尝。
E: I've got nowhere to go. I just paid my respects to my fallen comrades, so after that... I'll be focusing on these big guys. Came up with a few new recipes recently — might as well let 'em try out now.

C: （她…离开了吗？）
E: (Did... did she leave?)

C: 嗯…有位织者通晓各种偏门知识。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的升降梯井</color>，把自己伪装成了墙壁的一部分。要抓住时机才能见到它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who possesses knowledge of all unorthodox sorts. The golden thread brings tidings: They now secretly reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the Marmoreal Palace's elevator shaft</color>, disguising themselves as part of the wall. You need to catch the right opportunity to see them.

C: 嗯…有位织者说要当上雅努斯的祭司。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>悬崖边的护栏上</color>练习穿墙术，可以去检验下它的成果。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes to become Janus' priest. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>on the railing at the edge of the cliff</color>, honing their skill in wall penetration. Feel free to go and test the fruits of their practice.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 金丝带来了若虫惊慌的啜泣，那不寻常的颤动里，夹杂着愤怒…怨恨…和一丝释然。
E: Golden thread brings the nymph's frantic sobbing. In the unusual tremors, there is a mix of anger... resentment... and a hint of relief.

C: 真有意思呢，你这么一说，人家都想去实地看看啦。只是，要你来当向导！
E: That's so fascinating! When you talk about it like that, I wanna go see it for myself! Hehe, but I'll want you to be the guide!

C: 哈哈哈，怎么可能！这么大一片，要全让我打理，准得累垮了。
E: Hahaha, not a chance! A field this size? If I had to tend it solo, I'd collapse from exhaustion.

C: 花瓣枯萎就不值钱了，但是我不在乎迷。你知道为什么吗？因为我有的是钱迷！
E: Wilted petals aren't worth much anymore, but I don't care, memi. You know why? Because I'm rich, memi!

C: 看到那片菜地了吗？只要像萝卜一样在地里待够时间，我就能变成很多个我啦！
E: See that vegetable garden? If I stay buried long enough like a radish, I'll sprout into many copies of myself!

C: 至于凯撒大人许诺的未来……
E: As for the future the Great Imperator promised...

C: 曳石爵，来聊几句吧。
E: Dux Helkolithist, let's have a chat.

C: 或许在您看来，清洗者尽是些卑鄙无耻之徒。但这组织最初却是由一群正义之士所建立，目的是在战争时期遏制黄金裔的暴行。
E: You may deem the Cleaners despicable villains, but we were birthed as righteous souls curbing Chrysos Heirs' tyranny during wartime.

C: 我喜欢金色，金色是代表「浪漫」的颜色。听说「浪漫」的若虫是一群蝴蝶，它们的含「金」量一定很高吧……
E: I love the color gold, it is a color that symbolizes "romance." I heard that the nymphs of "romance" are actually a flutter of butterflies. They must be worth their weight in gold...

C: 究竟是没有能分配给它的角色，还是这场幻梦的主人不希望它沾染太多海腥？你不得而知。
E: Was there simply no role left to give it? Or did the dream's master will it to remain untouched by the smell of the sea? You can't tell.

C: 不过，那位采购商人精明又挑剔，从来只要品质最好的绿球菜。
E: But that merchant who buys? Sharp as a tack and super picky. Only the finest greenie cabbage makes the cut.

C: 没办法，只好退而求其次，先办个终身会员了迷。
E: No luck, so I settled for a lifetime membership to the restaurant, mem.

C: 呵呵…你们在吃沙拉，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
E: Hehe... you're eating salad, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.

C: 经过一番缠绵的炖煮，南瓜与汤汁的边界模糊了，肉的鲜香和南瓜的醇香交织了…世间的一切善与恶、真与假，都仿佛在锅中混融为一……
E: After a slow and gentle simmer, the lines between pumpkin and broth begin to fade. The savory depth of meat and the mellow sweetness of pumpkin intertwine... In that pot, all the world's good and evil, truth and lies, seem to fuse as one...

C: 那是在神殿里才行，这里是浴池，不能这么乱来。
E: That's inside the temple. This is a bath. You can't do that around here.

C: 生死将再度流转。你亲手播下的这片花海，今后将承载无数或悲或喜的灵魂，永远焕发生机。
E: The cycle of life and death will flow once again. This sea of flowers you sowed shall bear countless joyous or sorrowful souls, and bloom evermore.

C: 我相信，你能做到。
E: I believe in you. You can do it.

C: 吃饱了！开心！
E: I'm full! Happy!

C: 今天本该是折纸树林期末测验的日子，没想到这群孩子听到考试，趁老鸟不注意，一溜烟全飞走了，咕咕咕！
E: Today was supposed to be Paperfold Woods's final exam day, but once those children heard about the exam, they all fled without a trace while I wasn't looking, hoot hoot!

C: 咕咕…噢！有个狂热喜欢气球的孩子，或许正躲藏在<color=#dbc291ff>某个水池上方的气球</color>中呢，快去找它吧。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's crazy about balloons. Maybe they're hiding inside <color=#dbc291ff>some balloon above a certain pool</color>. Go find it quickly.

C: ——传说中最优秀的五只折纸小鸟啾！！！
E: ...The most outstanding five origami birds of legend, tweeeet!!!

C: 安全区就是过渡计划的产物，作为我们逐步夺回的舱段失地，最终将如星星之火，连为一体。
E: The safe zone is the result of our transition plan, for us to take back all the lost zones. I am confident all the dots will eventually be connected.

C: 好久不见，我的好朋友。你最近都在忙些什么？倘若有任何地方需要我的帮助，请直接开口吧！为知己两肋插刀，是我的人生座右铭。
E: It's been a while, my friend. What have you been doing? Let me know if you need my help! It's my life motto to help my friends the best I can!

C: 既然对莉莉而言，是幸福的体验，那时间长一些，也是一种享受吧？
E: Since it's such a great experience for Ley, I'm sure she'll enjoy it if she gets to stay for longer.

C: 很不幸…瑟希斯已经殒落了。
E: I'm sorry... Cerces has fallen.

C: 你就不要劝我了，我必须完成它！谁也阻止不了我，瑟希斯也不行！
E: Don't try to talk me out of it. I must finish this! No one can stop me, not even Cerces!

C: 嗷呜～我还会在树庭待一段时间，如果你也有些迷茫，不如和我一起停下来。我记得不少荒笛大人的故事，我可以讲给你听～
E: Awoo~ I'll be staying in the Grove for a while. If you're feeling a bit lost too, why not take a breather here with me? I remember quite a few stories about Lord Terravox, and I'd love to share them with you~

C: 你接下来有什么打算呢？
E: What are your plans from here?

C: 暂时就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.
Woah. It's in the shape of a "0"!

C: 只充电不消耗会变胖吗？
E: If I keep charging without using any of it, will I get fat?

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 嗯…有位织者生性多疑。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>静止的水车旁</color>，哀叹前路险阻呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's quite the skeptic. The golden thread brings tidings: They are by the <color=#dbc291ff>still waterwheel</color>, lamenting about the dangerous path ahead.

C: 从高处俯视，位于大墓深处的每个点光源都如此渺小。但你曾身处其中，你清楚那是无数台巨型机器发出的强光。
E: From up high, each source of light deep within the Great Tomb looks so tiny. But you've been down there. You know those are powerful beams from countless massive machines.

C: 好耶——那我要吃……
E: Yay! Then I want to eat...

C: 我错了！！！开个玩笑，你可千万别跟我哥告状！咳…那什么， {NICKNAME}啊，其实我打算以你为主角写本小说来着……
E: I'm sorry!!! Just kidding, please don't tell my brother! Ahem... Say, {NICKNAME}, I was actually thinking of writing a novel with you as the main character...

C: 这姑娘不仅执行力强，还有烹饪天赋——有这样的接班人，我每天都是笑着醒来的！
E: This girl not only has great execution skills, but also a talent for cooking. With such a successor, I wake up with a smile every day!

C: 呵呵，你？你连和它掰手腕的力气都没有，还是再多练几年吧。征讨它的功勋，只能由我收入囊中。
E: Heh, you? You don't even have the strength to arm wrestle with it. Better train for a few more years. The merit of conquering it will be mine alone.

C: 什么宴会，算我一个？
E: A party? Well, count me in!

C: 英雄，有空的话，也来。
E: Hero, join. If free.

C: 越过边境之后，沿着溪流一直走，就能来到一片平坦的原野。一到晚上，总有绿莹莹的光点飞舞，像星星一样！
E: After crossing the border, follow the stream, and you'll reach a vast, flat plain. When night falls, there are always these glowing green dots dancing around, just like stars!

C: 你来做设计师！
E: You be the designer!

C: 值得铭记的东西…小灰鱼是打算把它带去天外之海吗？也好……
E: Something worth remembering... Little Gray Fry, do you plan to take it to the sea beyond the sky? That works too...

C: 这种台词该在战斗时说！
E: That's the kind of line you should say during combat!

C: 应该比较酸牙吧？大概会有他喜欢的诗歌，悬锋城的史传……
E: Must be quite a sour taste, I'd say? There's probably some poetry he likes, and chronicles of Castrum Kremnos...

C: 哈！都是些蒙了灰的记忆，我曾告诫自己永志不忘，却已经不确定究竟是梦中还是真实。但至少，这回再去，绝不会再是那样的场景了。
E: Ha! Just dusty old memories now. I swore to myself I'd never forget, but now I can't even tell if they were dreams or reality. At least this time, when I go back, things won't play out the same way.

C: 它最精妙的设计是，只要捏一捏，就能用小伊卡的声音唱歌哦！你听——嘟嘟嘟嘟，嘟~嘟~嘟嘟——
E: The most ingenious part of the design is that with just a gentle squeeze, it can sing in Little Ica's voice! Listen—Doot-doot-doot-doot, doot~doot~doot-doot—

C: 没有任何东西能让你获得智慧，除了「我们对智慧还一无所知」的认知。
E: Nothing can grant you wisdom except the realization that "we know nothing of wisdom at all."

C: 或许就像法吉娜贪恋它的秘酿一样吧，我也天然地喜爱这从「大地」熔炉中诞生的物事。炙热，酥脆，美味，你也该与我一同用牙齿仔细感受…嚼嚼……
E: Perhaps, just as Phagousa can't resist their ambrosia, I've always had a natural fondness for what's born from the furnace of Earth. Hot, crispy, and delicious. You should use your teeth and thoroughly enjoy this feeling with me... Nom nom...

C: 嗯…有位织者正在隐秘侦察。金丝带来消息，它正隐匿于<color=#dbc291ff>巨大空旷的房间中</color>，为一座炮台惊异呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's doing some secret scouting. The golden thread brings tidings: They're hiding in a <color=#dbc291ff>huge, spacious platform</color>, marveling at a cannon turret.

C: 何况，「开拓」尚未陨落时列车就存在了，总不能有两颗心脏对吧？但，这辆列车很可能拥有某种机制，使它可以从开拓命途搬运力量。
E: Besides, the Express existed before the Trailblaze fell. There's no way they could have had two hearts, right? However, it is likely that the Express possesses some sort of mechanism to transfer power from the Path of Trailblaze.

C: 我们不知道他在逃避什么。有一次他跟我说：他也不知道，只是有什么在追逐他，让他不得不逃亡；他曾经待过仙舟，有阵子为公司工作。
E: We don't know what he's running from. He once told me that he didn't know either. All he knew was that something was chasing him and that he had to run away — first from the Xianzhou, then the IPC.

C: 嗯，{NICKNAME}，你回来了啊。有什么特别的事情要分享给我听听吗？
E: Mmm, {NICKNAME}. You're back. Anything special you've got to share with me?

C: 怎么，要重新布置场地吗？
E: So, do you want me to reset the mine carts for you?

C: 我有些问题想问…
E: I still have some more questions...

C: 再给你一部分报酬——然后是下一道题……
E: Here's another part of your reward — and now, another puzzle...

C: 滴答，仔细想想，他平时工作确实比我认真…无所谓，我这么讨人喜欢，早晚也能升职的！
E: Tick-tock, he's much more serious about work than I am when I think about it... Bah, doesn't matter — I'm beloved by all, so I'll get promoted sooner or later!

C: 滴答，钟表小子是假的，美梦小镇是假的，但加班补偿是真的！
E: Tick-tock, Clockie is not real. Dreamville is not real, but overtime pay is real!

C: 唉，我都不知道从何说起…我这伤不是外伤，是心里有缺口……
E: *sigh* I don't even know where to begin... This isn't even an external injury. My heart is just missing a piece...

C: 我想想，该从哪里说起呢？总之，先做个自我介绍…我叫伦纳德，是这座空间站的网络安全工程师。
E: Hmm, let me see. Where to begin? Anyway, let me introduce myself... My name's Leonard and I'm the cybersecurity engineer aboard this space station.

C: 街机厅？不如模拟宇宙。
E: Arcade? Simulated Universes are way more fun.

C: 啊？这、这…唔，也对，是我辜负了她的信任。如果当初用的是分割加密，空间站也许就不会被入侵了吧……
E: Ah? Th—This... Oh, I've betrayed her trust. If I'd used partition encryption right from the start, we'd never have been hacked...

C: 什——什么！？你不会指的是这里的事吧！
E: Wh—What? You can't mean what's going on here, can you...!

C: 感觉更可怕了啊！全完了全完了…这下得罪了最不该最得罪的人，我别想在这里继续待下去了啊……
E: That's even worse! It's over, it's all over... I've offended the last person that should ever be offended. There is no way I could ever keep on staying here like this...

C: 别这么说啊！至少空间站其他地方一点都没受到影响——我没有功劳也有苦劳吧。
E: Don't say that! At least the rest of the space station wasn't impacted — I at least deserve credit for back-breaking labor.

C: 我的歌走了调，我的嗓音沙哑——
E: I'm out of tune and my throat is hoarse —

C: 为了纪念母亲，我与筑城者一致认为应当为她创作画像，将其送入博物馆，供贝洛伯格人民纪念。
E: To commemorate my mother, the Architects and I agree that a portrait should be created for her and sent to the museum for the Belobogians to remember her.

C: 据说，母亲大人与我一样，也是从贫瘠的地底被选拔来到上层区的。那时的她对一切充满好奇——尤其是在地底时见不到的鲜花。闲暇时，她总爱去花店。
E: It is said that my mother, like me, was also selected from the barren underground and brought to the Overworld. At that time, she was curious about everything, especially the flowers that she couldn't see in the Underworld. In her spare time, she would always go to the florist.

C: 不过，听你这口气，想必至少是听说过这号人的……
E: Still, I can tell you have at least heard of Cyrille from your tone.

C: 一个破旧的皮箱，是来自四百年前的文物，出土时还装着其他的文物。
E: A worn leather case from four hundred years ago. It contained other artifacts when it was unearthed.

C: 或许它在那个年代只是一件垃圾。但只要存在得够久，垃圾也能成为宝物。
E: Maybe in those years, it was only a piece of junk. But with time, even junk can become treasure.

C: 一系列来自下层区的招贴画，看起来已十分陈旧。
E: A series of posters from the Underworld. They look old.

C: 有人说，阿基维利的「开拓」之旅是将过去、现在与未来联结的旅途——作为一名星穹列车的开拓客，你出色地完成了这项使命。
E: Some say that Akivili's Trailblaze journey is a journey to link the past, the present, and the future. As a Trailblazer aboard the Astral Express, you accomplished this mission with distinction.

C: 判官小姐，去做你们该做的事吧，我在这里待段时间就离开。
E: Miss judge, go to what you need to do. I will stay here for a while, then take my leave.

C: 幽灵与星槎突然散作飞舞的流萤星火，不再成形。你们将这些无主的岁阳收进了藏月瓠中。
E: The phantom and the starskiff suddenly disperse into fluttering glitters like fireflies, no longer taking shape. Your group captures these masterless heliobi into the Lunaumbra Gourd.

C: 金人巷有很多食物我从来都没有听过，第一次吃的时候，其实还有些害怕。
E: There's a lot of things here that I've never even heard of — I was kinda scared to try them.

C: 有什么好吃的吗？
E: So, is there anything good?

C: 我是金人巷的救世主。
E: I'm the savior of Aurum Alley.

C: 我一定不负期待。
E: I will rise to the occasion.

C: 在我这里可以<color=#dbc291ff>协助码头工人「码放货物」，以及协助鹤运物流完成「物流规划」。</color>
E: You'll be able to help the dock workers <color=#dbc291ff>do the inventory and help Heron Express with logistics planning</color>.

C: 会长一直在关心各位的进展，不必担心。
E: Don't worry, the president is paying very close attention to our progress in Aurum Alley.

C: 这种记录是怎么搞到的？
E: How did you obtain all these?

C: 呼，希望待会儿你当众向我道歉的时候，也要像刚才那样大声！
E: Hmph, you should be saving your voice for your public apology...

C: 有没有一种可能，你真的买通了码头工人呢？
E: Is it possible that you paid off a dock worker to do your bidding?

C: 这下码头能够支持跟更多的商家合作了，让我们一起为金人巷复兴努力吧！
E: Now the dock can support collaboration with more businesses. Let's keep working together for the revival of Aurum Alley!

C: 老爸，这位商会的朋友想来您这边做学徒，我带他们上手了啊。
E: Father, my friends from the Merchant Guild want to be your apprentices. I'll go ahead and show them the ropes.

C: 许多顾客慕名而来，实际到店人数不降反升，这与会长的设想相悖。
E: As a result, we're seeing an uptick in customers visiting the shop — contrary to the president's assumptions.

C: 我听素裳讲了你们在金人巷做的事情，好厉害。
E: Sushang told me all about what you did to help the shops in the Alley. Very impressive!

C: 为了建设商船港，这里大部分商店需要搬出金人巷。
E: To address this, most of the shops will need to be relocated.

C: 你是觉得这一切都不真实？
E: Pretty crazy.

C: 啊，这个，会不会是哪里搞错了呢？
E: Ah! Th—That... must be some kind of mistake.

C: 不过朋友，我信任你，你可千万别打开「货物」，也别问客人是谁，千万记住。
E: But friend, I trust you. You must never, ever open the "goods." And never ask about the client, either. Don't forget that.

C: 咱俩都是响当当的生意人，早晚都能发大财！
E: You and me, we're both established business people. Sooner or later we'll strike it big!

C: 把那些狗皮膏药似的菜单贴在桌上？不不不，咱们得让来这儿的游客体验一下纯正的，古老的饮食文化韵味。
E: You mean getting the menu to display on the table? No way. I will ensure an authentic, traditional experience for my customers.

C: 《琼玉牌秘技丛集》？
E: Celestial Jade Techniques 101?

C: 这是你平时说话的语气吗？
E: Is that how you normally talk?

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 你比我更熟悉小秘书，她会用假数据来说服你吗？
E: You know Mingxi better than I do. Would she deceive you with fake data?

C: 公司又开始施展钞能力了……
E: Classic IPC...

C: 家父只是个固执迂腐的匠人，不必以他的意见为参考。
E: ...Father has never been the shrewdest when it comes to business matters. I'm afraid his opinions don't constitute the most valuable insights.

C: 嗯？我听说有的人认为「交通事故集锦很下饭」，看来你不是这种人。
E: Oh? I heard some people say they "love rubbernecking at traffic accidents." I guess that's not your style, though.

C: 就像是去卖衣服的店里，你看见货柜上摆放着的通用款式，那是「常规运单」——价廉物美、量大管饱，适合客户的大部分日常需求。
E: Well, if you walk into a clothing store, you'll see regular clothes on the shelves. They're standard quality, affordable, and suitable for most customers' everyday needs. We call those clothes "general orders."

C: 之前商会宣传部的同事想了句口号，叫「让金人巷再次伟大！」
E: My colleagues from the Merchant Guild Promotion Department came up with a slogan, "Reclaim Aurum Alley's Golden Glory!"

C: 抓走路过的机巧鸟。
E: Catch the Passerby Cycrane.

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}大人，我在这里等候您多时了。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you here for quite a while.

C: 似乎并没有办法确认这台故障的售货机是否是「感应仪」指向的异常情况。但有一个绝妙的办法可以得到答案。
E: There doesn't seem to be a way to confirm whether this malfunctioning vending machine is abnormal as picked up by the sensor. But there is a brilliant way to get an answer.

C: （清扫雪堆）
E: (Clear the Snow Drift)

C: 你将积雪清扫掉，埋藏在下面的东西逐渐露出了真面目。
E: You sweep the pile of snow aside and unveiled the item buried in the snow.

C: 还没等你按下开关键，眼前的电影机突然出现烟雾。随着烟雾散尽，你看到的……
E: Before you barely touch the switch, smoke billows out of the projector. When the smoke has dispersed, you see...

C: 正是那个异常现象！
E: That anomaly!

C: 就一下…我就玩一下嘛！
E: Just one touch... I'll just touch it once!

C: 这次的地方已经给你标注好了，你多上点心，可别漏了什么关键线索！
E: I've marked the location for you this time. Pay attention and don't miss anything!

C: 哈——欠！困死了，我们走吧！
E: *yaaawn* So boring, let's go!

C: （总感觉这个人很奇怪。不仅是说的话很耳熟，仔细一看…好像长相也很眼熟。）
E: (This person is weird. Not only is his spiel familiar... he looks similar too.)

C: 买一送二？
E: Buy one, get two free?

C: 发现美梦破灭了？
E: Did her beautiful dream shatter?

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 我们要去哪儿？
E: Where are we heading?

C: 前方究竟有怎样残酷的道路在等待着你，我无法想象啾。
E: I can hardly imagine how harsh the path ahead of you will be, tweet.

C: 似乎被困在别处了。
E: I think they are being trapped elsewhere.

C: 总之她是一个很好的人，滴答，如果不是她，
E: In any case, she's a very nice person. Tick-tock, if not for her,

C: 不知过了多久，通往汇合点的港口才终于出现在视野里——果不其然，航道已经被破坏了。
E: Some time has passed, and the harbor leading to the rendezvous point finally comes into view — To the surprise of no one, the lane has already been destroyed.

C: 下一位选手——{NICKNAME}，是吧？说吧，你的梦想是什么？
E: Next up! {NICKNAME}, right? Tell us about your dream.

C: 安抚它的情绪。
E: Soothe its feelings.

C: 喂，傻狗！…傻狗？…傻狗傻狗傻狗傻狗哈哈哈！嘴皮子使劲耍，谁都拿我没办法！
E: Hey, idiot pooch! ...Idiot pooch? ...Idiot idiot idiot idiot pooch! Hahaha! I've got quite the mouth. No one can handle this!

C: （舒翁还是没出现…还是先开始营业吧。）
E: (Siobhan hasn't shown up yet... Well, let's start serving customers anyway.)

C: 那么大的个子，唯独没有脑子！嘿，别管它了，咱们继续玩！
E: That big guy doesn't have a brain, and that's for sure! Let's leave him be and have fun!

C: <size=28>呀！来、来人啊——快救救我们！！</size>
E: <size=28>Yikes! Please, s—someone! Help us!!</size>

C: 虽然我从来没离开过酒店，但我帅气又灵敏的鼻子会带我们找到舒翁的汪！
E: Although I've never left the hotel, my handsome and keen nose will lead us straight to Siobhan! Woof!

C: 汪！谢谢你！
E: Woof! Thank you!

C: 我是银河球棒侠！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 你作为列车组有去过什么寒冷的地方吗？或者是极端炎热的地方？
E: As part of the Crew, have you ever been somewhere bitingly cold or blazingly hot?

C: 你想让我把「银河强手棋」寄出。
E: You want me to mail Cosmodyssey out.

C: 你打开包裹后，看到了玛姬的留言。
E: You open the package and see Mag's message.

C: 听说试图再次入侵美梦小镇的石头老板被赶跑了，看来您已经找到一份隐藏起来的宝物了……
E: It seems that Boss Stone, who tried to invade the Dreamville once again, has been chased out. Looks like you've found a hidden treasure already...

C: 哦，该死的鸢尾花，这下我们该怎么办啊？
E: Oh, that blasted Iris Family! What should we do now?

C: 没错，就是钟表小子，匹诺康尼的吉祥物，美梦小镇的大明星！
E: That's right! It's Clockie — the mascot of Penacony and the brightest star in Dreamville!

C: 我了解「钟表匠」的故事。
E: I'm familiar with the Watchmaker's story.

C: 片名：《旧时代存护战士》
E: Title: Aeon Genesis Preservation

C: 你认识「钟表匠」？
E: Do you know the Watchmaker personally?

C: 倒也不是，家主梅芙恩其实是《钟表小子》的影迷，听说「音符小姐」的原型就是她。
E: Not really. Our family head, Maeven, is actually a fan of Clockie. I heard that she is the inspiration behind the "Miss Note" character.

C: 这、这又是什么计策，我不会上当的，等导演回来……
E: Wh—What are you up to this time? I'm not going to fall into your trap. We'll wait for the director to be back...

C: 呵呵，其实我平时不怎么看动画，比起创作出来的故事，我更欣赏真实的记录。
E: Heheh, I normally don't watch animations. I prefer real life accounts over created stories.

C: 导演，您回来了，要来进行影片剪辑吗？
E: Director, you're back! Do you want to do some film editing?

C: 每天都困在这暗不见光的地方，我不想再加工宝石了——我想出去，拼装最最炫酷的「恶夜钻钻娃」！
E: I don't want to be trapped in this dismal abyss day after day. I don't want to refine gems anymore — I yearn to be free! I want to assemble the coolest Diamond Doll ever!

C: 能够漫步的苏乐达地板还没有全部消除…要直接打开宝箱吗？
E: The moving SoulGlad floor hasn't been completely removed... Do you want to open the chest?

C: 看来，苏乐达的妙用还有很多呢。先走上去试试看吧！
E: Looks like SoulGlad's got plenty of amazing uses. Walk on it and try it out!

C: 导演，哈努兄弟的外传已经制作完成了？听说你们制作的外传从各个角度挖掘了哈努兄弟的过去，那位哈努动画师对你的叙事水平赞不绝口！
E: Director, have you already finished making Brother Hanu's extra story? I heard that the Extra you shot explored Hanu's past from all kinds of angles. The animator for Brother Hanu's can't stop praising your narrative skills!

C: 与大片相比，广告只能算是开胃小菜。
E: Compared to a film, a commercial can only be considered an appetizer.

C: 现实中的仓鼠球骑士叫做「哈姆兹」，作为啮齿目的智慧生命，它和动画里一样可爱，也一样*快*！几千场比赛未尝一败！
E: The real Hamster Ball Knight is named "Hamz." As an intelligent rodent, it's just as cute and just as fast as in the animation! That's thousands of races without a single loss!

C: 下次再聊。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 对首次测试的参与者，我得问几个例行问题——这也是为了收集一些关于游戏体验的反馈。
E: I have to ask the participants of the first test a few routine questions — it's also to collect feedback on the game's user experience.

C: 时间不早了，我得把这些反馈带回去，让那些开发人员看着改改。
E: It's getting late and I have to get this feedback back to the developers for them to run their changes.

C: 亲爱的主角，你的下一幕只能是崭新的情节！请回到正确的轨道上来吧！
E: Dear protagonist, your next scene can only be a brand-new plot! Please get back on the right track!

C: 难道「化身为恐龙」还不够充满想象力，这是只在匹诺康尼才能看见的浪漫。现在，言归正传——
E: Transforming into a dinosaur isn't imaginative enough for you? This is the sort of magic only seen on Penacony. Anyway, let's get back on track. Where were we? Oh, that's right—

C: 「筑梦拼图」很紧张刺激吗？
E: Is Dream Jigsaw really that intense and thrilling?

C: 天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然被发现了！各位，千万要小心行事！
E: Oh my, the unstoppable Hanu has been spotted! Everyone, please proceed with caution!

C: 我好像听到了熟悉的声音……
E: I think I hear something familiar...

C: （这到底是怎么回事，还是去问问艾迪恩吧……）
E: (What's going on here? Better go ask Aideen...)

C: 亲爱的巨星，你还有什么想问的吗？
E: Got any other questions, superstar?

C: 饰
E: as

C: 演员
E: Cast

C: 你认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 活体的赤红星宿笼罩在孤舟的穹顶，随着活物一般的搏动裂开了筋肉枯蔓构成的外壳，舟体被彻底包裹。
E: The living crimson star hovered in the sky over the singular ship. It pulsated like a living creature, causing the shell formed by flesh and withered vines to crack before enveloping the entire ship.

C: 其实，灰潮产生于人祸。先知篡改历史后，消失的世界线凝结成海啸般的混沌忆质。只是谁也不愿意直面症结所在。
E: The truth is, the gray tide was a calamity caused by human folly. After the prophet altered history, the disappeared timelines condensed into a tsunami-like muddled memoria. Yet, no one was bold enough to directly address the underlying issue.

C: 让时间回到三月七刚开始学剑的时候……
E: Turning back the clock to when March 7th had just begun studying swordplay...

C: 别听彦卿那些虚头巴脑的鸡汤了。
E: Oh, come on, don't listen to his empty talk.

C: 虽然她心有不甘，但美少女即便输掉了剑斗不服气的样子也很可爱。
E: Though unwilling to accept it, the young heroine still looked undeniably adorable in her defiance after losing the duel.

C: 战胜一群恶徒的方法有很多，不过你若想成为「英雄大侠」，除了提升自己没有任何捷径可以走——彦卿希望三月小姐能记住这一点。
E: There are many ways to defeat villains, but if you want to become a true hero, you have to focus on self-improvement. I hope you will always remember this, Miss March.

C: 是，正在检索在库机甲。
E: Understood. Checking the inventory now.

C: 你跑得老快了，这事应该没这么简单。
E: You run super fast. This matter's probably not that simple.

C: 没关系的，因为我最喜欢爸爸了～
E: It's okay Dad, because you're the best.

C: 他跑了！啊这这这，这怎么办……
E: He ran away! Ah... Wh—What should I do now...

C: 斯科特，你要立刻向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，大声说「公司机甲，猪头才要」，然后在运输船上的每台机甲上都印上这句话，还要学猪叫！
E: Skott, you need to immediately apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl. You'll need to shout "IPC mechs are a total joke!" and print that on every mech on your transport ship! Oh yeah, almost forgot — you have to squeal like a pig!

C: 你不会明白的！相信瞬息万变的网络，人类是不会有安全感的！
E: You just don't get it! Humanity will never feel secure by putting all their faith in an ever-changing network!

C: 你别吓着他了，我平时主要担任太卜司的掌门工作。
E: Don't freak him out. I work as the head of the Divination Commission most of the time.

C: 太卜司的卜者恐怖如斯。
E: Diviners are indeed not to be trifled with.

C: 怎、怎么了？我这是从工作中体会生活的乐趣，我的生活…非常充实！
E: Wh—What's the big deal!? I find joy in my work, and my life is... is pretty fulfilling!

C: 什么是凉拌千年人参？
E: What's Millennial Ginseng With Sauce?

C: 那怎么就能叫「千年人参」呢？
E: Then why's it called "Millennial Ginseng"?

C: 五花肉切片煸炒出油，再加入雪莲、姜葱蒜炒出香味，加入酱油调味，再大火快炒将雪莲变软，加盐出锅。
E: Stir-fry the belly meat till the fat renders, then add snow lotus, onion, and garlic and fry till fragrant. Add soy sauce to taste, and finally stir-fry the snow lotus on high heat till it softens, add salt, and voilà.

C: 有没有买不到的药材呢？
E: Are there herbs that can't be bought?

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}，还有那个…三月七，是叫这个名字吧？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! And what's-her-name again... March 7th? Am I right?

C: 我听你提起过…好像是有些危险、又有些神奇的书？
E: I have heard you mention them before... I remember you were saying that some of them were quite dangerous and mysterious?

C: 咱们俩算是异父异母的…
E: Though we may have different parents, I guess that makes us...

C: 可以这么理解。但我的研究对象是「精神垃圾」。你应该听说过「忆质」这种东西吧？
E: You could put it that way. However, my research target is actually "psychological trash." I'm sure you've heard of memoria before, right?

C: 一旦离散忆质标记完成，我就会展开捕捉工作，对仙舟人的忆质展开研究。
E: Once the marking for scattered memoria is complete, I will begin the capture work and carry out research on the memoria of the Xianzhou people.

C: 如果换做我们刚认识的时候我会跟你说，「一定有关系」。
E: If this were back when we had just met, I would have told you: "Absolutely."

C: 你认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 人家从里到外，你比谁都了解，难道还要装作与我不熟悉吗？你这个…{F#渣女}{M#渣男}！
E: You know my insides better than anyone. Surely you are not going to stand here and pretend we are no more than strangers, are you? You... {F#heartbreaker}{M#jerk}!

C: （照做）
E: (Comply)

C: 原来搞了半天，你俩认识呀。
E: Oh, so you two actually know each other?

C: 哎呀呀，这不是{NICKNAME}大客户嘛！
E: Woah, if it isn't {NICKNAME}, my favorite customer!

C: 学会了如何齐心协力。
E: Like how to unite our efforts with our hearts aligned.

C: 你看，仙舟没那么可怕吧？
E: See? Xianzhou's not that scary, is it?

C: 停停停，我可高攀不上这种「故知」啊！
E: Yup. Me and the IPC brass. Super "old friends."

C: 简单解释一下，就是仙舟上负责信息技术的部门，平时主要负责预测未来。
E: A simple explanation would be that they are the information technology department on the Xianzhou. They are mainly responsible for predicting the future.

C: 可是，这个休息室太无聊了，又小又没劲…在这种小地方，虎克根本没办法大展拳脚嘛！
E: But, this lounge is so small and boring... I can't show off my moves in a tiny place like this!

C: 我们听说你仅靠「寻径指津」就镇服了附身在太卜大人身上的岁阳，这简直是「寻径指津」诞生三百年来从未有过的高光时刻！
E: We heard that you relied solely on the "Pathfinder" to overcome the heliobus possessing the master diviner! That's definitely the highlight of the "Pathfinder" since its conception three hundred years ago!

C: 妾身大概明白是怎么回事了。你身在异乡，难免有些神经紧张。这种紊乱不安的精神状态，在你饮下好梦气泡饮后被激化了。
E: I think I understand what's going on. It's not unusual to be anxious when you're far away from home. When your nerves were thrown into disarray, the Sweet Dreams Soda you drank intensified it.

C: 哈哈，有钱难买真交情！几位手上这封「迟到四百年的邀请函」想必是一桩奇妙的因缘。各位有缘来到罗浮，我们可不能失了礼数。
E: Haha, money can't buy relationships! This invitation that's been delayed for four hundred years must be a marvelous twist of fate. And since fate has brought you all here to the Luofu, we will not fail in our hospitality.

C: 这就是传说中「报仇雪恨般地干饭」吧。
E: This must be the fabled manifestation of "eating with a vengeance."

C: 呜呜呜…尾巴大爷！对不起！其实是因为，尾巴大爷很喜欢看卢卡选手打拳。
E: I'm sorry, Mr. Tail! In truth, Mr. Tail really likes watching Luka's fights.

C: 要帮那小子重拾信心，那就要找到打击他信心的根源，然后铲除掉。
E: If we're to help the kid find his confidence again, we'll have to strike at the root of the problem and remove it completely.

C: 有你这样尽心尽力的教练，我当然会赢啦！
E: With a dedicated coach like you, of course, I'm going to win!

C: 我后来又跑去书库里翻了半天…七百年虽然说长也不算长，但正好卡在了一个动荡混乱的年代…第二次丰饶民战争的余波未止，很快又是饮月之乱。
E: I went to the repository the other day and did some digging. Seven hundred years ago was not too long ago, but it was a turbulent era... The aftermath of the second Denizens of Abundance War still lingered, and the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae soon followed.

C: 我还没有那么老啦！
E: I'm not that old!

C: 漆黑铁臂…虎克大人？
E: Pitch-Dark Iron Arm... Hook the Great?

C: 但奇怪的是，为什么波提欧先生突然收枪回套，放弃比赛了呢？
E: Still, I wonder why Mr. Boothill suddenly decided to holster his gun and forfeit the match?

C: 二位都是贵客啊！要喝点什么，尽管说～
E: It's a pleasure to have two distinguished guests here today! What can I get for you? Just let me know!

C: 卢卡！卢卡！卢卡！卢卡！
E: Luka! Luka! Luka! Luka!

C: 你好啊，贝洛伯格的卢卡。很高兴能见到你。
E: Hello, Luka from Belobog. It is a pleasure to meet you.

C: 在我一次次挥拳时，我的家人、朋友正在因为军团的入侵流血死亡。在我一次次挥拳时，他们的希望正在渐渐熄灭。
E: While I've been fighting here? My family and friends are bleeding to death because of the Antimatter Legion's invasion. With every fist I threw, their hopes dimmed a little more.

C: 等等，善逝！先别动手，别动手——
E: Wait, Sugata! Do not attack. Do not attack —

C: 无论你为什么愿望而来，你都没有得偿所愿的机会了。丹轮寺将因你所犯的血案而名声丧尽，请愿更是无从谈起。而这一切，都毁在你手里。
E: No matter what intentions you had coming here, you've lost your opportunity in achieving them. Claretwheel Temple's reputation is now tarnished by the bloodshed you've caused, and there's no room for any petition of yours. All this is ruined by your own hands.

C: 杀了他！
E: Kill him!

C: 嗐，看到幻觉不全是坏事…
E: Eh, hallucinations aren't all that bad...

C: {NICKNAME}教练真是太狂了！
E: Coach {NICKNAME} is so brazen!

C: 倒是不能怪他们，只怪咱们的卢卡选手隐藏了实力。
E: Can't say I blame them. Our Luka just hid his prowess really well.

C: 我是来自《周刊闻椿》的记者，我司奉行保护个人隐私的原则…所以我也就不方便透露自己的名字了，各位请称呼我为「八卦记者」就好。
E: I'm a journalist from Weekly Wenchun. Our company adheres to the principle of protecting our personal privacy, which is why I can't reveal my name. Feel free to just call me "that Tabloid Journalist."

C: 这身装备也是租来的，打坏了我们实在赔不起啊哥！
E: Our equipment is rented too. If it's damaged, we really can't afford to pay for it, bro!

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 「朱明三不」…仔细品了品，这名字还挺帅气的。该去擂台上会会他们了！
E: The Tri-Dis of Zhuming... After some appreciation, this name sounds quite impressive. It's time to go meet them in the arena!

C: 但选手照片上的这些植物，是不是过于神奇了？
E: But aren't the plants in the competitor's photo a bit too fantastical?

C: 组委会提示，「神奇植物在哪里」并未使用任何寿瘟祸祖的力量，也没有深陷魔阴——只是单纯长得比较「丰饶」而已！请放心观赛！
E: The organizing committee assures that "Fantastic Botany and Where to Find Them" is not at all utilizing any Plagues Author's powers, nor are they direly afflicted with mara — they just look a bit "Abundant." Please watch this exciting bout without fear!

C: 我是专业的，我明白教练此刻还在隐藏战术意图，具体的我就不问了。
E: I'm a professional, and I understand that you wish to keep your tactics under wraps. I won't delve into details then.

C: 我真的是在过度解读吗？难道不是你在隐藏什么？
E: Am I really over-analyzing? Or are you hiding something?

C: 接下来开始由{NICKNAME}教练选择记者提问。
E: Next, Coach {NICKNAME} will be selecting journalists for questions.

C: 稳住，用这招对付对手！
E: Use this move against your opponent!

C: 你这条公司的走狗，赶紧滚回公司。
E: Go back to Pier Point, IPC lackey.

C: 大毫？你怎么在这里？
E: Dahao? What're you doing here?

C: 啊，咱们的对话超过<unbreak>800</unbreak>字了。本次对话到此结束。你快去摆货吧，再见。
E: Ah, we've exceeded <unbreak>800</unbreak> words! This chat will end now. Go stack your goods, goodbye.

C: 啧，该不会是怕你们社团的成员被「观忍社」抢走吧？小气！
E: Tsk, afraid that your society members would be snatched up by the Ninja Appreciation Society? So petty!

C: 我超喜欢这里！
E: I love this place!

C: 听着好复杂…
E: Sounds complex...

C: 在下——定要将诸位训练成无惧任何演台的优秀音忍！
E: I... will definitely train everyone into outstanding ninjas who do not fear any stage!

C: ——盛会巨星！有件事想问！就是…我也可以加入你们嘛？
E: ...The Festive Superstar! I have something to ask! That is... can I join you all too?

C: 登场可震慑对手心魄，行动间亦能吸引目光，实乃演台作战必备的专门•忍具是也！
E: Striking fear into opponents' hearts the moment you step on to the stage, your slightest movement capturing the attention of all — such a specialized ningu is essential for the battle performance!

C: 不好说。
E: It's hard to say.

C: 就要登台了，记得各自检查乐器的状况。还觉得紧张，可以把眼睛闭起来，将动作完全交给音乐。弹错了也没关系，跟我的节奏就好。
E: We're about to go on. Remember to double-check your instruments. If you're still nervous, just close your eyes and let the music move for you. It's fine even if you play the notes wrong. Just follow my lead.

C: 咳。
E: Ahem.

C: 股东，音乐派对是折纸大学最重要的庆典，你们可得上点心啊！
E: Dear shareholder, the music party is Paperfold University's most important celebration. You all must put in double the effort!

C: 音乐派对会持续多久？
E: How long will the music party last?

C: 看到头顶那只金光灿灿的大鸟了吗？是不是特别地潮？！
E: Can you see that huge glittering golden bird above us? Isn't it super stylish?

C: 嗯！
E: Sure!

C: 论据？呵，这就由我等的主公来向阁下说明吧。
E: My proof? Hah, I will allow our Sound Master to explain that to you.

C: 金色音符激奏！绯红音符激奏！还有，看我契波大人的绝技——挑染缤纷音符激奏！
E: Golden note blast! Crimson note blast! Wait for it, here comes Lord Czipo's finishing move... Colored Highlights Note Blast!

C: 所谓的青春和校园生活是什么呢…怎么想都不太明白。
E: What is this thing they call youth? What is campus life...? I just can't seem to understand them.

C: 呃，还挺好听的？
E: Err, that actually sounded pretty good?

C: 看来降本增效的风，还是吹到了匹诺康尼。
E: Looks like the cost reduction trend has blown its way to Penacony.

C: 感谢诸位为在下拖延时限！
E: Thank you all for helping me delay my deadline!

C: 在这里，我认识了一群非常厉害的朋友：一把能打垮一百条鳄鱼的手枪，一面能掏出各种知识的镜子，一只让恶人闻风丧胆的野狼，还有那块无所不能的小钟表……
E: It was here that I befriended a group of amazing people: A revolver that could defeat a hundred crocodiles, a mirror that brimmed with knowledge, a wild wolf that made villains freeze in fear, and that little clock that could do just about anything...

C: 别担心，虽说乐队只是个社团活动，来去自由，但我契波大人是最讲信用的财富学院学生，答应了你们，就会认真完成演出的！
E: Don't worry. The band may just be a club event, and we're free to come and go as we please, but I am the most trustworthy among all Fortune Academy students. Once I've made a promise, you bet I'll be sure to complete the performance!

C: 就这还好意思说是我的宿敌？
E: Are you not at all embarrassed to say you're my archrival?

C: 呜…都怪我喵。最近空间站的造物们想为阮•梅女士合唱一首赞歌，所以在进行发声训练，可是我…怎么都唱不好。
E: Boo... it's all my fault, meow. Recently, the creations on the space station want to sing a hymn of praise for Madam Ruan Mei, so we are going through vocal training. But I... just can't seem to sing well.

C: （拍拍脑袋）
E: (Pat its head)

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Hmph, hmph hmph!

C: （揪揪鼻子）
E: (Pinch its nose)

C: 现在都流行细分赛道，谁说小众榜单的第一不是第一？
E: It's all about niche markets right now. Who can say that number one in a niche ranking isn't number one?

C: 把我打包送给帕姆吧。这样以后我就不用做值日了！
E: Wrap me up and give me to Pom-Pom. Then I won't have to be on Express duty!

C: 丹恒老师，你才是真正的名侦探啊！推理能力也太强了叭！
E: Dan Heng, you're the true detective! Your deduction skills are brilliant!

C: 「举手投足皆是习武，静极不动亦是练剑，此即『浑然天成』。」
E: "Every gesture is a stroke of martial art. Even in stillness, the sword is being trained — the pinnacle of natural harmony."

C: 你们声称在地砖缝隙里找到了耳机，实则偷偷重新买了一只。
E: You all claim to have found it in one of the floor tiles' crevices, when in reality you bought a replacement.

C: 没办法嘛。对别人撒谎，和对你们撒谎，是完全不同的两件事呀。
E: It can't be helped. Lying to others and lying to you all are two completely different matters.

C: 让黑塔女士不要把这么多危险品堆放在支援舱段才更合理一些吧？
E: Isn't it more reasonable to tell Madam Herta not to stash so many dangerous items in the supply zone?

C: 不过「扭蛋盲盒」倒的确是个有趣的物件。前不久我刚读到一篇文章，是一个「武装考古学派」年轻学生的作品，研究如何在不破坏古代墓葬的情况下摸清其中文物的价值。
E: But I can't deny that the capsule blindbox is an interesting thing. I read an article not long ago. It was written by a young student from the Armed Archaeologists, about the research on how to ascertain a relic's worth in ancient tombs without damaging them.

C: 有了。就是这个。
E: Got it. It's this one.

C: 卧室建造完成了！终于不用睡纸箱子啦！唉？怎么还有点怀念纸箱子的触感？
E: The bedroom's finally finished! No more sleeping in a cardboard box! Ha, funny thing is, I kinda miss the feel of sleeping there!

C: 往这边走就是车行了。
E: This is where the car dealership is.

C: 规则就是用来打破的啾！
E: Rules are made to be broken, tweet!

C: 欢迎光临匹诺康尼~
E: Welcome to Penacony!!!

C: 欢庆促销！
E: Our celebration sale is on!

C: 「进击的巨猴」。
E: "Attack on Giant Monkey."

C: 呜哇，又回想起了被睡蕉小猴的潮流支配的恐惧……
E: Woah, I just recalled the horrific frenzy the Slumbernana Monkey craze created...

C: 咳咳，列车马上就要启程了——在下一站，我们也要一起留下更多更好的照片哦！
E: Ahem, the Express is about to depart! Next stop, we're gonna keep snapping even more, even better photographs!

C: 三月七小姐，藿藿就知道，你的照片一定能受大家喜欢！
E: Miss March 7th, I knew from the start that your photo would be a smash hit!

C: 巧合：正如灵感的落花在触地前与现实相遇。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我和拉帝奥先生正要谈论到你的事情。
E: Coincidence: Just as the falling flowers of inspiration touch the ground before encountering reality. {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, Mr. Ratio and I were just about to talk about you.

C: 本想向{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}传递这份神圣的职责，但看来我挑错了对象——你并非是一位沉默的「观众」。
E: I wanted to impart this sacred duty to {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, but it looks like I've picked the wrong person — you are not a silent "spectator."

C: 确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
E: You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.

C: 不用害怕挑衅。就把他的队伍设为下阶段的目标，我会帮你获胜。
E: Don't be afraid of his taunts. Just treat his squad as the next objective, and I'll help you hit it.

C: 我可以帮你打保级赛。
E: I can help you fight a demotion prevention match.

C: 职业经理踩着欢快的步伐离开了，围观的奇美拉都露出了羡慕的神色。
E: The professional manager departs with a light-hearted skip, the onlooking chimeras casting envious stares.

C: 我已经在研究决赛的对手了。
E: I have been studying our opponents for the final match.

C: 如今，「懒得取名字 / 开拓者说的都队 / 风堇亲卫队 / 奇美拉施工队 / 无名部队 / 自定义小队1」成为了行业里不可忽视的力量，你我终究要有一战。
E: Now, Can't Be Bothered To Make A Name / The Squad Mentioned by the Trailblazer / Hyacine's Royal Guard / Chimera Operation Team / Nameless Army / Custom Team 1 has become a powerhouse that can't be ignored, which is why you and I are fated to battle it out.

C: 工作成绩达到这个标准才算是合格，先努力保住你的小队吧。
E: Our work performance must attain this standard to be considered acceptable. Let's just focus on keeping your squad together first.

C: 你还记得，自己之所以来到这儿，是为了追逐某个悠远的声音。
E: You still remember that you came here to pursue that distant voice.

C: 不要紧不要紧，年轻人不怕失败，要不，再来一把？
E: Don't worry, youngsters shouldn't be afraid of failures. Another round?

C: ——不过，不知道是不是心理作用，你总觉得它没想象中那么沉甸甸。
E: ...However — maybe it's just you — it isn't as heavy as you thought it'd be.

C: o((-'ω´- )o「人家可是天使，怎么能放狠话呢？」)∋
E: o((-'ω´- )o "I'm an angel, how could I make threats?" )∋

C: 嗷呜～被重力束缚住灵魂的小海豹，是不会懂得正面冲撞的意义的。
E: Awoo~ A baby seal bound by gravity will never understand the meaning of a head-on collision.

C: 代表山之民惩罚我是吧？你们都合起伙来欺负我巴特鲁斯！
E: So you're punishing me on behalf of the Mountain Dweller? You're all ganging up on poor little me!

C: o((〒ω〒; )っ「豹曾是有刺海豹，现在是无刺海豹了……」)∋
E: o((〒ω〒; )っ "I was once a spiky seal, now it's a non-spiky seal..." )∋

C: 拜拜了您嘞。
E: Well, goodbye then.

C: 想偷你花重金打造的宝贝，还需要理由吗？那么大的一个金灿灿的东西，多诱人哪！我贼心不死，跃跃欲试，不行吗？
E: Do I need a reason to steal your precious treasure? A huge sparkling gold object like this, what a temptation! Old habits die hard and there's no harm in trying, right?

C: 嗷呜～也许梦醒来之后，我们不会记得你是谁，但你可千万记得要来找我们呀。
E: Awooo! Maybe we won't remember who you are when this dream ends, but please remember to come find us.

C: 小组赛即将开始，请选手们带上自己的小海豹，前往比赛场地……
E: The group stage is about to begin. Please bring your baby seals and head to the arena...

C: 一枚金币…缇宝阿姐你是不是诚心想找我啊，搁这来逗猫玩儿啊？
E: A single coin... Big sis Tribbie, do you really have business with me, or are you here to tease the cat again?

C: 走了走了！我们有缘再见了。不过嘛，有言在先——
E: Well then, job's done! We'll see each other when we see each other again. There's one last thing I want to say, though —

C: 各位，我有一个翁法罗斯梦！
E: Everyone, I have a vision of Amphoreus!

C: 不如我亲手将奖杯打碎吧。
E: What if I shatter the trophy myself?

C: 顺带一提，<color=#dbc291ff>我把初始角色都设置成了列车组成员</color>。
E: Also, <color=#dbc291ff>I've made all Initial Characters Express Crew members</color>.

C: 而此次的冒险就将从这里开始——「在黑洞中，我们幸运的勇者反而因祸得福，知晓了最强球棒的真正所在——『黑斗篷魔王』的手中！」
E: And that's where the adventure begins — "In the black hole, our lucky hero, instead of perishing, discovers the true location of the Ultimate Bat — it's in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King!"

C: 先击碎我的防御再说吧！
E: Why don't you break my defense first?

C: 对了，您这辆<color=#dbc291ff>「巡海大鲨鱼」号</color>跟您报名登记的球笼时候不太一样，得亏是那位选手出了许多情况……
E: By the way, this <color=#dbc291ff>Sea Hunter Shark model</color> you've got here doesn't match the one you signed up with. Lucky for you, that other racer had some issues...

C: 佩佩，待会儿你就多看，多学，别太兴奋了，一会儿还要打复活赛呢！
E: Peppy, keep your eyes on the race. Don't get hyped — we've got the loser's bracket later!

C: 入库手续正在为您加急办理了，差点忘了正事——恭喜您登上冠军宝座！
E: Your registration's being fast-tracked. Almost forgot to mention the important stuff — congrats on making it to the championship!

C: 恶灵式神•折纸鸟阁下！你是否敢于接受在下的挑战？
E: Evil Spirit Origami Bird! Do you have the courage to accept my challenge?

C: 青雀别慌，我来助你。
E: Don't worry, Qingque. I've got your back.

C: 呃…我无所谓，只要别让它再去祸害人就行了。现在我唯一的想法就是，短时间内，我再也不想碰「折纸小鸟对对碰」了。
E: Uh... I don't really care, as long as it doesn't go around causing trouble anymore. Honestly, the only thing on my mind is: I don't want to touch Origami Bird Clash again. Not for a long, long time.

C: 哼，既然你们都没什么想法，不如让我赏它颗枪子？放心，我一向很准。
E: Hmph. If none of you have a better idea, how about I finish it with a bullet? Don't worry, I never miss.

C: 让我来招待各位吧，这次也是给各位添了不少麻烦！正好让我离这些街机也远一些！
E: Allow me to host everyone this time. I've caused enough trouble already! Besides, it's a good excuse to get away from those arcade machines!

C: 怎么样？{NICKNAME}老板，有空来玩一局吗？
E: So, boss {NICKNAME}, how about a round when you're free?

C: 你又过来干什么？今天我可没有招惹你。
E: What do you want this time? I didn't mess with you today.

C: 作为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师，从现在开始，这里的所有原料和设施都交由你使用。
E: From now on, you're our guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. All our ingredients and equipment are yours to use.

C: 今天全场消费由我买单！
E: Drinks are on the house today!

C: 谢谢。公司的认可，对我来说就是最大的嘉奖。
E: Thank you. Recognition from the IPC is its own reward.

C: （开始调饮）
E: (Mixing begins)

C: 提到这个，也存在另一种可能：部分人群的反复性嗜睡由基因中特定碱基对异常遗传造成，导致免疫表达缺陷和下丘脑泌素分泌受阻，从而出现突发睡眠症状。
E: On that note, there's another possibility: Recurrent hypersomnia may result from genetic abnormalities in specific base pairs. These can impair immune expression and hinder hypothalamic orexin secretion, causing sudden sleep episodes.

C: 不学不学。这些都太过时，现在大家都去不夜侯听说书先生讲有声书了。我想学些更有趣的知识~
E: Nope, nope, not learning! That stuff is ancient. Everyone's listening to the storytellers' audiobooks at the Sleepless Earl nowadays. I want to learn something more interesting~

C: 感谢。我会收集好感官信标的反馈数据。
E: Thank you. I'll collect the sensory beacon's feedback data.

C: 连长相都变了，这样对吗？
E: Even the appearance has changed. Is that supposed to happen?

C: 瞧吧，还是一样的实事求是。
E: See? Still grounded in facts.

C: 花火大人听到了些小道消息，在我的地盘上，竟然冒出了个兜售古怪调饮的家伙。
E: Word on the street is that some weird upstart has been peddling funky drinks on my turf.

C: 真是人红是非多啊。
E: Fame really does come with baggage, huh.

C: 汪汪！没想到吧，因为这里是匹诺康尼——
E: Woof woof! Bet you didn't see that coming. This is Penacony!

C: 「人生体验卡」。
E: "Life Experience Card."

C: 求之不得！输的一方，干脆人道毁灭好了吧。
E: Gladly! Loser gets vaporized. Nice and simple.

C: 我…睡了多久？
E: I... how long was I asleep?

C: 怎么是你？
E: You?

C: 放心，第一次会从最低难度开始，我们不仅会手把手教你熟悉系统，而且会额外以特殊的形式协助你。
E: Don't worry, we'll start with the lowest difficulty level. Not only will we guide you through the system step by step, we'll also provide special assistance along the way.

C: 对了，不久之后我就要去其他地方寻宝了…在离开前，你要是想再进到遗迹里搜刮…啊不是，探索几趟，我也奉陪。
E: Oh yeah, I'm going off treasure-hunting somewhere else soon... Before I go, if you wanna go back in to hunt for relics one last time — ahh, I mean as many times you like — well, I'll be there!

C: 按您的说法，您在这儿和同伴一起挑战了药王秘传的魁首。这场大战中可有遇到什么艰难波折？又或者，她施了什么妖法诡计，教各位求生不得求死不能？
E: You said that this was where you and your companions fought against the master primus of the Sanctus Medicus. Was there any conflict that you encountered here? Or perhaps, did she stoop to any dastardly tricks to really put you in between a rock and a hard place?

C: （沉默地看着西衍先生）
E: (Stare at Mr. Xiyan in silence)

C: 怎么会呢？「风雷天根」产生的电流，乃是疏通经脉、按摩肌肉、软化血管的不二之法，并没有什么危险的。
E: How could it? The Whirlbolt Pneumatophore's electricity merely unblocks the meridians as it massages and stimulates blood flow. It's a great remedy and not at all dangerous.

C: 那在这次冒险过程里，有哪位同伴的故事适合加入这个故事呢？
E: So then, are there any companions whose exploits are suitable for us to add to our story?

C: 怎么神功又要大成了？
E: Didn't I already achieve transcendence by taking that dragon oil elixir?

C: 不给拉倒。
E: Fine, I don't even want it.

C: {NICKNAME}，您可算是来了。给您介绍一下，这位就是我给您准备的「惊喜」。
E: {NICKNAME}, you've made it. Why don't you meet this "surprise" I've got waiting for you?

C: 看起来特别凶恶。
E: It looks incredibly ferocious.

C: 你找到生长促进剂了？我尝尝品质好不好……
E: Did you find the growth booster? Let me taste it and see if it's any good...

C: 龙尊一拂衣袖，托手如云，似同眼前的巨大丹炉交相感应。只见丹炉中奇光迸现（此处请幻戏剧组加强特效），一团流动的金辉如水般在空中攒聚成形——
E: With a flick of his sleeve, the high elder elegantly moved his hands like billowing clouds, as if communicating telepathically with the huge elixir crucible before him. A strange light burst forth from the crucible (by the way, this is where the VFX artists can add some Immersia special effects), and a lump of molten brilliance coalesced like condensation forming in the air —

C: 「二位英杰杀入鳞渊深处，只见一道黑影盘踞于建木玄根，正是那欲倾覆仙舟的万恶罪魁——幻胧！」
E: "The two heroes plunged deep into Scalegorge Waterscape, only to see a black shadow enshrouding the Ambrosial Arbor. It was none other than the root of all evil, the one trying to overthrow the Xianzhou - Phantylia!"

C: 小衍，你找的这{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}到底行不行啊？一点都不敬业。
E: Xiyan, is this {F#girl}{M#boy} going to be okay on set? Totally unprofessional.

C: 唉！虽然我也想亲自让神兵重新现世，但奈何我丹恒 / 冷面小青龙 / 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型 / 赵大宝才刚出生，还身材矮小…如果没有其他问题的话，就请你开始锻造吧。
E: Well! Even though I'd like to personally bear witness to the reawakening of this divine weapon, I — Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe — have only just been reborn, so I'm still not very tall... If there are no further questions, please start with the forging yourself.

C: 风灵月影剑！
E: Reaper of Nexus Modder!

C: 行吧，我犟不过您二位…碎星绝尘剑 / 大宝剑 / 风灵月影剑 / 虚数内能便携式战术激光炮就碎星绝尘剑 / 大宝剑 / 风灵月影剑 / 虚数内能便携式战术激光炮吧……
E: Fine. You two are simply too much... If Star-Shattering Blade of Truth / Big Sword / Reaper of Nexus Modder / Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon is what you want, then Star-Shattering Blade of Truth / Big Sword / Reaper of Nexus Modder / Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon it is...

C: 对对对，你先别计较这些…等我之后再做修改。咳咳，在下还是先继续给故事收个尾啊……
E: Yes, that's right. Don't worry about these details... I'll revise them later. Ahem, I'll keep going and bring the story to its denouement, then...

C: 嗯，不过你先别急，我还有话没说完。
E: Hang on. There's one more thing I'd like to say.

C: 醒一醒，你还听得到吗？{NICKNAME}？这是几，你看得到吗？
E: Wake up, {NICKNAME}! Are you still with me? How many fingers do you see?

C: 不用了，我感觉挺好的。
E: Don't worry. I'm feeling fine.

C: 在现实里我一个机兵都买不起，但在以太战线里我收集了好多机兵，以太战线真是太棒了！
E: In the real world, I can't even afford a single automaton. But, in the world of Aetherium Wars, I have collected many! Aetherium Wars is the best!

C: 你从哪里拿到我的号码的？
E: How did you get my number?

C: 哈哈，能交到你们这样的朋友，今天真是我人生中最快乐的日子了。
E: Haha, to have made friends like you — what a joyous day.

C: 这不是什么值得炫耀的事吧……
E: Should we really be bragging about something like this...

C: 百闻不如一见——你们就用这两座灯炉练练手吧！
E: Experience is always the best teacher — so go ahead and try for yourselves with these two lamps!

C: 看，有了希露瓦改装的热能传递功能，你们就可以点亮那些无法抵达的灯炉了。
E: You see? Serval's modifications to the lamps allow you to illuminate lamps that are out of your reach.

C: 哼哼…哼……
E: Oink... Oink...

C: 既然二位都弄明白了，那不妨直接上手试试看吧！我就在这儿等着二位咯。
E: Now that you know what to do, why not give it a go? I'll be right here, waiting for you.

C: 看到那边厢墙壁上的<color=#dbc291ff>纹样</color>了不？只要用玉兆留影器记录场地里的全部纹样，咱就能见到那位冠军候补啦——
E: See the <color=#dbc291ff>markings</color> on the wall over there? All you need to do is use the Jade Abacus's image recorder to capture all of them, and you'll be able to reach this zone's contender...

C: 他可能是全宇宙最招摇的假面愚者了——谁没听说过艾普瑟隆的假面富商？说不了解我才觉得奇怪呢。
E: Who hasn't heard about the Masked Tycoon of Epsilon? He's probably the flashiest Masked Fool in the universe — it'd be weird if I hadn't heard of him.

C: 或者我直接把那资格徽章给你得了？你选吧。
E: Or I can just give you the Mastery Mark, up to you.

C: 好了，闲话就到此为止吧。我还有事，真的……
E: Alright, that's enough small talk. I've got things to do, seriously...

C: 展开讲讲？
E: Care to elaborate?

C: 我希望二位能把储存着这只以太灵数据的硬币交给我们。在那之后，我们会将它送到艾丝妲小姐的手里。
E: I'm just hoping you two are willing to hand over the Aether Coin and Aether Spirit. Once we have them, we'll make sure they get to Miss Asta safe and sound.

C: 哼哼哼…我们的推测果然没错！
E: Hehe... Just as expected!

C: 那…乔瓦尼先生和那位玩家又是什么关系呢？
E: So... what's the special connection between you and the player, then?

C: 哼！哼哼——哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: 那就让你见识下我们鼹鼠党正式队员的厉害。别小瞧我哦，我可是一直在跟虎克老大进行秘密训练的。
E: Then how about I show you the power of an official Moles member? Don't underestimate me, I've been doing secret training with Hook for ages!

C: 都能领到什么福利？
E: What benefits are there?

C: 唉，下次我绝对不来当福利发放员了……
E: Ah, I won't be doing this job again...

C: …我们一起炒热全场的气氛吧！
E: Let's put on a show to remember!

C: 下一场比赛即将正式开始——
E: The next contest is about to begin!

C: 你胆子也太大了吧？！
E: Can you believe her!?

C: …对不起，现在说这些恐怕是有些扫兴了。眼下还是专注于享受庆典的氛围吧，祝你们无往不利。
E: ...Apologies, this isn't the best time to discuss such matters. Let's focus on the festive spirit for now. I wish you the best of luck.

C: …只消完成她为你们设下的最后一道挑战！两位，是时候做决定了——你们是否接受这次对决邀请？
E: Now... It's decision time. Are you prepared to accept this invitation and final challenge?

C: 祝贺你们——成为真正的冠军首席。
E: Congrats to you both — you're champions now.

C: …哎，{NICKNAME}，还是你来吧！你最擅长做选择了，脑袋瓜也聪明…你肯定知道该怎么做比较好……
E: Hmm... Why don't you decide, {NICKNAME}! You're good at making choices — I'm sure you'll know what's best.

C: …这还真是一场简短又难忘的旅行呀。
E: The journey may be short, but the memories will last forever~

C: …那叫「罗浮杂俎」！行不行啊你。
E: Ugh, it's Ghostly Grove, not Ghastly Gravy!

C: 如果能知晓岁阳想做什么，能做什么，对解救被附身的宿主应该会有很大的帮助。
E: If we can better understand what a heliobus wants to do — and what it's capable of doing — it'll be easier for us to help the victim.

C: 不、不可以…宿主是无辜的。
E: D—Don't be ridiculous... We can't allow the host to be harmed.

C: 鬼啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！
E: Ghoooooooost!!!

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，见到您一切安好，甚是可喜。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, it is good to see you are doing well.

C: 反倒是许多年前我们无意间救下的女孩，成了击败浮烟的关键。世事真是奇妙。
E: As fate would have it, the girl we unwittingly rescued many years ago became the key to defeating Cirrus.

C: 是粘合剂好吧！
E: ...Glue.

C: …这也太棒了吧！
E: ...a great idea!

C: 接下来，接下来该如何是好？
E: What next? What do we do now?

C: 衷心感谢各位的帮助。
E: I must express my sincere gratitude to all of you for your help.

C: 对于火焰来说，我不会因为要在宇宙热寂时熄灭就停止眼下的燃烧；就像你不会因为明天仙舟要沉没而放弃今晚的晚饭。
E: If you knew the Luofu were to perish tomorrow, would you skip dinner tonight? The flame of the heliobi will be extinguished in the hot silence of the universe... but that won't stop me from burning today...

C: 我明白她的想法了…
E: I see where she's going with this...

C: 岁阳，你不能理解人类的乐趣。你被囚禁在了命定论的幻觉中无法解脱，所以你希望每一个窥探未来的人都要承受和你相同的痛苦。
E: Heliobus, you cannot fathom the joys of humanity. You are imprisoned by the illusion of destiny, unable to free yourself, and you want everyone who peeks into the future to suffer the same pain as you.

C: 不过，就算失去了尾巴，藿藿一样是个厉害的判官呀，咱们这么多次行动的成功不就证明了这一点。
E: Anyway, even if you don't find Tail, you're still a great judge — the success of our ghost-hunting squad proves it.

C: 死兽的眼眸中还凝有一丝惊骇，仿佛不能置信人类的动作可以如此之快。
E: The eyes of the slain beast still contained a hint of astonishment, as if seemingly unable to believe the speed of which humans were capable.

C: 你担心将军对你失望。你担心自己没办法成为将军希望你成为的人。
E: You worry that the General is disappointed in you. You worry that you don't have what it takes to be the person the General wants you to be.

C: …只、只是桂乃芬小姐这样叫我而已。
E: That's just what Miss Guinaifen calls me... hehe.

C: 小子，这棋你到底还下不下了？我以为你是没脑子赢我，结果竟是没胆识挑战，呵呵。
E: Kid, are you playing chess or not? I figured you don't have the brains to beat me, turns out you don't even have the guts to challenge me!

C: 就这样吧，我也先去忙啦，之后再见～
E: Well, that's that! I've got to get back to work, see you again soon~

C: 好的，不着急，慢慢来。
E: Alright. Take your time. No rush.

C: 文远是个内向的人，独来独往，很少和人交谈。但就在最近这段时间开始，他们家晚上总能传出些谈笑声。这家伙不知何时也变得满面春风了起来。
E: Wenyuan is an introvert who keeps to himself and hardly ever gets to interact with anyone. But recently at night there's been this laughter coming from his place. Somehow, this guy has turned into a person filled with radiant joy.

C: 它不是你的妻子。
E: It's not your wife.

C: 如果没有其他事的话，你走吧。
E: If there's nothing else, please go.

C: 呃，该怎么说呢？之前各位帮我祓除缠身的岁阳时，太卜司的卜者青雀居功甚伟。我本想感谢她，多给她一些司部内表现的机会……
E: Ahem, how should I explain? When you were all assisting me in driving out the lingering heliobi, our diviner Qingque made a great contribution to the efforts. I wanted to thank her and give her more opportunities to show her skills in the department...

C: 走吧，我猜你们也很感兴趣。
E: Let's go, I think you'll find this interesting, too.

C: 可恶！竟让我在她的集团里当打杂的洗脚婢。
E: That.... she... I can't believe she made me a mere underling in her corporation!

C: 咱们运营部计划为帝垣琼玉植入更多付费维度。我们打算为牌背、牌桌、牌手都制作可订制付费内容——
E: Our operations department plans to implant more micro-payments for Celestial Jade. We plan to create customizable paid content for tile backs, game tables and players—

C: 这些箱子就没有十连保底的吗？
E: Is there no <unbreak>10</unbreak>x draw guarantee?

C: 重要的是感觉！它金光闪闪从箱子里蹦出来样子，你不快乐吗？
E: What matters is how it feels! Do you not feel overjoyed seeing its golden sparkle as it appears from the chest?

C: 这破宅子我虽然不打算要了，但它好歹算是我私人财产，高低能卖点钱。你们既然想调查凶宅，我想拜托你们帮我个忙。
E: Even though I don't want this busted house anymore, it is still a personal asset. I'd like to sell it no matter the price. If you're going to investigate the haunted house, there's something I'd like to ask you.

C: 抱歉，这个保险箱没有「0」。
E: Sorry, this safe has no "0".

C: …虽然凶宅是假的，这不妨碍我们更新一下「罗浮杂俎」。
E: ...Even though the haunted house isn't true, that doesn't stop us from posting an update on Ghostly Grove.

C: 不会读书和不聪明，是两件事！
E: Not being able to read and being stupid are two separate things!

C: 让我考虑考虑。
E: Let me think.

C: 咦？这都被你发现了，行吧，那我也不装了。
E: Huh? So you can tell. Fine, no use pretending anymore.

C: 走走走，该出发咯！
E: C'mon, let's get moving!

C: 这就是藿藿大人指定的「飞行式藏月瓠移动平台」，简称「降魔机巧鸟」。
E: This is the Flying Lunaumbra Gourd Mobile Platform, AKA, exorcist cycrane you've requested for, Judge Huohuo.

C: 这么短的时间，您倒是说说我怎么给您搞个大发明啊。
E: Please tell me how I can come out with a big invention for you on short notice.

C: 我们...有谁会用机巧鸟吗？
E: Among us... do we have anyone who knows how to operate a cycrane?

C: 应该就是这些岁阳了，{NICKNAME}，准备好了吗？
E: It should be the heliobus. {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

C: 也就是说，这次的求助者是熟悉的人？
E: Does that mean the requester is someone you know?

C: 人都到了呀，那我就开始了！咳咳！
E: Is everyone here? Then I'll begin! Ahem!

C: 你为什么要跟踪我们？你好好回答，否则我会考虑到地衡司报警。
E: Why are you stalking us? Go on, tell us — otherwise I'll have to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 就是，团队行程都被你打乱了！
E: Yeah, our squad trip was all messed up by you!

C: 对对对。
E: Yup yup yup.

C: （看来，这就是我的了。）
E: (Looks like this is mine.)

C: 呃，身体器官…它们倒是一直没遮掩过，算不上什么隐藏实力。
E: Er, well their organs...? They have never really been covered up before, so there's nothing really hidden about it.

C: 那可不行。况且，就算你送养了它们，其他造物在场，难免会有类似的情况发生。
E: That won't work. Even if we put them up for adoption, similar situations will keep happening with other creations.

C: 舱段分区改造已初见成果，有个好消息要告诉你，{NICKNAME}。
E: The rezoning work appears to be yielding results. I have some good news to tell you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 譬如那日，联盟集结兵力，协助博识学会清缴一处星区内的孽物。在尝试突破造翼者佣兵的封锁时，罗浮太卜符玄认为，应当集结优势兵力，进攻薄弱处。
E: For example, on that day, an alliance was formed to assist the Intelligentsia Guild in purging abominations within a star zone. While attempting to break through the Wingweaver blockade, Fu Xuan — the Luofu's master diviner — believed that because their rallied forces were superior they should assault the weakest link.

C: 即使在很多琥珀纪以后，贝洛伯格的人们也会时常想起那场世纪大审判——代理大守护者佩拉审判僭主布洛妮娅。
E: Even after many Amber Eras, the citizens of Belobog will still harken to the trial of the era: The trial of the tyrant, Bronya, by the acting Supreme Guardian, Pela.

C: …晚、晚上好，嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀先生。
E: ...G—Good evening, Mr. Tick-Tock.

C: …我当然知道！
E: ...Of course I know that!
"Perhaps..."

C: （奇怪，我怎么又回到这地方来了？）
E: (Weird, why am I back here again?)

C: …你到底是希望有，还是不希望有啊。我要走了，想跟我回家吗？
E: ...Are you actually expecting a "yes" from me? I'm leaving. Do you want to come with me or not?

C: 汪！我不是发狂的怪物哇！
E: Woof! I'm not some berserk monster!

C: 什么嘛，味道都不对！哇咔咔，难道你和我一样，那个…发起晕来什么都分不清？
E: What's this? The taste is off! Whoa, are you feeling like me? You know... unable to distinguish the difference between everything when I'm dizzy?

C: 你是喝多了吧？
E: Are you drunk already?

C: 好啦，喝完调制的饮料，也该把那件好玩的事告诉您了，就是呀——
E: Well, now that I've finished my drink, it's time to share that interesting story with you...

C: 这是你的真实想法吗？
E: Is that what you really think?

C: 搞不懂你到底想干嘛。
E: I just don't understand what you want.

C: 届时，便看您的安排了。
E: I believe you'll be able to handle the situation when they arrive.

C: ——哈啊！舒服得仿佛全身得齿轮都在颤动，像是将润滑油涂进了内在的每个角落！
E: ...Aha! It's so delightful that it feels like all the gears in my body are shaking, and every corner of my insides has been lubricated!

C: …冰块？
E: ...Ice cubes?

C: 在成为酒吧的调饮师前，我曾经是「美梦剧团」的管理员。说是管理者，但我始终把那些孩子当家人在看待。所以，看到它们变成这样，我很痛心。
E: Before becoming a drinksmith, I used to be the administrator of the Sweet Dreams Troupe. My title might have been their administrator, but I treated them like my own family. That's why it hurts me to see them in this state.

C: 因为我只是狗狗，什么都做不到，你最开始就不该对我抱有太高的期待汪！
E: And that's because I'm a dog. I can't do anything. You shouldn't have had high expectations for me in the first place, woof!

C: 嗝！有点晕乎乎的…和你聊天好开心，我还会来酒吧找你玩的，要记得欢迎我哇！
E: Burp! I'm feeling a bit dizzy... It's so nice talking to you! I'll come hang out with you some other day. Be sure to welcome me with open arms!

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 汪汪汪  汪  汪
E: WoofWoofWoof  Woof  Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪汪汪
E: Woof  Woof  WoofWoofWoof

C: 难度变高了，先感受下新的节奏吧。
E: The difficulty has gone up. Feel the new rhythm first.

C: 先来复习一下节奏吧。
E: Let's rehearse the beat first.

C: 放心吧，那玩意只能在梦里起作用，而且保质期也差不多就要过了。
E: Relax, that thing only works in dreams. Besides, its shelf life will be over soon.

C: 根本就是个白盒好吗，里里外外都透着敷衍…算了，总之先回去看看街机的内置游戏做得怎么样吧。
E: It's pretty much just white-box testing at this rate. Everything is so perfunctory... Forget it, let's just go back and see how the arcade's built-in games are doing for now.

C: 喂！听听你说的是人话吗——好歹都是一辆车上下来的，我怎么就不能收到邀请了！
E: Hey! Rude. We both disembarked from the same train. Of course I got an invite too!

C: 呼…别让我再见到它们，尤其是那只傻狗，不然尾巴毛都给它啄秃了！
E: Hoo... Don't let me see them again, especially that stupid dog. Or else, I'll make sure to chew up all of its tail hair!

C: 他在草原上驰骋、攀登雪峰、穿越沙漠、甚至曾抵达过炙热的地心……
E: He rode across fields, scaled snowy peaks, and crossed deserts, even reaching as far as the fiery core of the planet...
Umm...

C: 别慌，现在原始代码已经迭代过一版了，我们对齐了安保科的需求，优化了模拟战斗的流程……
E: Keep calm. The source code's already been iterated once. We've also cross-checked with the Security Department's requirements and optimized the simulated combat's process...

C: 把路让出来吧。还是说你们要先跟我的球棒讲讲道理？我可不是参赛选手，不受你们的道德绑架。
E: Make way. Or do you need to discuss this with my baseball bat? I'm not a contestant, and I'm not bound by your morals.

C: 你觉得周围的人都在议论你，是因为你身处竞锋舰的擂台附近。
E: You might think everyone is talking about you, but that's because you're near the Skysplitter arena.

C: 嗯…请一定要胜利呀！
E: Make sure you win!

C: 打倒卢卡！为铄金报仇！
E: Down with Luka! Avenge Shuojin!

C: …呜，怎么可能。公司的最新款动力甲，没道理打不过你这乡巴佬的原始科技……
E: ...Ugh, how is this possible? The IPC's latest technology shouldn't be outmatched by your primitive technology...

C: 用有机生命的修辞来说，我们确实在模拟宇宙里「玩过头」了。
E: In the vernacular of organic lifeforms, we have definitely "overdone" it in the Simulated Universe.

C: 全灭，就是和平。
E: Now that they have all fallen, the world shall know peace.

C: 早就准备好了！
E: You bet I am!

C: 没错！{NICKNAME}乘客终于不再居无定所了，帕姆好欣慰！
E: That's right! Pom-Pom is so glad that {NICKNAME} finally has a place of {M#his}{F#her} own!

C: 我和谁挤挤就好！
E: I can just room with one of you!

C: 感谢您选择「取消格式化」！我将继续竭诚为您服务。
E: Thank you for canceling the reformat operation! Rest assured I shall continue to serve the crew diligently.

C: 今天我们就是来帮你解决开头问题的！
E: That is why we're here today — to help you with taking that first step!

C: 那就开始建设吧！
E: Let's get to it, then!

C: 换了新衣服，{NICKNAME}乘客就认不出我了吗！本列车长可是如假包换的列车长帕！
E: Pom-Pom changed into new clothes, and now you don't recognize me, Passenger {NICKNAME}? Pom-Pom is the real deal, authentic through and through!

C: （但总有一天，总有一天，黑塔也会震惊于我的收藏！哼！）
E: But someday, someday, Herta will be astonished by my collection! Hmph!

C: 摆件的归摆件，海报的归海报！
E: Figurines belong with figurines, posters belong with posters!

C: 看着这里从无到有逐渐充实起来，真让人舒心。这种好日子，就该做些什么来庆祝一下！
E: It's so nice seeing this empty space gradually fill up with furniture. A happy occasion like this calls for a celebration!

C: 已录入{NICKNAME}乘客的饮食习惯数据，从明日起将为您调整食谱，提供营养更加均衡的餐食。明日午餐：萝卜丁、生菜叶、鸡胸肉，淋柠檬汁。
E: {NICKNAME}'s dietary preferences have been saved. Starting tomorrow, your meals will be changed to a more nutritionally balanced menu. Tomorrow's lunch menu includes diced carrots, raw lettuce, and chicken breast with lemon drizzle.

C: 总而言之，计划很简单，我负责带路，你负责解开那里的残余机关。得手后，咱俩三七分成。
E: In any case, our plan is simple: I'll lead the way, and you can sort out whatever mechanisms that remain. And when we finally get to the treasures, we can split them 3-7.

C: 听说它被{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量庇护，原先是用来对抗黑潮的避难所，之后嘛……
E: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power supposedly protected this place. It used to be a shelter used to resist the black tide, but years later...

C: 虽然不是第一次见，但我还是好奇…如此巨大的手，真能用来偷窃吗？
E: Although this is not the first time I've seen this item, I'm still curious about one thing... Can such an enormous hand really be used for theft?

C: 世人称它为，大•巨•极•大地兽•撕裂群山者•垃圾制造狂•后面编不出来了——简称「大撕垃」。
E: They named it the Super-Duper-Mega-Ultra-Dromas-Summit-Incisor-Litter-Launcher-Can'tMakeStuffUpAnymore — or "Dromasilla" for short.

C: 呜嗡，呜嗡——（嘿嘿，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}最好啦。）
E: Grumph, grumph— (Hehe, {F#mama}{M#papa} is the best.)

C: 就叫这个啦！
E: Yep, that's the name!

C: 呜嗡？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？）
E: Grumph? ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}?)

C: 不知等驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大成长为完全体的那天，那刻夏会是什么表情。
E: You wonder what expression Anaxa will have when Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas reaches its ultimate form.

C: 它好像有些为难的样子…
E: It seems a bit troubled...

C: 浴场角落里，又一次变小的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大正静静地泡在池水中。一旁的侍者们不时往这边打量，却识趣地没有多说什么。
E: In a corner of the baths, a once-again-miniaturized Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas was quietly soaking in the pool. The nearby attendants stole glances, but wisely kept their thoughts to themselves.

C: 宝宝肚肚打雷啦…
E: Baby's tummy is making thunder noises...

C: 呜，呜~嗡~~~（它还说，老大的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}就是它的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，让我替它向你问好）
E: Grumph, Grumphhh~~~ (It also says that boss's {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is its {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, and asked me to say hi to you.)

C: 呜嗡。（好怪哦，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你又多了个孩子呢。）
E: Grumph. (That's so weird, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Now you've got another kid.)

C: 来吧。
E: Come on then.

C: 想要吗？想要的话，就拿大家都喜欢的糕点来换吧。
E: Want it? If you do, trade me some of those pastries everyone loves.

C: …前辈，别看数据啦，贵客前来可不能失了礼数啊！
E: ...Grumpy, stop looking at the data, a guest of honor just arrived!

C: 资源危机让拉蒂卡兰人重新拿起武器，陷入了漫长的混战。现在，那里只剩下一片废墟。
E: The resource crisis drove the Ladiklans to take up arms again, plunging them into a prolonged civil war. Now, all that remains are nothing but ruins.

C: 开拓者之家。
E: The Trailblazer's Hearth.

C: 缤纷沙拉。
E: Colorful Salad.

C: 生菜沙拉。
E: Lettuce Salad.

C: 哎呀，又是平局。*我们*，谁都没法说服谁呢！
E: Oh no, another tie. We just can't convince each other!

C: 缇宁翻阅了成堆的资料，整理出好多让菜品变得更美味的小技巧。
E: Trinnon read a mountain of books and compiled tons of tips for making food taste even better.

C: 而我们的主厨，在揉制面团与最终烘焙时，也使用了悬锋城特有的技巧，能让烤饼的口感变得更为酥脆，同时令蜂蜜的香味得到最大程度的发挥。
E: And the head chef used a signature technique from Castrum Kremnos when kneading the dough and baking it, which makes the pancakes extra crisp and really brings out the full aroma of the honey.

C: 迷迷迷，迷迷迷迷迷！遇见我们，算是你的不幸迷！
E: Mem! Memem, mememem! Meeting us must be the worst luck you've had all year, mem!

C: ——迷迷！迷！干净利落地击败对手吧，万敌主厨！
E: Mem! Memem! Take them down quick and clean, Chef Mydei!

C: 哈哈。多么滑稽，我们两个拼尽了全力，都没能满足海瑟音小姐的胃口。
E: Haha... Isn't this something? We gave it everything we had, and still couldn't satisfy Miss Hysilens's appetite.

C: 不错，不错。这正是我预想中的模样。
E: Very good. This is exactly what I had in mind.

C: 罢了。既然是店长选定的主导者，我也不多说什么。你问吧。
E: Very well. Since the Manager appointed you, I won't argue further. Ask away.

C: 还请店长与各位贵客，务必拨冗参加哪。
E: We insist that you and all distinguished guests attend.

C: 抢答时间！没人举手的话，*我们*要点名咯！
E: Alright, answer time! If no one raises their hand, then we are going to start picking people!

C: 不过，这就是主厨的职责啊。我还挺乐在其中的。
E: But hey, that's what being a head chef is all about. I'm honestly enjoying it.

C: 瞧瞧，比拳头还大的土黄豆，我还是第一次见。你那边的收获如何？
E: Look here, soybeans bigger than my fist... Never seen anything like it before. How's the harvest going on your end?

C: 一切如前——\n若想窥探男人的怒火，\n须在七千步外远望。
E: As always —\nTo perceive the man's fury,\nOne must do so seven thousand paces away.

C: 「它说，承载神权吧。」
E: "Bear the divine authority, it declared."

C:
在送别死者时，
她将石板徒劳地丢入火焰。

我未曾听闻何地有此番遗俗。
E:
To the dead, when she bids farewell,
She casts the slate into the fire, an act futile.

I have never heard of lands with such customs.

C:
可在学者要离场时，
一阵风拂过，乌龟落到他身前。

悖论莫名成了真——
他踉跄追赶了一天一夜。
E:
Yet as he is about to leave,
A wind blows the tortoise in front of him.

And behold, his paradox becomes truth —
To catch up to the turtle, an entire day and night he spends.

C: 女孩披上兜帽，遁入无光的夜，\n「我向贼神立誓……」\n她自此贼不走空，满口诳诞。
E: The girl pulls down the hood and sinks into the starless dark.\n"I vow to the god of thieves..."\nAnd from that day, she never left empty-handed, her words woven with deceit.

C:
贤者之乡的金藤、
尚死之地的圣骸、
海畔明珠的神琴、
千门之城的水晶樽…
E:
The golden vines of the sages' homes,
The sacred carcass of the deathward realm.
The divine lyre of the seashore's pearl
And the crystal chalice of the thousand gates...

C: 巨龙在大地上孤独行走。\n泰坦知晓它也会恐惧寂寞，\n于是用骨肉将新的兽群雕琢。
E: The giant dragon walked the earth alone.\nThe Titan knew they were lonely and terrified too,\nAnd so sculpted new beasts from flesh and bone.

C: 忍受着咥啮骨肉的痛楚，\n吉奥里亚绷紧了神躯，\n再听不清造物的呼喊。
E: Bearing their bone-gnawing pain and agony,\nGeorios tightened every fiber in their body,\nNo longer hearing the call of their creations clearly.

C: 而今，它沉默地转身远行，\n离开隔世的高原与山脉，\n走入那喧哗的万邦。
E: And now, the dragon silently turned and departed,\nLeaving the plateaus and mountains of a secluded world,\nAnd entering the bustling cities humankind crowded.

C: 数年之后，艾格勒闭上眼目，\n而巨龙的脚步终于受阻。
E: Many years later, Aquila closed their eyes,\nAnd the Giant Dragon's steps were finally halted.

C: 于是，巨龙看见大地的今昔，\n也明了星空遥不可及。
E: And so, the Giant Dragon sees the past and present of Earth,\nAnd understands that the starry sky is forever out of reach.

C: 凯撒的军队初入北域之邦， 行过战火烧焦的城门。 「又一位僭主！」 愤怒的孩童高呼。
E: The Imperator's armies stormed into the northern states for the first time, Passing through city gates scorched by war. "Another tyrant still!" So exclaimed the angry child.

C: 笑声朗朗——\n男人行走在大地上，\n留下的足迹满是欢欣。
E: Laughter resounds —\nThe man walks the land,\nLeaving footprints filled with joy.

C: 它们的原型，\n来自创世之初，天父手中的泥像。
E: As for the inspiration behind these statues,\nThey are said to be the clay figures that Kephale made at the world's creation.

C: 而她既无明眸也无酒涡，甚至无有面相，\n她是阿格莱雅的衣匠，\n她是只追随于半神的侍从。
E: She has neither eyes nor dimples, lacking even a face.\nFor she is Aglaea's Garmentmaker.\nMerely a demigod's serf.

C:
她在浪漫的殿堂中度过青春，
身旁皆是珍美之物，
连侍女也柳夭桃艳。

常得贵胄的谄媚，
满载豪绅的赞美。
E:
She spent her youth in a palace of romance,
Surrounded by treasures,
With even maids beautiful beyond belief.

Often bathing in the praise and admiration
Of wealthy nobles.
