>>>来自天外的无名客
>>>同为「毁灭」行者
>>>我感谢{F#她}{M#他}的到来 令翁法罗斯再度转动
E:
>>>But, there is another variable
>>>The Nameless from beyond the sky
>>>Also a pathstrider of "Destruction"
>>>I give thanks for {M#his}{F#her} arrival, allowing Amphoreus to turn once more

C: 「那霎同学！你这是…？」金发少年认出来，这是他的同学，性情孤僻，同袍中没人叫对过他的名字。
E: "Anaksa! What are you...?" The blonde youth recognized his classmate, a loner whom none of his companions had ever gotten his name right.

C: 大约半个月后，风堇清早醒来，在昏光庭院的门口发现了小伊卡，只是它似乎…胖了一圈。一同被发现的还有一封怪盗信，上书——「还以为翼兽后裔是值钱玩意，想不到是赔钱玩意。太能吃了！太能吃了！！！才几天，快把我的钱包吃空了。还是还给你吧，多洛斯人不做赔本买卖。」
E: About half a month later, Hyacine woke up early to find Little Ica at the entrance of the Twilight Courtyard, though it seemed... a bit rounder than before. Along with it was a phantom thief's note that read: "Thought a winged beast descendant would be worth something. Turns out it's a money pit. Such a glutton! SUCH A GLUTTON!!! In just a few days, it nearly emptied my wallet. Here, take it back. We Dolosians don't do money-losing deals."

C: 但奇怪的是，小伊卡并没有因此而消化不良，风堇猜测它的食谱发生了变化。「莫非…觉醒了能够消化红土的能力？是哪位大地兽先祖显灵了，我谢谢您。」
E: Strangely enough, Little Ica didn't get indigestion from it, and Hyacine suspected its diet had changed. "Could it be... it awakened the ability to digest redsoil? Which dromas ancestor blessed us? I'm truly grateful for that."

C:
因NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>自毁，第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环的「负世」逻辑出现漏洞，由变量{NICKNAME}接替。

经系统评估，放任{NICKNAME}行动将极大概率使系统迭代进程停滞甚至倒退，有一定概率导致权杖演算命题趋于自悖。

为保障实验的正常运行，管理员以ID：LykoS介入运算。在驱逐变量{NICKNAME}、并着手毁灭文明后，数枚电信号对LykoS显露敌意，并采取系列攻击行为，致使管理员失联。

第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环末期，数据库遭到「记忆」入侵，废弃数据被「长夜月」捞取。目前已无风险。
E:
Due to the self-destruction of Neikos<unbreak>496</unbreak>, a vulnerability appeared in the Worldbearing logic in the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop. Assumed by variable {NICKNAME}.

A system assessment indicates that allowing {NICKNAME} to act unchecked will, with a high probability, cause the system's iteration process to stagnate or even regress. There's also a certain probability that it could lead to the Scepter's extrapolative propositions becoming self-contradictory.

To ensure the normal operation of the experiment, the Administrator intervened in the calculation with ID: LykoS. After expelling the variable {NICKNAME} and destroying the civilization, several electrical signals displayed hostility towards LykoS and launched a series of attacks, resulting in the loss of contact with the Administrator.

In the final phase of the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive loop, the database was invaded by the Remembrance, and discarded data was retrieved by "Evernight." Currently, there are no risks.

C:
以「神礼观众」自居，███████████，实验「翁法罗斯」的管理员、第一推动者。
行于「智识」命途，却意图创造「毁灭」。

【检测到历史数据，正在同步…同步成功。】
【俱乐部编号识别完成，权杖系统权限已开放。欢迎，██████。】
E:
Assuming the mantle of Theoros, ███████████, Administrator and Prime Mover of The Amphoreus Experiment.
Walks the Path of Erudition, yet seeks to forge Destruction.

[Historical data detected. Syncing... Sync complete.]
[Society ID recognized. Scepter System access granted. Welcome, ██████████.]

C: 电信号间自主进行继承和迭代，并实现循环的交替，将大幅提升毁灭方程式的迭代速率。循环的灭亡最终成为循环的新生，也符合本项目最初的逻辑推断。\n\n【结论：毁灭的第一因=诞生的第一因。】
E: Having electric signals voluntarily inherit and iterate, and alternate the cycles themselves, will drastically increase the iteration rate of the Destruction Equation. The end of a cycle becomes the beginning of another, fully aligning with the project's original hypothesis.\n\n[Conclusion: The Prime Mover of Destruction = The Prime Mover of Birth.]

C: 嘿嘿，这一次又能大饱耳福了！
E: Hehe, I get to hear good music again!

C: 看看看看，有没有亮晶晶的？
E: *gasp* Shiny! *bigger gasp* Sparkly!

C: 想不想来杯咖啡？
E: Fancy a coffee?

C: 挺有趣的。
E: Interesting.

C: 该下线了…啊不对，搞错了。
E: Time to log off... I mean, ah, head back.

C: 都收好了么？
E: Did we get it all?

C: 我模仿一下平时的阿兰：「大家听从艾丝妲站长的判断。」然后当我叮嘱他：「阿兰，你也小心一点。」他说：「没事，我有自己的判断。」
E: Arlan's always saying stuff like, "all of you must heed Lead Researcher Asta's judgment!" Then when I remind him that that includes him, he says, "don't worry, I have my own judgment."

C: 黑塔女士举世无双，黑塔女士聪明绝顶，黑塔女士沉鱼落雁。
E: Madam Herta is a peerless gem. Madam Herta is an unrivalled genius. Madam Herta is an inimitable beauty.

C: 好看么？跟我小时候比，勉强也就七分相似吧。
E: What do you make of it? It's about seventy percent similar to how I looked as a child.

C: 他是一位优秀的战士，只是性格有些…冲动。或者说，他既能谋定大局，也会忘我鏖战…心思缜密却又蛮勇过人，这便是「光之子」。
E: He's an exceptional warrior, though his temperament is... impetuous. Or rather, he possesses the wisdom to plan far ahead, yet still throw himself into battle with abandon... A keen thinker and dauntless warrior. That is the "Child of Light."

C: 设计颇为精巧。
E: The design is exquisite.

C: 我认识的可可利亚会去屋顶上听我唱歌，但…「大守护者」不会。
E: The Cocolia I knew would sit on the roof and listen to my songs, but... not the supreme guardian.

C: 你来了，我刚结束锻炼。
E: You're here. I just finished training.

C: 好像等了很久…
E: Seems I've been waiting a while...

C: 已有之事，必将再来。我的足迹不会因此停驻。
E: What happened in the past is destined to return — I won't stand still to delay this encounter.

C: 她教我研习剑技，却始终未能与我亲近一些…但无边的夜色中，哪有比始终当空的明月更亲近人的存在呢？
E: She taught me the skills with a blade, but we never became close... *sigh* In an endless night, there is nothing closer than the bright moon, always hanging in the sky.

C: 镜流…见证我的痛苦，我的一招一式。
E: Jingliu... witness my every move, my suffering.

C: 卦象之内。
E: As divined.

C: 与丹恒先生交手时愈发发现，他虽枪术精湛，却对此毫不在意…枪术与他而言，只是一种手段么？
E: When I fought Dan Heng, his spear mastery was almost perfect... but he was completely detached from it as an art. Maybe for him it's just a means to an end?

C: 就当攒些零花钱。
E: This can go towards my allowance.

C: 嘻嘻，医术精进了不少！
E: Hehe, my healing skills are second to none!

C: 你呀，看着有点儿虚。
E: Ha, you don't look so good.

C: 虽然是初露尖角，但瞧这长势倒是很喜人。只是剑术一道，不披创沥血、杀生无算，是无法窥其真妙的。
E: He is still a fledgling, but I see great potential. Still, one cannot truly understand swordsmanship without sustaining injury and drawing blood in the thick of battle...

C: 我早已跨过了自己的极限，徘徊于魔阴身的边界。与其睹物思旧，恨火烧身。不如以黑纱障目，信步所之。
E: I have already surpassed my limits and may soon succumb to the influence of mara... but given the choice between staring into the abyss with a troubled mind and marching forward blindfolded, I choose the latter.

C: 准备受死…
E: Ready for death...?

C: 前生种种，对我来说就像陌生的影子，看不真切，却亦步亦趋。我很难描述那种感觉，但可以肯定的是，我不是任何人的影子。
E: My previous life is like a faint shadow — hardly visible yet following me wherever I go. It's hard to describe the feeling, but one thing is for certain — I am nobody's shadow.

C: 能修复吾的机巧身躯，那外乡人…不一般。
E: As an outsider capable of mending my mechanical body, he's far from typical...

C: 许久未见了。近来还好吧？我近来不太好，但鉴于我一直都不太好，倒是也无妨。
E: It's been a while. How have you been? I can't say I've been doing well lately myself, but that's normal for me.

C: 我是飞霄，仙舟「曜青」的将军。这样就算认识了，如果星穹列车碰上什么麻烦，尽管联系，曜青随叫随到。
E: I'm Feixiao, general of the Xianzhou Yaoqing. Now that we're acquainted, should the Astral Express run into any trouble, feel free to contact me. The Yaoqing will be there in an instant.

C: 椒大夫总抱怨自己长了张不值得信任的脸，看上去鬼点子太多。但如果真遇上大事，你完全可以信任他的鬼点子。
E: Doc Jiao always complains that his face looks untrustworthy and people think he has too many crafty ideas. But when push comes to shove, you can absolutely depend on those ideas.

C: 良机就在当下。
E: There's no time like the present.
Pulverizing sword strike!

C: 妾身曾亲眼见识过她作战。比起将军，她更是位武者——早前，她决死冲锋的气魄下总有一丝恐惧的味道，但如今已所剩无几了。
E: I once witnessed her in battle with my own eyes. She is more like a warrior than a general. There used to be a faint scent of fear beneath her boldness and willingness to charge into life-or-death situations, but now that is almost gone.

C: 小心，别在美梦中陷得太深。
E: Careful, don't get too lost in those sweet dreams.

C: 啊，多么具有「魅力」的圆球。
E: Haha, such an adorable little creature.

C: 每一次呼吸，都是自我的感知。
E: Every breath one takes is a perception of the self.

C: 我可不是你…这儿要是「模拟宇宙」，就由着你任性了。
E: If this were the Simulated Universe, I'd be at your mercy — but this is real life.

C: 永远记得，不要让生命留下遗憾。
E: Always remember, don't let life leave you any regrets.

C: 黑洞并不壮观，也不惨烈，它很安静，像一道孤零零的视线，看着你我…然后静静吞没所有，予以冰冷、沉默的拥抱。
E: Black holes aren't spectacular, nor are they fierce. They're silent, like a lone, forlorn gaze watching over you and me... and then gently they consume everything, bestowing a frigid, silent embrace.

C: 受到攻击。
E: Attack detected.

C: 好像找到窍门了。
E: I might have cracked the code.

C: 自省后的瞭望，并非幻梦一场。
E: What I see now, after self-reflection, is not an illusion.

C: 以此为据，也就再无反悔的余地…你我都是。
E: There's no backing out now, for me... or for you.

C: 上膛！
E: Locked and loaded!

C: 无情！化恨成岚花尽散。
E: Merciless! Hate turns to mist and scattered flowers.

C: 在下会铭记汝等的辞世句，告辞。
E: I will remember your last words. Farewell.

C: 每次听见她实验失败的消息，我都会第一时间冲过去狠狠恭喜——对于天才，没有什么比失败更珍贵。
E: Every time I heard that her experiments failed, I'd rush over ASAP and congratulate her with the utmost sincerity — there's nothing more precious than failures for a genius.

C: 我们会重逢的，朋友。无论你行向何处，奥赫玛的大门始终为英雄敞开。
E: We will meet again, friend. No matter where your journey leads, the gates of Okhema will forever be open to heroes.

C: 好久不见。下一曲，我们用什么舞步？
E: Long time no see. What steps shall we dance for the next tune?

C: 很荣幸能见证，属于大地和开拓的意志。
E: I'm honored to witness the will of both the Earth and the Trailblaze.

C: 无伤大雅。
E: Of no great concern.

C: 这就是…逐火……
E: This... is the Flame-Chase...

C: 小猫们的晚饭有着落咯~
E: The kittens are gonna eat well tonight~

C: 她总说，期盼着世界不需要救世主的存在。但她心中一定早已明了，只要有人深爱着这个世界，救世主注定降临。
E: She always said that she hoped for the world to no longer need a Deliverer. She must've known deep down that, as long as there are still people who love this world, a Deliverer is destined to appear.

C: 这次该比什么了…速度还是力量？
E: What should our contest be this time? Speed? Or strength?

C: 群山往往沉默少言，但那背负一切的决心，已无需喧嚣的语言明示。
E: Mountains are often silent and still, yet the resolve they bear needs no loud words to be known.

C: 别担心，让它再游过来些吧。
E: Easy now... let it swim a little closer.

C: 不必拘束，此地也将蒙受我的庇护。
E: Be at ease. This place, too, shall know my protection.

C: 好好招待大家~
E: Go on. Treat our guests nicely~

C: 成熟、优雅、如玫瑰般馥郁…三月一直在努力向她学习呢。当列车驶向更深邃的星空，未来…她又会以怎样的姿态绽放？
E: Mature, elegant, fragrant like a rose... March has been working hard to learn from her. As the Express ventures into deeper starry skies, how will Himeko bloom in the future?

C: 小伤而已，不需挂心。
E: Do not worry. This is nothing.

C: 谢谢！活力满满呢。
E: Thanks! All energized!

C: 伴着和煦的微风，喝着花茶，和风堇一起揉搓白白软软的小伊卡…嘻，幻想着这样的时光，不想醒来也是人之常情吧？
E: Drinking scented tea under a warm breeze, and petting soft and fluffy Little Ica with Hyacine... Hehe. Anyone would want to lose themselves in that fantasy, no?

C: 风堇，感谢你洒下的色彩。
E: Thank you for the colors you've scattered across the world, Hyacine.

C: 星穹列车
E: Astral Express

E: Select Target — Down

C: 星际和平指南
E: Interastral Peace Guide

E: Battle Speed-Up

E: Challenge formidable foes in epics!

E: Countdown

E: Complete the Easy difficulty challenge

C: 有关星核的颂歌
E: Hymn of the Stellaron

C: …别害怕。
E: ...Don't worry.

E: Knight (II)

深红宝石

C: 对战开始时：对随机1名对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of combat: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to 1 random opponent.

C: 自身受到伤害时：与后1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile behind, and its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>

C: 同伴被击倒时：若自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>大于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，则自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值-<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>，并使该名同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When a companion is knocked down: If this unit's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> is higher than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, it loses <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP</color> and causes that companion's <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=2 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>

C: 同伴概率类技能发动成功时：使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When a companion's probability-based ability is successfully launched: Its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>, and its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 使1只奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases 1 chimera's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 前1格同伴受到伤害时：使其<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，并有<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的概率使其<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>

C: ・在银狼的帮助下，流萤从原始忆域潜入了匹诺康尼的梦境。\n・据银狼所说，家族拥有一个在匹诺康尼近乎全知全能的存在，但正体不明。\n・在混乱的忆域中，流萤发现了另一位格拉默铁骑留下的忆质——名为AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>，对方是流萤一同留下过美好记忆的同伴。
E: ・ With Silver Wolf's help, Firefly infiltrated Penacony's dreamscape through the Primordial Memory Zone.\n・ According to Silver Wolf, The Family has an omniscient presence within Penacony, though its true identity remains unknown.\n・ In the chaotic Memory Zone, Firefly discovered memoria left by another Glamoth Knight, designated AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>, a companion with whom Firefly once shared cherished memories.

E: With Silver Wolf's help, Firefly is preparing to sneak into Penacony...

C: 我方目标施放攻击后，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>固定概率为随机攻击目标添加1个随机属性弱点，优先添加未持有的弱点，添加的弱点在敌方目标被击破后移除；为敌方目标添加弱点后，使敌方目标陷入<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层【<u>和音</u>】，并记录1次添加的弱点，每次行动最多触发<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>次该效果；当任意敌方目标被击破后，基于记录的弱点，每次记录对其及相邻目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的对应属性击破效果。
E: After an ally target uses an attack, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> fixed chance to add 1 Weakness of a random Type to a random attack target, prioritizing Weakness Type that the enemy target does not already have. The applied Weakness is removed after the enemy target is Weakness Broken. After adding a weakness to an enemy target, applies <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> stacks of "<u>Harmonize</u>" to the enemy target and records the added Weakness once. This effect can only trigger up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> time(s) per action. When any enemy target is Weakness Broken, based on the recorded weaknesses, each record deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Break effect of corresponding Type to the target and adjacent targets.

E: Blood-Sworn Alliance

E: Psychedelic Elegy

C: 被击败的真蛰虫遗骸消失，它们果然只是忆质形成的幻影。银狼劝流萤绕开虫子，但流萤没法说服自己视而不见。
E: The defeated True Sting's remains vanished, and they were indeed just illusions formed from memoria. Silver Wolf advised Firefly to avoid the bugs, but Firefly couldn't bring herself to just look the other way.

C: 流萤与你在游乐场分开，随后收到银狼来讯，提醒她别忘了「第一次死亡」。流萤发觉自己可能被人跟踪，知更鸟认为流萤果然不简单。
E: After parting ways with you at the amusement park, Firefly received a message from Silver Wolf reminding her not to forget about the First Death. Firefly suspected she was being followed, and Robin concluded that Firefly was not that simple.

C: 大丽花在原始梦境中接住流萤。趁「死亡」吸引着「梦主」的视线，大丽花提议在此寻找关于歌斐木的情报以及反击手段。
E: In the Primordial Dreamscape, The Dahlia caught Firefly as she fell. While the "Death" drew the Dreammaster's attention, The Dahlia suggested searching for information about the Gopher Wood and ways to strike back.

C: 流萤对上「接头娃娃」的暗号，身份确认为「机甲大亨」。「接头娃娃」请流萤前往下一处接头地址。
E: Firefly exchanged passphrases with the Contact Doll, who confirmed her identity as the Mech Tycoon and then asked her to proceed to the next meeting location.

C: 银狼表示她看过「剧本」，让你拼命别输。只要你别怕睡着，就一定能醒来。
E: Silver Wolf said she had read the "script" and told you to do your best not to fail. As long as you weren't afraid to fall asleep, you'd definitely wake up again.

E: The Family still hasn't figured out who "Stellaron Hunter: SAM" really is, right?

C: 可我还是没想起来…
E: But I still can't recall...

C: 还记得她吧——无人不知的知更鸟，在现实酒店，你们早早相遇。
E: You still remember her, don't you? Robin, known by all... You encountered her early on at the hotel in reality.

C: 哟，这不是我忠实的大顾客——{NICKNAME}嘛！
E: Hey, well if it isn't my most loyal customer, {NICKNAME}?

C: 现在，先办正事吧。
E: Now, let's get down to business.

C: …别怕，我接住你了。感觉还好吗？
E: ...Don't worry, I've got you. How are you feeling?

C: 原因呢，现在你有眉目了吗？
E: So, have you figured out the reason yet?

C: 你认识黑天鹅？
E: You know Black Swan?

C: 你们…究竟是什么人？
E: Who... exactly are you people?

C: 公司，星穹列车…现在你连家族的委托也接下了？「人缘」真不错。
E: The IPC, Astral Express... and now you're even taking assignments from The Family? My, aren't you "popular."

C: 演了这样一出戏，借我之手重获自由，又是为了从美梦中，窃取哪一种记忆？
E: After putting on such an elaborate show, using me to regain your freedom... Which kind of memories are you trying to steal from the sweet dream?

C: 最多一句话：<color=#dbc291ff>在你度过最美好的时光之后，就尽力飞向天空吧，你会在橡木的顶端听见虫鸣。</color>
E: Here's the short version: <color=#dbc291ff>After you've lived through the best of times, soar toward the sky with all your might. You'll hear insects chirping at the oak's crown.</color>

C: 结果，他们只能自取其辱。
E: In the end, they only brought shame upon themselves.

C: （指针转动的声效，沉重一些）滴答…滴答…滴答……
E: Tick tock... tick tock... tick tock...

C: 纳努克亲自示现，无限夫长因之陨落…此事震动寰宇，我早已知晓。又何必劳烦一位「主家」使者亲赴边陲？
E: The manifestation of Nanook and the fall of the Eternal Centurion... Such news has shaken the universe, and I've long since known about it. So why would a messenger of the Main Family take the trouble to visit this frontier?

C: 太好了。感激不尽，黑天鹅小姐。
E: Thank you so much, Black Swan.

C: 就算做蛋糕真的很麻烦，我也还是会去尝试，因为我喜欢把它送给重要的人们，看着他们微笑。
E: Even though baking cakes is really troublesome, I'll still keep trying, because I love giving them to people who matter to me and seeing those people smile.

C: 我们的愿望，就交到你手里了。请让它们迎来，今后每一天的日出。
E: Our hopes and dreams are in your hands now. Please guide them to witness every sunrise that is yet to come.

C: 米沙，「钟表匠」
E: Misha, Watchmaker

C: 命运不允许我给出回答。而真正的结局…太过悲伤，我更希望你忘记它。
E: Destiny won't let me give you the answer, and the true ending... is too sad. I'd rather you forget about it.

C: 不，哪怕是全无作为的神，至少也能让许多人寄托心灵，得到安慰。
E: No. Even a god who does nothing can at least give people something to believe in and find comfort in.

C: 抱歉，我不是故意想躲着你。
E: Sorry. I wasn't trying to avoid you.

C: 无论如何，谢谢。好像还没开始，我们先坐一会儿吧。
E: Either way, thank you. Looks like it hasn't started yet. Let's sit for a while.

C: 如果是唯一一次做梦，我希望…你能看到最好的我。
E: If this is my only chance to dream, then I want you... to see the best version of me.

C: 月光洒在你离去的路上。等到时机成熟时，你仍可升得更高。
E: Moonlight shines upon your path of departure. When the time is right, you can still rise higher.

C: 高背椅微妙的弧度能够完美地承托背部，暗示着它的主人有着良好品味，且不是一个能够忍受正襟危坐的人。
E: The subtle curve of the high-back chair perfectly supports the back, suggesting that its owner has impeccable taste, and is not one to tolerate improper behavior.

C: 这就是小敌专属的奇美拉，不仅打架很厉害，在悬锋古语方面也相当有造诣呢。
E: This is De's personal chimera. Not only is it fierce in combat, but it's also quite accomplished in the ancient Kremnos language.

C: 参赛选手快到齐，锦标赛就要开始了。小灰，下次见面，就是对手了哦！
E: The contestants are almost all here, and the tournament's about to begin. The next time we meet, we'll be rivals, Little Gray!

C: 鉴于你是初次参赛，我们特意安排了数场相对轻松的比赛，来帮助你熟悉对战规则，并确定你的初始等级。
E: Since this is your first time competing, we've specially arranged several relatively easy matches to help you get familiar with the battle rules and determine your initial rank.

E: Merciful Ferryman

E: Oneiric Memoir

E: Master Cat-Thief has rather powerful abilities. Gray Mystery, use them carefully.

E: Nightmare Overcome
